authors_text: Dandan Guo,Long Tian,He Zhao,Mingyuan Zhou,Hongyuan Zha
title: Adaptive Distribution Calibration for Few-Shot Learning with Hierarchical Optimal Transport
title_zh: 具有分层最优传输的少样本学习的自适应分布校准
abstract: Few-shot classification aims to learn a classifier to recognize unseen classes during training, where the learned model can easily become over-fitted based on the biased distribution formed by only a few training examples. A recent solution to this problem is calibrating the distribution of these few sample classes by transferring statistics from the base classes with sufficient examples, where how to decide the transfer weights from base classes to novel classes is the key. However, principled approaches for learning the transfer weights have not been carefully studied. To this end, we propose a novel distribution calibration method by learning the adaptive weight matrix between novel samples and base classes, which is built upon a hierarchical Optimal Transport (H-OT) framework. By minimizing the high-level OT distance between novel samples and base classes, we can view the learned transport plan as the adaptive weight information for transferring the statistics of base classes. The learning of the cost function between a base class and novel class in the high-level OT leads to the introduction of the low-level OT, which considers the weights of all the data samples in the base class. Experimental results on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed plug-and-play model outperforms competing approaches and owns desired cross-domain generalization ability, indicating the effectiveness of the learned adaptive weights.
summary: Few-shot classification aims to learn a classifier to recognize unseen classes during training, where the learned model can easily become over-fitted based on the biased distribution formed by only a few training examples. A recent solution to this problem is calibrating the distribution of these few sample classes by transferring statistics from the base classes with sufficient examples, where how to decide the transfer weights from base classes to novel classes is the key. However, principled approaches for learning the transfer weights have not been carefully studied. To this end, we propose a novel distribution calibration method by learning the adaptive weight matrix between novel samples and base classes, which is built upon a hierarchical Optimal Transport (H-OT) framework. By minimizing the high-level OT distance between novel samples and base classes, we can view the learned transport plan as the adaptive weight information for transferring the statistics of base classes. The learning of the cost function between a base class and novel class in the high-level OT leads to the introduction of the low-level OT, which considers the weights of all the data samples in the base class. Experimental results on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed plug-and-play model outperforms competing approaches and owns desired cross-domain generalization ability, indicating the effectiveness of the learned adaptive weights.
abstract_zh: 少样本分类旨在学习分类器在训练期间识别看不见的类，其中学习的模型很容易基于仅由少数训练示例形成的偏差分布而过度拟合。最近解决这个问题的方法是通过从具有足够示例的基类转移统计数据来校准这几个样本类的分布，其中如何确定从基类到新类的转移权重是关键。然而，学习转移权重的原则方法尚未得到仔细研究。为此，我们通过学习新样本和基类之间的自适应权重矩阵，提出了一种新颖的分布校准方法，该方法建立在分层最优传输（H-OT）框架之上。通过最小化新样本和基类之间的高级 OT 距离，我们可以将学习到的传输计划视为用于传输基类统计信息的自适应权重信息。高层OT中基类和新类之间成本函数的学习导致了低层OT的引入，低层OT考虑了基类中所有数据样本的权重。标准基准的实验结果表明，我们提出的即插即用模型优于竞争方法，并拥有所需的跨域泛化能力，表明所学习的自适应权重的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分层最优传输的自适应分布校准方法，用于解决少样本学习中的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 少样本学习中，模型易因少量样本导致的分布偏差而过拟合，现有方法缺乏对基类到新类转移权重的系统学习机制。
AI.method: 构建分层最优传输（H-OT）框架，通过高层OT最小化新类与基类的距离获取自适应权重矩阵，并引入低层OT考虑基类样本权重。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中，该方法在分类性能和跨域泛化能力上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 自适应权重学习机制有效缓解了少样本学习中的分布偏差问题，提升了模型泛化能力。

To this end, we propose a novel distribution calibration method by learning the adaptive weight matrix between novel samples and base classes, which is built upon a hierarchical Optimal Transport (H-OT) framework. By minimizing the high-level OT distance between novel samples and base classes, we can view the learned transport plan as the adaptive weight information for transferring the statistics of base classes. The learning of the cost function between a base class and novel class in the high-level OT leads to the introduction of the low-level OT, which considers the weights of all the data samples in the base class. Experimental results on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our proposed plug-and-play model outperforms competing approaches and owns desired cross-domain generalization ability, indicating the effectiveness of the learned adaptive weights. 少样本分类旨在学习分类器在训练期间识别看不见的类，其中学习的模型很容易基于仅由少数训练示例形成的偏差分布而过度拟合。最近解决这个问题的方法是通过从具有足够示例的基类转移统计数据来校准这几个样本类的分布，其中如何确定从基类到新类的转移权重是关键。然而，学习转移权重的原则方法尚未得到仔细研究。为此，我们通过学习新样本和基类之间的自适应权重矩阵，提出了一种新颖的分布校准方法，该方法建立在分层最优传输（H-OT）框架之上。通过最小化新样本和基类之间的高级 OT 距离，我们可以将学习到的传输计划视为用于传输基类统计信息的自适应权重信息。高层OT中基类和新类之间成本函数的学习导致了低层OT的引入，低层OT考虑了基类中所有数据样本的权重。标准基准的实验结果表明，我们提出的即插即用模型优于竞争方法，并拥有所需的跨域泛化能力，表明所学习的自适应权重的有效性。 本文提出了一种基于分层最优传输的自适应分布校准方法，用于解决少样本学习中的过拟合问题。 Dandan Guo,Long Tian,He Zhao,Mingyuan Zhou,Hongyuan Zha cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Kuan-Wei Huang,Geoff Chih-Fan Chen,Po-Wen Chang,Sheng-Chieh Lin,Chia-Jung Hsu,Vishal Thengane,Joshua Yao-Yu Lin
title: Strong Gravitational Lensing Parameter Estimation with Vision Transformer
title_zh: 使用 Vision Transformer 进行强引力透镜参数估计
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022 AI for Space Workshop
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022 AI for Space Workshop
abstract: Quantifying the parameters and corresponding uncertainties of hundreds of strongly lensed quasar systems holds the key to resolving one of the most important scientific questions: the Hubble constant ($H_{0}$) tension. The commonly used Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) method has been too time-consuming to achieve this goal, yet recent work has shown that convolution neural networks (CNNs) can be an alternative with seven orders of magnitude improvement in speed. With 31,200 simulated strongly lensed quasar images, we explore the usage of Vision Transformer (ViT) for simulated strong gravitational lensing for the first time. We show that ViT could reach competitive results compared with CNNs, and is specifically good at some lensing parameters, including the most important mass-related parameters such as the center of lens $θ_{1}$ and $θ_{2}$, the ellipticities $e_1$ and $e_2$, and the radial power-law slope $γ'$. With this promising preliminary result, we believe the ViT (or attention-based) network architecture can be an important tool for strong lensing science for the next generation of surveys. The open source of our code and data is in \url{https://github.com/kuanweih/strong_lensing_vit_resnet}.
summary: Quantifying the parameters and corresponding uncertainties of hundreds of strongly lensed quasar systems holds the key to resolving one of the most important scientific questions: the Hubble constant ($H_{0}$) tension. The commonly used Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) method has been too time-consuming to achieve this goal, yet recent work has shown that convolution neural networks (CNNs) can be an alternative with seven orders of magnitude improvement in speed. With 31,200 simulated strongly lensed quasar images, we explore the usage of Vision Transformer (ViT) for simulated strong gravitational lensing for the first time. We show that ViT could reach competitive results compared with CNNs, and is specifically good at some lensing parameters, including the most important mass-related parameters such as the center of lens $θ_{1}$ and $θ_{2}$, the ellipticities $e_1$ and $e_2$, and the radial power-law slope $γ'$. With this promising preliminary result, we believe the ViT (or attention-based) network architecture can be an important tool for strong lensing science for the next generation of surveys. The open source of our code and data is in \url{https://github.com/kuanweih/strong_lensing_vit_resnet}.
abstract_zh: 量化数百个强透镜类星体系统的参数和相应的不确定性是解决最重要的科学问题之一的关键：哈勃常数 ($H_{0}$) 张力。常用的马尔可夫链蒙特卡罗 (MCMC) 方法过于耗时，无法实现这一目标，但最近的工作表明，卷积神经网络 (CNN) 可以作为替代方案，将速度提高七个数量级。通过 31,200 张模拟的强透镜类星体图像，我们首次探索使用 Vision Transformer (ViT) 来模拟强引力透镜。我们表明，与 CNN 相比，ViT 可以达到有竞争力的结果，并且特别擅长某些透镜参数，包括最重要的质量相关参数，例如透镜中心 $θ_{1}$ 和 $θ_{2}$、椭圆度 $e_1$ 和 $e_2$ 以及径向幂律斜率 $γ'$。有了这个有希望的初步结果，我们相信 ViT（或基于注意力的）网络架构可以成为下一代调查的强大透镜科学的重要工具。我们的代码和数据开源在\url{https://github.com/kuanweih/strong_lensing_vit_resnet}。

AI.tldr: 本文首次探索使用视觉Transformer（ViT）进行强引力透镜模拟参数估计，以替代传统的MCMC方法。
AI.motivation: 传统MCMC方法计算强引力透镜参数耗时过长，而卷积神经网络（CNN）虽快但存在局限性，需寻找更高效的模型以解决哈勃常数（H₀）张力问题。
AI.method: 基于31,200个模拟的强引力透镜类星体图像，首次应用ViT模型进行参数估计，并与CNN结果对比。
AI.result: ViT在关键参数（如透镜中心坐标、椭圆率、径向幂律斜率）上表现优异，速度较MCMC提升7个数量级。
AI.conclusion: ViT（或基于注意力机制的网络）有望成为下一代天文调查中强透镜科学研究的重要工具。

authors_text: Ali Ayub,Carter Fendley
title: Few-Shot Continual Active Learning by a Robot
title_zh: 机器人的少样本持续主动学习
abstract: In this paper, we consider a challenging but realistic continual learning (CL) problem, Few-Shot Continual Active Learning (FoCAL), where a CL agent is provided with unlabeled data for a new or a previously learned task in each increment and the agent only has limited labeling budget available. Towards this, we build on the continual learning and active learning literature and develop a framework that can allow a CL agent to continually learn new object classes from a few labeled training examples. Our framework represents each object class using a uniform Gaussian mixture model (GMM) and uses pseudo-rehearsal to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. The framework also uses uncertainty measures on the Gaussian representations of the previously learned classes to find the most informative samples to be labeled in an increment. We evaluate our approach on the CORe-50 dataset and on a real humanoid robot for the object classification task. The results show that our approach not only produces state-of-the-art results on the dataset but also allows a real robot to continually learn unseen objects in a real environment with limited labeling supervision provided by its user.
summary: In this paper, we consider a challenging but realistic continual learning (CL) problem, Few-Shot Continual Active Learning (FoCAL), where a CL agent is provided with unlabeled data for a new or a previously learned task in each increment and the agent only has limited labeling budget available. Towards this, we build on the continual learning and active learning literature and develop a framework that can allow a CL agent to continually learn new object classes from a few labeled training examples. Our framework represents each object class using a uniform Gaussian mixture model (GMM) and uses pseudo-rehearsal to mitigate catastrophic forgetting. The framework also uses uncertainty measures on the Gaussian representations of the previously learned classes to find the most informative samples to be labeled in an increment. We evaluate our approach on the CORe-50 dataset and on a real humanoid robot for the object classification task. The results show that our approach not only produces state-of-the-art results on the dataset but also allows a real robot to continually learn unseen objects in a real environment with limited labeling supervision provided by its user.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑一个具有挑战性但现实的持续学习（CL）问题，即少样本持续主动学习（FoCAL），其中为CL代理提供每个增量中新任务或先前学习任务的未标记数据，并且代理只有有限的可用标记预算。为此，我们以持续学习和主动学习文献为基础，开发了一个框架，允许 CL 代理从一些标记的训练示例中不断学习新的对象类。我们的框架使用统一的高斯混合模型（GMM）来表示每个对象类别，并使用伪排练来减轻灾难性遗忘。该框架还对先前学习的类的高斯表示使用不确定性度量，以找到信息最丰富的样本以增量进行标记。我们在 CORe-50 数据集和用于对象分类任务的真实人形机器人上评估我们的方法。结果表明，我们的方法不仅在数据集上产生了最先进的结果，而且还允许真正的机器人在用户提供的有限标签监督下不断学习真实环境中看不见的物体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FoCAL的少样本持续主动学习框架，使机器人能够在有限的标注预算下持续学习新对象类别。
AI.motivation: 在持续学习任务中，机器人通常面临新任务的未标记数据和有限的标注预算，因此需要一种高效的方法来持续学习新对象类别并避免灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 该框架使用均匀高斯混合模型（GMM）表示每个对象类别，并通过伪重放策略减轻灾难性遗忘。同时，利用高斯表示中的不确定性度量，选择最具有信息量的样本进行标注。
AI.result: 该方法在CORe-50数据集和真实人形机器人上的实验结果表明，其不仅在数据集上取得了最先进的性能，还允许机器人在真实环境中以有限的标注监督持续学习新对象。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的FoCAL框架在持续学习和主动学习领域具有重要意义，为机器人在真实环境中持续学习提供了有效的方法。

authors_text: Shraman Pramanick,Li Jing,Sayan Nag,Jiachen Zhu,Hardik Shah,Yann LeCun,Rama Chellappa
title: VoLTA: Vision-Language Transformer with Weakly-Supervised Local-Feature Alignment
title_zh: VoLTA：具有弱监督局部特征对齐的视觉语言转换器
abstract: Vision-language pre-training (VLP) has recently proven highly effective for various uni- and multi-modal downstream applications. However, most existing end-to-end VLP methods use high-resolution image-text box data to perform well on fine-grained region-level tasks, such as object detection, segmentation, and referring expression comprehension. Unfortunately, such high-resolution images with accurate bounding box annotations are expensive to collect and use for supervision at scale. In this work, we propose VoLTA (Vision-Language Transformer with weakly-supervised local-feature Alignment), a new VLP paradigm that only utilizes image-caption data but achieves fine-grained region-level image understanding, eliminating the use of expensive box annotations. VoLTA adopts graph optimal transport-based weakly-supervised alignment on local image patches and text tokens to germinate an explicit, self-normalized, and interpretable low-level matching criterion. In addition, VoLTA pushes multi-modal fusion deep into the uni-modal backbones during pre-training and removes fusion-specific transformer layers, further reducing memory requirements. Extensive experiments on a wide range of vision- and vision-language downstream tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of VoLTA on fine-grained applications without compromising the coarse-grained downstream performance, often outperforming methods using significantly more caption and box annotations.
summary: Vision-language pre-training (VLP) has recently proven highly effective for various uni- and multi-modal downstream applications. However, most existing end-to-end VLP methods use high-resolution image-text box data to perform well on fine-grained region-level tasks, such as object detection, segmentation, and referring expression comprehension. Unfortunately, such high-resolution images with accurate bounding box annotations are expensive to collect and use for supervision at scale. In this work, we propose VoLTA (Vision-Language Transformer with weakly-supervised local-feature Alignment), a new VLP paradigm that only utilizes image-caption data but achieves fine-grained region-level image understanding, eliminating the use of expensive box annotations. VoLTA adopts graph optimal transport-based weakly-supervised alignment on local image patches and text tokens to germinate an explicit, self-normalized, and interpretable low-level matching criterion. In addition, VoLTA pushes multi-modal fusion deep into the uni-modal backbones during pre-training and removes fusion-specific transformer layers, further reducing memory requirements. Extensive experiments on a wide range of vision- and vision-language downstream tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of VoLTA on fine-grained applications without compromising the coarse-grained downstream performance, often outperforming methods using significantly more caption and box annotations.
abstract_zh: 最近证明，视觉语言预训练（VLP）对于各种单模态和多模态下游应用非常有效。然而，大多数现有的端到端 VLP 方法使用高分辨率图像文本框数据，在细粒度区域级任务上表现良好，例如对象检测、分割和引用表达理解。不幸的是，这种具有准确边界框注释的高分辨率图像的收集和大规模监督的成本很高。在这项工作中，我们提出了 VoLTA（具有弱监督局部特征对齐的视觉语言转换器），这是一种新的 VLP 范例，它仅利用图像标题数据，但实现了细粒度的区域级图像理解，从而消除了昂贵的框注释的使用。 VoLTA 在本地图像块和文本标记上采用基于图最优传输的弱监督对齐，以产生明确的、自归一化的、可解释的低级匹配标准。此外，VoLTA 在预训练期间将多模态融合深入到单模态主干中，并删除了特定于融合的变压器层，进一步降低了内存需求。对各种视觉和视觉语言下游任务的广泛实验证明了 VoLTA 在细粒度应用程序上的有效性，而不会影响粗粒度下游性能，通常优于使用更多标题和框注释的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无需高分辨率图像框标注的视觉-语言预训练方法VoLTA，实现细粒度图像理解。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言预训练方法依赖昂贵的高分辨率图像框标注数据，限制了细粒度任务的广泛应用。
AI.method: 基于图最优传输的弱监督局部特征对齐，结合多模态融合深度化设计，消除专用Transformer层。
AI.result: 在多种视觉及视觉-语言任务中均表现优异，细粒度任务性能超越使用更多标注数据的方法。
AI.conclusion: VoLTA通过弱监督机制有效实现细粒度理解，在减少标注依赖的同时保持整体性能优势。

search_text: VoLTA: Vision-Language Transformer with Weakly-Supervised Local-Feature Alignment VoLTA：具有弱监督局部特征对齐的视觉语言转换器 Vision-language pre-training (VLP) has recently proven highly effective for various uni- and multi-modal downstream applications. However, most existing end-to-end VLP methods use high-resolution image-text box data to perform well on fine-grained region-level tasks, such as object detection, segmentation, and referring expression comprehension. Unfortunately, such high-resolution images with accurate bounding box annotations are expensive to collect and use for supervision at scale. In this work, we propose VoLTA (Vision-Language Transformer with weakly-supervised local-feature Alignment), a new VLP paradigm that only utilizes image-caption data but achieves fine-grained region-level image understanding, eliminating the use of expensive box annotations. VoLTA adopts graph optimal transport-based weakly-supervised alignment on local image patches and text tokens to germinate an explicit, self-normalized, and interpretable low-level matching criterion. In addition, VoLTA pushes multi-modal fusion deep into the uni-modal backbones during pre-training and removes fusion-specific transformer layers, further reducing memory requirements. Extensive experiments on a wide range of vision- and vision-language downstream tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of VoLTA on fine-grained applications without compromising the coarse-grained downstream performance, often outperforming methods using significantly more caption and box annotations. 最近证明，视觉语言预训练（VLP）对于各种单模态和多模态下游应用非常有效。然而，大多数现有的端到端 VLP 方法使用高分辨率图像文本框数据，在细粒度区域级任务上表现良好，例如对象检测、分割和引用表达理解。不幸的是，这种具有准确边界框注释的高分辨率图像的收集和大规模监督的成本很高。在这项工作中，我们提出了 VoLTA（具有弱监督局部特征对齐的视觉语言转换器），这是一种新的 VLP 范例，它仅利用图像标题数据，但实现了细粒度的区域级图像理解，从而消除了昂贵的框注释的使用。 VoLTA 在本地图像块和文本标记上采用基于图最优传输的弱监督对齐，以产生明确的、自归一化的、可解释的低级匹配标准。此外，VoLTA 在预训练期间将多模态融合深入到单模态主干中，并删除了特定于融合的变压器层，进一步降低了内存需求。对各种视觉和视觉语言下游任务的广泛实验证明了 VoLTA 在细粒度应用程序上的有效性，而不会影响粗粒度下游性能，通常优于使用更多标题和框注释的方法。 提出一种无需高分辨率图像框标注的视觉-语言预训练方法VoLTA，实现细粒度图像理解。 Shraman Pramanick,Li Jing,Sayan Nag,Jiachen Zhu,Hardik Shah,Yann LeCun,Rama Chellappa cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.MM

authors_text: Pierre Chambon,Christian Bluethgen,Curtis P. Langlotz,Akshay Chaudhari
title: Adapting Pretrained Vision-Language Foundational Models to Medical Imaging Domains
title_zh: 将预训练的视觉语言基础模型应用于医学成像领域
abstract: Multi-modal foundation models are typically trained on millions of pairs of natural images and text captions, frequently obtained through web-crawling approaches. Although such models depict excellent generative capabilities, they do not typically generalize well to specific domains such as medical images that have fundamentally shifted distributions compared to natural images. Building generative models for medical images that faithfully depict clinical context may help alleviate the paucity of healthcare datasets. Thus, in this study, we seek to research and expand the representational capabilities of large pretrained foundation models to medical concepts, specifically for leveraging the Stable Diffusion model to generate domain specific images found in medical imaging. We explore the sub-components of the Stable Diffusion pipeline (the variational autoencoder, the U-Net and the text-encoder) to fine-tune the model to generate medical images. We benchmark the efficacy of these efforts using quantitative image quality metrics and qualitative radiologist-driven evaluations that accurately represent the clinical content of conditional text prompts. Our best-performing model improves upon the stable diffusion baseline and can be conditioned to insert a realistic-looking abnormality on a synthetic radiology image, while maintaining a 95% accuracy on a classifier trained to detect the abnormality.
summary: Multi-modal foundation models are typically trained on millions of pairs of natural images and text captions, frequently obtained through web-crawling approaches. Although such models depict excellent generative capabilities, they do not typically generalize well to specific domains such as medical images that have fundamentally shifted distributions compared to natural images. Building generative models for medical images that faithfully depict clinical context may help alleviate the paucity of healthcare datasets. Thus, in this study, we seek to research and expand the representational capabilities of large pretrained foundation models to medical concepts, specifically for leveraging the Stable Diffusion model to generate domain specific images found in medical imaging. We explore the sub-components of the Stable Diffusion pipeline (the variational autoencoder, the U-Net and the text-encoder) to fine-tune the model to generate medical images. We benchmark the efficacy of these efforts using quantitative image quality metrics and qualitative radiologist-driven evaluations that accurately represent the clinical content of conditional text prompts. Our best-performing model improves upon the stable diffusion baseline and can be conditioned to insert a realistic-looking abnormality on a synthetic radiology image, while maintaining a 95% accuracy on a classifier trained to detect the abnormality.
abstract_zh: 多模态基础模型通常在数百万对自然图像和文本标题上进行训练，这些图像和文本标题通常通过网络爬行方法获得。尽管此类模型描绘了出色的生成能力，但它们通常不能很好地推广到特定领域，例如与自然图像相比，医学图像的分布发生了根本性的变化。为忠实描述临床背景的医学图像构建生成模型可能有助于缓解医疗数据集的匮乏。因此，在本研究中，我们寻求研究并将大型预训练基础模型的表示能力扩展到医学概念，特别是利用稳定扩散模型来生成医学成像中发现的特定领域图像。我们探索稳定扩散管道的子组件（变分自动编码器、U-Net 和文本编码器）来微调模型以生成医学图像。我们使用定量图像质量指标和定性放射科医生驱动的评估来对这些工作的有效性进行基准测试，这些评估准确地代表了条件文本提示的临床内容。我们性能最佳的模型在稳定扩散基线的基础上进行了改进，并且可以调节以在合成放射学图像上插入看起来逼真的异常，同时在经过训练以检测异常的分类器上保持 95% 的准确度。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在将预训练的视觉-语言基础模型适应到医学影像领域，利用Stable Diffusion模型生成符合临床需求的医学图像。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练模型难以适应医学影像领域，而生成高质量医学图像有助于缓解医疗数据不足问题并提升临床实用性。
AI.method: 对Stable Diffusion模型的变分自编码器、U-Net和文本编码器组件进行微调，并通过定量指标与放射科医生定性评估验证效果。
AI.result: 最佳模型在生成带真实异常的医学图像时优于基线模型，且在异常检测分类任务中保持95%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 微调方法有效提升了模型在医学影像领域的表现，为生成高质量临床图像提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yeji Song,Chaerin Kong,Seoyoung Lee,Nojun Kwak,Joonseok Lee
title: Towards Efficient Neural Scene Graphs by Learning Consistency Fields
title_zh: 通过学习一致性场实现高效的神经场景图
abstract: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieves photo-realistic image rendering from novel views, and the Neural Scene Graphs (NSG) \cite{ost2021neural} extends it to dynamic scenes (video) with multiple objects. Nevertheless, computationally heavy ray marching for every image frame becomes a huge burden. In this paper, taking advantage of significant redundancy across adjacent frames in videos, we propose a feature-reusing framework. From the first try of naively reusing the NSG features, however, we learn that it is crucial to disentangle object-intrinsic properties consistent across frames from transient ones. Our proposed method, \textit{Consistency-Field-based NSG (CF-NSG)}, reformulates neural radiance fields to additionally consider \textit{consistency fields}. With disentangled representations, CF-NSG takes full advantage of the feature-reusing scheme and performs an extended degree of scene manipulation in a more controllable manner. We empirically verify that CF-NSG greatly improves the inference efficiency by using 85\% less queries than NSG without notable degradation in rendering quality. Code will be available at: https://github.com/ldynx/CF-NSG
summary: Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieves photo-realistic image rendering from novel views, and the Neural Scene Graphs (NSG) \cite{ost2021neural} extends it to dynamic scenes (video) with multiple objects. Nevertheless, computationally heavy ray marching for every image frame becomes a huge burden. In this paper, taking advantage of significant redundancy across adjacent frames in videos, we propose a feature-reusing framework. From the first try of naively reusing the NSG features, however, we learn that it is crucial to disentangle object-intrinsic properties consistent across frames from transient ones. Our proposed method, \textit{Consistency-Field-based NSG (CF-NSG)}, reformulates neural radiance fields to additionally consider \textit{consistency fields}. With disentangled representations, CF-NSG takes full advantage of the feature-reusing scheme and performs an extended degree of scene manipulation in a more controllable manner. We empirically verify that CF-NSG greatly improves the inference efficiency by using 85\% less queries than NSG without notable degradation in rendering quality. Code will be available at: https://github.com/ldynx/CF-NSG
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 从新颖的视图中实现逼真的图像渲染，而神经场景图 (NSG) \cite{ost2021neural} 将其扩展到具有多个对象的动态场景（视频）。然而，每个图像帧的计算量大的光线行进变成了巨大的负担。在本文中，利用视频中相邻帧之间的显着冗余，我们提出了一种特征重用框架。然而，从第一次天真地重用 NSG 特征的尝试中，我们了解到，将跨帧一致的对象固有属性与瞬态属性区分开来至关重要。我们提出的方法 \textit{基于一致性场的 NSG (CF-NSG)} 重新表述了神经辐射场以另外考虑 \textit{一致性场}。通过解开表示，CF-NSG 充分利用特征重用方案，并以更可控的方式执行扩展程度的场景操作。我们凭经验验证，CF-NSG 通过使用比 NSG 少 85% 的查询极大地提高了推理效率，且渲染质量没有显着下降。代码位于：https://github.com/ldynx/CF-NSG

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于一致性场的神经场景图（CF-NSG）方法，通过学习动态场景中跨帧的物体内在一致性属性，提升神经场景图的推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有神经场景图（NSG）方法在处理动态视频时需对每一帧进行计算量巨大的光线追踪，导致效率低下，亟需优化。
AI.method: 通过分离物体跨帧的内在一致性属性与瞬时变化属性，提出一致性场（Consistency Field）并结合特征复用框架，减少冗余计算。
AI.result: 实验表明，CF-NSG相比原始NSG减少了85%的查询次数，在保持渲染质量的前提下显著提升了推理效率。
AI.conclusion: CF-NSG通过解耦一致性属性与瞬时变化属性，有效降低了动态场景建模的计算负担，为高效可控的神经场景图提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于一致性场的神经场景图（CF-NSG）方法，通过学习动态场景中跨帧的物体内在一致性属性，提升神经场景图的推理效率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有神经场景图（NSG）方法在处理动态视频时需对每一帧进行计算量巨大的光线追踪，导致效率低下，亟需优化。

search_text: Towards Efficient Neural Scene Graphs by Learning Consistency Fields 通过学习一致性场实现高效的神经场景图 Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) achieves photo-realistic image rendering from novel views, and the Neural Scene Graphs (NSG) \cite{ost2021neural} extends it to dynamic scenes (video) with multiple objects. Nevertheless, computationally heavy ray marching for every image frame becomes a huge burden. In this paper, taking advantage of significant redundancy across adjacent frames in videos, we propose a feature-reusing framework. From the first try of naively reusing the NSG features, however, we learn that it is crucial to disentangle object-intrinsic properties consistent across frames from transient ones. Our proposed method, \textit{Consistency-Field-based NSG (CF-NSG)}, reformulates neural radiance fields to additionally consider \textit{consistency fields}. With disentangled representations, CF-NSG takes full advantage of the feature-reusing scheme and performs an extended degree of scene manipulation in a more controllable manner. We empirically verify that CF-NSG greatly improves the inference efficiency by using 85\% less queries than NSG without notable degradation in rendering quality. Code will be available at: https://github.com/ldynx/CF-NSG 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 从新颖的视图中实现逼真的图像渲染，而神经场景图 (NSG) \cite{ost2021neural} 将其扩展到具有多个对象的动态场景（视频）。然而，每个图像帧的计算量大的光线行进变成了巨大的负担。在本文中，利用视频中相邻帧之间的显着冗余，我们提出了一种特征重用框架。然而，从第一次天真地重用 NSG 特征的尝试中，我们了解到，将跨帧一致的对象固有属性与瞬态属性区分开来至关重要。我们提出的方法 \textit{基于一致性场的 NSG (CF-NSG)} 重新表述了神经辐射场以另外考虑 \textit{一致性场}。通过解开表示，CF-NSG 充分利用特征重用方案，并以更可控的方式执行扩展程度的场景操作。我们凭经验验证，CF-NSG 通过使用比 NSG 少 85% 的查询极大地提高了推理效率，且渲染质量没有显着下降。代码位于：https://github.com/ldynx/CF-NSG 本文提出了一种基于一致性场的神经场景图（CF-NSG）方法，通过学习动态场景中跨帧的物体内在一致性属性，提升神经场景图的推理效率。 Yeji Song,Chaerin Kong,Seoyoung Lee,Nojun Kwak,Joonseok Lee cs.CV

authors_text: Ruizhong Qiu,Zhiqing Sun,Yiming Yang
title: DIMES: A Differentiable Meta Solver for Combinatorial Optimization Problems
title_zh: DIMES：组合优化问题的可微分元求解器
abstract: Recently, deep reinforcement learning (DRL) models have shown promising results in solving NP-hard Combinatorial Optimization (CO) problems. However, most DRL solvers can only scale to a few hundreds of nodes for combinatorial optimization problems on graphs, such as the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP). This paper addresses the scalability challenge in large-scale combinatorial optimization by proposing a novel approach, namely, DIMES. Unlike previous DRL methods which suffer from costly autoregressive decoding or iterative refinements of discrete solutions, DIMES introduces a compact continuous space for parameterizing the underlying distribution of candidate solutions. Such a continuous space allows stable REINFORCE-based training and fine-tuning via massively parallel sampling. We further propose a meta-learning framework to enable the effective initialization of model parameters in the fine-tuning stage. Extensive experiments show that DIMES outperforms recent DRL-based methods on large benchmark datasets for Traveling Salesman Problems and Maximal Independent Set problems.
summary: Recently, deep reinforcement learning (DRL) models have shown promising results in solving NP-hard Combinatorial Optimization (CO) problems. However, most DRL solvers can only scale to a few hundreds of nodes for combinatorial optimization problems on graphs, such as the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP). This paper addresses the scalability challenge in large-scale combinatorial optimization by proposing a novel approach, namely, DIMES. Unlike previous DRL methods which suffer from costly autoregressive decoding or iterative refinements of discrete solutions, DIMES introduces a compact continuous space for parameterizing the underlying distribution of candidate solutions. Such a continuous space allows stable REINFORCE-based training and fine-tuning via massively parallel sampling. We further propose a meta-learning framework to enable the effective initialization of model parameters in the fine-tuning stage. Extensive experiments show that DIMES outperforms recent DRL-based methods on large benchmark datasets for Traveling Salesman Problems and Maximal Independent Set problems.
abstract_zh: 最近，深度强化学习（DRL）模型在解决 NP 难组合优化（CO）问题方面显示出了有希望的结果。然而，大多数 DRL 求解器只能扩展到几百个节点，以解决图上的组合优化问题，例如旅行商问题 (TSP)。本文通过提出一种新方法（即 DIMES）来解决大规模组合优化中的可扩展性挑战。与之前的 DRL 方法不同，DIMES 引入了一个紧凑的连续空间来参数化候选解决方案的底层分布，该方法需要进行昂贵的自回归解码或离散解决方案的迭代细化。这样的连续空间允许通过大规模并行采样进行稳定的基于增强的训练和微调。我们进一步提出了一个元学习框架，以实现在微调阶段模型参数的有效初始化。大量实验表明，DIMES 在旅行商问题和最大独立集问题的大型基准数据集上优于最近基于 DRL 的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DIMES方法，通过可微分元学习框架解决大规模组合优化问题的可扩展性挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有深度强化学习方法在处理大规模图问题（如TSP）时存在解码成本高、迭代次数多等可扩展性瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建连续空间参数化候选解分布，采用REINFORCE训练与并行采样，并结合元学习框架实现参数初始化。
AI.result: 在TSP和最大独立集问题的基准数据集上，DIMES性能优于最新DRL方法。
AI.conclusion: DIMES通过连续空间建模和元学习有效提升了组合优化问题的求解效率与可扩展性。

authors_text: Ardavan S. Nobandegani,Thomas R. Shultz,Irina Rish
title: Cognitive Models as Simulators: The Case of Moral Decision-Making
title_zh: 作为模拟器的认知模型：道德决策的案例
abstract: To achieve desirable performance, current AI systems often require huge amounts of training data. This is especially problematic in domains where collecting data is both expensive and time-consuming, e.g., where AI systems require having numerous interactions with humans, collecting feedback from them. In this work, we substantiate the idea of $\textit{cognitive models as simulators}$, which is to have AI systems interact with, and collect feedback from, cognitive models instead of humans, thereby making their training process both less costly and faster. Here, we leverage this idea in the context of moral decision-making, by having reinforcement learning (RL) agents learn about fairness through interacting with a cognitive model of the Ultimatum Game (UG), a canonical task in behavioral and brain sciences for studying fairness. Interestingly, these RL agents learn to rationally adapt their behavior depending on the emotional state of their simulated UG responder. Our work suggests that using cognitive models as simulators of humans is an effective approach for training AI systems, presenting an important way for computational cognitive science to make contributions to AI.
summary: To achieve desirable performance, current AI systems often require huge amounts of training data. This is especially problematic in domains where collecting data is both expensive and time-consuming, e.g., where AI systems require having numerous interactions with humans, collecting feedback from them. In this work, we substantiate the idea of $\textit{cognitive models as simulators}$, which is to have AI systems interact with, and collect feedback from, cognitive models instead of humans, thereby making their training process both less costly and faster. Here, we leverage this idea in the context of moral decision-making, by having reinforcement learning (RL) agents learn about fairness through interacting with a cognitive model of the Ultimatum Game (UG), a canonical task in behavioral and brain sciences for studying fairness. Interestingly, these RL agents learn to rationally adapt their behavior depending on the emotional state of their simulated UG responder. Our work suggests that using cognitive models as simulators of humans is an effective approach for training AI systems, presenting an important way for computational cognitive science to make contributions to AI.
abstract_zh: 为了获得理想的性能，当前的人工智能系统通常需要大量的训练数据。这在收集数据既昂贵又耗时的领域尤其成问题，例如，人工智能系统需要与人类进行大量交互，收集他们的反馈。在这项工作中，我们证实了 $\textit{认知模型作为模拟器}$ 的想法，即让人工智能系统代替人类与认知模型交互并收集反馈，从而使他们的训练过程成本更低、速度更快。在这里，我们在道德决策的背景下利用这一想法，让强化学习（RL）代理通过与最后通牒博弈（UG）的认知模型交互来了解公平性，最后通牒博弈是行为和脑科学中研究公平的典型任务。有趣的是，这些 RL 智能体学会根据模拟 UG 响应者的情绪状态合理地调整自己的行为。我们的工作表明，使用认知模型作为人类模拟器是训练人工智能系统的有效方法，为计算认知科学为人工智能做出贡献提供了重要途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将认知模型作为模拟器用于训练AI系统，通过模拟人类道德决策过程（如乌尔姆博弈）降低训练成本。
AI.motivation: 传统AI训练依赖大量昂贵的人类交互数据，尤其在涉及道德决策等复杂领域时效率低下。
AI.method: 利用强化学习代理与乌尔姆博弈的认知模型交互，模拟人类对公平性的反馈以训练AI行为决策。
AI.result: RL代理能根据模拟的乌尔姆博弈响应者情绪状态动态调整策略，验证了认知模型模拟的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 认知模型作为人类行为模拟器可显著提升AI训练效率，为计算认知科学与AI的交叉研究提供新路径。

authors_text: Viraj Shah,Ayush Sarkar,Sudharsan Krishnakumar Anitha,Svetlana Lazebnik
title: MultiStyleGAN: Multiple One-shot Image Stylizations using a Single GAN
title_zh: MultiStyleGAN：使用单个 GAN 进行多个一次性图像风格化
abstract: Image stylization aims at applying a reference style to arbitrary input images. A common scenario is one-shot stylization, where only one example is available for each reference style. Recent approaches for one-shot stylization such as JoJoGAN fine-tune a pre-trained StyleGAN2 generator on a single style reference image. However, such methods cannot generate multiple stylizations without fine-tuning a new model for each style separately. In this work, we present a MultiStyleGAN method that is capable of producing multiple different stylizations at once by fine-tuning a single generator. The key component of our method is a learnable transformation module called Style Transformation Network. It takes latent codes as input, and learns linear mappings to different regions of the latent space to produce distinct codes for each style, resulting in a multistyle space. Our model inherently mitigates overfitting since it is trained on multiple styles, hence improving the quality of stylizations. Our method can learn upwards of $120$ image stylizations at once, bringing $8\times$ to $60\times$ improvement in training time over recent competing methods. We support our results through user studies and quantitative results that indicate meaningful improvements over existing methods.

Recent approaches for one-shot stylization such as JoJoGAN fine-tune a pre-trained StyleGAN2 generator on a single style reference image. However, such methods cannot generate multiple stylizations without fine-tuning a new model for each style separately. In this work, we present a MultiStyleGAN method that is capable of producing multiple different stylizations at once by fine-tuning a single generator. The key component of our method is a learnable transformation module called Style Transformation Network. It takes latent codes as input, and learns linear mappings to different regions of the latent space to produce distinct codes for each style, resulting in a multistyle space. Our model inherently mitigates overfitting since it is trained on multiple styles, hence improving the quality of stylizations. Our method can learn upwards of $120$ image stylizations at once, bringing $8\times$ to $60\times$ improvement in training time over recent competing methods. We support our results through user studies and quantitative results that indicate meaningful improvements over existing methods.
abstract_zh: 图像风格化旨在将参考风格应用于任意输入图像。一种常见的场景是一次性风格化，其中每种参考样式只有一个示例可用。最近的一次性风格化方法（例如 JoJoGAN）在单一风格参考图像上微调预训练的 StyleGAN2 生成器。然而，如果不分别为每种风格微调新模型，此类方法就无法生成多种风格化。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种 MultiStyleGAN 方法，该方法能够通过微调单个生成器同时生成多种不同的风格化。我们方法的关键组成部分是一个可学习的转换模块，称为风格转换网络。它将潜在代码作为输入，并学习到潜在空间不同区域的线性映射，为每种风格生成不同的代码，从而产生多风格空间。我们的模型本质上减轻了过度拟合，因为它接受了多种风格的训练，从而提高了风格化的质量。我们的方法可以一次学习超过 120 美元的图像风格化，与最近的竞争方法相比，训练时间缩短了 8 倍到 60 倍。我们通过用户研究和定量结果来支持我们的结果，这些结果表明对现有方法进行了有意义的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MultiStyleGAN方法，通过单个生成对抗网络（GAN）实现多种一次性图像风格化。
AI.motivation: 现有方法如JoJoGAN需为每个风格单独微调模型，无法高效生成多风格结果，且训练效率低。
AI.method: 设计可学习的Style Transformation Network模块，通过线性映射将潜在空间划分为多区域，实现单次微调生成多风格。
AI.result: 支持同时学习120种风格化，训练时间较现有方法提升8倍至60倍，用户研究和定量结果验证了效果提升。
AI.conclusion: MultiStyleGAN通过统一模型处理多风格，显著提升训练效率与风格化质量，为一次性图像风格化提供新思路。

authors_text: Honglei Zhang,Francesco Cricri,Hamed Rezazadegan Tavakoli,Emre Aksu,Miska M. Hannuksela
title: Leveraging progressive model and overfitting for efficient learned image compression
title_zh: 利用渐进模型和过度拟合来实现高效的学习图像压缩
abstract: Deep learning is overwhelmingly dominant in the field of computer vision and image/video processing for the last decade. However, for image and video compression, it lags behind the traditional techniques based on discrete cosine transform (DCT) and linear filters. Built on top of an autoencoder architecture, learned image compression (LIC) systems have drawn enormous attention in recent years. Nevertheless, the proposed LIC systems are still inferior to the state-of-the-art traditional techniques, for example, the Versatile Video Coding (VVC/H.266) standard, due to either their compression performance or decoding complexity. Although claimed to outperform the VVC/H.266 on a limited bit rate range, some proposed LIC systems take over 40 seconds to decode a 2K image on a GPU system. In this paper, we introduce a powerful and flexible LIC framework with multi-scale progressive (MSP) probability model and latent representation overfitting (LOF) technique. With different predefined profiles, the proposed framework can achieve various balance points between compression efficiency and computational complexity. Experiments show that the proposed framework achieves 2.5%, 1.0%, and 1.3% Bjontegaard delta bit rate (BD-rate) reduction over the VVC/H.266 standard on three benchmark datasets on a wide bit rate range. More importantly, the decoding complexity is reduced from O(n) to O(1) compared to many other LIC systems, resulting in over 20 times speedup when decoding 2K images.
summary: Deep learning is overwhelmingly dominant in the field of computer vision and image/video processing for the last decade. However, for image and video compression, it lags behind the traditional techniques based on discrete cosine transform (DCT) and linear filters. Built on top of an autoencoder architecture, learned image compression (LIC) systems have drawn enormous attention in recent years. Nevertheless, the proposed LIC systems are still inferior to the state-of-the-art traditional techniques, for example, the Versatile Video Coding (VVC/H.266) standard, due to either their compression performance or decoding complexity. Although claimed to outperform the VVC/H.266 on a limited bit rate range, some proposed LIC systems take over 40 seconds to decode a 2K image on a GPU system. In this paper, we introduce a powerful and flexible LIC framework with multi-scale progressive (MSP) probability model and latent representation overfitting (LOF) technique. With different predefined profiles, the proposed framework can achieve various balance points between compression efficiency and computational complexity. Experiments show that the proposed framework achieves 2.5%, 1.0%, and 1.3% Bjontegaard delta bit rate (BD-rate) reduction over the VVC/H.266 standard on three benchmark datasets on a wide bit rate range. More importantly, the decoding complexity is reduced from O(n) to O(1) compared to many other LIC systems, resulting in over 20 times speedup when decoding 2K images.
abstract_zh: 过去十年来，深度学习在计算机视觉和图像/视频处理领域占据压倒性主导地位。然而，对于图像和视频压缩，它落后于基于离散余弦变换（DCT）和线性滤波器的传统技术。建立在自动编码器架构之上的学习图像压缩（LIC）系统近年来引起了极大的关注。然而，由于其压缩性能或解码复杂性，所提出的 LIC 系统仍然不如最先进的传统技术，例如通用视频编码（VVC/H.266）标准。尽管声称在有限的比特率范围内优于 VVC/H.266，但一些提议的 LIC 系统需要 40 秒以上才能在 GPU 系统上解码 2K 图像。在本文中，我们介绍了一个强大而灵活的 LIC 框架，具有多尺度渐进（MSP）概率模型和潜在表示过拟合（LOF）技术。通过不同的预定义配置文件，所提出的框架可以在压缩效率和计算复杂度之间实现各种平衡点。实验表明，所提出的框架在较宽的比特率范围内的三个基准数据集上，比 VVC/H.266 标准实现了 2.5%、1.0% 和 1.3% 的 Bjontegaard 增量比特率 (BD-rate) 降低。更重要的是，与许多其他 LIC 系统相比，解码复杂度从 O(n) 降低到 O(1)，从而在解码 2K 图像时加速超过 20 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合多尺度渐进概率模型和潜在表示过拟合技术的高效学习图像压缩框架。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的图像压缩系统在压缩效率和解码速度上均不如传统方法（如VVC/H.266），尤其在高分辨率图像解码时存在显著延迟。
AI.method: 设计了多尺度渐进（MSP）概率模型与潜在表示过拟合（LOF）技术，通过预定义配置平衡压缩效率与计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实现比VVC/H.266标准低2.5%、1.0%和1.3%的BD-rate，解码复杂度从O(n)降至O(1)，2K图像解码速度提升20倍。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保持压缩性能优势的同时，显著降低了计算复杂度，为高效图像压缩提供了新方向。

authors_text: Juan Yepes,Daniel Raviv
title: Visual Looming from Motion Field and Surface Normals
title_zh: 运动场和表面法线的视觉效果
abstract: Looming, traditionally defined as the relative expansion of objects in the observer's retina, is a fundamental visual cue for perception of threat and can be used to accomplish collision free navigation. In this paper we derive novel solutions for obtaining visual looming quantitatively from the 2D motion field resulting from a six-degree-of-freedom motion of an observer relative to a local surface in 3D. We also show the relationship between visual looming and surface normals. We present novel methods to estimate visual looming from spatial derivatives of optical flow without the need for knowing range. Simulation results show that estimations of looming are very close to ground truth looming under some assumptions of surface orientations. In addition, we present results of visual looming using real data from the KITTI dataset. Advantages and limitations of the methods are discussed as well.
summary: Looming, traditionally defined as the relative expansion of objects in the observer's retina, is a fundamental visual cue for perception of threat and can be used to accomplish collision free navigation. In this paper we derive novel solutions for obtaining visual looming quantitatively from the 2D motion field resulting from a six-degree-of-freedom motion of an observer relative to a local surface in 3D. We also show the relationship between visual looming and surface normals. We present novel methods to estimate visual looming from spatial derivatives of optical flow without the need for knowing range. Simulation results show that estimations of looming are very close to ground truth looming under some assumptions of surface orientations. In addition, we present results of visual looming using real data from the KITTI dataset. Advantages and limitations of the methods are discussed as well.
abstract_zh: 隐现，传统上定义为观察者视网膜中物体的相对扩张，是感知威胁的基本视觉线索，可用于实现无碰撞导航。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的解决方案，用于从观察者相对于 3D 局部表面的六自由度运动产生的 2D 运动场中定量获得视觉隐现。我们还展示了视觉隐现和表面法线之间的关系。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以根据光流的空间导数来估计视觉隐现，而无需知道范围。仿真结果表明，在某些表面方向假设下，隐现的估计非常接近地面实况隐现。此外，我们还使用 KITTI 数据集中的真实数据展示了视觉隐现的结果。还讨论了这些方法的优点和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从二维运动场和表面法线中定量计算视觉looming的新方法，用于实现无碰撞导航。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉looming作为感知威胁和导航的关键线索，需依赖距离信息，而实际应用中距离信息获取困难，需新方法。
AI.method: 通过六自由度运动产生的二维运动场推导looming公式，结合表面法线并利用光流空间导数进行估计，无需距离信息。
AI.result: 仿真及KITTI数据集验证显示，估计looming值与真实值接近，方法在特定表面方向假设下有效，但存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无碰撞导航提供新思路，但依赖表面方向假设，需进一步优化以提升鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出从二维运动场和表面法线中定量计算视觉looming的新方法，用于实现无碰撞导航。
ai_content.motivation: 传统视觉looming作为感知威胁和导航的关键线索，需依赖距离信息，而实际应用中距离信息获取困难，需新方法。
ai_content.method: 通过六自由度运动产生的二维运动场推导looming公式，结合表面法线并利用光流空间导数进行估计，无需距离信息。
ai_content.result: 仿真及KITTI数据集验证显示，估计looming值与真实值接近，方法在特定表面方向假设下有效，但存在局限性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为无碰撞导航提供新思路，但依赖表面方向假设，需进一步优化以提升鲁棒性。

search_text: Visual Looming from Motion Field and Surface Normals 运动场和表面法线的视觉效果 Looming, traditionally defined as the relative expansion of objects in the observer's retina, is a fundamental visual cue for perception of threat and can be used to accomplish collision free navigation. In this paper we derive novel solutions for obtaining visual looming quantitatively from the 2D motion field resulting from a six-degree-of-freedom motion of an observer relative to a local surface in 3D. We also show the relationship between visual looming and surface normals. We present novel methods to estimate visual looming from spatial derivatives of optical flow without the need for knowing range. Simulation results show that estimations of looming are very close to ground truth looming under some assumptions of surface orientations. In addition, we present results of visual looming using real data from the KITTI dataset. Advantages and limitations of the methods are discussed as well. 隐现，传统上定义为观察者视网膜中物体的相对扩张，是感知威胁的基本视觉线索，可用于实现无碰撞导航。在本文中，我们提出了新颖的解决方案，用于从观察者相对于 3D 局部表面的六自由度运动产生的 2D 运动场中定量获得视觉隐现。我们还展示了视觉隐现和表面法线之间的关系。我们提出了一种新颖的方法，可以根据光流的空间导数来估计视觉隐现，而无需知道范围。仿真结果表明，在某些表面方向假设下，隐现的估计非常接近地面实况隐现。此外，我们还使用 KITTI 数据集中的真实数据展示了视觉隐现的结果。还讨论了这些方法的优点和局限性。 本文提出从二维运动场和表面法线中定量计算视觉looming的新方法，用于实现无碰撞导航。 Juan Yepes,Daniel Raviv eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Yan V. Sym,João Gabriel M. Campos,Marcos M. José,Fabio G. Cozman
title: Comparing Computational Architectures for Automated Journalism
title_zh: 比较自动化新闻的计算架构
comment: Accepted at the 19th National Meeting on Artificial and Computational Intelligence (ENIAC 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 19th National Meeting on Artificial and Computational Intelligence (ENIAC 2022)
abstract: The majority of NLG systems have been designed following either a template-based or a pipeline-based architecture. Recent neural models for data-to-text generation have been proposed with an end-to-end deep learning flavor, which handles non-linguistic input in natural language without explicit intermediary representations. This study compares the most often employed methods for generating Brazilian Portuguese texts from structured data. Results suggest that explicit intermediate steps in the generation process produce better texts than the ones generated by neural end-to-end architectures, avoiding data hallucination while better generalizing to unseen inputs. Code and corpus are publicly available.
summary: The majority of NLG systems have been designed following either a template-based or a pipeline-based architecture. Recent neural models for data-to-text generation have been proposed with an end-to-end deep learning flavor, which handles non-linguistic input in natural language without explicit intermediary representations. This study compares the most often employed methods for generating Brazilian Portuguese texts from structured data. Results suggest that explicit intermediate steps in the generation process produce better texts than the ones generated by neural end-to-end architectures, avoiding data hallucination while better generalizing to unseen inputs. Code and corpus are publicly available.
abstract_zh: 大多数 NLG 系统都是按照基于模板或基于管道的架构设计的。最近提出的用于数据到文本生成的神经模型具有端到端的深度学习风格，它可以处理自然语言中的非语言输入，而无需明确的中间表示。本研究比较了从结构化数据生成巴西葡萄牙语文本的最常用方法。结果表明，生成过程中的显式中间步骤产生的文本比神经端到端架构生成的文本更好，避免了数据幻觉，同时更好地泛化到看不见的输入。代码和语料库是公开的。

AI.tldr: 比较用于自动化新闻生成的计算架构，分析模板/流水线架构与端到端神经模型的优劣。
AI.motivation: 现有NLG系统多采用模板或流水线架构，而新兴的端到端神经模型可能因缺乏中间表示导致数据幻觉，需验证不同架构在生成质量与泛化能力上的表现差异。
AI.method: 通过实验对比生成巴西葡萄牙语文本的常用架构（含显式中间步骤的流水线与端到端神经模型），评估生成文本质量与泛化能力。
AI.result: 显式中间步骤的架构在文本质量、数据幻觉控制及未见数据泛化能力上均优于端到端神经模型。
AI.conclusion: 显式中间表示的架构在自动化新闻生成任务中更可靠，可有效平衡生成质量与模型泛化能力。

authors_text: Steven Squires,Elaine F. Harkness,D. Gareth Evans,Susan M. Astley
title: The effect of variable labels on deep learning models trained to predict breast density
title_zh: 变量标签对训练预测乳腺密度的深度学习模型的影响
abstract: Purpose: High breast density is associated with reduced efficacy of mammographic screening and increased risk of developing breast cancer. Accurate and reliable automated density estimates can be used for direct risk prediction and passing density related information to further predictive models. Expert reader assessments of density show a strong relationship to cancer risk but also inter-reader variation. The effect of label variability on model performance is important when considering how to utilise automated methods for both research and clinical purposes. Methods: We utilise subsets of images with density labels to train a deep transfer learning model which is used to assess how label variability affects the mapping from representation to prediction. We then create two end-to-end deep learning models which allow us to investigate the effect of label variability on the model representation formed. Results: We show that the trained mappings from representations to labels are altered considerably by the variability of reader scores. Training on labels with distribution variation removed causes the Spearman rank correlation coefficients to rise from $0.751\pm0.002$ to either $0.815\pm0.006$ when averaging across readers or $0.844\pm0.002$ when averaging across images. However, when we train different models to investigate the representation effect we see little difference, with Spearman rank correlation coefficients of $0.846\pm0.006$ and $0.850\pm0.006$ showing no statistically significant difference in the quality of the model representation with regard to density prediction. Conclusions: We show that the mapping between representation and mammographic density prediction is significantly affected by label variability. However, the effect of the label variability on the model representation is limited.
summary: Purpose: High breast density is associated with reduced efficacy of mammographic screening and increased risk of developing breast cancer. Accurate and reliable automated density estimates can be used for direct risk prediction and passing density related information to further predictive models. Expert reader assessments of density show a strong relationship to cancer risk but also inter-reader variation. The effect of label variability on model performance is important when considering how to utilise automated methods for both research and clinical purposes. Methods: We utilise subsets of images with density labels to train a deep transfer learning model which is used to assess how label variability affects the mapping from representation to prediction. We then create two end-to-end deep learning models which allow us to investigate the effect of label variability on the model representation formed. Results: We show that the trained mappings from representations to labels are altered considerably by the variability of reader scores. Training on labels with distribution variation removed causes the Spearman rank correlation coefficients to rise from $0.751\pm0.002$ to either $0.815\pm0.006$ when averaging across readers or $0.844\pm0.002$ when averaging across images. However, when we train different models to investigate the representation effect we see little difference, with Spearman rank correlation coefficients of $0.846\pm0.006$ and $0.850\pm0.006$ showing no statistically significant difference in the quality of the model representation with regard to density prediction. Conclusions: We show that the mapping between representation and mammographic density prediction is significantly affected by label variability. However, the effect of the label variability on the model representation is limited.
abstract_zh: Purpose: High breast density is associated with reduced efficacy of mammographic screening and increased risk of developing breast cancer.准确可靠的自动密度估计可用于直接风险预测并将密度相关信息传递给进一步的预测模型。 Expert reader assessments of density show a strong relationship to cancer risk but also inter-reader variation.在考虑如何将自动化方法用于研究和临床目的时，标签变异性对模型性能的影响非常重要。方法：我们利用带有密度标签的图像子集来训练深度迁移学习模型，该模型用于评估标签变异性如何影响从表示到预测的映射。然后，我们创建两个端到端深度学习模型，使我们能够研究标签变异性对所形成的模型表示的影响。 Results: We show that the trained mappings from representations to labels are altered considerably by the variability of reader scores.对删除分布变化的标签进行训练会导致 Spearman 排名相关系数从 $0.751\pm0.002$ 上升到 $0.815\pm0.006$ （跨读者平均时）或 $0.844\pm0.002$ （跨图像平均时）。然而，当我们训练不同的模型来研究表示效果时，我们发现差异不大，Spearman 等级相关系数为 $0.846\pm0.006$ 和 $0.850\pm0.006$，在密度预测方面模型表示的质量没有显着的统计差异。 Conclusions: We show that the mapping between representation and mammographic density prediction is significantly affected by label variability. However, the effect of the label variability on the model representation is limited.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了标签变量对深度学习模型预测乳腺密度的影响，探讨了标签不一致性对模型性能和表示的影响。
AI.motivation: 乳腺密度高与乳腺癌风险增加相关，但专家评估存在差异。需明确标签变量如何影响自动化方法在研究和临床中的应用效果。
AI.method: 利用带密度标签的图像子集训练迁移学习模型，构建两个端到端模型分析标签变量对表示层的影响。
AI.result: 去除标签分布变异后，模型的Spearman相关系数从0.751提升至0.844，但表示层差异无统计学意义（0.846 vs 0.850）。
AI.conclusion: 标签变量显著影响预测映射关系，但对模型表示层的影响有限。

authors_text: Vincent Grondin,François Pomerleau,Philippe Giguère
title: Training Deep Learning Algorithms on Synthetic Forest Images for Tree Detection
title_zh: 在合成森林图像上训练深度学习算法以进行树木检测
comment: Work presented at ICRA 2022 Workshop in Innovation in Forestry Robotics: Research and Industry Adoption
comments: Work presented at ICRA 2022 Workshop in Innovation in Forestry Robotics: Research and Industry Adoption
abstract: Vision-based segmentation in forested environments is a key functionality for autonomous forestry operations such as tree felling and forwarding. Deep learning algorithms demonstrate promising results to perform visual tasks such as object detection. However, the supervised learning process of these algorithms requires annotations from a large diversity of images. In this work, we propose to use simulated forest environments to automatically generate 43 k realistic synthetic images with pixel-level annotations, and use it to train deep learning algorithms for tree detection. This allows us to address the following questions: i) what kind of performance should we expect from deep learning in harsh synthetic forest environments, ii) which annotations are the most important for training, and iii) what modality should be used between RGB and depth. We also report the promising transfer learning capability of features learned on our synthetic dataset by directly predicting bounding box, segmentation masks and keypoints on real images. Code available on GitHub (https://github.com/norlab-ulaval/PercepTreeV1).
summary: Vision-based segmentation in forested environments is a key functionality for autonomous forestry operations such as tree felling and forwarding. Deep learning algorithms demonstrate promising results to perform visual tasks such as object detection. However, the supervised learning process of these algorithms requires annotations from a large diversity of images. In this work, we propose to use simulated forest environments to automatically generate 43 k realistic synthetic images with pixel-level annotations, and use it to train deep learning algorithms for tree detection. This allows us to address the following questions: i) what kind of performance should we expect from deep learning in harsh synthetic forest environments, ii) which annotations are the most important for training, and iii) what modality should be used between RGB and depth. We also report the promising transfer learning capability of features learned on our synthetic dataset by directly predicting bounding box, segmentation masks and keypoints on real images. Code available on GitHub (https://github.com/norlab-ulaval/PercepTreeV1).
abstract_zh: 森林环境中基于视觉的分割是树木砍伐和转发等自主林业作业的关键功能。 Deep learning algorithms demonstrate promising results to perform visual tasks such as object detection. However, the supervised learning process of these algorithms requires annotations from a large diversity of images.在这项工作中，我们建议使用模拟森林环境自动生成具有像素级注释的 43 k 真实合成图像，并用它来训练用于树木检测的深度学习算法。这使我们能够解决以下问题：i）我们应该在恶劣的合成森林环境中从深度学习中获得什么样的性能，ii）哪些注释对于训练最重要，以及iii）RGB和深度之间应该使用什么模式。我们还报告了通过直接预测真实图像上的边界框、分割掩模和关键点在我们的合成数据集上学习到的特征的有前景的迁移学习能力。 Code available on GitHub (https://github.com/norlab-ulaval/PercepTreeV1).

AI.tldr: 本论文提出利用合成森林图像训练深度学习算法以实现树木检测。
AI.motivation: 真实森林环境中的视觉分割对林业自动化操作至关重要，但深度学习模型训练需要大量标注数据，而实际获取困难。
AI.method: 生成43,000张带像素级标注的合成森林图像，用于训练深度学习模型，并对比RGB与深度模态效果，验证合成数据到真实场景的迁移学习能力。
AI.result: 模型在合成环境中表现良好，关键标注对训练至关重要，RGB模态优于深度模态，且合成数据特征可直接迁移到真实图像检测任务。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据能有效替代真实数据训练树木检测模型，且迁移学习效果显著。

authors_text: Blerta Lindqvist
title: Symmetry Defense Against CNN Adversarial Perturbation Attacks
title_zh: 针对 CNN 对抗性扰动攻击的对称防御
abstract: This paper uses symmetry to make Convolutional Neural Network classifiers (CNNs) robust against adversarial perturbation attacks. Such attacks add perturbation to original images to generate adversarial images that fool classifiers such as road sign classifiers of autonomous vehicles. Although symmetry is a pervasive aspect of the natural world, CNNs are unable to handle symmetry well. For example, a CNN can classify an image differently from its mirror image. For an adversarial image that misclassifies with a wrong label $l_w$, CNN inability to handle symmetry means that a symmetric adversarial image can classify differently from the wrong label $l_w$. Further than that, we find that the classification of a symmetric adversarial image reverts to the correct label. To classify an image when adversaries are unaware of the defense, we apply symmetry to the image and use the classification label of the symmetric image. To classify an image when adversaries are aware of the defense, we use mirror symmetry and pixel inversion symmetry to form a symmetry group. We apply all the group symmetries to the image and decide on the output label based on the agreement of any two of the classification labels of the symmetry images. Adaptive attacks fail because they need to rely on loss functions that use conflicting CNN output values for symmetric images. Without attack knowledge, the proposed symmetry defense succeeds against both gradient-based and random-search attacks, with up to near-default accuracies for ImageNet. The defense even improves the classification accuracy of original images.
summary: This paper uses symmetry to make Convolutional Neural Network classifiers (CNNs) robust against adversarial perturbation attacks. Such attacks add perturbation to original images to generate adversarial images that fool classifiers such as road sign classifiers of autonomous vehicles. Although symmetry is a pervasive aspect of the natural world, CNNs are unable to handle symmetry well. For example, a CNN can classify an image differently from its mirror image. For an adversarial image that misclassifies with a wrong label $l_w$, CNN inability to handle symmetry means that a symmetric adversarial image can classify differently from the wrong label $l_w$. Further than that, we find that the classification of a symmetric adversarial image reverts to the correct label. To classify an image when adversaries are unaware of the defense, we apply symmetry to the image and use the classification label of the symmetric image. To classify an image when adversaries are aware of the defense, we use mirror symmetry and pixel inversion symmetry to form a symmetry group. We apply all the group symmetries to the image and decide on the output label based on the agreement of any two of the classification labels of the symmetry images. Adaptive attacks fail because they need to rely on loss functions that use conflicting CNN output values for symmetric images. Without attack knowledge, the proposed symmetry defense succeeds against both gradient-based and random-search attacks, with up to near-default accuracies for ImageNet. The defense even improves the classification accuracy of original images.
abstract_zh: 本文利用对称性使卷积神经网络分类器（CNN）对对抗性扰动攻击具有鲁棒性。此类攻击会对原始图像添加扰动，以生成对抗性图像，从而欺骗自动驾驶车辆的路标分类器等分类器。尽管对称性是自然界中普遍存在的一个方面，但 CNN 无法很好地处理对称性。例如，CNN 可以对图像与其镜像进行不同的分类。对于使用错误标签 $l_w$ 进行错误分类的对抗性图像，CNN 无法处理对称性意味着对称对抗性图像可以与错误标签 $l_w$ 进行不同的分类。除此之外，我们发现对称对抗图像的分类会恢复到正确的标签。为了在对手不知道防御的情况下对图像进行分类，我们对图像应用对称性并使用对称图像的分类标签。为了在对手意识到防御时对图像进行分类，我们使用镜像对称和像素反转对称来形成对称群。我们将所有组对称性应用于图像，并根据对称图像的任意两个分类标签的一致性来决定输出标签。自适应攻击会失败，因为它们需要依赖于对称图像使用冲突的 CNN 输出值的损失函数。在没有攻击知识的情况下，所提出的对称防御可以成功抵御基于梯度和随机搜索的攻击，并且达到 ImageNet 接近默认的精度。该防御甚至提高了原始图像的分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用对称性增强卷积神经网络（CNN）对对抗性扰动攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: CNN在处理对称性时存在缺陷，导致对抗样本通过镜像等对称变换可能被重新正确分类。现有防御方法难以应对已知防御的攻击，需探索更有效的对称性防御机制。
AI.method: 通过镜像对称和像素反转对称构建对称群组，对输入图像应用所有群组变换并基于对称图像分类结果的一致性判定最终标签。
AI.result: 该方法在未知攻击场景下恢复近似默认准确率，在ImageNet数据集上甚至提升原始图像分类准确率，且对梯度攻击和随机搜索攻击均有效。
AI.conclusion: 基于对称性的防御策略无需攻击先验知识即可有效抵御对抗攻击，并能提升模型鲁棒性与分类性能。

authors_text: Shijie Li,Ming-Ming Cheng,Juergen Gall
title: Dual Pyramid Generative Adversarial Networks for Semantic Image Synthesis
title_zh: 用于语义图像合成的双金字塔生成对抗网络
abstract: The goal of semantic image synthesis is to generate photo-realistic images from semantic label maps. It is highly relevant for tasks like content generation and image editing. Current state-of-the-art approaches, however, still struggle to generate realistic objects in images at various scales. In particular, small objects tend to fade away and large objects are often generated as collages of patches. In order to address this issue, we propose a Dual Pyramid Generative Adversarial Network (DP-GAN) that learns the conditioning of spatially-adaptive normalization blocks at all scales jointly, such that scale information is bi-directionally used, and it unifies supervision at different scales. Our qualitative and quantitative results show that the proposed approach generates images where small and large objects look more realistic compared to images generated by state-of-the-art methods.
summary: The goal of semantic image synthesis is to generate photo-realistic images from semantic label maps. It is highly relevant for tasks like content generation and image editing. Current state-of-the-art approaches, however, still struggle to generate realistic objects in images at various scales. In particular, small objects tend to fade away and large objects are often generated as collages of patches. In order to address this issue, we propose a Dual Pyramid Generative Adversarial Network (DP-GAN) that learns the conditioning of spatially-adaptive normalization blocks at all scales jointly, such that scale information is bi-directionally used, and it unifies supervision at different scales. Our qualitative and quantitative results show that the proposed approach generates images where small and large objects look more realistic compared to images generated by state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 语义图像合成的目标是从语义标签图生成逼真的图像。它与内容生成和图像编辑等任务高度相关。然而，当前最先进的方法仍然难以在各种尺度的图像中生成真实的物体。特别是，小对象往往会消失，而大对象通常会生成为拼贴画。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种双金字塔生成对抗网络（DP-GAN），它联合学习所有尺度的空间自适应归一化块的调节，从而双向使用尺度信息，并统一不同尺度的监督。我们的定性和定量结果表明，与最先进的方法生成的图像相比，所提出的方法生成的图像中小型和大型物体看起来更真实。

AI.tldr: 提出双金字塔生成对抗网络（DP-GAN）以解决语义图像合成中不同尺度物体生成不真实的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成多尺度物体时存在小物体模糊、大物体拼贴不连贯的问题，需改进尺度信息的建模与融合。
AI.method: 设计双金字塔结构，联合学习各尺度空间自适应归一化块的条件，实现尺度信息双向传递与多尺度监督统一。
AI.result: 生成图像中小物体更清晰、大物体更连贯，优于现有方法的定性和定量评估结果。
AI.conclusion: DP-GAN通过尺度信息的双向利用和统一监督，有效提升了语义图像合成中多尺度物体的真实感。

ai_content.tldr: 提出双金字塔生成对抗网络（DP-GAN）以解决语义图像合成中不同尺度物体生成不真实的问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在生成多尺度物体时存在小物体模糊、大物体拼贴不连贯的问题，需改进尺度信息的建模与融合。
ai_content.method: 设计双金字塔结构，联合学习各尺度空间自适应归一化块的条件，实现尺度信息双向传递与多尺度监督统一。
ai_content.result: 生成图像中小物体更清晰、大物体更连贯，优于现有方法的定性和定量评估结果。
ai_content.conclusion: DP-GAN通过尺度信息的双向利用和统一监督，有效提升了语义图像合成中多尺度物体的真实感。

search_text: Dual Pyramid Generative Adversarial Networks for Semantic Image Synthesis 用于语义图像合成的双金字塔生成对抗网络 The goal of semantic image synthesis is to generate photo-realistic images from semantic label maps. It is highly relevant for tasks like content generation and image editing. Current state-of-the-art approaches, however, still struggle to generate realistic objects in images at various scales. In particular, small objects tend to fade away and large objects are often generated as collages of patches. In order to address this issue, we propose a Dual Pyramid Generative Adversarial Network (DP-GAN) that learns the conditioning of spatially-adaptive normalization blocks at all scales jointly, such that scale information is bi-directionally used, and it unifies supervision at different scales. Our qualitative and quantitative results show that the proposed approach generates images where small and large objects look more realistic compared to images generated by state-of-the-art methods. 语义图像合成的目标是从语义标签图生成逼真的图像。它与内容生成和图像编辑等任务高度相关。然而，当前最先进的方法仍然难以在各种尺度的图像中生成真实的物体。特别是，小对象往往会消失，而大对象通常会生成为拼贴画。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种双金字塔生成对抗网络（DP-GAN），它联合学习所有尺度的空间自适应归一化块的调节，从而双向使用尺度信息，并统一不同尺度的监督。我们的定性和定量结果表明，与最先进的方法生成的图像相比，所提出的方法生成的图像中小型和大型物体看起来更真实。 提出双金字塔生成对抗网络（DP-GAN）以解决语义图像合成中不同尺度物体生成不真实的问题。 Shijie Li,Ming-Ming Cheng,Juergen Gall cs.CV

authors_text: Sumegha Premchandar,Sandeep Madireddy,Sanket Jantre,Prasanna Balaprakash
title: Unified Probabilistic Neural Architecture and Weight Ensembling Improves Model Robustness
title_zh: 统一的概率神经架构和权重集成提高了模型的鲁棒性
abstract: Robust machine learning models with accurately calibrated uncertainties are crucial for safety-critical applications. Probabilistic machine learning and especially the Bayesian formalism provide a systematic framework to incorporate robustness through the distributional estimates and reason about uncertainty. Recent works have shown that approximate inference approaches that take the weight space uncertainty of neural networks to generate ensemble prediction are the state-of-the-art. However, architecture choices have mostly been ad hoc, which essentially ignores the epistemic uncertainty from the architecture space. To this end, we propose a Unified probabilistic architecture and weight ensembling Neural Architecture Search (UraeNAS) that leverages advances in probabilistic neural architecture search and approximate Bayesian inference to generate ensembles form the joint distribution of neural network architectures and weights. The proposed approach showed a significant improvement both with in-distribution (0.86% in accuracy, 42% in ECE) CIFAR-10 and out-of-distribution (2.43% in accuracy, 30% in ECE) CIFAR-10-C compared to the baseline deterministic approach.
summary: Robust machine learning models with accurately calibrated uncertainties are crucial for safety-critical applications. Probabilistic machine learning and especially the Bayesian formalism provide a systematic framework to incorporate robustness through the distributional estimates and reason about uncertainty. Recent works have shown that approximate inference approaches that take the weight space uncertainty of neural networks to generate ensemble prediction are the state-of-the-art. However, architecture choices have mostly been ad hoc, which essentially ignores the epistemic uncertainty from the architecture space. To this end, we propose a Unified probabilistic architecture and weight ensembling Neural Architecture Search (UraeNAS) that leverages advances in probabilistic neural architecture search and approximate Bayesian inference to generate ensembles form the joint distribution of neural network architectures and weights. The proposed approach showed a significant improvement both with in-distribution (0.86% in accuracy, 42% in ECE) CIFAR-10 and out-of-distribution (2.43% in accuracy, 30% in ECE) CIFAR-10-C compared to the baseline deterministic approach.
abstract_zh: 具有精确校准不确定性的稳健机器学习模型对于安全关键型应用至关重要。概率机器学习，尤其是贝叶斯形式主义，提供了一个系统框架，通过分布估计和不确定性推理来整合鲁棒性。最近的工作表明，利用神经网络的权重空间不确定性来生成集成预测的近似推理方法是最先进的。然而，架构选择大多是临时的，这本质上忽略了架构空间的认知不确定性。为此，我们提出了一种统一概率架构和权重集成神经架构搜索（UraeNAS），它利用概率神经架构搜索的进步和近似贝叶斯推理来生成神经网络架构和权重的联合分布的集成。与基线确定性方法相比，所提出的方法在分布内（准确度为 0.86%，ECE 为 42%）CIFAR-10 和分布外（准确度为 2.43%，ECE 为 30%）CIFAR-10-C 方面均显示出显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的概率神经架构与权重集成方法（UraeNAS），通过联合优化神经网络架构和权重分布，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在神经网络架构选择上缺乏系统性，忽视了架构空间的不确定性，导致模型在分布外场景下鲁棒性不足。
AI.method: 结合概率神经架构搜索与近似贝叶斯推理，从神经网络架构和权重的联合分布中生成集成预测，同时建模显式架构不确定性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上提升准确率0.86%、ECE降低42%，在CIFAR-10-C上提升准确率2.43%、ECE降低30%，优于基线确定性方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合建模架构与权重不确定性，UraeNAS显著增强了模型在分布内和分布外场景下的鲁棒性与不确定性校准能力。

authors_text: Aleksandar Petrov,Marta Kwiatkowska
title: Robustness of Unsupervised Representation Learning without Labels
title_zh: 无标签的无监督表示学习的鲁棒性
abstract: Unsupervised representation learning leverages large unlabeled datasets and is competitive with supervised learning. But non-robust encoders may affect downstream task robustness. Recently, robust representation encoders have become of interest. Still, all prior work evaluates robustness using a downstream classification task. Instead, we propose a family of unsupervised robustness measures, which are model- and task-agnostic and label-free. We benchmark state-of-the-art representation encoders and show that none dominates the rest. We offer unsupervised extensions to the FGSM and PGD attacks. When used in adversarial training, they improve most unsupervised robustness measures, including certified robustness. We validate our results against a linear probe and show that, for MOCOv2, adversarial training results in 3 times higher certified accuracy, a 2-fold decrease in impersonation attack success rate and considerable improvements in certified robustness.
summary: Unsupervised representation learning leverages large unlabeled datasets and is competitive with supervised learning. But non-robust encoders may affect downstream task robustness. Recently, robust representation encoders have become of interest. Still, all prior work evaluates robustness using a downstream classification task. Instead, we propose a family of unsupervised robustness measures, which are model- and task-agnostic and label-free. We benchmark state-of-the-art representation encoders and show that none dominates the rest. We offer unsupervised extensions to the FGSM and PGD attacks. When used in adversarial training, they improve most unsupervised robustness measures, including certified robustness. We validate our results against a linear probe and show that, for MOCOv2, adversarial training results in 3 times higher certified accuracy, a 2-fold decrease in impersonation attack success rate and considerable improvements in certified robustness.
abstract_zh: 无监督表示学习利用大量未标记的数据集，与监督学习具有竞争力。但非鲁棒编码器可能会影响下游任务的鲁棒性。最近，鲁棒表示编码器引起了人们的兴趣。尽管如此，所有先前的工作都使用下游分类任务来评估稳健性。相反，我们提出了一系列无监督的鲁棒性度量，它们与模型和任务无关且无标签。我们对最先进的表示编码器进行了基准测试，结果表明没有一个编码器能够主导其他编码器。我们提供 FGSM 和 PGD 攻击的无监督扩展。当用于对抗性训练时，它们可以改善大多数无监督的稳健性措施，包括经过认证的稳健性。我们针对线性探针验证了我们的结果，结果表明，对于 MOCOv2，对抗性训练的认证精度提高了 3 倍，模拟攻击成功率降低了 2 倍，认证鲁棒性也得到了显着提高。

AI.tldr: 提出无监督鲁棒性度量方法，评估对抗训练对无监督表示学习的影响
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒性评估依赖有标签任务，缺乏无监督方法，需开发模型和任务无关的无标签评估指标
AI.method: 设计无监督鲁棒性指标，扩展对抗攻击方法，通过对抗训练提升编码器鲁棒性
AI.result: 对抗训练显著提升鲁棒性指标，如认证准确率提升3倍，攻击成功率降低50%
AI.conclusion: 无监督鲁棒性评估重要，对抗训练有效提升模型鲁棒性，需进一步研究更全面的指标

authors_text: Haoyu Wang,Hongming Zhang,Yueguan Wang,Yuqian Deng,Muhao Chen,Dan Roth
title: Are All Steps Equally Important? Benchmarking Essentiality Detection of Events
title_zh: 所有步骤都同样重要吗？事件本质性检测的基准测试
abstract: Natural language expresses events with varying granularities, where coarse-grained events (goals) can be broken down into finer-grained event sequences (steps). A critical yet overlooked aspect of understanding event processes is recognizing that not all step events hold equal importance toward the completion of a goal. In this paper, we address this gap by examining the extent to which current models comprehend the essentiality of step events in relation to a goal event. Cognitive studies suggest that such capability enables machines to emulate human commonsense reasoning about preconditions and necessary efforts of everyday tasks. We contribute a high-quality corpus of (goal, step) pairs gathered from the community guideline website WikiHow, with steps manually annotated for their essentiality concerning the goal by experts. The high inter-annotator agreement demonstrates that humans possess a consistent understanding of event essentiality. However, after evaluating multiple statistical and largescale pre-trained language models, we find that existing approaches considerably underperform compared to humans. This observation highlights the need for further exploration into this critical and challenging task. The dataset and code are available at http://cogcomp.org/page/publication_view/1023.
summary: Natural language expresses events with varying granularities, where coarse-grained events (goals) can be broken down into finer-grained event sequences (steps). A critical yet overlooked aspect of understanding event processes is recognizing that not all step events hold equal importance toward the completion of a goal. In this paper, we address this gap by examining the extent to which current models comprehend the essentiality of step events in relation to a goal event. Cognitive studies suggest that such capability enables machines to emulate human commonsense reasoning about preconditions and necessary efforts of everyday tasks. We contribute a high-quality corpus of (goal, step) pairs gathered from the community guideline website WikiHow, with steps manually annotated for their essentiality concerning the goal by experts. The high inter-annotator agreement demonstrates that humans possess a consistent understanding of event essentiality. However, after evaluating multiple statistical and largescale pre-trained language models, we find that existing approaches considerably underperform compared to humans. This observation highlights the need for further exploration into this critical and challenging task. The dataset and code are available at http://cogcomp.org/page/publication_view/1023.
abstract_zh: 自然语言表达具有不同粒度的事件，其中粗粒度的事件（目标）可以分解为更细粒度的事件序列（步骤）。理解事件过程的一个关键但被忽视的方面是认识到并非所有步骤事件对于完成目标都具有同等的重要性。在本文中，我们通过检查当前模型对与目标事件相关的步骤事件的重要性的理解程度来解决这一差距。认知研究表明，这种能力使机器能够模仿人类对日常任务的先决条件和必要努力的常识推理。我们贡献了从社区指南网站 WikiHow 收集的高质量（目标、步骤）对的语料库，其中的步骤由专家手动注释，以说明其与目标相关的重要性。注释者间的高度一致性表明人类对事件重要性具有一致的理解。然而，在评估多个统计和大规模预训练语言模型后，我们发现现有方法的表现远远低于人类。这一观察结果凸显了进一步探索这一关键且具有挑战性的任务的必要性。数据集和代码可在 http://cogcomp.org/page/publication_view/1023 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究事件步骤对目标的重要性检测，构建数据集并评估现有模型性能。
AI.motivation: 事件过程理解需识别关键步骤，但现有模型对此能力不足，缺乏相关基准测试。
AI.method: 从WikiHow构建带专家标注的(goal, step)数据集，评估统计模型与大语言模型的步骤重要性识别能力。
AI.result: 人类标注一致性高，但现有模型在关键步骤识别任务上显著弱于人类表现。
AI.conclusion: 该任务具有挑战性且需进一步研究，公开数据集与代码供后续探索。

authors_text: Yao Wei,George Vosselman,Michael Ying Yang
title: Flow-based GAN for 3D Point Cloud Generation from a Single Image
title_zh: 用于从单个图像生成 3D 点云的基于流的 GAN
abstract: Generating a 3D point cloud from a single 2D image is of great importance for 3D scene understanding applications. To reconstruct the whole 3D shape of the object shown in the image, the existing deep learning based approaches use either explicit or implicit generative modeling of point clouds, which, however, suffer from limited quality. In this work, we aim to alleviate this issue by introducing a hybrid explicit-implicit generative modeling scheme, which inherits the flow-based explicit generative models for sampling point clouds with arbitrary resolutions while improving the detailed 3D structures of point clouds by leveraging the implicit generative adversarial networks (GANs). We evaluate on the large-scale synthetic dataset ShapeNet, with the experimental results demonstrating the superior performance of the proposed method. In addition, the generalization ability of our method is demonstrated by performing on cross-category synthetic images as well as by testing on real images from PASCAL3D+ dataset.
summary: Generating a 3D point cloud from a single 2D image is of great importance for 3D scene understanding applications. To reconstruct the whole 3D shape of the object shown in the image, the existing deep learning based approaches use either explicit or implicit generative modeling of point clouds, which, however, suffer from limited quality. In this work, we aim to alleviate this issue by introducing a hybrid explicit-implicit generative modeling scheme, which inherits the flow-based explicit generative models for sampling point clouds with arbitrary resolutions while improving the detailed 3D structures of point clouds by leveraging the implicit generative adversarial networks (GANs). We evaluate on the large-scale synthetic dataset ShapeNet, with the experimental results demonstrating the superior performance of the proposed method. In addition, the generalization ability of our method is demonstrated by performing on cross-category synthetic images as well as by testing on real images from PASCAL3D+ dataset.
abstract_zh: 从单个 2D 图像生成 3D 点云对于 3D 场景理解应用程序非常重要。为了重建图像中显示的物体的整个 3D 形状，现有的基于深度学习的方法使用点云的显式或隐式生成建模，然而，这些模型的质量有限。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过引入一种混合显式-隐式生成建模方案来缓解这个问题，该方案继承了用于以任意分辨率采样点云的基于流的显式生成模型，同时利用隐式生成对抗网络（GAN）改进了点云的详细3D结构。我们在大规模合成数据集 ShapeNet 上进行了评估，实验结果证明了该方法的优越性能。此外，通过在跨类别合成图像上执行以及在 PASCAL3D+ 数据集的真实图像上进行测试，证明了我们方法的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于流模型和GAN的混合生成方法，用于从单张图像生成高质量的3D点云。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度学习的点云生成方法在质量和细节表现上存在局限，需通过结合显式与隐式生成模型的优势来提升效果。
AI.method: 采用混合显式-隐式生成框架，利用流模型实现任意分辨率点云采样，结合隐式GAN优化点云细节结构。
AI.result: 在ShapeNet数据集上验证了方法优越性，并通过跨类别合成图像和PASCAL3D+真实图像测试证明了良好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 混合生成模型有效提升了点云生成质量，验证了显式与隐式方法结合的优势及跨场景适用性。
