authors_text: Prashant Pandey,Michael A. Bender,Alex Conway,Martín Farach-Colton,William Kuszmaul,Guido Tagliavini,Rob Johnson
title: IcebergHT: High Performance PMEM Hash Tables Through Stability and Low Associativity
title_zh: IcebergHT：通过稳定性和低关联性实现高性能 PMEM 哈希表
abstract: Modern hash table designs strive to minimize space while maximizing speed. The most important factor in speed is the number of cache lines accessed during updates and queries. This is especially important on PMEM, which is slower than DRAM and in which writes are more expensive than reads. This paper proposes two stronger design objectives: stability and low-associativity. A stable hash table doesn't move items around, and a hash table has low associativity if there are only a few locations where an item can be stored. Low associativity ensures that queries need to examine only a few memory locations, and stability ensures that insertions write to very few cache lines. Stability also simplifies scaling and crash safety. We present IcebergHT, a fast, crash-safe, concurrent, and space-efficient hash table for PMEM based on the design principles of stability and low associativity. IcebergHT combines in-memory metadata with a new hashing technique, iceberg hashing, that is (1) space efficient, (2) stable, and (3) supports low associativity. In contrast, existing hash-tables either modify numerous cache lines during insertions (e.g. cuckoo hashing), access numerous cache lines during queries (e.g. linear probing), or waste space (e.g. chaining). Moreover, the combination of (1)-(3) yields several emergent benefits: IcebergHT scales better than other hash tables, supports crash-safety, and has excellent performance on PMEM (where writes are particularly expensive).
summary: Modern hash table designs strive to minimize space while maximizing speed. The most important factor in speed is the number of cache lines accessed during updates and queries. This is especially important on PMEM, which is slower than DRAM and in which writes are more expensive than reads. This paper proposes two stronger design objectives: stability and low-associativity. A stable hash table doesn't move items around, and a hash table has low associativity if there are only a few locations where an item can be stored. Low associativity ensures that queries need to examine only a few memory locations, and stability ensures that insertions write to very few cache lines. Stability also simplifies scaling and crash safety. We present IcebergHT, a fast, crash-safe, concurrent, and space-efficient hash table for PMEM based on the design principles of stability and low associativity. IcebergHT combines in-memory metadata with a new hashing technique, iceberg hashing, that is (1) space efficient, (2) stable, and (3) supports low associativity. In contrast, existing hash-tables either modify numerous cache lines during insertions (e.g. cuckoo hashing), access numerous cache lines during queries (e.g. linear probing), or waste space (e.g. chaining). Moreover, the combination of (1)-(3) yields several emergent benefits: IcebergHT scales better than other hash tables, supports crash-safety, and has excellent performance on PMEM (where writes are particularly expensive).
abstract_zh: 现代哈希表设计力求最小化空间，同时最大化速度。影响速度的最重要因素是更新和查询期间访问的缓存行的数量。这对于 PMEM 来说尤其重要，因为 PMEM 比 DRAM 慢并且写入比读取更昂贵。本文提出了两个更强的设计目标：稳定性和低关联性。稳定的哈希表不会移动项目，并且如果只有几个位置可以存储项目，则哈希表的关联性较低。低关联性确保查询只需要检查几个内存位置，而稳定性则确保插入写入很少的缓存行。稳定性还简化了缩放和碰撞安全性。我们提出了 IcebergHT，这是一种基于稳定性和低关联性设计原则的快速、防崩溃、并发且节省空间的 PMEM 哈希表。 IcebergHT 将内存中元数据与新的哈希技术（冰山哈希）相结合，即 (1) 空间高效，(2) 稳定，(3) 支持低关联性。相反，现有的哈希表要么在插入期间修改大量缓存行（例如布谷鸟散列），要么在查询期间访问大量缓存行（例如线性探测），要么浪费空间（例如链接）。此外，(1)-(3) 的组合产生了几个新的好处：IcebergHT 的扩展性比其他哈希表更好，支持崩溃安全，并且在 PMEM 上具有出色的性能（其中写入特别昂贵）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IcebergHT，一种基于稳定性和低关联性的高性能持久内存哈希表设计。
AI.motivation: 传统哈希表在持久内存(PMEM)中存在缓存行访问多、写操作代价高或空间浪费等问题，需通过稳定性与低关联性优化性能与安全性。
AI.method: 结合内存元数据与冰山哈希技术，实现空间高效、稳定且低关联的哈希表，减少缓存行访问与写操作开销。
AI.result: IcebergHT在PMEM上表现出更优的扩展性、崩溃安全性及性能，优于现有 cuckoo、线性探测和链式哈希方案。
AI.conclusion: 通过稳定性与低关联性设计原则，IcebergHT为持久内存场景提供了高效、安全的哈希表解决方案。

This is especially important on PMEM, which is slower than DRAM and in which writes are more expensive than reads. This paper proposes two stronger design objectives: stability and low-associativity. A stable hash table doesn't move items around, and a hash table has low associativity if there are only a few locations where an item can be stored. Low associativity ensures that queries need to examine only a few memory locations, and stability ensures that insertions write to very few cache lines. Stability also simplifies scaling and crash safety. We present IcebergHT, a fast, crash-safe, concurrent, and space-efficient hash table for PMEM based on the design principles of stability and low associativity. IcebergHT combines in-memory metadata with a new hashing technique, iceberg hashing, that is (1) space efficient, (2) stable, and (3) supports low associativity. In contrast, existing hash-tables either modify numerous cache lines during insertions (e.g. cuckoo hashing), access numerous cache lines during queries (e.g. linear probing), or waste space (e.g. chaining). Moreover, the combination of (1)-(3) yields several emergent benefits: IcebergHT scales better than other hash tables, supports crash-safety, and has excellent performance on PMEM (where writes are particularly expensive). 现代哈希表设计力求最小化空间，同时最大化速度。影响速度的最重要因素是更新和查询期间访问的缓存行的数量。这对于 PMEM 来说尤其重要，因为 PMEM 比 DRAM 慢并且写入比读取更昂贵。本文提出了两个更强的设计目标：稳定性和低关联性。稳定的哈希表不会移动项目，并且如果只有几个位置可以存储项目，则哈希表的关联性较低。低关联性确保查询只需要检查几个内存位置，而稳定性则确保插入写入很少的缓存行。稳定性还简化了缩放和碰撞安全性。我们提出了 IcebergHT，这是一种基于稳定性和低关联性设计原则的快速、防崩溃、并发且节省空间的 PMEM 哈希表。 IcebergHT 将内存中元数据与新的哈希技术（冰山哈希）相结合，即 (1) 空间高效，(2) 稳定，(3) 支持低关联性。相反，现有的哈希表要么在插入期间修改大量缓存行（例如布谷鸟散列），要么在查询期间访问大量缓存行（例如线性探测），要么浪费空间（例如链接）。此外，(1)-(3) 的组合产生了几个新的好处：IcebergHT 的扩展性比其他哈希表更好，支持崩溃安全，并且在 PMEM 上具有出色的性能（其中写入特别昂贵）。 本文提出IcebergHT，一种基于稳定性和低关联性的高性能持久内存哈希表设计。 Prashant Pandey,Michael A. Bender,Alex Conway,Martín Farach-Colton,William Kuszmaul,Guido Tagliavini,Rob Johnson cs.DS,cs.DB

authors_text: Julius Jankowski,Lara Brudermüller,Nick Hawes,Sylvain Calinon
title: VP-STO: Via-point-based Stochastic Trajectory Optimization for Reactive Robot Behavior
title_zh: VP-STO：针对反应式机器人行为的基于过孔点的随机轨迹优化
abstract: Achieving reactive robot behavior in complex dynamic environments is still challenging as it relies on being able to solve trajectory optimization problems quickly enough, such that we can replan the future motion at frequencies which are sufficiently high for the task at hand. We argue that current limitations in Model Predictive Control (MPC) for robot manipulators arise from inefficient, high-dimensional trajectory representations and the negligence of time-optimality in the trajectory optimization process. Therefore, we propose a motion optimization framework that optimizes jointly over space and time, generating smooth and timing-optimal robot trajectories in joint-space. While being task-agnostic, our formulation can incorporate additional task-specific requirements, such as collision avoidance, and yet maintain real-time control rates, demonstrated in simulation and real-world robot experiments on closed-loop manipulation. For additional material, please visit https://sites.google.com/oxfordrobotics.institute/vp-sto.
summary: Achieving reactive robot behavior in complex dynamic environments is still challenging as it relies on being able to solve trajectory optimization problems quickly enough, such that we can replan the future motion at frequencies which are sufficiently high for the task at hand. We argue that current limitations in Model Predictive Control (MPC) for robot manipulators arise from inefficient, high-dimensional trajectory representations and the negligence of time-optimality in the trajectory optimization process. Therefore, we propose a motion optimization framework that optimizes jointly over space and time, generating smooth and timing-optimal robot trajectories in joint-space. While being task-agnostic, our formulation can incorporate additional task-specific requirements, such as collision avoidance, and yet maintain real-time control rates, demonstrated in simulation and real-world robot experiments on closed-loop manipulation. For additional material, please visit https://sites.google.com/oxfordrobotics.institute/vp-sto.
abstract_zh: 在复杂的动态环境中实现反应性机器人行为仍然具有挑战性，因为它依赖于能够足够快地解决轨迹优化问题，这样我们就可以以足够高的频率重新规划未来的运动以完成手头的任务。我们认为，当前机器人机械臂模型预测控制（MPC）的局限性源于低效、高维轨迹表示以及轨迹优化过程中时间最优性的忽视。因此，我们提出了一种运动优化框架，可以在空间和时间上联合优化，在关节空间中生成平滑且时间最优的机器人轨迹。虽然与任务无关，但我们的公式可以包含额外的特定于任务的要求，例如避免碰撞，但仍保持实时控制率，这在闭环操纵的模拟和现实机器人实验中得到了证明。如需更多材料，请访问 https://sites.google.com/oxfordrobotics.institute/vp-sto。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轨迹点的随机轨迹优化框架VP-STO，旨在解决动态环境中机器人反应性行为的实时轨迹优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有模型预测控制（MPC）方法因轨迹表示高维且忽略时间最优性，导致机器人轨迹优化效率不足，难以满足动态环境下的实时控制需求。
AI.method: 通过联合优化空间与时间维度，采用轨迹点（via-point）表示和随机优化方法，在关节空间生成平滑且时间最优的轨迹，同时支持任务特定约束（如避障）。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实机器人实验中验证了该方法的实时性，实现了闭环操作中的高效轨迹规划与控制。
AI.conclusion: VP-STO通过优化轨迹表示与时间最优性，有效提升了机器人动态环境下的反应性行为能力，为实时控制提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chutong Meng,Junyi Ao,Tom Ko,Mingxuan Wang,Haizhou Li
title: CoBERT: Self-Supervised Speech Representation Learning Through Code Representation Learning
title_zh: CoBERT：通过代码表示学习进行自监督语音表示学习
abstract: Speech is the surface form of a finite set of phonetic units, which can be represented by discrete codes. We propose the Code BERT (CoBERT) approach for self-supervised speech representation learning. The idea is to convert an utterance to a sequence of discrete codes, and perform code representation learning, where we predict the code representations based on a masked view of the original speech input. Unlike the prior self-distillation approaches of which the teacher and the student are of the same modality, our target model predicts representations from a different modality. CoBERT outperforms the most recent state-of-the-art performance on the ASR task and brings significant improvements on the SUPERB speech translation (ST) task. Our code and models are released at https://github.com/mct10/CoBERT.
summary: Speech is the surface form of a finite set of phonetic units, which can be represented by discrete codes. We propose the Code BERT (CoBERT) approach for self-supervised speech representation learning. The idea is to convert an utterance to a sequence of discrete codes, and perform code representation learning, where we predict the code representations based on a masked view of the original speech input. Unlike the prior self-distillation approaches of which the teacher and the student are of the same modality, our target model predicts representations from a different modality. CoBERT outperforms the most recent state-of-the-art performance on the ASR task and brings significant improvements on the SUPERB speech translation (ST) task. Our code and models are released at https://github.com/mct10/CoBERT.
abstract_zh: 语音是一组有限语音单元的表面形式，可以用离散代码表示。我们提出了用于自监督语音表示学习的 Code BERT (CoBERT) 方法。这个想法是将话语转换为离散代码序列，并执行代码表示学习，其中我们根据原始语音输入的屏蔽视图来预测代码表示。与先前的教师和学生具有相同模态的自蒸馏方法不同，我们的目标模型预测来自不同模态的表示。 CoBERT 在 ASR 任务上的表现优于最新的最先进性能，并在 SUPERB 语音翻译 (ST) 任务上带来了显着改进。我们的代码和模型发布在 https://github.com/mct10/CoBERT。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoBERT方法，通过将语音转换为离散代码序列并进行代码表示学习，实现自监督语音表示学习。
AI.motivation: 传统自蒸馏方法依赖同模态师生模型，而本文通过跨模态（语音到代码）的表示学习，有望提升语音表示的泛化能力。
AI.method: 将语音转换为离散代码序列，利用掩码机制预测代码表示，通过不同模态（原始语音与代码）的对比学习优化模型。
AI.result: CoBERT在ASR任务上超越最新SOTA，在SUPERB语音翻译任务上显著提升，代码与模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态代码表示学习有效提升语音表示质量，为自监督语音模型研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Boris Epstein,Will Ma
title: Selection and Ordering Policies for Hiring Pipelines via Linear Programming
title_zh: 通过线性规划租用管道的选择和订购策略
abstract: Motivated by hiring pipelines, we study three selection and ordering problems in which applicants for a finite set of positions must be interviewed or sent offers. There is a finite time budget for interviewing/sending offers, and every interview/offer is followed by a stochastic realization of discovering the applicant's quality or acceptance decision, leading to computationally challenging problems. In the first problem, we study sequential interviewing and show that a computationally tractable, non-adaptive policy that must make offers immediately after interviewing is near-optimal, assuming offers are always accepted. We further show how to use this policy as a subroutine for obtaining a PTAS. In the second problem, we assume that applicants have already been interviewed but only accept offers with some probability; we develop a computationally tractable policy that makes offers for the different positions in parallel, which can be used even if positions are heterogeneous, and is near-optimal relative to a policy that can make the same total number of offers one by one. In the third problem, we introduce a parsimonious model of overbooking where all offers must be sent simultaneously and a linear penalty is incurred for each acceptance beyond the number of positions; we provide nearly tight bounds on the performance of practically motivated value-ordered policies. All in all, our paper takes a unified approach to three different hiring problems, based on linear programming. Our results in the first two problems generalize and improve the existing guarantees due to Purohit et al. (2019) that were between 1/8 and 1/2 to new guarantees that are at least 1-1/e. We also numerically compare three different settings of making offers to candidates (sequentially, in parallel, or simultaneously), providing insight into when a firm should favor each one.
summary: Motivated by hiring pipelines, we study three selection and ordering problems in which applicants for a finite set of positions must be interviewed or sent offers. There is a finite time budget for interviewing/sending offers, and every interview/offer is followed by a stochastic realization of discovering the applicant's quality or acceptance decision, leading to computationally challenging problems. In the first problem, we study sequential interviewing and show that a computationally tractable, non-adaptive policy that must make offers immediately after interviewing is near-optimal, assuming offers are always accepted. We further show how to use this policy as a subroutine for obtaining a PTAS. In the second problem, we assume that applicants have already been interviewed but only accept offers with some probability; we develop a computationally tractable policy that makes offers for the different positions in parallel, which can be used even if positions are heterogeneous, and is near-optimal relative to a policy that can make the same total number of offers one by one. In the third problem, we introduce a parsimonious model of overbooking where all offers must be sent simultaneously and a linear penalty is incurred for each acceptance beyond the number of positions; we provide nearly tight bounds on the performance of practically motivated value-ordered policies. All in all, our paper takes a unified approach to three different hiring problems, based on linear programming. Our results in the first two problems generalize and improve the existing guarantees due to Purohit et al. (2019) that were between 1/8 and 1/2 to new guarantees that are at least 1-1/e. We also numerically compare three different settings of making offers to candidates (sequentially, in parallel, or simultaneously), providing insight into when a firm should favor each one.
abstract_zh: 受招聘渠道的推动，我们研究了三个选择和排序问题，在这些问题中，有限职位的申请人必须接受面试或发送录用通知。面试/发送录取通知书的时间预算是有限的，并且每次面试/录取通知书之后都会随机实现发现申请人的质量或接受决定，从而导致计算上具有挑战性的问题。在第一个问题中，我们研究了顺序面试，并表明，假设录取通知书总是被接受，则必须在面试后立即发出录取通知书的计算上易于处理的非自适应策略是近乎最优的。我们进一步展示如何使用此策略作为获取 PTAS 的子例程。在第二个问题中，我们假设申请人已经接受过面试，但仅以一定的概率接受录用通知；我们开发了一种计算上易于处理的策略，可以并行地为不同的职位提供报价，即使职位是异构的，也可以使用该策略，并且相对于可以逐个提供相同总数的报价的策略而言，该策略接近最优。在第三个问题中，我们引入了一种简约的超额预订模型，其中所有报价必须同时发送，并且每次接受超出位置数量的报价都会产生线性惩罚；我们对实际激励的价值排序政策的绩效提供了近乎严格的限制。总而言之，我们的论文基于线性规划，对三个不同的招聘问题采用了统一的方法。我们在前两个问题上的结果概括并改进了 Purohit 等人提出的现有保证。 (2019) 介于 1/8 和 1/2 之间的新担保至少为 1-1/e。我们还以数字方式比较了向候选人提供报价的三种不同设置（顺序、并行或同时），从而深入了解公司何时应该偏向每一位候选人。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过线性规划解决招聘流程中的三个选择与排序问题，包括顺序面试、并行发offer和同时发offer的策略。
AI.motivation: 招聘流程中存在有限的时间预算，每次面试或发offer后需面对申请人的质量或接受结果的随机性，导致计算复杂度高，需设计高效策略。
AI.method: 基于线性规划，提出三种场景下的计算可行策略：顺序面试立即发offer、并行处理异构职位发offer、同时发offer的过度预订模型。
AI.result: 改进了现有保证（1/8-1/2）至至少1-1/e，数值实验对比了顺序、并行和同时发offer的场景适用性。
AI.conclusion: 统一的线性规划方法为招聘问题提供了近似最优策略，且揭示了不同场景下策略选择的依据。

search_text: Selection and Ordering Policies for Hiring Pipelines via Linear Programming 通过线性规划租用管道的选择和订购策略 Motivated by hiring pipelines, we study three selection and ordering problems in which applicants for a finite set of positions must be interviewed or sent offers. There is a finite time budget for interviewing/sending offers, and every interview/offer is followed by a stochastic realization of discovering the applicant's quality or acceptance decision, leading to computationally challenging problems. In the first problem, we study sequential interviewing and show that a computationally tractable, non-adaptive policy that must make offers immediately after interviewing is near-optimal, assuming offers are always accepted. We further show how to use this policy as a subroutine for obtaining a PTAS. In the second problem, we assume that applicants have already been interviewed but only accept offers with some probability; we develop a computationally tractable policy that makes offers for the different positions in parallel, which can be used even if positions are heterogeneous, and is near-optimal relative to a policy that can make the same total number of offers one by one. In the third problem, we introduce a parsimonious model of overbooking where all offers must be sent simultaneously and a linear penalty is incurred for each acceptance beyond the number of positions; we provide nearly tight bounds on the performance of practically motivated value-ordered policies. All in all, our paper takes a unified approach to three different hiring problems, based on linear programming. Our results in the first two problems generalize and improve the existing guarantees due to Purohit et al. (2019) that were between 1/8 and 1/2 to new guarantees that are at least 1-1/e. We also numerically compare three different settings of making offers to candidates (sequentially, in parallel, or simultaneously), providing insight into when a firm should favor each one. 受招聘渠道的推动，我们研究了三个选择和排序问题，在这些问题中，有限职位的申请人必须接受面试或发送录用通知。面试/发送录取通知书的时间预算是有限的，并且每次面试/录取通知书之后都会随机实现发现申请人的质量或接受决定，从而导致计算上具有挑战性的问题。在第一个问题中，我们研究了顺序面试，并表明，假设录取通知书总是被接受，则必须在面试后立即发出录取通知书的计算上易于处理的非自适应策略是近乎最优的。我们进一步展示如何使用此策略作为获取 PTAS 的子例程。在第二个问题中，我们假设申请人已经接受过面试，但仅以一定的概率接受录用通知；我们开发了一种计算上易于处理的策略，可以并行地为不同的职位提供报价，即使职位是异构的，也可以使用该策略，并且相对于可以逐个提供相同总数的报价的策略而言，该策略接近最优。在第三个问题中，我们引入了一种简约的超额预订模型，其中所有报价必须同时发送，并且每次接受超出位置数量的报价都会产生线性惩罚；我们对实际激励的价值排序政策的绩效提供了近乎严格的限制。总而言之，我们的论文基于线性规划，对三个不同的招聘问题采用了统一的方法。我们在前两个问题上的结果概括并改进了 Purohit 等人提出的现有保证。 (2019) 介于 1/8 和 1/2 之间的新担保至少为 1-1/e。我们还以数字方式比较了向候选人提供报价的三种不同设置（顺序、并行或同时），从而深入了解公司何时应该偏向每一位候选人。 本文研究了通过线性规划解决招聘流程中的三个选择与排序问题，包括顺序面试、并行发offer和同时发offer的策略。 Boris Epstein,Will Ma cs.DS

authors_text: Yuxiang Guo,Cheng Peng,Chun Pong Lau,Rama Chellappa
title: Multi-Modal Human Authentication Using Silhouettes, Gait and RGB
title_zh: 使用轮廓、步态和 RGB 的多模式人体身份验证
abstract: Whole-body-based human authentication is a promising approach for remote biometrics scenarios. Current literature focuses on either body recognition based on RGB images or gait recognition based on body shapes and walking patterns; both have their advantages and drawbacks. In this work, we propose Dual-Modal Ensemble (DME), which combines both RGB and silhouette data to achieve more robust performances for indoor and outdoor whole-body based recognition. Within DME, we propose GaitPattern, which is inspired by the double helical gait pattern used in traditional gait analysis. The GaitPattern contributes to robust identification performance over a large range of viewing angles. Extensive experimental results on the CASIA-B dataset demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art recognition systems. We also provide experimental results using the newly collected BRIAR dataset.
summary: Whole-body-based human authentication is a promising approach for remote biometrics scenarios. Current literature focuses on either body recognition based on RGB images or gait recognition based on body shapes and walking patterns; both have their advantages and drawbacks. In this work, we propose Dual-Modal Ensemble (DME), which combines both RGB and silhouette data to achieve more robust performances for indoor and outdoor whole-body based recognition. Within DME, we propose GaitPattern, which is inspired by the double helical gait pattern used in traditional gait analysis. The GaitPattern contributes to robust identification performance over a large range of viewing angles. Extensive experimental results on the CASIA-B dataset demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art recognition systems. We also provide experimental results using the newly collected BRIAR dataset.
abstract_zh: 基于全身的人体身份验证是远程生物识别场景的一种有前景的方法。目前的文献主要集中在基于RGB图像的身体识别或基于身体形状和行走模式的步态识别；两者都有各自的优点和缺点。在这项工作中，我们提出了双模态集成（DME），它结合了 RGB 和轮廓数据，为室内和室外基于全身的识别实现更强大的性能。在 DME 中，我们提出了 GaitPattern，其灵感来自于传统步态分析中使用的双螺旋步态模式。 GaitPattern 有助于在大范围的视角下实现稳健的识别性能。 CASIA-B 数据集上的大量实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的识别系统。我们还提供了使用新收集的 BRIAR 数据集的实验结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合RGB图像和轮廓数据的多模态人体认证方法DME，通过融合步态特征提升室内外场景下的识别鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB图像识别和步态识别方法各有局限，单独使用易受视角变化影响，需探索多模态融合方案以提高识别稳定性。
AI.method: 设计Dual-Modal Ensemble框架，整合RGB与轮廓信息，并引入受双螺旋步态启发的GaitPattern模块，增强多视角下的特征表征能力。
AI.result: 在CASIA-B数据集上超越现有最优方法，在自建BRIAR数据集上验证了方法的有效性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征融合与GaitPattern设计有效提升了全身人体认证性能，为复杂场景下的远程生物识别提供了新思路。

authors_text: Lun Quan,Longji Yin,Tingrui Zhang,Mingyang Wang,Ruilin Wang,Sheng Zhong,Zhou Xin,Yanjun Cao,Chao Xu,Fei Gao
title: Robust and Efficient Trajectory Planning for Formation Flight in Dense Environments
title_zh: 密集环境下编队飞行的稳健高效的轨迹规划
comment: Accepted for IEEE Transactions on Robotics
comments: Accepted for IEEE Transactions on Robotics
abstract: Formation flight has a vast potential for aerial robot swarms in various applications. However, existing methods lack the capability to achieve fully autonomous large-scale formation flight in dense environments. To bridge the gap, we present a complete formation flight system that effectively integrates real-world constraints into aerial formation navigation. This paper proposes a differentiable graph-based metric to quantify the overall similarity error between formations. This metric is invariant to rotation, translation, and scaling, providing more freedom for formation coordination. We design a distributed trajectory optimization framework that considers formation similarity, obstacle avoidance, and dynamic feasibility. The optimization is decoupled to make large-scale formation flights computationally feasible. To improve the elasticity of formation navigation in highly constrained scenes, we present a swarm reorganization method that adaptively adjusts the formation parameters and task assignments by generating local navigation goals. A novel swarm agreement strategy called global-remap-local-replan and a formation-level path planner is proposed in this work to coordinate the global planning and local trajectory optimizations. To validate the proposed method, we design comprehensive benchmarks and simulations with other cutting-edge works in terms of adaptability, predictability, elasticity, resilience, and efficiency. Finally, integrated with palm-sized swarm platforms with onboard computers and sensors, the proposed method demonstrates its efficiency and robustness by achieving the largest scale formation flight in dense outdoor environments.
summary: Formation flight has a vast potential for aerial robot swarms in various applications. However, existing methods lack the capability to achieve fully autonomous large-scale formation flight in dense environments. To bridge the gap, we present a complete formation flight system that effectively integrates real-world constraints into aerial formation navigation. This paper proposes a differentiable graph-based metric to quantify the overall similarity error between formations. This metric is invariant to rotation, translation, and scaling, providing more freedom for formation coordination. We design a distributed trajectory optimization framework that considers formation similarity, obstacle avoidance, and dynamic feasibility. The optimization is decoupled to make large-scale formation flights computationally feasible. To improve the elasticity of formation navigation in highly constrained scenes, we present a swarm reorganization method that adaptively adjusts the formation parameters and task assignments by generating local navigation goals. A novel swarm agreement strategy called global-remap-local-replan and a formation-level path planner is proposed in this work to coordinate the global planning and local trajectory optimizations. To validate the proposed method, we design comprehensive benchmarks and simulations with other cutting-edge works in terms of adaptability, predictability, elasticity, resilience, and efficiency. Finally, integrated with palm-sized swarm platforms with onboard computers and sensors, the proposed method demonstrates its efficiency and robustness by achieving the largest scale formation flight in dense outdoor environments.
abstract_zh: 编队飞行对于空中机器人群在各种应用中具有巨大的潜力。然而，现有方法缺乏在密集环境下实现完全自主的大规模编队飞行的能力。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一个完整的编队飞行系统，该系统可以有效地将现实世界的约束融入空中编队导航中。本文提出了一种基于可微图的度量来量化地层之间的整体相似性误差。该度量对于旋转、平移和缩放是不变的，为编队协调提供了更多的自由度。我们设计了一个分布式轨迹优化框架，考虑了编队相似性、避障和动态可行性。优化是解耦的，使得大规模编队飞行在计算上可行。为了提高高度受限场景中编队导航的弹性，我们提出了一种群体重组方法，通过生成局部导航目标来自适应调整编队参数和任务分配。这项工作提出了一种称为全局重映射局部重规划的新型群体协议策略和编队级路径规划器来协调全局规划和局部轨迹优化。为了验证所提出的方法，我们在适应性、可预测性、弹性、复原力和效率方面与其他前沿工作设计了全面的基准和模拟。最后，该方法与带有机载计算机和传感器的手掌大小的集群平台集成，通过在密集的室外环境中实现最大规模的编队飞行，展示了其效率和鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于密集环境的大规模编队飞行轨迹规划系统，通过整合现实约束和分布式优化框架实现高效自主飞行。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在密集环境中实现大规模自主编队飞行，需解决现实约束集成、动态避障及弹性调整等关键技术问题。
AI.method: 设计旋转/平移/缩放不变的微分图度量指标，构建分布式轨迹优化框架，结合全局重映射-局部重规划策略与编队级路径规划器，实现大规模编队的弹性导航。
AI.result: 通过基准测试与仿真验证，方法在适应性、鲁棒性等指标优于现有技术，并在密集户外环境中实现了最大规模的微型无人机编队飞行。

search_text: Robust and Efficient Trajectory Planning for Formation Flight in Dense Environments 密集环境下编队飞行的稳健高效的轨迹规划 Formation flight has a vast potential for aerial robot swarms in various applications. However, existing methods lack the capability to achieve fully autonomous large-scale formation flight in dense environments. To bridge the gap, we present a complete formation flight system that effectively integrates real-world constraints into aerial formation navigation. This paper proposes a differentiable graph-based metric to quantify the overall similarity error between formations. This metric is invariant to rotation, translation, and scaling, providing more freedom for formation coordination. We design a distributed trajectory optimization framework that considers formation similarity, obstacle avoidance, and dynamic feasibility. The optimization is decoupled to make large-scale formation flights computationally feasible. To improve the elasticity of formation navigation in highly constrained scenes, we present a swarm reorganization method that adaptively adjusts the formation parameters and task assignments by generating local navigation goals. A novel swarm agreement strategy called global-remap-local-replan and a formation-level path planner is proposed in this work to coordinate the global planning and local trajectory optimizations. To validate the proposed method, we design comprehensive benchmarks and simulations with other cutting-edge works in terms of adaptability, predictability, elasticity, resilience, and efficiency. Finally, integrated with palm-sized swarm platforms with onboard computers and sensors, the proposed method demonstrates its efficiency and robustness by achieving the largest scale formation flight in dense outdoor environments. 编队飞行对于空中机器人群在各种应用中具有巨大的潜力。然而，现有方法缺乏在密集环境下实现完全自主的大规模编队飞行的能力。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一个完整的编队飞行系统，该系统可以有效地将现实世界的约束融入空中编队导航中。本文提出了一种基于可微图的度量来量化地层之间的整体相似性误差。该度量对于旋转、平移和缩放是不变的，为编队协调提供了更多的自由度。我们设计了一个分布式轨迹优化框架，考虑了编队相似性、避障和动态可行性。优化是解耦的，使得大规模编队飞行在计算上可行。为了提高高度受限场景中编队导航的弹性，我们提出了一种群体重组方法，通过生成局部导航目标来自适应调整编队参数和任务分配。这项工作提出了一种称为全局重映射局部重规划的新型群体协议策略和编队级路径规划器来协调全局规划和局部轨迹优化。为了验证所提出的方法，我们在适应性、可预测性、弹性、复原力和效率方面与其他前沿工作设计了全面的基准和模拟。最后，该方法与带有机载计算机和传感器的手掌大小的集群平台集成，通过在密集的室外环境中实现最大规模的编队飞行，展示了其效率和鲁棒性。 本文提出了一种适用于密集环境的大规模编队飞行轨迹规划系统，通过整合现实约束和分布式优化框架实现高效自主飞行。 Lun Quan,Longji Yin,Tingrui Zhang,Mingyang Wang,Ruilin Wang,Sheng Zhong,Zhou Xin,Yanjun Cao,Chao Xu,Fei Gao cs.RO

authors_text: M Seetha Ramaiah
title: Motion Planning on Visual Manifolds
title_zh: 视觉流形上的运动规划
comment: A PhD thesis submitted to and accepted by the Department of Computer Science & Engineering at the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur
comments: A PhD thesis submitted to and accepted by the Department of Computer Science & Engineering at the Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur
abstract: In this thesis, we propose an alternative characterization of the notion of Configuration Space, which we call Visual Configuration Space (VCS). This new characterization allows an embodied agent (e.g., a robot) to discover its own body structure and plan obstacle-free motions in its peripersonal space using a set of its own images in random poses. Here, we do not assume any knowledge of geometry of the agent, obstacles or the environment. We demonstrate the usefulness of VCS in (a) building and working with geometry-free models for robot motion planning, (b) explaining how a human baby might learn to reach objects in its peripersonal space through motor babbling, and (c) automatically generating natural looking head motion animations for digital avatars in virtual environments. This work is based on the formalism of manifolds and manifold learning using the agent's images and hence we call it Motion Planning on Visual Manifolds.
summary: In this thesis, we propose an alternative characterization of the notion of Configuration Space, which we call Visual Configuration Space (VCS). This new characterization allows an embodied agent (e.g., a robot) to discover its own body structure and plan obstacle-free motions in its peripersonal space using a set of its own images in random poses. Here, we do not assume any knowledge of geometry of the agent, obstacles or the environment. We demonstrate the usefulness of VCS in (a) building and working with geometry-free models for robot motion planning, (b) explaining how a human baby might learn to reach objects in its peripersonal space through motor babbling, and (c) automatically generating natural looking head motion animations for digital avatars in virtual environments. This work is based on the formalism of manifolds and manifold learning using the agent's images and hence we call it Motion Planning on Visual Manifolds.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了配置空间概念的另一种描述，我们称之为视觉配置空间（VCS）。这种新的表征允许实体主体（例如机器人）发现自己的身体结构，并使用一组随机姿势的自己的图像来规划其周围空间中的无障碍运动。在这里，我们不假设对代理、障碍物或环境的几何形状有任何了解。我们展示了 VCS 在以下方面的实用性：(a) 构建和使用无几何模型进行机器人运动规划；(b) 解释人类婴儿如何通过电机牙牙学语学习到达其周围空间中的物体；以及 (c) 自动为虚拟环境中的数字化身生成看起来自然的头部运动动画。这项工作基于流形的形式主义和使用代理图像的流形学习，因此我们将其称为视觉流形上的运动规划。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的视觉配置空间（VCS）概念，使机器人能够在无需环境或自身几何先验知识的情况下，通过随机姿态的图像自主发现身体结构并规划无障碍运动。
AI.motivation: 传统配置空间方法依赖几何先验知识，而实际场景中这些信息往往不可知。本文旨在突破这一限制，实现更自主的运动规划，并解释生物学习机制与虚拟动画生成。
AI.method: 基于流形学习理论，通过代理自身在随机姿态下的图像构建视觉流形，利用图像数据隐式表征配置空间，无需显式几何建模。
AI.result: 成功应用于几何无关的机器人运动规划、婴儿抓取学习机制解释以及虚拟角色自然头部动画生成，验证了方法的跨领域有效性。
AI.conclusion: 视觉流形方法为运动规划提供了新的几何无关框架，揭示了生物运动学习的潜在机制，并为虚拟角色动画生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yun Liu,Xiaomeng Xu,Weihang Chen,Haocheng Yuan,He Wang,Jing Xu,Rui Chen,Li Yi
title: Enhancing Generalizable 6D Pose Tracking of an In-Hand Object with Tactile Sensing
title_zh: 通过触觉感知增强手中物体的通用 6D 姿势跟踪
abstract: When manipulating an object to accomplish complex tasks, humans rely on both vision and touch to keep track of the object's 6D pose. However, most existing object pose tracking systems in robotics rely exclusively on visual signals, which hinder a robot's ability to manipulate objects effectively. To address this limitation, we introduce TEG-Track, a tactile-enhanced 6D pose tracking system that can track previously unseen objects held in hand. From consecutive tactile signals, TEG-Track optimizes object velocities from marker flows when slippage does not occur, or regresses velocities using a slippage estimation network when slippage is detected. The estimated object velocities are integrated into a geometric-kinematic optimization scheme to enhance existing visual pose trackers. To evaluate our method and to facilitate future research, we construct a real-world dataset for visual-tactile in-hand object pose tracking. Experimental results demonstrate that TEG-Track consistently enhances state-of-the-art generalizable 6D pose trackers in synthetic and real-world scenarios. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/leolyliu/TEG-Track.
summary: When manipulating an object to accomplish complex tasks, humans rely on both vision and touch to keep track of the object's 6D pose. However, most existing object pose tracking systems in robotics rely exclusively on visual signals, which hinder a robot's ability to manipulate objects effectively. To address this limitation, we introduce TEG-Track, a tactile-enhanced 6D pose tracking system that can track previously unseen objects held in hand. From consecutive tactile signals, TEG-Track optimizes object velocities from marker flows when slippage does not occur, or regresses velocities using a slippage estimation network when slippage is detected. The estimated object velocities are integrated into a geometric-kinematic optimization scheme to enhance existing visual pose trackers. To evaluate our method and to facilitate future research, we construct a real-world dataset for visual-tactile in-hand object pose tracking. Experimental results demonstrate that TEG-Track consistently enhances state-of-the-art generalizable 6D pose trackers in synthetic and real-world scenarios. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/leolyliu/TEG-Track.
abstract_zh: 当操纵物体来完成复杂的任务时，人类依靠视觉和触觉来跟踪物体的 6D 姿态。然而，机器人技术中大多数现有的物体姿态跟踪系统完全依赖于视觉信号，这阻碍了机器人有效操纵物体的能力。为了解决这一限制，我们引入了 TEG-Track，这是一种触觉增强型 6D 姿势跟踪系统，可以跟踪以前未见过的手持物体。根据连续的触觉信号，TEG-Track 在未发生滑动时优化标记流中的对象速度，或者在检测到滑动时使用滑动估计网络回归速度。估计的物体速度被集成到几何运动学优化方案中，以增强现有的视觉姿态跟踪器。为了评估我们的方法并促进未来的研究，我们构建了一个用于视觉触觉手持物体姿势跟踪的真实数据集。实验结果表明，TEG-Track 在合成场景和现实场景中持续增强最先进的通用 6D 姿势跟踪器。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/leolyliu/TEG-Track 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合触觉信号的6D位姿跟踪系统TEG-Track，用于提升机器人对手中未知物体的位姿估计能力。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人位姿跟踪系统仅依赖视觉信号，难以应对复杂操作中的滑动和未知物体，而人类通过视觉与触觉协同感知物体位姿，因此需引入触觉信息增强跟踪鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过连续触觉信号估计物体速度：无滑动时优化标记流速度，检测到滑动时使用滑动估计网络回归速度，并将速度信息整合到几何运动学优化框架中，与视觉跟踪器协同工作。同时构建了视觉-触觉位姿跟踪数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明TEG-Track在合成与真实场景中均能有效提升现有通用6D位姿跟踪器的性能，代码与数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 触觉增强的多模态融合方法可显著提升手中物体位姿跟踪的泛化能力，所构建的数据集为后续研究提供支持。

search_text: Enhancing Generalizable 6D Pose Tracking of an In-Hand Object with Tactile Sensing 通过触觉感知增强手中物体的通用 6D 姿势跟踪 When manipulating an object to accomplish complex tasks, humans rely on both vision and touch to keep track of the object's 6D pose. However, most existing object pose tracking systems in robotics rely exclusively on visual signals, which hinder a robot's ability to manipulate objects effectively. To address this limitation, we introduce TEG-Track, a tactile-enhanced 6D pose tracking system that can track previously unseen objects held in hand. From consecutive tactile signals, TEG-Track optimizes object velocities from marker flows when slippage does not occur, or regresses velocities using a slippage estimation network when slippage is detected. The estimated object velocities are integrated into a geometric-kinematic optimization scheme to enhance existing visual pose trackers. To evaluate our method and to facilitate future research, we construct a real-world dataset for visual-tactile in-hand object pose tracking. Experimental results demonstrate that TEG-Track consistently enhances state-of-the-art generalizable 6D pose trackers in synthetic and real-world scenarios. Our code and dataset are available at https://github.com/leolyliu/TEG-Track. 当操纵物体来完成复杂的任务时，人类依靠视觉和触觉来跟踪物体的 6D 姿态。然而，机器人技术中大多数现有的物体姿态跟踪系统完全依赖于视觉信号，这阻碍了机器人有效操纵物体的能力。为了解决这一限制，我们引入了 TEG-Track，这是一种触觉增强型 6D 姿势跟踪系统，可以跟踪以前未见过的手持物体。根据连续的触觉信号，TEG-Track 在未发生滑动时优化标记流中的对象速度，或者在检测到滑动时使用滑动估计网络回归速度。估计的物体速度被集成到几何运动学优化方案中，以增强现有的视觉姿态跟踪器。为了评估我们的方法并促进未来的研究，我们构建了一个用于视觉触觉手持物体姿势跟踪的真实数据集。实验结果表明，TEG-Track 在合成场景和现实场景中持续增强最先进的通用 6D 姿势跟踪器。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/leolyliu/TEG-Track 获取。 本文提出了一种结合触觉信号的6D位姿跟踪系统TEG-Track，用于提升机器人对手中未知物体的位姿估计能力。 Yun Liu,Xiaomeng Xu,Weihang Chen,Haocheng Yuan,He Wang,Jing Xu,Rui Chen,Li Yi cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Tao Yang,Haokui Zhang,Wenze Hu,Changwen Chen,Xiaoyu Wang
title: Fast-ParC: Capturing Position Aware Global Feature for ConvNets and ViTs
title_zh: Fast-ParC：捕获 ConvNet 和 ViT 的位置感知全局特征
comment: 22 pages, 8 figures, 10 tables. A preliminary version of this paper has been published in ECCV 2022 and it can be find in arXiv:2203.03952
comments: 22 pages, 8 figures, 10 tables. A preliminary version of this paper has been published in ECCV 2022 and it can be find in arXiv:2203.03952
abstract: Transformer models have made tremendous progress in various fields in recent years. In the field of computer vision, vision transformers (ViTs) also become strong alternatives to convolutional neural networks (ConvNets), yet they have not been able to replace ConvNets since both have their own merits. For instance, ViTs are good at extracting global features with attention mechanisms while ConvNets are more efficient in modeling local relationships due to their strong inductive bias. A natural idea that arises is to combine the strengths of both ConvNets and ViTs to design new structures. In this paper, we propose a new basic neural network operator named position-aware circular convolution (ParC) and its accelerated version Fast-ParC. The ParC operator can capture global features by using a global kernel and circular convolution while keeping location sensitiveness by employing position embeddings. Our Fast-ParC further reduces the O(n2) time complexity of ParC to O(n log n) using Fast Fourier Transform. This acceleration makes it possible to use global convolution in the early stages of models with large feature maps, yet still maintains the overall computational cost comparable with using 3x3 or 7x7 kernels. The proposed operation can be used in a plug-and-play manner to 1) convert ViTs to pure-ConvNet architecture to enjoy wider hardware support and achieve higher inference speed; 2) replacing traditional convolutions in the deep stage of ConvNets to improve accuracy by enlarging the effective receptive field. Experiment results show that our ParC op can effectively enlarge the receptive field of traditional ConvNets, and adopting the proposed op benefits both ViTs and ConvNet models on all three popular vision tasks, image classification, object
summary: Transformer models have made tremendous progress in various fields in recent years. In the field of computer vision, vision transformers (ViTs) also become strong alternatives to convolutional neural networks (ConvNets), yet they have not been able to replace ConvNets since both have their own merits. For instance, ViTs are good at extracting global features with attention mechanisms while ConvNets are more efficient in modeling local relationships due to their strong inductive bias. A natural idea that arises is to combine the strengths of both ConvNets and ViTs to design new structures. In this paper, we propose a new basic neural network operator named position-aware circular convolution (ParC) and its accelerated version Fast-ParC. The ParC operator can capture global features by using a global kernel and circular convolution while keeping location sensitiveness by employing position embeddings. Our Fast-ParC further reduces the O(n2) time complexity of ParC to O(n log n) using Fast Fourier Transform. This acceleration makes it possible to use global convolution in the early stages of models with large feature maps, yet still maintains the overall computational cost comparable with using 3x3 or 7x7 kernels. The proposed operation can be used in a plug-and-play manner to 1) convert ViTs to pure-ConvNet architecture to enjoy wider hardware support and achieve higher inference speed; 2) replacing traditional convolutions in the deep stage of ConvNets to improve accuracy by enlarging the effective receptive field. Experiment results show that our ParC op can effectively enlarge the receptive field of traditional ConvNets, and adopting the proposed op benefits both ViTs and ConvNet models on all three popular vision tasks, image classification, object
abstract_zh: 近年来，变压器模型在各个领域取得了巨大的进步。在计算机视觉领域，视觉变换器（ViT）也成为卷积神经网络（ConvNet）的有力替代品，但由于两者各有优点，它们还无法取代ConvNet。例如，ViT 擅长通过注意力机制提取全局特征，而 ConvNet 由于其强归纳偏差，在建模局部关系方面更有效。一个自然的想法是结合 ConvNet 和 ViT 的优势来设计新的结构。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基本神经网络算子，名为位置感知循环卷积（ParC）及其加速版本 Fast-ParC。 ParC 算子可以通过使用全局内核和循环卷积来捕获全局特征，同时通过使用位置嵌入来保持位置敏感性。我们的 Fast-ParC 使用快速傅里叶变换进一步将 ParC 的 O(n2) 时间复杂度降低到 O(n log n)。这种加速使得在具有大特征图的模型的早期阶段使用全局卷积成为可能，但仍然保持与使用 3x3 或 7x7 内核相当的总体计算成本。所提出的操作可以以即插即用的方式使用，1）将ViT转换为纯ConvNet架构，以获得更广泛的硬件支持并实现更高的推理速度； 2）在ConvNets的深层替换传统的卷积，通过扩大有效感受野来提高精度。实验结果表明，我们的 ParC 运算可以有效地扩大传统 ConvNet 的感受野，并且采用所提出的运算对 ViT 和 ConvNet 模型在所有三种流行的视觉任务（图像分类、对象）上都有好处

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Fast-ParC的新神经网络操作符，结合卷积神经网络（ConvNets）和视觉Transformer（ViTs）的优势，通过位置感知的全局特征捕捉提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: ViTs擅长提取全局特征但计算效率低，ConvNets局部建模效率高但感受野有限，需融合两者优势以实现更优性能。
AI.method: 设计位置感知循环卷积（ParC）操作符，利用全局核和位置嵌入捕捉全局特征并保持位置敏感性；通过快速傅里叶变换（FFT）加速至O(n log n)时间复杂度，形成Fast-ParC。
AI.result: 实验表明，Fast-ParC可扩大传统ConvNets感受野，在图像分类等任务中提升ViTs和ConvNets的准确率与推理速度。
AI.conclusion: Fast-ParC有效结合ConvNets与ViTs优势，在保持计算成本可控的前提下，为模型设计提供了灵活的插件式解决方案。

authors_text: Jayoung Kim,Chaejeong Lee,Noseong Park
title: STaSy: Score-based Tabular data Synthesis
title_zh: STaSy：基于分数的表格数据合成
comment: 27 pages, Accepted by ICLR 2023 for spotlight presentation, Official code: https://github.com/JayoungKim408/STaSy
comments: 27 pages, Accepted by ICLR 2023 for spotlight presentation, Official code: https://github.com/JayoungKim408/STaSy
abstract: Tabular data synthesis is a long-standing research topic in machine learning. Many different methods have been proposed over the past decades, ranging from statistical methods to deep generative methods. However, it has not always been successful due to the complicated nature of real-world tabular data. In this paper, we present a new model named Score-based Tabular data Synthesis (STaSy) and its training strategy based on the paradigm of score-based generative modeling. Despite the fact that score-based generative models have resolved many issues in generative models, there still exists room for improvement in tabular data synthesis. Our proposed training strategy includes a self-paced learning technique and a fine-tuning strategy, which further increases the sampling quality and diversity by stabilizing the denoising score matching training. Furthermore, we also conduct rigorous experimental studies in terms of the generative task trilemma: sampling quality, diversity, and time. In our experiments with 15 benchmark tabular datasets and 7 baselines, our method outperforms existing methods in terms of task-dependant evaluations and diversity. Code is available at https://github.com/JayoungKim408/STaSy.
summary: Tabular data synthesis is a long-standing research topic in machine learning. Many different methods have been proposed over the past decades, ranging from statistical methods to deep generative methods. However, it has not always been successful due to the complicated nature of real-world tabular data. In this paper, we present a new model named Score-based Tabular data Synthesis (STaSy) and its training strategy based on the paradigm of score-based generative modeling. Despite the fact that score-based generative models have resolved many issues in generative models, there still exists room for improvement in tabular data synthesis. Our proposed training strategy includes a self-paced learning technique and a fine-tuning strategy, which further increases the sampling quality and diversity by stabilizing the denoising score matching training. Furthermore, we also conduct rigorous experimental studies in terms of the generative task trilemma: sampling quality, diversity, and time. In our experiments with 15 benchmark tabular datasets and 7 baselines, our method outperforms existing methods in terms of task-dependant evaluations and diversity. Code is available at https://github.com/JayoungKim408/STaSy.
abstract_zh: 表格数据合成是机器学习领域一个长期存在的研究课题。在过去的几十年里，人们提出了许多不同的方法，从统计方法到深度生成方法。然而，由于现实世界表格数据的复杂性，它并不总是成功。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为基于分数的表格数据合成（STaSy）的新模型及其基于基于分数的生成建模范式的训练策略。尽管基于分数的生成模型已经解决了生成模型中的许多问题，但表格数据合成仍然存在改进的空间。我们提出的训练策略包括自定进度的学习技术和微调策略，通过稳定去噪分数匹配训练来进一步提高采样质量和多样性。此外，我们还针对生成任务三难困境进行了严格的实验研究：采样质量、多样性和时间。在我们使用 15 个基准表格数据集和 7 个基线进行的实验中，我们的方法在任务相关评估和多样性方面优于现有方法。代码可在 https://github.com/JayoungKim408/STaSy 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分数生成模型的新型表格数据合成方法STaSy，旨在提升生成数据的质量和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有表格数据合成方法在处理复杂现实数据时存在生成质量、多样性与效率难以平衡的问题。
AI.method: 设计了结合自适应学习策略与微调机制的分数生成模型训练框架，通过稳定去噪分数匹配过程优化采样效果。
AI.result: 在15个基准数据集上优于7种基线方法，在任务相关评估和多样性指标上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: STaSy通过改进训练策略有效解决了表格数据合成中的三难困境，为生成模型研究提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于分数生成模型的新型表格数据合成方法STaSy，旨在提升生成数据的质量和多样性。
motivation: 现有表格数据合成方法在处理复杂现实数据时存在生成质量、多样性与效率难以平衡的问题。
method: 设计了结合自适应学习策略与微调机制的分数生成模型训练框架，通过稳定去噪分数匹配过程优化采样效果。
result: 在15个基准数据集上优于7种基线方法，在任务相关评估和多样性指标上表现更优。
conclusion: STaSy通过改进训练策略有效解决了表格数据合成中的三难困境，为生成模型研究提供了新思路。
search_text: STaSy: Score-based Tabular data Synthesis STaSy：基于分数的表格数据合成 Tabular data synthesis is a long-standing research topic in machine learning. Many different methods have been proposed over the past decades, ranging from statistical methods to deep generative methods. However, it has not always been successful due to the complicated nature of real-world tabular data. In this paper, we present a new model named Score-based Tabular data Synthesis (STaSy) and its training strategy based on the paradigm of score-based generative modeling. Despite the fact that score-based generative models have resolved many issues in generative models, there still exists room for improvement in tabular data synthesis. Our proposed training strategy includes a self-paced learning technique and a fine-tuning strategy, which further increases the sampling quality and diversity by stabilizing the denoising score matching training. Furthermore, we also conduct rigorous experimental studies in terms of the generative task trilemma: sampling quality, diversity, and time. In our experiments with 15 benchmark tabular datasets and 7 baselines, our method outperforms existing methods in terms of task-dependant evaluations and diversity. Code is available at https://github.com/JayoungKim408/STaSy. 表格数据合成是机器学习领域一个长期存在的研究课题。在过去的几十年里，人们提出了许多不同的方法，从统计方法到深度生成方法。然而，由于现实世界表格数据的复杂性，它并不总是成功。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为基于分数的表格数据合成（STaSy）的新模型及其基于基于分数的生成建模范式的训练策略。尽管基于分数的生成模型已经解决了生成模型中的许多问题，但表格数据合成仍然存在改进的空间。我们提出的训练策略包括自定进度的学习技术和微调策略，通过稳定去噪分数匹配训练来进一步提高采样质量和多样性。此外，我们还针对生成任务三难困境进行了严格的实验研究：采样质量、多样性和时间。在我们使用 15 个基准表格数据集和 7 个基线进行的实验中，我们的方法在任务相关评估和多样性方面优于现有方法。代码可在 https://github.com/JayoungKim408/STaSy 获取。 本文提出了一种基于分数生成模型的新型表格数据合成方法STaSy，旨在提升生成数据的质量和多样性。 Jayoung Kim,Chaejeong Lee,Noseong Park cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DB

authors_text: Yabo Xiao,Xiaojuan Wang,Dongdong Yu,Kai Su,Lei Jin,Mei Song,Shuicheng Yan,Jian Zhao
title: AdaptivePose++: A Powerful Single-Stage Network for Multi-Person Pose Regression
title_zh: AdaptivePose++：用于多人姿势回归的强大单级网络
comment: Submit to IEEE TCSVT; 11 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.13635
comments: Submit to IEEE TCSVT; 11 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2112.13635
abstract: Multi-person pose estimation generally follows top-down and bottom-up paradigms. Both of them use an extra stage ($\boldsymbol{e.g.,}$ human detection in top-down paradigm or grouping process in bottom-up paradigm) to build the relationship between the human instance and corresponding keypoints, thus leading to the high computation cost and redundant two-stage pipeline. To address the above issue, we propose to represent the human parts as adaptive points and introduce a fine-grained body representation method. The novel body representation is able to sufficiently encode the diverse pose information and effectively model the relationship between the human instance and corresponding keypoints in a single-forward pass. With the proposed body representation, we further deliver a compact single-stage multi-person pose regression network, termed as AdaptivePose. During inference, our proposed network only needs a single-step decode operation to form the multi-person pose without complex post-processes and refinements. We employ AdaptivePose for both 2D/3D multi-person pose estimation tasks to verify the effectiveness of AdaptivePose. Without any bells and whistles, we achieve the most competitive performance on MS COCO and CrowdPose in terms of accuracy and speed. Furthermore, the outstanding performance on MuCo-3DHP and MuPoTS-3D further demonstrates the effectiveness and generalizability on 3D scenes. Code is available at https://github.com/buptxyb666/AdaptivePose.
summary: Multi-person pose estimation generally follows top-down and bottom-up paradigms. Both of them use an extra stage ($\boldsymbol{e.g.,}$ human detection in top-down paradigm or grouping process in bottom-up paradigm) to build the relationship between the human instance and corresponding keypoints, thus leading to the high computation cost and redundant two-stage pipeline. To address the above issue, we propose to represent the human parts as adaptive points and introduce a fine-grained body representation method. The novel body representation is able to sufficiently encode the diverse pose information and effectively model the relationship between the human instance and corresponding keypoints in a single-forward pass. With the proposed body representation, we further deliver a compact single-stage multi-person pose regression network, termed as AdaptivePose. During inference, our proposed network only needs a single-step decode operation to form the multi-person pose without complex post-processes and refinements. We employ AdaptivePose for both 2D/3D multi-person pose estimation tasks to verify the effectiveness of AdaptivePose. Without any bells and whistles, we achieve the most competitive performance on MS COCO and CrowdPose in terms of accuracy and speed. Furthermore, the outstanding performance on MuCo-3DHP and MuPoTS-3D further demonstrates the effectiveness and generalizability on 3D scenes. Code is available at https://github.com/buptxyb666/AdaptivePose.
abstract_zh: 多人姿态估计通常遵循自上而下和自下而上的范例。两者都使用额外的阶段（$\boldsymbol{例如，}$自上而下范式中的人体检测或自下而上范式中的分组过程）来建立人体实例和相应关键点之间的关系，从而导致高计算成本和冗余的两阶段管道。为了解决上述问题，我们建议将人体部位表示为自适应点，并引入细粒度的身体表示方法。新颖的身体表示能够充分编码不同的姿势信息，并在单前向传递中有效地建模人体实例和相应关键点之间的关系。通过所提出的身体表示，我们进一步提供了一个紧凑的单阶段多人姿势回归网络，称为 AdaptivePose。在推理过程中，我们提出的网络只需要单步解码操作即可形成多人姿势，无需复杂的后处理和细化。我们将 AdaptivePose 用于 2D/3D 多人姿势估计任务，以验证 AdaptivePose 的有效性。没有任何花里胡哨的东西，我们在 MS COCO 和 CrowdPose 上在准确性和速度方面实现了最具竞争力的性能。此外，MuCo-3DHP和MuPoTS-3D上的出色表现进一步证明了其在3D场景上的有效性和通用性。代码可在 https://github.com/buptxyb666/AdaptivePose 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种单阶段网络AdaptivePose，用于高效解决多人姿态回归问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多人姿态估计方法（如top-down和bottom-up）依赖额外阶段建立人体实例与关键点关系，导致计算成本高且流程冗余。
AI.method: 引入自适应点表示和细粒度体表征方法，在单次前向传递中编码姿态信息并建模人体与关键点关系，设计单阶段网络AdaptivePose实现单步解码。
AI.result: 在MS COCO、CrowdPose、MuCo-3DHP和MuPoTS-3D数据集上均取得最优性能，兼顾准确率与速度。
AI.conclusion: AdaptivePose通过单阶段设计有效提升了多人姿态估计的效率与泛化能力，适用于2D/3D场景。

authors_text: Xinwei Yu,Xiaohua Zhang
title: (Fusionformer):Exploiting the Joint Motion Synergy with Fusion Network Based On Transformer for 3D Human Pose Estimation
title_zh: (Fusionformer)：利用基于 Transformer 的融合网络的联合运动协同进行 3D 人体姿态估计
abstract: For the current 3D human pose estimation task, a group of methods mainly learn the rules of 2D-3D projection from spatial and temporal correlation. However, earlier methods model the global features of the entire body joint in the time domain, but ignore the motion trajectory of individual joint. The recent work [29] considers that there are differences in motion between different joints and deals with the temporal relationship of each joint separately. However, we found that different joints show the same movement trends under some specific actions. Therefore, our proposed Fusionformer method introduces a self-trajectory module and a mutual-trajectory module based on the spatio-temporal module .After that, the global spatio-temporal features and local joint trajectory features are fused through a linear network in a parallel manner. To eliminate the influence of bad 2D poses on 3D projections, finally we also introduce a pose refinement network to balance the consistency of 3D projections. In addition, we evaluate the proposed method on two benchmark datasets (Human3.6M, MPI-INF-3DHP). Comparing our method with the baseline method poseformer, the results show an improvement of 2.4% MPJPE and 4.3% P-MPJPE on the Human3.6M dataset, respectively.
summary: For the current 3D human pose estimation task, a group of methods mainly learn the rules of 2D-3D projection from spatial and temporal correlation. However, earlier methods model the global features of the entire body joint in the time domain, but ignore the motion trajectory of individual joint. The recent work [29] considers that there are differences in motion between different joints and deals with the temporal relationship of each joint separately. However, we found that different joints show the same movement trends under some specific actions. Therefore, our proposed Fusionformer method introduces a self-trajectory module and a mutual-trajectory module based on the spatio-temporal module .After that, the global spatio-temporal features and local joint trajectory features are fused through a linear network in a parallel manner. To eliminate the influence of bad 2D poses on 3D projections, finally we also introduce a pose refinement network to balance the consistency of 3D projections. In addition, we evaluate the proposed method on two benchmark datasets (Human3.6M, MPI-INF-3DHP). Comparing our method with the baseline method poseformer, the results show an improvement of 2.4% MPJPE and 4.3% P-MPJPE on the Human3.6M dataset, respectively.
abstract_zh: 对于当前的3D人体姿态估计任务，一组方法主要从空间和时间相关性中学习2D-3D投影的规则。然而，早期的方法在时域中对整个身体关节的全局特征进行建模，但却忽略了单个关节的运动轨迹。最近的工作[29]认为不同关节之间的运动存在差异，并分别处理每个关节的时间关系。然而，我们发现不同的关节在某些特定动作下表现出相同的运动趋势。因此，我们提出的Fusionformer方法在时空模块的基础上引入了自轨迹模块和互轨迹模块​​。之后，通过线性网络以并行方式融合全局时空特征和局部关节轨迹特征。为了消除不良 2D 姿势对 3D 投影的影响，最后我们还引入了姿势细化网络来平衡 3D 投影的一致性。此外，我们在两个基准数据集（Human3.6M、MPI-INF-3DHP）上评估了所提出的方法。将我们的方法与基线方法poseformer进行比较，结果显示在Human3.6M数据集上MPJPE和P-MPJPE分别提高了2.4%和4.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fusionformer方法，通过融合时空模块与关节轨迹特征，改进3D人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或忽略单个关节运动轨迹，或单独处理关节时间关系，未能捕捉特定动作下关节的共性运动趋势。
AI.method: 引入自轨迹模块和互轨迹模块，结合时空模块提取特征，通过线性网络并行融合全局时空特征与局部关节轨迹特征，并加入姿态优化网络提升投影一致性。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M数据集上，相比基线Poseformer方法，MPJPE提升2.4%，P-MPJPE提升4.3%。
AI.conclusion: Fusionformer通过同时建模个体关节运动与全局协同模式，有效提升了3D人体姿态估计的准确性。

To eliminate the influence of bad 2D poses on 3D projections, finally we also introduce a pose refinement network to balance the consistency of 3D projections. In addition, we evaluate the proposed method on two benchmark datasets (Human3.6M, MPI-INF-3DHP). Comparing our method with the baseline method poseformer, the results show an improvement of 2.4% MPJPE and 4.3% P-MPJPE on the Human3.6M dataset, respectively. 对于当前的3D人体姿态估计任务，一组方法主要从空间和时间相关性中学习2D-3D投影的规则。然而，早期的方法在时域中对整个身体关节的全局特征进行建模，但却忽略了单个关节的运动轨迹。最近的工作[29]认为不同关节之间的运动存在差异，并分别处理每个关节的时间关系。然而，我们发现不同的关节在某些特定动作下表现出相同的运动趋势。因此，我们提出的Fusionformer方法在时空模块的基础上引入了自轨迹模块和互轨迹模块​​。之后，通过线性网络以并行方式融合全局时空特征和局部关节轨迹特征。为了消除不良 2D 姿势对 3D 投影的影响，最后我们还引入了姿势细化网络来平衡 3D 投影的一致性。此外，我们在两个基准数据集（Human3.6M、MPI-INF-3DHP）上评估了所提出的方法。将我们的方法与基线方法poseformer进行比较，结果显示在Human3.6M数据集上MPJPE和P-MPJPE分别提高了2.4%和4.3%。 本文提出Fusionformer方法，通过融合时空模块与关节轨迹特征，改进3D人体姿态估计。 Xinwei Yu,Xiaohua Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuxia Geng,Jiaoyan Chen,Jeff Z. Pan,Mingyang Chen,Song Jiang,Wen Zhang,Huajun Chen
title: Relational Message Passing for Fully Inductive Knowledge Graph Completion
title_zh: 用于完全归纳知识图完成的关系消息传递
abstract: In knowledge graph completion (KGC), predicting triples involving emerging entities and/or relations, which are unseen when the KG embeddings are learned, has become a critical challenge. Subgraph reasoning with message passing is a promising and popular solution. Some recent methods have achieved good performance, but they (i) usually can only predict triples involving unseen entities alone, failing to address more realistic fully inductive situations with both unseen entities and unseen relations, and (ii) often conduct message passing over the entities with the relation patterns not fully utilized. In this study, we propose a new method named RMPI which uses a novel Relational Message Passing network for fully Inductive KGC. It passes messages directly between relations to make full use of the relation patterns for subgraph reasoning with new techniques on graph transformation, graph pruning, relation-aware neighborhood attention, addressing empty subgraphs, etc., and can utilize the relation semantics defined in the ontological schema of KG. Extensive evaluation on multiple benchmarks has shown the effectiveness of techniques involved in RMPI and its better performance compared with the existing methods that support fully inductive KGC. RMPI is also comparable to the state-of-the-art partially inductive KGC methods with very promising results achieved. Our codes and data are available at https://github.com/zjukg/RMPI.
summary: In knowledge graph completion (KGC), predicting triples involving emerging entities and/or relations, which are unseen when the KG embeddings are learned, has become a critical challenge. Subgraph reasoning with message passing is a promising and popular solution. Some recent methods have achieved good performance, but they (i) usually can only predict triples involving unseen entities alone, failing to address more realistic fully inductive situations with both unseen entities and unseen relations, and (ii) often conduct message passing over the entities with the relation patterns not fully utilized. In this study, we propose a new method named RMPI which uses a novel Relational Message Passing network for fully Inductive KGC. It passes messages directly between relations to make full use of the relation patterns for subgraph reasoning with new techniques on graph transformation, graph pruning, relation-aware neighborhood attention, addressing empty subgraphs, etc., and can utilize the relation semantics defined in the ontological schema of KG. Extensive evaluation on multiple benchmarks has shown the effectiveness of techniques involved in RMPI and its better performance compared with the existing methods that support fully inductive KGC. RMPI is also comparable to the state-of-the-art partially inductive KGC methods with very promising results achieved. Our codes and data are available at https://github.com/zjukg/RMPI.
abstract_zh: 在知识图补全（KGC）中，预测涉及新兴实体和/或关系的三元组（这些实体和/或关系在学习 KG 嵌入时是看不见的）已成为一项关键挑战。带有消息传递的子图推理是一种有前途且流行的解决方案。最近的一些方法取得了良好的性能，但它们（i）通常只能预测仅涉及不可见实体的三元组，无法解决具有不可见实体和不可见关系的更现实的完全归纳情况，并且（ii）经常在关系模式未充分利用的实体上进行消息传递。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种名为 RMPI 的新方法，该方法使用一种新颖的关系消息传递网络来实现完全归纳式 KGC。它通过图变换、图剪枝、关系感知邻域注意力、解决空子图等新技术，在关系之间直接传递消息，充分利用关系模式进行子图推理，并可以利用知识图谱本体模式中定义的关系语义。对多个基准的广泛评估表明了 RMPI 所涉及技术的有效性，并且与支持完全归纳 KGC 的现有方法相比，其性能更好。 RMPI 还可以与最先进的部分归纳 KGC 方法相媲美，并取得了非常有希望的结果。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/zjukg/RMPI 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RMPI的新方法，通过关系消息传递网络解决知识图谱补全中的全归纳问题，即预测包含未见过实体和关系的三元组。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理同时包含未见过实体和关系的全归纳场景时表现不足，且未能充分利用关系模式进行子图推理。
AI.method: 设计关系消息传递网络（RMPI），通过直接在关系间传递消息，结合图变换、图剪枝、关系感知邻域注意力等技术，利用知识图谱本体模式中的关系语义进行子图推理。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，RMPI在全归纳场景下优于现有方法，并且在部分归纳场景下表现与最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: RMPI通过创新的关系消息传递机制和子图推理技术，有效解决了全归纳知识图谱补全的挑战，验证了其方法的有效性和优越性。

authors_text: Silvia Beddar-Wiesing,Giuseppe Alessio D'Inverno,Caterina Graziani,Veronica Lachi,Alice Moallemy-Oureh,Franco Scarselli,Josephine Maria Thomas
title: Weisfeiler-Lehman goes Dynamic: An Analysis of the Expressive Power of Graph Neural Networks for Attributed and Dynamic Graphs
title_zh: Weisfeiler-Lehman 走向动态：图神经网络对属性图和动态图的表达能力分析
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are a large class of relational models for graph processing. Recent theoretical studies on the expressive power of GNNs have focused on two issues. On the one hand, it has been proven that GNNs are as powerful as the Weisfeiler-Lehman test (1-WL) in their ability to distinguish graphs. Moreover, it has been shown that the equivalence enforced by 1-WL equals unfolding equivalence. On the other hand, GNNs turned out to be universal approximators on graphs modulo the constraints enforced by 1-WL/unfolding equivalence. However, these results only apply to Static Attributed Undirected Homogeneous Graphs (SAUHG) with node attributes. In contrast, real-life applications often involve a much larger variety of graph types. In this paper, we conduct a theoretical analysis of the expressive power of GNNs for two other graph domains that are particularly interesting in practical applications, namely dynamic graphs and SAUGHs with edge attributes. Dynamic graphs are widely used in modern applications; hence, the study of the expressive capability of GNNs in this domain is essential for practical reasons and, in addition, it requires a new analyzing approach due to the difference in the architecture of dynamic GNNs compared to static ones. On the other hand, the examination of SAUHGs is of particular relevance since they act as a standard form for all graph types: it has been shown that all graph types can be transformed without loss of information to SAUHGs with both attributes on nodes and edges. This paper considers generic GNN models and appropriate 1-WL tests for those domains. Then, the known results on the expressive power of GNNs are extended to the mentioned domains: it is proven that GNNs have the same capability as the 1-WL test, the 1-WL equivalence equals unfolding equivalence and that GNNs are universal approximators modulo 1-WL/unfolding equivalence.
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) are a large class of relational models for graph processing. Recent theoretical studies on the expressive power of GNNs have focused on two issues. On the one hand, it has been proven that GNNs are as powerful as the Weisfeiler-Lehman test (1-WL) in their ability to distinguish graphs. Moreover, it has been shown that the equivalence enforced by 1-WL equals unfolding equivalence. On the other hand, GNNs turned out to be universal approximators on graphs modulo the constraints enforced by 1-WL/unfolding equivalence. However, these results only apply to Static Attributed Undirected Homogeneous Graphs (SAUHG) with node attributes. In contrast, real-life applications often involve a much larger variety of graph types. In this paper, we conduct a theoretical analysis of the expressive power of GNNs for two other graph domains that are particularly interesting in practical applications, namely dynamic graphs and SAUGHs with edge attributes. Dynamic graphs are widely used in modern applications; hence, the study of the expressive capability of GNNs in this domain is essential for practical reasons and, in addition, it requires a new analyzing approach due to the difference in the architecture of dynamic GNNs compared to static ones. On the other hand, the examination of SAUHGs is of particular relevance since they act as a standard form for all graph types: it has been shown that all graph types can be transformed without loss of information to SAUHGs with both attributes on nodes and edges. This paper considers generic GNN models and appropriate 1-WL tests for those domains. Then, the known results on the expressive power of GNNs are extended to the mentioned domains: it is proven that GNNs have the same capability as the 1-WL test, the 1-WL equivalence equals unfolding equivalence and that GNNs are universal approximators modulo 1-WL/unfolding equivalence.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）是一大类用于图处理的关系模型。最近关于 GNN 表达能力的理论研究主要集中在两个问题上。一方面，已经证明 GNN 区分图的能力与 Weisfeiler-Lehman 测试（1-WL）一样强大。此外，已经表明 1-WL 强制执行的等价等于展开等价。另一方面，GNN 被证明是图上以 1-WL/展开等价强制约束为模的通用逼近器。然而，这些结果仅适用于具有节点属性的静态属性无向同质图（SAUHG）。相比之下，现实生活中的应用程序通常涉及更多种类的图形类型。在本文中，我们对实际应用中特别有趣的另外两个图域（即动态图和具有边缘属性的 SAUGH）的 GNN 表达能力进行了理论分析。动态图在现代应用中得到广泛应用；因此，出于实际原因，研究 GNN 在该领域的表达能力至关重要，此外，由于动态 GNN 的架构与静态 GNN 的差异，它需要一种新的分析方法。另一方面，SAUHG 的检查具有特别的相关性，因为它们充当所有图类型的标准形式：事实证明，所有图类型都可以在不丢失节点和边属性的 SAUHG 信息的情况下进行转换。本文考虑了通用 GNN 模型和针对这些领域的适当 1-WL 测试。然后，将 GNN 表达能力的已知结果扩展到上述领域：证明 GNN 具有与 1-WL 测试相同的能力，1-WL 等价等于展开等价，并且 GNN 是模 1-WL/展开等价的通用逼近器。

AI.tldr: 本文分析图神经网络（GNN）在动态图和带边属性的静态图中的表达能力，扩展现有理论结果。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN表达能力研究局限于静态带节点属性图，而实际应用中动态图和带边属性图更常见，需理论支持。
AI.method: 通过理论分析，结合通用GNN模型与对应1-WL测试，扩展静态图结果到动态图和带边属性图领域。
AI.result: 证明GNN在动态图和带边属性图中与1-WL测试等价，且具有模1-WL的通用逼近能力。
AI.conclusion: 研究为动态图和带边属性图的GNN应用提供理论基础，推动实际应用与模型设计优化。

Then, the known results on the expressive power of GNNs are extended to the mentioned domains: it is proven that GNNs have the same capability as the 1-WL test, the 1-WL equivalence equals unfolding equivalence and that GNNs are universal approximators modulo 1-WL/unfolding equivalence. 图神经网络（GNN）是一大类用于图处理的关系模型。最近关于 GNN 表达能力的理论研究主要集中在两个问题上。一方面，已经证明 GNN 区分图的能力与 Weisfeiler-Lehman 测试（1-WL）一样强大。此外，已经表明 1-WL 强制执行的等价等于展开等价。另一方面，GNN 被证明是图上以 1-WL/展开等价强制约束为模的通用逼近器。然而，这些结果仅适用于具有节点属性的静态属性无向同质图（SAUHG）。相比之下，现实生活中的应用程序通常涉及更多种类的图形类型。在本文中，我们对实际应用中特别有趣的另外两个图域（即动态图和具有边缘属性的 SAUGH）的 GNN 表达能力进行了理论分析。动态图在现代应用中得到广泛应用；因此，出于实际原因，研究 GNN 在该领域的表达能力至关重要，此外，由于动态 GNN 的架构与静态 GNN 的差异，它需要一种新的分析方法。另一方面，SAUHG 的检查具有特别的相关性，因为它们充当所有图类型的标准形式：事实证明，所有图类型都可以在不丢失节点和边属性的 SAUHG 信息的情况下进行转换。本文考虑了通用 GNN 模型和针对这些领域的适当 1-WL 测试。然后，将 GNN 表达能力的已知结果扩展到上述领域：证明 GNN 具有与 1-WL 测试相同的能力，1-WL 等价等于展开等价，并且 GNN 是模 1-WL/展开等价的通用逼近器。 本文分析图神经网络（GNN）在动态图和带边属性的静态图中的表达能力，扩展现有理论结果。 Silvia Beddar-Wiesing,Giuseppe Alessio D'Inverno,Caterina Graziani,Veronica Lachi,Alice Moallemy-Oureh,Franco Scarselli,Josephine Maria Thomas cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Tai Hoang,Alona Kharchenko,Simon Trendel,Rafael Hostettler
title: Ball-and-socket joint pose estimation using magnetic field
title_zh: 使用磁场进行球窝关节姿态估计
comment: Accepted at the International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR) 2022
comments: Accepted at the International Symposium on Robotics Research (ISRR) 2022
abstract: Roboy 3.0 is an open-source tendon-driven humanoid robot that mimics the musculoskeletal system of the human body. Roboy 3.0 is being developed as a remote robotic body - or a robotic avatar - for humans to achieve remote physical presence. Artificial muscles and tendons allow it to closely resemble human morphology with 3-DoF neck, shoulders and wrists. Roboy 3.0 3-DoF joints are implemented as ball-and-socket joints. While industry provides a clear solution for 1-DoF joint pose sensing, it is not the case for the ball-and-socket joint type. In this paper we present a custom solution to estimate the pose of a ball-and-socket joint. We embed an array of magnets into the ball and an array of 3D magnetic sensors into the socket. We then, based on the changes in the magnetic field as the joint rotates, are able to estimate the orientation of the joint. We evaluate the performance of two neural network approaches using the LSTM and Bayesian-filter like DVBF. Results show that in order to achieve the same mean square error (MSE) DVBFs require significantly more time training and hyperparameter tuning compared to LSTMs, while DVBF cope with sensor noise better. Both methods are capable of real-time joint pose estimation at 37 Hz with MSE of around 0.03 rad for all three degrees of freedom combined. The LSTM model is deployed and used for joint pose estimation of Roboy 3.0's shoulder and neck joints. The software implementation and PCB designs are open-sourced under https://github.com/Roboy/ball_and_socket_estimator
summary: Roboy 3.0 is an open-source tendon-driven humanoid robot that mimics the musculoskeletal system of the human body. Roboy 3.0 is being developed as a remote robotic body - or a robotic avatar - for humans to achieve remote physical presence. Artificial muscles and tendons allow it to closely resemble human morphology with 3-DoF neck, shoulders and wrists. Roboy 3.0 3-DoF joints are implemented as ball-and-socket joints. While industry provides a clear solution for 1-DoF joint pose sensing, it is not the case for the ball-and-socket joint type. In this paper we present a custom solution to estimate the pose of a ball-and-socket joint. We embed an array of magnets into the ball and an array of 3D magnetic sensors into the socket. We then, based on the changes in the magnetic field as the joint rotates, are able to estimate the orientation of the joint. We evaluate the performance of two neural network approaches using the LSTM and Bayesian-filter like DVBF. Results show that in order to achieve the same mean square error (MSE) DVBFs require significantly more time training and hyperparameter tuning compared to LSTMs, while DVBF cope with sensor noise better. Both methods are capable of real-time joint pose estimation at 37 Hz with MSE of around 0.03 rad for all three degrees of freedom combined. The LSTM model is deployed and used for joint pose estimation of Roboy 3.0's shoulder and neck joints. The software implementation and PCB designs are open-sourced under https://github.com/Roboy/ball_and_socket_estimator
abstract_zh: Roboy 3.0是一款开源的肌腱驱动的人形机器人，模仿人体的肌肉骨骼系统。 Roboy 3.0 正在开发为远程机器人身体（或机器人化身），供人类实现远程物理存在。人造肌肉和肌腱使其与具有 3-DoF 颈部、肩膀和手腕的人类形态非常相似。 Roboy 3.0 3-DoF 关节采用球窝关节。虽然业界为 1-DoF 关节姿态传感提供了明确的解决方案，但球窝关节类型的情况并非如此。在本文中，我们提出了一种定制解决方案来估计球窝关节的姿态。我们将一组磁铁嵌入到球中，并将一组 3D 磁传感器嵌入到插座中。然后，我们根据关节旋转时磁场的变化，能够估计关节的方向。我们使用 LSTM 和贝叶斯滤波器（如 DVBF）评估两种神经网络方法的性能。结果表明，为了实现相同的均方误差 (MSE)，与 LSTM 相比，DVBF 需要明显更多的时间训练和超参数调整，而 DVBF 可以更好地应对传感器噪声。两种方法都能够在 37 Hz 频率下进行实时关节姿态估计，所有三个自由度组合的 MSE 约为 0.03 rad。部署 LSTM 模型并用于 Roboy 3.0 肩颈关节的关节姿态估计。软件实现和 PCB 设计在 https://github.com/Roboy/ball_and_socket_estimator 下开源

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于磁场的球窝关节姿态估计方法，用于仿人机器人Roboy 3.0的3自由度关节。
AI.motivation: 现有工业方案难以满足球窝关节的多自由度姿态感知需求，而Roboy 3.0作为远程机器人化身需要精确的关节定位以实现类人运动控制。
AI.method: 在球体嵌入磁铁阵列，窝部安装3D磁传感器阵列，通过磁场变化特征结合LSTM神经网络和DVBF贝叶斯滤波器进行姿态估计。
AI.result: 两种方法均实现37Hz实时估计，综合MSE约0.03rad。LSTM训练效率更高，DVBF抗噪性能更优，LSTM已部署于Roboy 3.0肩颈关节。
AI.conclusion: 磁场传感结合深度学习有效解决球窝关节姿态估计难题，LSTM在实际部署中展现更优的实时性与实用性。

authors_text: Junhao Zheng,Zhanxian Liang,Haibin Chen,Qianli Ma
title: Distilling Causal Effect from Miscellaneous Other-Class for Continual Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 从各种其他类中提取因果效应以进行持续命名实体识别
abstract: Continual Learning for Named Entity Recognition (CL-NER) aims to learn a growing number of entity types over time from a stream of data. However, simply learning Other-Class in the same way as new entity types amplifies the catastrophic forgetting and leads to a substantial performance drop. The main cause behind this is that Other-Class samples usually contain old entity types, and the old knowledge in these Other-Class samples is not preserved properly. Thanks to the causal inference, we identify that the forgetting is caused by the missing causal effect from the old data. To this end, we propose a unified causal framework to retrieve the causality from both new entity types and Other-Class. Furthermore, we apply curriculum learning to mitigate the impact of label noise and introduce a self-adaptive weight for balancing the causal effects between new entity types and Other-Class. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art method by a large margin. Moreover, our method can be combined with the existing state-of-the-art methods to improve the performance in CL-NER
summary: Continual Learning for Named Entity Recognition (CL-NER) aims to learn a growing number of entity types over time from a stream of data. However, simply learning Other-Class in the same way as new entity types amplifies the catastrophic forgetting and leads to a substantial performance drop. The main cause behind this is that Other-Class samples usually contain old entity types, and the old knowledge in these Other-Class samples is not preserved properly. Thanks to the causal inference, we identify that the forgetting is caused by the missing causal effect from the old data. To this end, we propose a unified causal framework to retrieve the causality from both new entity types and Other-Class. Furthermore, we apply curriculum learning to mitigate the impact of label noise and introduce a self-adaptive weight for balancing the causal effects between new entity types and Other-Class. Experimental results on three benchmark datasets show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art method by a large margin. Moreover, our method can be combined with the existing state-of-the-art methods to improve the performance in CL-NER
abstract_zh: 命名实体识别的持续学习 (CL-NER) 旨在随着时间的推移从数据流中学习越来越多的实体类型。然而，简单地以与新实体类型相同的方式学习其他类会放大灾难性遗忘并导致性能大幅下降。造成这种情况的主要原因是其他类样本通常包含旧的实体类型，而这些其他类样本中的旧知识没有得到妥善保存。通过因果推断，我们发现遗忘是由于旧数据缺失因果效应造成的。为此，我们提出了一个统一的因果框架来从新实体类型和其他类中检索因果关系。此外，我们应用课程学习来减轻标签噪声的影响，并引入自适应权重来平衡新实体类型和其他类之间的因果效应。三个基准数据集的实验结果表明，我们的方法大大优于最先进的方法。此外，我们的方法可以与现有的最先进的方法相结合，以提高 CL-NER 的性能

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于因果推理的统一框架，用于在持续命名实体识别（CL-NER）中缓解灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将Other-Class（非实体类）样本与新实体类型同等对待，导致旧知识丢失和性能下降。因果推理表明，遗忘源于旧数据中因果效应的缺失。
AI.method: 构建统一因果框架提取新实体类型与Other-Class的因果关系，结合课程学习降低标签噪声影响，并引入自适应权重平衡两类因果效应。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，且可与现有技术结合进一步提升CL-NER性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过因果推理有效缓解CL-NER中的灾难性遗忘问题，为持续学习提供了新的研究框架。

authors_text: Matin Macktoobian
title: Self-organizing nest migration dynamics synthesis for ant colony systems
title_zh: 蚁群系统的自组织巢迁移动力学综合
abstract: In this study, we synthesize a novel dynamical approach for ant colonies enabling them to migrate to new nest sites in a self-organizing fashion. In other words, we realize ant colony migration as a self-organizing phenotype-level collective behavior. For this purpose, we first segment the edges of the graph of ants' pathways. Then, each segment, attributed to its own pheromone profile, may host an ant. So, multiple ants may occupy an edge at the same time. Thanks to this segment-wise edge formulation, ants have more selection options in the course of their pathway determination, thereby increasing the diversity of their colony's emergent behaviors. In light of the continuous pheromone dynamics of segments, each edge owns a spatio-temporal piece-wise continuous pheromone profile in which both deposit and evaporation processes are unified. The passive dynamics of the proposed migration mechanism is sufficiently rich so that an ant colony can migrate to the vicinity of a new nest site in a self-organizing manner without any external supervision. In particular, we perform extensive simulations to test our migration dynamics applied to a colony including 500 ants traversing a pathway graph comprising 200 nodes and 4000 edges which are segmented based on various resolutions. The obtained results exhibit the effectiveness of our strategy.

Thanks to this segment-wise edge formulation, ants have more selection options in the course of their pathway determination, thereby increasing the diversity of their colony's emergent behaviors. In light of the continuous pheromone dynamics of segments, each edge owns a spatio-temporal piece-wise continuous pheromone profile in which both deposit and evaporation processes are unified. The passive dynamics of the proposed migration mechanism is sufficiently rich so that an ant colony can migrate to the vicinity of a new nest site in a self-organizing manner without any external supervision. In particular, we perform extensive simulations to test our migration dynamics applied to a colony including 500 ants traversing a pathway graph comprising 200 nodes and 4000 edges which are segmented based on various resolutions. The obtained results exhibit the effectiveness of our strategy.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，我们为蚁群综合了一种新颖的动态方法，使它们能够以自组织的方式迁移到新的巢穴地点。 In other words, we realize ant colony migration as a self-organizing phenotype-level collective behavior. For this purpose, we first segment the edges of the graph of ants' pathways. Then, each segment, attributed to its own pheromone profile, may host an ant. So, multiple ants may occupy an edge at the same time.由于这种分段边缘公式，蚂蚁在路径确定过程中拥有更多选择选择，从而增加了蚁群突发行为的多样性。鉴于片段的连续信息素动力学，每条边都拥有时空分段连续的信息素剖面，其中沉积和蒸发过程是统一的。所提出的迁移机制的被动动态足够丰富，使得蚁群可以在没有任何外部监督的情况下以自组织方式迁移到新巢穴附近。特别是，我们进行了广泛的模拟来测试我们的迁移动力学应用于一个蚁群，其中包括 500 只蚂蚁，它们穿过一个由 200 个节点和 4000 个边组成的路径图，这些边根据不同的分辨率进行分段。 The obtained results exhibit the effectiveness of our strategy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型动态方法，使蚁群能够以自组织方式迁移至新巢穴。
AI.motivation: 传统蚁群迁移方法依赖外部控制，缺乏自组织特性。本文旨在通过动态信息素机制实现无需监督的自组织迁移行为。
AI.method: 通过分割路径图的边为多个片段，每个片段独立维护信息素动态。蚂蚁在片段间选择路径时可提升行为多样性，信息素沉积与蒸发过程统一建模为时空连续函数。
AI.result: 在包含500只蚂蚁、200节点4000边的路径图上进行的大量仿真验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分段信息素动态模型成功实现了蚁群的自组织迁移，为群体智能系统提供了新范式。
