authors_text: Xuejun Yan,Hongyu Yan,Jingjing Wang,Hang Du,Zhihong Wu,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu,Li Lu
title: FBNet: Feedback Network for Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: FBNet：点云补全的反馈网络
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The source code and model are available at https://github.com/hikvision-research/3DVision/. Accepted to ECCV 2022 as oral presentation
comments: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The source code and model are available at https://github.com/hikvision-research/3DVision/. Accepted to ECCV 2022 as oral presentation
abstract: The rapid development of point cloud learning has driven point cloud completion into a new era. However, the information flows of most existing completion methods are solely feedforward, and high-level information is rarely reused to improve low-level feature learning. To this end, we propose a novel Feedback Network (FBNet) for point cloud completion, in which present features are efficiently refined by rerouting subsequent fine-grained ones. Firstly, partial inputs are fed to a Hierarchical Graph-based Network (HGNet) to generate coarse shapes. Then, we cascade several Feedback-Aware Completion (FBAC) Blocks and unfold them across time recurrently. Feedback connections between two adjacent time steps exploit fine-grained features to improve present shape generations. The main challenge of building feedback connections is the dimension mismatching between present and subsequent features. To address this, the elaborately designed point Cross Transformer exploits efficient information from feedback features via cross attention strategy and then refines present features with the enhanced feedback features. Quantitative and qualitative experiments on several datasets demonstrate the superiority of proposed FBNet compared to state-of-the-art methods on point completion task.
summary: The rapid development of point cloud learning has driven point cloud completion into a new era. However, the information flows of most existing completion methods are solely feedforward, and high-level information is rarely reused to improve low-level feature learning. To this end, we propose a novel Feedback Network (FBNet) for point cloud completion, in which present features are efficiently refined by rerouting subsequent fine-grained ones. Firstly, partial inputs are fed to a Hierarchical Graph-based Network (HGNet) to generate coarse shapes. Then, we cascade several Feedback-Aware Completion (FBAC) Blocks and unfold them across time recurrently. Feedback connections between two adjacent time steps exploit fine-grained features to improve present shape generations. The main challenge of building feedback connections is the dimension mismatching between present and subsequent features. To address this, the elaborately designed point Cross Transformer exploits efficient information from feedback features via cross attention strategy and then refines present features with the enhanced feedback features. Quantitative and qualitative experiments on several datasets demonstrate the superiority of proposed FBNet compared to state-of-the-art methods on point completion task.
abstract_zh: 点云学习的快速发展推动点云完成进入了新时代。然而，大多数现有补全方法的信息流只是前馈的，很少重用高层信息来改进低层特征学习。为此，我们提出了一种用于点云补全的新型反馈网络（FBNet），其中通过重新路由后续的细粒度特征来有效地细化当前特征。首先，部分输入被馈送到基于分层图的网络（HGNet）以生成粗略形状。然后，我们级联几个反馈感知完成（FBAC）块并跨时间循环展开它们。两个相邻时间步骤之间的反馈连接利用细粒度特征来改进当前形状的生成。建立反馈连接的主要挑战是当前特征和后续特征之间的维度不匹配。为了解决这个问题，精心设计的点交叉变压器通过交叉注意策略利用来自反馈特征的有效信息，然后使用增强的反馈特征细化当前特征。对多个数据集的定量和定性实验证明了所提出的 FBNet 与点完成任务上最先进的方法相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种反馈网络（FBNet）用于点云补全，通过反馈机制优化特征学习，提升补全效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法信息流为单向前馈，高阶信息难以复用以提升低级特征学习，限制了补全效果。
AI.method: 提出Hierarchical Graph-based Network（HGNet）生成粗略形状，结合反馈感知完成模块（FBAC）与时间递归展开的反馈连接，利用点交叉变换器处理维度不匹配，提升特征融合效率。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，FBNet在点云补全任务中优于现有最先进方法，具有更高的精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 反馈网络有效解决了点云补全中的信息复用问题，通过交叉注意力机制处理维度差异，验证了方法在提升补全质量上的有效性。

authors_text: Yong He,Cheng Wang,Shun Zhang,Nan Li,Zhaorong Li,Zhenyu Zeng
title: KG-MTT-BERT: Knowledge Graph Enhanced BERT for Multi-Type Medical Text Classification
title_zh: KG-MTT-BERT：用于多类型医学文本分类的知识图增强 BERT
abstract: Medical text learning has recently emerged as a promising area to improve healthcare due to the wide adoption of electronic health record (EHR) systems. The complexity of the medical text such as diverse length, mixed text types, and full of medical jargon, poses a great challenge for developing effective deep learning models. BERT has presented state-of-the-art results in many NLP tasks, such as text classification and question answering. However, the standalone BERT model cannot deal with the complexity of the medical text, especially the lengthy clinical notes. Herein, we develop a new model called KG-MTT-BERT (Knowledge Graph Enhanced Multi-Type Text BERT) by extending the BERT model for long and multi-type text with the integration of the medical knowledge graph. Our model can outperform all baselines and other state-of-the-art models in diagnosis-related group (DRG) classification, which requires comprehensive medical text for accurate classification. We also demonstrated that our model can effectively handle multi-type text and the integration of medical knowledge graph can significantly improve the performance.
summary: Medical text learning has recently emerged as a promising area to improve healthcare due to the wide adoption of electronic health record (EHR) systems. The complexity of the medical text such as diverse length, mixed text types, and full of medical jargon, poses a great challenge for developing effective deep learning models. BERT has presented state-of-the-art results in many NLP tasks, such as text classification and question answering. However, the standalone BERT model cannot deal with the complexity of the medical text, especially the lengthy clinical notes. Herein, we develop a new model called KG-MTT-BERT (Knowledge Graph Enhanced Multi-Type Text BERT) by extending the BERT model for long and multi-type text with the integration of the medical knowledge graph. Our model can outperform all baselines and other state-of-the-art models in diagnosis-related group (DRG) classification, which requires comprehensive medical text for accurate classification. We also demonstrated that our model can effectively handle multi-type text and the integration of medical knowledge graph can significantly improve the performance.
abstract_zh: 由于电子健康记录（EHR）系统的广泛采用，医学文本学习最近已成为改善医疗保健的一个有前景的领域。医学文本的复杂性，如长度多样、文本类型混合、医学术语较多等，给开发有效的深度学习模型带来了巨大的挑战。 BERT 在许多 NLP 任务中都取得了最先进的成果，例如文本分类和问答。然而，独立的 BERT 模型无法处理复杂的医学文本，尤其是冗长的临床笔记。在这里，我们通过将 BERT 模型扩展到长、多类型文本并结合医学知识图谱，开发了一种名为 KG-MTT-BERT（知识图增强型多类型文本 BERT）的新模型。我们的模型在诊断相关组（DRG）分类方面可以优于所有基线和其他最先进的模型，这需要全面的医学文本才能进行准确的分类。我们还证明了我们的模型可以有效处理多类型文本，并且医学知识图的集成可以显着提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合知识图谱的BERT模型（KG-MTT-BERT），用于处理多类型医疗文本的分类任务，特别是针对诊断相关组（DRG）分类的复杂医疗文本。
AI.motivation: 医疗文本具有长度不一、类型混合和专业术语多等特点，传统BERT模型难以有效处理长临床记录和复杂医疗内容，需通过知识图谱增强模型表现。
AI.method: 通过扩展BERT模型，整合医疗知识图谱信息，设计KG-MTT-BERT模型以处理长文本和多类型医疗数据，提升对医学概念及上下文的理解能力。
AI.result: 在DRG分类任务中，KG-MTT-BERT优于所有基线模型和其他先进方法，且证明了知识图谱整合对多类型医疗文本处理的显著性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 知识图谱增强的BERT模型能有效应对医疗文本复杂性，在多类型医学文本分类任务中具有显著优势。

search_text: KG-MTT-BERT: Knowledge Graph Enhanced BERT for Multi-Type Medical Text Classification KG-MTT-BERT：用于多类型医学文本分类的知识图增强 BERT Medical text learning has recently emerged as a promising area to improve healthcare due to the wide adoption of electronic health record (EHR) systems. The complexity of the medical text such as diverse length, mixed text types, and full of medical jargon, poses a great challenge for developing effective deep learning models. BERT has presented state-of-the-art results in many NLP tasks, such as text classification and question answering. However, the standalone BERT model cannot deal with the complexity of the medical text, especially the lengthy clinical notes. Herein, we develop a new model called KG-MTT-BERT (Knowledge Graph Enhanced Multi-Type Text BERT) by extending the BERT model for long and multi-type text with the integration of the medical knowledge graph. Our model can outperform all baselines and other state-of-the-art models in diagnosis-related group (DRG) classification, which requires comprehensive medical text for accurate classification. We also demonstrated that our model can effectively handle multi-type text and the integration of medical knowledge graph can significantly improve the performance. 由于电子健康记录（EHR）系统的广泛采用，医学文本学习最近已成为改善医疗保健的一个有前景的领域。医学文本的复杂性，如长度多样、文本类型混合、医学术语较多等，给开发有效的深度学习模型带来了巨大的挑战。 BERT 在许多 NLP 任务中都取得了最先进的成果，例如文本分类和问答。然而，独立的 BERT 模型无法处理复杂的医学文本，尤其是冗长的临床笔记。在这里，我们通过将 BERT 模型扩展到长、多类型文本并结合医学知识图谱，开发了一种名为 KG-MTT-BERT（知识图增强型多类型文本 BERT）的新模型。我们的模型在诊断相关组（DRG）分类方面可以优于所有基线和其他最先进的模型，这需要全面的医学文本才能进行准确的分类。我们还证明了我们的模型可以有效处理多类型文本，并且医学知识图的集成可以显着提高性能。 本文提出了一种结合知识图谱的BERT模型（KG-MTT-BERT），用于处理多类型医疗文本的分类任务，特别是针对诊断相关组（DRG）分类的复杂医疗文本。 Yong He,Cheng Wang,Shun Zhang,Nan Li,Zhaorong Li,Zhenyu Zeng cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Wei Ju,Yifang Qin,Ziyue Qiao,Xiao Luo,Yifan Wang,Yanjie Fu,Ming Zhang
title: Kernel-based Substructure Exploration for Next POI Recommendation
title_zh: 基于内核的子结构探索下一个 POI 推荐
comment: Accepted by the IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM) 2022
comments: Accepted by the IEEE International Conference on Data Mining (ICDM) 2022
abstract: Point-of-Interest (POI) recommendation, which benefits from the proliferation of GPS-enabled devices and location-based social networks (LBSNs), plays an increasingly important role in recommender systems. It aims to provide users with the convenience to discover their interested places to visit based on previous visits and current status. Most existing methods usually merely leverage recurrent neural networks (RNNs) to explore sequential influences for recommendation. Despite the effectiveness, these methods not only neglect topological geographical influences among POIs, but also fail to model high-order sequential substructures. To tackle the above issues, we propose a Kernel-Based Graph Neural Network (KBGNN) for next POI recommendation, which combines the characteristics of both geographical and sequential influences in a collaborative way. KBGNN consists of a geographical module and a sequential module. On the one hand, we construct a geographical graph and leverage a message passing neural network to capture the topological geographical influences. On the other hand, we explore high-order sequential substructures in the user-aware sequential graph using a graph kernel neural network to capture user preferences. Finally, a consistency learning framework is introduced to jointly incorporate geographical and sequential information extracted from two separate graphs. In this way, the two modules effectively exchange knowledge to mutually enhance each other. Extensive experiments conducted on two real-world LBSN datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed method over the state-of-the-arts. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Fang6ang/KBGNN.
summary: Point-of-Interest (POI) recommendation, which benefits from the proliferation of GPS-enabled devices and location-based social networks (LBSNs), plays an increasingly important role in recommender systems. It aims to provide users with the convenience to discover their interested places to visit based on previous visits and current status. Most existing methods usually merely leverage recurrent neural networks (RNNs) to explore sequential influences for recommendation. Despite the effectiveness, these methods not only neglect topological geographical influences among POIs, but also fail to model high-order sequential substructures. To tackle the above issues, we propose a Kernel-Based Graph Neural Network (KBGNN) for next POI recommendation, which combines the characteristics of both geographical and sequential influences in a collaborative way. KBGNN consists of a geographical module and a sequential module. On the one hand, we construct a geographical graph and leverage a message passing neural network to capture the topological geographical influences. On the other hand, we explore high-order sequential substructures in the user-aware sequential graph using a graph kernel neural network to capture user preferences. Finally, a consistency learning framework is introduced to jointly incorporate geographical and sequential information extracted from two separate graphs. In this way, the two modules effectively exchange knowledge to mutually enhance each other. Extensive experiments conducted on two real-world LBSN datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our proposed method over the state-of-the-arts. Our codes are available at https://github.com/Fang6ang/KBGNN.
abstract_zh: 兴趣点 (POI) 推荐受益于 GPS 设备和基于位置的社交网络 (LBSN) 的激增，在推荐系统中发挥着越来越重要的作用。它旨在为用户提供便利，根据以前的访问和当前的状态来发现他们感兴趣的景点。大多数现有方法通常仅利用循环神经网络（RNN）来探索推荐的顺序影响。尽管有效，这些方法不仅忽略了 POI 之间的拓扑地理影响，而且无法对高阶顺序子结构进行建模。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了一种用于下一个 POI 推荐的基于内核的图神经网络（KBGNN），它以协作的方式结合了地理和顺序影响的特征。 KBGNN 由地理模块和顺序模块组成。一方面，我们构建了一个地理图并利用消息传递神经网络来捕获拓扑地理影响。另一方面，我们使用图内核神经网络来探索用户感知序列图中的高阶序列子结构以捕获用户偏好。最后，引入一致性学习框架来联合合并从两个单独的图中提取的地理和顺序信息。这样，两个模块有效地交换知识，相互促进。在两个真实世界的 LBSN 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了我们提出的方法比最先进的方法具有优越的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Fang6ang/KBGNN 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于核方法的图神经网络（KBGNN），用于改进基于位置的社交网络（LBSN）中的下一个兴趣点（POI）推荐，通过结合地理拓扑结构和高阶序列子结构信息。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖循环神经网络（RNN）建模序列信息，但忽略了POI之间的地理拓扑关系及高阶序列子结构，导致推荐效果受限。
AI.method: KBGNN包含地理模块和序列模块：地理模块通过图神经网络捕捉POI拓扑关系；序列模块利用图核网络挖掘用户序列偏好；并通过一致性学习框架融合两模块信息。
AI.result: 在两个真实LBSN数据集上的实验表明，KBGNN在推荐性能上优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: KBGNN通过协同建模地理与序列信息，有效提升了下一POI推荐的准确性。

authors_text: Aravind Reddy,Zhao Song,Lichen Zhang
title: Dynamic Tensor Product Regression
title_zh: 动态张量积回归
abstract: In this work, we initiate the study of \emph{Dynamic Tensor Product Regression}. One has matrices $A_1\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\times d_1},\ldots,A_q\in \mathbb{R}^{n_q\times d_q}$ and a label vector $b\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\ldots n_q}$, and the goal is to solve the regression problem with the design matrix $A$ being the tensor product of the matrices $A_1, A_2, \dots, A_q$ i.e. $\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^{d_1\ldots d_q}}~\|(A_1\otimes \ldots\otimes A_q)x-b\|_2$. At each time step, one matrix $A_i$ receives a sparse change, and the goal is to maintain a sketch of the tensor product $A_1\otimes\ldots \otimes A_q$ so that the regression solution can be updated quickly. Recomputing the solution from scratch for each round is very slow and so it is important to develop algorithms which can quickly update the solution with the new design matrix. Our main result is a dynamic tree data structure where any update to a single matrix can be propagated quickly throughout the tree. We show that our data structure can be used to solve dynamic versions of not only Tensor Product Regression, but also Tensor Product Spline regression (which is a generalization of ridge regression) and for maintaining Low Rank Approximations for the tensor product.
summary: In this work, we initiate the study of \emph{Dynamic Tensor Product Regression}. One has matrices $A_1\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\times d_1},\ldots,A_q\in \mathbb{R}^{n_q\times d_q}$ and a label vector $b\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\ldots n_q}$, and the goal is to solve the regression problem with the design matrix $A$ being the tensor product of the matrices $A_1, A_2, \dots, A_q$ i.e. $\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^{d_1\ldots d_q}}~\|(A_1\otimes \ldots\otimes A_q)x-b\|_2$. At each time step, one matrix $A_i$ receives a sparse change, and the goal is to maintain a sketch of the tensor product $A_1\otimes\ldots \otimes A_q$ so that the regression solution can be updated quickly. Recomputing the solution from scratch for each round is very slow and so it is important to develop algorithms which can quickly update the solution with the new design matrix. Our main result is a dynamic tree data structure where any update to a single matrix can be propagated quickly throughout the tree. We show that our data structure can be used to solve dynamic versions of not only Tensor Product Regression, but also Tensor Product Spline regression (which is a generalization of ridge regression) and for maintaining Low Rank Approximations for the tensor product.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们启动了\emph{动态张量积回归}的研究。有矩阵 $A_1\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\times d_1},\ldots,A_q\in \mathbb{R}^{n_q\times d_q}$ 和标签向量 $b\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\ldots n_q}$，目标是解决回归问题，设计矩阵 $A$ 是矩阵 $A_1, A_2, \dots, A_q$ 即 $\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^{d_1\ldots d_q}}~\|(A_1\otimes \ldots\otimes A_q)x-b\|_2$。在每个时间步，一个矩阵 $A_i$ 接收稀疏变化，目标是维护张量积 $A_1​​\otimes\ldots \otimes A_q$ 的草图，以便可以快速更新回归解。每轮从头开始重新计算解决方案非常慢，因此开发可以使用新设计矩阵快速更新解决方案的算法非常重要。我们的主要结果是一个动态树数据结构，其中对单个矩阵的任何更新都可以在整个树中快速传播。我们表明，我们的数据结构不仅可以用于解决张量积回归的动态版本，还可以用于解决张量积样条回归（这是岭回归的推广）以及用于维护张量积的低秩近似。

AI.tldr: 本文研究动态张量积回归问题，旨在当输入矩阵发生稀疏变化时，快速更新回归解而无需从头计算。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在矩阵变化时需重新计算整个张量积，计算成本高昂，因此需开发高效动态更新算法。
AI.method: 提出动态树状数据结构，通过局部更新传播机制维护张量积的近似表示，支持快速回归解更新。
AI.result: 所提方法可高效处理动态张量积回归、张量积样条回归及低秩近似维护，显著优于从头计算的效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文为动态高维回归问题提供了通用高效解决方案，其树状结构设计可扩展至多种张量相关模型。

search_text: Dynamic Tensor Product Regression 动态张量积回归 In this work, we initiate the study of \emph{Dynamic Tensor Product Regression}. One has matrices $A_1\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\times d_1},\ldots,A_q\in \mathbb{R}^{n_q\times d_q}$ and a label vector $b\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\ldots n_q}$, and the goal is to solve the regression problem with the design matrix $A$ being the tensor product of the matrices $A_1, A_2, \dots, A_q$ i.e. $\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^{d_1\ldots d_q}}~\|(A_1\otimes \ldots\otimes A_q)x-b\|_2$. At each time step, one matrix $A_i$ receives a sparse change, and the goal is to maintain a sketch of the tensor product $A_1\otimes\ldots \otimes A_q$ so that the regression solution can be updated quickly. Recomputing the solution from scratch for each round is very slow and so it is important to develop algorithms which can quickly update the solution with the new design matrix. Our main result is a dynamic tree data structure where any update to a single matrix can be propagated quickly throughout the tree. We show that our data structure can be used to solve dynamic versions of not only Tensor Product Regression, but also Tensor Product Spline regression (which is a generalization of ridge regression) and for maintaining Low Rank Approximations for the tensor product. 在这项工作中，我们启动了\emph{动态张量积回归}的研究。有矩阵 $A_1\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\times d_1},\ldots,A_q\in \mathbb{R}^{n_q\times d_q}$ 和标签向量 $b\in \mathbb{R}^{n_1\ldots n_q}$，目标是解决回归问题，设计矩阵 $A$ 是矩阵 $A_1, A_2, \dots, A_q$ 即 $\min_{x\in \mathbb{R}^{d_1\ldots d_q}}~\|(A_1\otimes \ldots\otimes A_q)x-b\|_2$。在每个时间步，一个矩阵 $A_i$ 接收稀疏变化，目标是维护张量积 $A_1​​\otimes\ldots \otimes A_q$ 的草图，以便可以快速更新回归解。每轮从头开始重新计算解决方案非常慢，因此开发可以使用新设计矩阵快速更新解决方案的算法非常重要。我们的主要结果是一个动态树数据结构，其中对单个矩阵的任何更新都可以在整个树中快速传播。我们表明，我们的数据结构不仅可以用于解决张量积回归的动态版本，还可以用于解决张量积样条回归（这是岭回归的推广）以及用于维护张量积的低秩近似。 本文研究动态张量积回归问题，旨在当输入矩阵发生稀疏变化时，快速更新回归解而无需从头计算。 Aravind Reddy,Zhao Song,Lichen Zhang cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Yaohua Wang,FangYi Zhang,Ming Lin,Senzhang Wang,Xiuyu Sun,Rong Jin
title: Robust Graph Structure Learning via Multiple Statistical Tests
title_zh: 通过多项统计测试进行稳健的图结构学习
comment: Accepted by the NeurIPS 2022. Homepage: https://thomas-wyh.github.io/
comments: Accepted by the NeurIPS 2022. Homepage: https://thomas-wyh.github.io/
abstract: Graph structure learning aims to learn connectivity in a graph from data. It is particularly important for many computer vision related tasks since no explicit graph structure is available for images for most cases. A natural way to construct a graph among images is to treat each image as a node and assign pairwise image similarities as weights to corresponding edges. It is well known that pairwise similarities between images are sensitive to the noise in feature representations, leading to unreliable graph structures. We address this problem from the viewpoint of statistical tests. By viewing the feature vector of each node as an independent sample, the decision of whether creating an edge between two nodes based on their similarity in feature representation can be thought as a ${\it single}$ statistical test. To improve the robustness in the decision of creating an edge, multiple samples are drawn and integrated by ${\it multiple}$ statistical tests to generate a more reliable similarity measure, consequentially more reliable graph structure. The corresponding elegant matrix form named $\mathcal{B}\textbf{-Attention}$ is designed for efficiency. The effectiveness of multiple tests for graph structure learning is verified both theoretically and empirically on multiple clustering and ReID benchmark datasets. Source codes are available at https://github.com/Thomas-wyh/B-Attention.
summary: Graph structure learning aims to learn connectivity in a graph from data. It is particularly important for many computer vision related tasks since no explicit graph structure is available for images for most cases. A natural way to construct a graph among images is to treat each image as a node and assign pairwise image similarities as weights to corresponding edges. It is well known that pairwise similarities between images are sensitive to the noise in feature representations, leading to unreliable graph structures. We address this problem from the viewpoint of statistical tests. By viewing the feature vector of each node as an independent sample, the decision of whether creating an edge between two nodes based on their similarity in feature representation can be thought as a ${\it single}$ statistical test. To improve the robustness in the decision of creating an edge, multiple samples are drawn and integrated by ${\it multiple}$ statistical tests to generate a more reliable similarity measure, consequentially more reliable graph structure. The corresponding elegant matrix form named $\mathcal{B}\textbf{-Attention}$ is designed for efficiency. The effectiveness of multiple tests for graph structure learning is verified both theoretically and empirically on multiple clustering and ReID benchmark datasets. Source codes are available at https://github.com/Thomas-wyh/B-Attention.
abstract_zh: 图结构学习旨在从数据中学习图中的连通性。这对于许多计算机视觉相关任务尤其重要，因为在大多数情况下没有可用于图像的显式图形结构。在图像之间构建图的一种自然方法是将每个图像视为一个节点，并将成对图像相似度作为权重分配给相应的边。众所周知，图像之间的成对相似性对特征表示中的噪声敏感，导致图结构不可靠。我们从统计检验的角度来解决这个问题。通过将每个节点的特征向量视为独立样本，基于两个节点在特征表示中的相似性来决定是否在两个节点之间创建边可以被认为是一个${\it single}$统计测试。为了提高创建边缘决策的鲁棒性，通过${\it multiple}$统计测试抽取和集成多个样本，以生成更可靠的相似性度量，从而生成更可靠的图结构。名为 $\mathcal{B}\textbf{-Attention}$ 的相应优雅矩阵形式是为了提高效率而设计的。图结构学习的多项测试的有效性在多个聚类和 ReID 基准数据集上得到了理论和实证验证。源代码可在 https://github.com/Thomas-wyh/B-Attention 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过多重统计检验提升图结构学习鲁棒性的方法，用于计算机视觉任务中的图像节点连接构建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于图像特征相似性的图结构易受特征表示噪声影响，导致结构不可靠，需通过统计检验增强鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将节点特征视为独立样本，采用多重统计检验整合多样本信息，设计矩阵形式的B-Attention机制提升相似性度量效率。
AI.result: 理论与实验验证了方法在多个聚类和ReID基准数据集上的有效性，源代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 多重统计检验显著提升了图结构学习的可靠性，为噪声环境下的图构建提供了新思路。

authors_text: Wei Mao,Miaomiao Liu,Richard Hartley,Mathieu Salzmann
title: Contact-aware Human Motion Forecasting
title_zh: 接触感知人体运动预测
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the task of scene-aware 3D human motion forecasting, which consists of predicting future human poses given a 3D scene and a past human motion. A key challenge of this task is to ensure consistency between the human and the scene, accounting for human-scene interactions. Previous attempts to do so model such interactions only implicitly, and thus tend to produce artifacts such as "ghost motion" because of the lack of explicit constraints between the local poses and the global motion. Here, by contrast, we propose to explicitly model the human-scene contacts. To this end, we introduce distance-based contact maps that capture the contact relationships between every joint and every 3D scene point at each time instant. We then develop a two-stage pipeline that first predicts the future contact maps from the past ones and the scene point cloud, and then forecasts the future human poses by conditioning them on the predicted contact maps. During training, we explicitly encourage consistency between the global motion and the local poses via a prior defined using the contact maps and future poses. Our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art human motion forecasting and human synthesis methods on both synthetic and real datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/wei-mao-2019/ContAwareMotionPred.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the task of scene-aware 3D human motion forecasting, which consists of predicting future human poses given a 3D scene and a past human motion. A key challenge of this task is to ensure consistency between the human and the scene, accounting for human-scene interactions. Previous attempts to do so model such interactions only implicitly, and thus tend to produce artifacts such as "ghost motion" because of the lack of explicit constraints between the local poses and the global motion. Here, by contrast, we propose to explicitly model the human-scene contacts. To this end, we introduce distance-based contact maps that capture the contact relationships between every joint and every 3D scene point at each time instant. We then develop a two-stage pipeline that first predicts the future contact maps from the past ones and the scene point cloud, and then forecasts the future human poses by conditioning them on the predicted contact maps. During training, we explicitly encourage consistency between the global motion and the local poses via a prior defined using the contact maps and future poses. Our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art human motion forecasting and human synthesis methods on both synthetic and real datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/wei-mao-2019/ContAwareMotionPred.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决场景感知 3D 人体运动预测的任务，其中包括根据 3D 场景和过去的人体运动预测未来的人体姿势。这项任务的一个关键挑战是确保人与场景之间的一致性，并考虑人与场景的交互。以前的尝试仅隐式地对此类交互进行建模，因此由于局部姿势和全局运动之间缺乏显式约束，因此往往会产生诸如“幽灵运动”之类的伪影。相比之下，在这里，我们建议对人类场景接触进行显式建模。为此，我们引入了基于距离的接触图，它捕获每个关节和每个 3D 场景点在每个时刻之间的接触关系。然后，我们开发了一个两阶段管道，首先根据过去的接触图和场景点云预测未来的接触图，然后通过在预测的接触图上调节它们来预测未来的人体姿势。在训练过程中，我们通过使用接触图和未来姿势预先定义，明确鼓励全局运动和局部姿势之间的一致性。我们的方法在合成数据集和真实数据集上都优于最先进的人体运动预测和人体合成方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wei-mao-2019/ContAwareMotionPred 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于场景感知的3D人体运动预测方法，通过显式建模人体与场景的接触关系来提高预测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过隐式建模人体-场景交互，导致预测结果出现'幽灵运动'等不一致问题，需通过显式约束提升预测合理性。
AI.method: 引入基于距离的接触图捕捉关节与场景点的接触关系，采用两阶段流程：先预测未来接触图，再基于接触图生成人体姿态，并通过接触图定义先验约束训练模型。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上均优于现有最先进的运动预测与人体生成方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模人体-场景接触关系能有效提升运动预测的时空一致性，为场景感知运动预测提供了新思路。

search_text: Contact-aware Human Motion Forecasting 接触感知人体运动预测 In this paper, we tackle the task of scene-aware 3D human motion forecasting, which consists of predicting future human poses given a 3D scene and a past human motion. A key challenge of this task is to ensure consistency between the human and the scene, accounting for human-scene interactions. Previous attempts to do so model such interactions only implicitly, and thus tend to produce artifacts such as "ghost motion" because of the lack of explicit constraints between the local poses and the global motion. Here, by contrast, we propose to explicitly model the human-scene contacts. To this end, we introduce distance-based contact maps that capture the contact relationships between every joint and every 3D scene point at each time instant. We then develop a two-stage pipeline that first predicts the future contact maps from the past ones and the scene point cloud, and then forecasts the future human poses by conditioning them on the predicted contact maps. During training, we explicitly encourage consistency between the global motion and the local poses via a prior defined using the contact maps and future poses. Our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art human motion forecasting and human synthesis methods on both synthetic and real datasets. Our code is available at https://github.com/wei-mao-2019/ContAwareMotionPred. 在本文中，我们解决场景感知 3D 人体运动预测的任务，其中包括根据 3D 场景和过去的人体运动预测未来的人体姿势。这项任务的一个关键挑战是确保人与场景之间的一致性，并考虑人与场景的交互。以前的尝试仅隐式地对此类交互进行建模，因此由于局部姿势和全局运动之间缺乏显式约束，因此往往会产生诸如“幽灵运动”之类的伪影。相比之下，在这里，我们建议对人类场景接触进行显式建模。为此，我们引入了基于距离的接触图，它捕获每个关节和每个 3D 场景点在每个时刻之间的接触关系。然后，我们开发了一个两阶段管道，首先根据过去的接触图和场景点云预测未来的接触图，然后通过在预测的接触图上调节它们来预测未来的人体姿势。在训练过程中，我们通过使用接触图和未来姿势预先定义，明确鼓励全局运动和局部姿势之间的一致性。我们的方法在合成数据集和真实数据集上都优于最先进的人体运动预测和人体合成方法。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/wei-mao-2019/ContAwareMotionPred 获取。 本文提出了一种基于场景感知的3D人体运动预测方法，通过显式建模人体与场景的接触关系来提高预测准确性。 Wei Mao,Miaomiao Liu,Richard Hartley,Mathieu Salzmann cs.CV

authors_text: Peizhe Jiang,Wei Yang,Xiaoqing Ye,Xiao Tan,Meng Wu
title: Detaching and Boosting: Dual Engine for Scale-Invariant Self-Supervised Monocular Depth Estimation
title_zh: 分离和增强：用于尺度不变自监督单目深度估计的双引擎
comment: Accepted by ICLR and IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL)
comments: Accepted by ICLR and IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RAL)
abstract: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) in the self-supervised scenario has emerged as a promising method as it refrains from the requirement of ground truth depth. Despite continuous efforts, MDE is still sensitive to scale changes especially when all the training samples are from one single camera. Meanwhile, it deteriorates further since camera movement results in heavy coupling between the predicted depth and the scale change. In this paper, we present a scale-invariant approach for self-supervised MDE, in which scale-sensitive features (SSFs) are detached away while scale-invariant features (SIFs) are boosted further. To be specific, a simple but effective data augmentation by imitating the camera zooming process is proposed to detach SSFs, making the model robust to scale changes. Besides, a dynamic cross-attention module is designed to boost SIFs by fusing multi-scale cross-attention features adaptively. Extensive experiments on the KITTI dataset demonstrate that the detaching and boosting strategies are mutually complementary in MDE and our approach achieves new State-of-The-Art performance against existing works from 0.097 to 0.090 w.r.t absolute relative error. The code will be made public soon.

abstract_zh: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) in the self-supervised scenario has emerged as a promising method as it refrains from the requirement of ground truth depth.尽管不断努力，MDE 仍然对尺度变化敏感，尤其是当所有训练样本都来自一台相机时。同时，由于相机移动导致预测深度和尺度变化之间的严重耦合，它会进一步恶化。 In this paper, we present a scale-invariant approach for self-supervised MDE, in which scale-sensitive features (SSFs) are detached away while scale-invariant features (SIFs) are boosted further. To be specific, a simple but effective data augmentation by imitating the camera zooming process is proposed to detach SSFs, making the model robust to scale changes.此外，动态交叉注意模块被设计来通过自适应地融合多尺度交叉注意特征来提高 SIF。 Extensive experiments on the KITTI dataset demonstrate that the detaching and boosting strategies are mutually complementary in MDE and our approach achieves new State-of-The-Art performance against existing works from 0.097 to 0.090 w.r.t absolute relative error. The code will be made public soon.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督单目深度估计方法，通过分离尺度敏感特征并增强尺度不变特征，解决单摄像头场景下的尺度变化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督单目深度估计方法对尺度变化敏感，尤其在单一摄像头训练样本下，相机运动会导致预测深度与尺度变化高度耦合，影响估计精度。
AI.method: 提出双重策略：1) 通过模拟相机缩放的数据增强方法分离尺度敏感特征；2) 设计动态跨注意力模块自适应融合多尺度特征以增强尺度不变特征。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上，绝对相对误差从0.097降低至0.090，达到当时最先进的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: 分离与增强策略在尺度不变自监督单目深度估计中具有互补性，有效提升了模型鲁棒性与精度。

authors_text: Hamzah Luqman
title: ArabSign: A Multi-modality Dataset and Benchmark for Continuous Arabic Sign Language Recognition
title_zh: ArabSign：连续阿拉伯手语识别的多模态数据集和基准
abstract: Sign language recognition has attracted the interest of researchers in recent years. While numerous approaches have been proposed for European and Asian sign languages recognition, very limited attempts have been made to develop similar systems for the Arabic sign language (ArSL). This can be attributed partly to the lack of a dataset at the sentence level. In this paper, we aim to make a significant contribution by proposing ArabSign, a continuous ArSL dataset. The proposed dataset consists of 9,335 samples performed by 6 signers. The total time of the recorded sentences is around 10 hours and the average sentence's length is 3.1 signs. ArabSign dataset was recorded using a Kinect V2 camera that provides three types of information (color, depth, and skeleton joint points) recorded simultaneously for each sentence. In addition, we provide the annotation of the dataset according to ArSL and Arabic language structures that can help in studying the linguistic characteristics of ArSL. To benchmark this dataset, we propose an encoder-decoder model for Continuous ArSL recognition. The model has been evaluated on the proposed dataset, and the obtained results show that the encoder-decoder model outperformed the attention mechanism with an average word error rate (WER) of 0.50 compared with 0.62 with the attention mechanism. The data and code are available at github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/ArabSign

In addition, we provide the annotation of the dataset according to ArSL and Arabic language structures that can help in studying the linguistic characteristics of ArSL. The data and code are available at github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/ArabSign
abstract_zh: 近年来，手语识别引起了研究人员的兴趣。尽管针对欧洲和亚洲手语识别提出了多种方法，但为阿拉伯手语 (ArSL) 开发类似系统的尝试非常有限。这可以部分归因于缺乏句子级别的数据集。在本文中，我们的目标是通过提出连续 ArSL 数据集arabsign 来做出重大贡献。提议的数据集由 6 名签名者执行的 9,335 个样本组成。录制的句子总时间约为10小时，平均句子长度为3.1个符号。 ArabSign 数据集使用 Kinect V2 摄像头记录，该摄像头提供为每个句子同时记录的三种类型的信息（颜色、深度和骨骼关节点）。此外，我们还根据 ArSL 和阿拉伯语言结构提供了数据集的注释，可以帮助研究 ArSL 的语言特征。为了对这个数据集进行基准测试，我们提出了一种用于连续 ArSL 识别的编码器-解码器模型。该模型已在所提出的数据集上进行了评估，获得的结果表明，编码器-解码器模型的平均单词错误率（WER）为 0.50，而注意力机制的平均单词错误率（WER）为 0.62，优于注意力机制。数据和代码可在 github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/ArabSign 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出ArabSign数据集和基准，用于连续阿拉伯手语识别。
AI.motivation: 阿拉伯手语识别研究缺乏句子级数据集，限制了相关系统的发展。
AI.method: 使用Kinect V2采集多模态数据（颜色、深度、骨骼点），构建包含9335个样本的数据集，并设计编码器-解码器模型进行识别。
AI.result: 编码器-解码器模型在ArabSign上实现0.50的词错误率，优于注意力机制的0.62。
AI.conclusion: ArabSign为阿拉伯手语研究提供重要资源，所提模型有效推动了连续手语识别进展。

To benchmark this dataset, we propose an encoder-decoder model for Continuous ArSL recognition. The model has been evaluated on the proposed dataset, and the obtained results show that the encoder-decoder model outperformed the attention mechanism with an average word error rate (WER) of 0.50 compared with 0.62 with the attention mechanism. The data and code are available at github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/ArabSign 近年来，手语识别引起了研究人员的兴趣。尽管针对欧洲和亚洲手语识别提出了多种方法，但为阿拉伯手语 (ArSL) 开发类似系统的尝试非常有限。这可以部分归因于缺乏句子级别的数据集。在本文中，我们的目标是通过提出连续 ArSL 数据集arabsign 来做出重大贡献。提议的数据集由 6 名签名者执行的 9,335 个样本组成。录制的句子总时间约为10小时，平均句子长度为3.1个符号。 ArabSign 数据集使用 Kinect V2 摄像头记录，该摄像头提供为每个句子同时记录的三种类型的信息（颜色、深度和骨骼关节点）。此外，我们还根据 ArSL 和阿拉伯语言结构提供了数据集的注释，可以帮助研究 ArSL 的语言特征。为了对这个数据集进行基准测试，我们提出了一种用于连续 ArSL 识别的编码器-解码器模型。该模型已在所提出的数据集上进行了评估，获得的结果表明，编码器-解码器模型的平均单词错误率（WER）为 0.50，而注意力机制的平均单词错误率（WER）为 0.62，优于注意力机制。数据和代码可在 github.com/Hamzah-Luqman/ArabSign 获取 本文提出ArabSign数据集和基准，用于连续阿拉伯手语识别。 Hamzah Luqman cs.CV

authors_text: Izzeddin Gur,Ofir Nachum,Yingjie Miao,Mustafa Safdari,Austin Huang,Aakanksha Chowdhery,Sharan Narang,Noah Fiedel,Aleksandra Faust
title: Understanding HTML with Large Language Models
title_zh: 理解 HTML 与大型语言模型
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown exceptional performance on a variety of natural language tasks. Yet, their capabilities for HTML understanding -- i.e., parsing the raw HTML of a webpage, with applications to automation of web-based tasks, crawling, and browser-assisted retrieval -- have not been fully explored. We contribute HTML understanding models (fine-tuned LLMs) and an in-depth analysis of their capabilities under three tasks: (i) Semantic Classification of HTML elements, (ii) Description Generation for HTML inputs, and (iii) Autonomous Web Navigation of HTML pages. While previous work has developed dedicated architectures and training procedures for HTML understanding, we show that LLMs pretrained on standard natural language corpora transfer remarkably well to HTML understanding tasks. For instance, fine-tuned LLMs are 12% more accurate at semantic classification compared to models trained exclusively on the task dataset. Moreover, when fine-tuned on data from the MiniWoB benchmark, LLMs successfully complete 50% more tasks using 192x less data compared to the previous best supervised model. Out of the LLMs we evaluate, we show evidence that T5-based models are ideal due to their bidirectional encoder-decoder architecture. To promote further research on LLMs for HTML understanding, we create and open-source a large-scale HTML dataset distilled and auto-labeled from CommonCrawl.
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown exceptional performance on a variety of natural language tasks. Yet, their capabilities for HTML understanding -- i.e., parsing the raw HTML of a webpage, with applications to automation of web-based tasks, crawling, and browser-assisted retrieval -- have not been fully explored. We contribute HTML understanding models (fine-tuned LLMs) and an in-depth analysis of their capabilities under three tasks: (i) Semantic Classification of HTML elements, (ii) Description Generation for HTML inputs, and (iii) Autonomous Web Navigation of HTML pages. While previous work has developed dedicated architectures and training procedures for HTML understanding, we show that LLMs pretrained on standard natural language corpora transfer remarkably well to HTML understanding tasks. For instance, fine-tuned LLMs are 12% more accurate at semantic classification compared to models trained exclusively on the task dataset. Moreover, when fine-tuned on data from the MiniWoB benchmark, LLMs successfully complete 50% more tasks using 192x less data compared to the previous best supervised model. Out of the LLMs we evaluate, we show evidence that T5-based models are ideal due to their bidirectional encoder-decoder architecture. To promote further research on LLMs for HTML understanding, we create and open-source a large-scale HTML dataset distilled and auto-labeled from CommonCrawl.
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 在各种自然语言任务上都表现出了卓越的性能。然而，它们的 HTML 理解能力（即解析网页的原始 HTML，以及应用于基于 Web 的任务自动化、爬行和浏览器辅助检索）尚未得到充分开发。我们贡献 HTML 理解模型（微调的法学硕士）并深入分析其在三个任务下的能力：(i) HTML 元素的语义分类，(ii) HTML 输入的描述生成，以及 (iii) HTML 页面的自主 Web 导航。虽然之前的工作已经开发了用于 HTML 理解的专用架构和培训程序，但我们表明，在标准自然语言语料库上进行预训练的法学硕士可以很好地转移到 HTML 理解任务。例如，与专门在任务数据集上训练的模型相比，经过微调的 LLM 在语义分类方面的准确度提高了 12%。此外，当对 MiniWoB 基准数据进行微调时，法学硕士使用比之前最佳监督模型少 192 倍的数据成功完成了 50% 多的任务。在我们评估的法学硕士中，我们证明基于 T5 的模型由于其双向编码器-解码器架构而非常理想。为了促进对 HTML 理解的法学硕士的进一步研究，我们创建并开源了一个从 CommonCrawl 中提取和自动标记的大型 HTML 数据集。

AI.tldr: 该论文探索了大语言模型（LLMs）在HTML理解任务中的应用，包括语义分类、描述生成和自主网页导航。
AI.motivation: 尽管LLMs在自然语言任务中表现优异，但其HTML理解能力（对网页自动化、爬虫等关键任务）尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 通过微调预训练LLMs，设计三个HTML理解任务，并与专用模型对比；同时构建基于CommonCrawl的开源HTML数据集。
AI.result: 微调LLMs在语义分类任务中准确率提升12%，在MiniWoB基准上数据效率提升192倍；T5模型因双向结构表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 预训练LLMs可有效迁移至HTML理解任务，T5架构更优，开源数据集将推动相关研究发展。

Out of the LLMs we evaluate, we show evidence that T5-based models are ideal due to their bidirectional encoder-decoder architecture. authors_text: Hang Du,Xuejun Yan,Jingjing Wang,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu
title: Point Cloud Upsampling via Cascaded Refinement Network
title_zh: 通过级联细化网络进行点云上采样
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/hikvision-research/3DVision. Accepted to ACCV 2022 as oral presentation
comments: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/hikvision-research/3DVision. Accepted to ACCV 2022 as oral presentation
abstract: Point cloud upsampling focuses on generating a dense, uniform and proximity-to-surface point set. Most previous approaches accomplish these objectives by carefully designing a single-stage network, which makes it still challenging to generate a high-fidelity point distribution. Instead, upsampling point cloud in a coarse-to-fine manner is a decent solution. However, existing coarse-to-fine upsampling methods require extra training strategies, which are complicated and time-consuming during the training. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective cascaded refinement network, consisting of three generation stages that have the same network architecture but achieve different objectives. Specifically, the first two upsampling stages generate the dense but coarse points progressively, while the last refinement stage further adjust the coarse points to a better position. To mitigate the learning conflicts between multiple stages and decrease the difficulty of regressing new points, we encourage each stage to predict the point offsets with respect to the input shape. In this manner, the proposed cascaded refinement network can be easily optimized without extra learning strategies. Moreover, we design a transformer-based feature extraction module to learn the informative global and local shape context. In inference phase, we can dynamically adjust the model efficiency and effectiveness, depending on the available computational resources. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-scanned datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Point cloud upsampling focuses on generating a dense, uniform and proximity-to-surface point set. Most previous approaches accomplish these objectives by carefully designing a single-stage network, which makes it still challenging to generate a high-fidelity point distribution. Instead, upsampling point cloud in a coarse-to-fine manner is a decent solution. However, existing coarse-to-fine upsampling methods require extra training strategies, which are complicated and time-consuming during the training. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective cascaded refinement network, consisting of three generation stages that have the same network architecture but achieve different objectives. Specifically, the first two upsampling stages generate the dense but coarse points progressively, while the last refinement stage further adjust the coarse points to a better position. To mitigate the learning conflicts between multiple stages and decrease the difficulty of regressing new points, we encourage each stage to predict the point offsets with respect to the input shape. In this manner, the proposed cascaded refinement network can be easily optimized without extra learning strategies. Moreover, we design a transformer-based feature extraction module to learn the informative global and local shape context. In inference phase, we can dynamically adjust the model efficiency and effectiveness, depending on the available computational resources. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-scanned datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 点云上采样专注于生成密集、均匀且接近表面的点集。以前的大多数方法都是通过仔细设计单级网络来实现这些目标，这使得生成高保真点分布仍然具有挑战性。相反，以从粗到细的方式对点云进行上采样是一个不错的解决方案。然而，现有的从粗到细的上采样方法需要额外的训练策略，训练过程复杂且耗时。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的级联细化网络，由具有相同网络架构但实现不同目标的三个生成阶段组成。具体来说，前两个上采样阶段逐渐生成密集但粗糙的点，而最后一个细化阶段进一步将粗点调整到更好的位置。为了减轻多个阶段之间的学习冲突并降低回归新点的难度，我们鼓励每个阶段预测相对于输入形状的点偏移。通过这种方式，所提出的级联细化网络可以轻松优化，无需额外的学习策略。此外，我们设计了一个基于变压器的特征提取模块来学习信息丰富的全局和局部形状上下文。在推理阶段，我们可以根据可用的计算资源动态调整模型的效率和有效性。对合成数据集和真实扫描数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的方法优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种级联 refinement 网络，用于生成密集、均匀且贴近表面的点云。
AI.motivation: 传统单阶段网络难以生成高保真点云分布，现有粗到细方法需复杂训练策略，本文旨在设计简单有效的级联网络以解决此问题。
AI.method: 构建包含三个同架构阶段的级联网络，前两阶段逐步生成密集粗略点，最后一阶段优化位置；通过预测输入形状的点偏移缓解多阶段学习冲突，并设计基于Transformer的特征提取模块。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 级联 refinement 网络结合偏移预测与Transformer模块，实现了高效且高质量的点云上采样。

authors_text: Hsin-Ying Lee,Hung-Ting Su,Bing-Chen Tsai,Tsung-Han Wu,Jia-Fong Yeh,Winston H. Hsu
title: Learning Fine-Grained Visual Understanding for Video Question Answering via Decoupling Spatial-Temporal Modeling
title_zh: 通过解耦时空建模学习视频问答的细粒度视觉理解
comment: BMVC 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/shinying/dest
comments: BMVC 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/shinying/dest
abstract: While recent large-scale video-language pre-training made great progress in video question answering, the design of spatial modeling of video-language models is less fine-grained than that of image-language models; existing practices of temporal modeling also suffer from weak and noisy alignment between modalities. To learn fine-grained visual understanding, we decouple spatial-temporal modeling and propose a hybrid pipeline, Decoupled Spatial-Temporal Encoders, integrating an image- and a video-language encoder. The former encodes spatial semantics from larger but sparsely sampled frames independently of time, while the latter models temporal dynamics at lower spatial but higher temporal resolution. To help the video-language model learn temporal relations for video QA, we propose a novel pre-training objective, Temporal Referring Modeling, which requires the model to identify temporal positions of events in video sequences. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms previous work pre-trained on orders of magnitude larger datasets.
summary: While recent large-scale video-language pre-training made great progress in video question answering, the design of spatial modeling of video-language models is less fine-grained than that of image-language models; existing practices of temporal modeling also suffer from weak and noisy alignment between modalities. To learn fine-grained visual understanding, we decouple spatial-temporal modeling and propose a hybrid pipeline, Decoupled Spatial-Temporal Encoders, integrating an image- and a video-language encoder. The former encodes spatial semantics from larger but sparsely sampled frames independently of time, while the latter models temporal dynamics at lower spatial but higher temporal resolution. To help the video-language model learn temporal relations for video QA, we propose a novel pre-training objective, Temporal Referring Modeling, which requires the model to identify temporal positions of events in video sequences. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms previous work pre-trained on orders of magnitude larger datasets.
abstract_zh: 虽然最近的大规模视频语言预训练在视频问答方面取得了很大进展，但视频语言模型的空间建模设计不如图像语言模型细粒度；现有的时间建模实践还存在模态之间的弱对齐和噪声对齐的问题。为了学习细粒度的视觉理解，我们解耦时空建模，并提出了一种混合管道，即解耦时空编码器，集成了图像和视频语言编码器。前者独立于时间对来自较大但稀疏采样的帧的空间语义进行编码，而后者以较低的空间但较高的时间分辨率对时间动态进行建模。为了帮助视频语言模型学习视频 QA 的时间关系，我们提出了一种新颖的预训练目标，即时间参考建模，它要求模型识别视频序列中事件的时间位置。大量的实验表明，我们的模型优于之前在更大数量级的数据集上进行预训练的工作。

AI.tldr: 通过解耦时空建模学习细粒度视觉理解以提升视频问答性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-语言模型在空间建模上不够精细，且时序建模存在模态对齐噪声问题，限制了视频问答的细粒度理解能力。
AI.method: 提出解耦时空编码器混合框架，包含独立处理空间语义的图像编码器和建模时序动态的视频-语言编码器，并设计时序指代建模预训练目标。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中超越基于海量数据预训练的先前方法，验证了小数据高效学习的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 解耦设计与新型预训练目标显著提升了视频问答的细粒度视觉理解能力，为模型设计提供新思路。

To learn fine-grained visual understanding, we decouple spatial-temporal modeling and propose a hybrid pipeline, Decoupled Spatial-Temporal Encoders, integrating an image- and a video-language encoder. The former encodes spatial semantics from larger but sparsely sampled frames independently of time, while the latter models temporal dynamics at lower spatial but higher temporal resolution. To help the video-language model learn temporal relations for video QA, we propose a novel pre-training objective, Temporal Referring Modeling, which requires the model to identify temporal positions of events in video sequences. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our model outperforms previous work pre-trained on orders of magnitude larger datasets. 虽然最近的大规模视频语言预训练在视频问答方面取得了很大进展，但视频语言模型的空间建模设计不如图像语言模型细粒度；现有的时间建模实践还存在模态之间的弱对齐和噪声对齐的问题。为了学习细粒度的视觉理解，我们解耦时空建模，并提出了一种混合管道，即解耦时空编码器，集成了图像和视频语言编码器。前者独立于时间对来自较大但稀疏采样的帧的空间语义进行编码，而后者以较低的空间但较高的时间分辨率对时间动态进行建模。为了帮助视频语言模型学习视频 QA 的时间关系，我们提出了一种新颖的预训练目标，即时间参考建模，它要求模型识别视频序列中事件的时间位置。大量的实验表明，我们的模型优于之前在更大数量级的数据集上进行预训练的工作。 通过解耦时空建模学习细粒度视觉理解以提升视频问答性能。 Hsin-Ying Lee,Hung-Ting Su,Bing-Chen Tsai,Tsung-Han Wu,Jia-Fong Yeh,Winston H. authors_text: Lu Zhang,Yang Wang,Jiaogen Zhou,Chenbo Zhang,Yinglu Zhang,Jihong Guan,Yatao Bian,Shuigeng Zhou
title: Hierarchical Few-Shot Object Detection: Problem, Benchmark and Method
title_zh: 分层少样本目标检测：问题、基准和方法
abstract: Few-shot object detection (FSOD) is to detect objects with a few examples. However, existing FSOD methods do not consider hierarchical fine-grained category structures of objects that exist widely in real life. For example, animals are taxonomically classified into orders, families, genera and species etc. In this paper, we propose and solve a new problem called hierarchical few-shot object detection (Hi-FSOD), which aims to detect objects with hierarchical categories in the FSOD paradigm. To this end, on the one hand, we build the first large-scale and high-quality Hi-FSOD benchmark dataset HiFSOD-Bird, which contains 176,350 wild-bird images falling to 1,432 categories. All the categories are organized into a 4-level taxonomy, consisting of 32 orders, 132 families, 572 genera and 1,432 species. On the other hand, we propose the first Hi-FSOD method HiCLPL, where a hierarchical contrastive learning approach is developed to constrain the feature space so that the feature distribution of objects is consistent with the hierarchical taxonomy and the model's generalization power is strengthened. Meanwhile, a probabilistic loss is designed to enable the child nodes to correct the classification errors of their parent nodes in the taxonomy. Extensive experiments on the benchmark dataset HiFSOD-Bird show that our method HiCLPL outperforms the existing FSOD methods.
summary: Few-shot object detection (FSOD) is to detect objects with a few examples. However, existing FSOD methods do not consider hierarchical fine-grained category structures of objects that exist widely in real life. For example, animals are taxonomically classified into orders, families, genera and species etc. In this paper, we propose and solve a new problem called hierarchical few-shot object detection (Hi-FSOD), which aims to detect objects with hierarchical categories in the FSOD paradigm. To this end, on the one hand, we build the first large-scale and high-quality Hi-FSOD benchmark dataset HiFSOD-Bird, which contains 176,350 wild-bird images falling to 1,432 categories. All the categories are organized into a 4-level taxonomy, consisting of 32 orders, 132 families, 572 genera and 1,432 species. On the other hand, we propose the first Hi-FSOD method HiCLPL, where a hierarchical contrastive learning approach is developed to constrain the feature space so that the feature distribution of objects is consistent with the hierarchical taxonomy and the model's generalization power is strengthened. Meanwhile, a probabilistic loss is designed to enable the child nodes to correct the classification errors of their parent nodes in the taxonomy. Extensive experiments on the benchmark dataset HiFSOD-Bird show that our method HiCLPL outperforms the existing FSOD methods.
abstract_zh: 小样本目标检测（FSOD）是用几个例子来检测目标。然而，现有的FSOD方法没有考虑现实生活中广泛存在的对象的分层细粒度类别结构。例如，动物在分类上分为目、科、属和种等。在本文中，我们提出并解决了一个称为分层少样本目标检测（Hi-FSOD）的新问题，其目的是在 FSOD 范式中检测具有分层类别的目标。为此，一方面，我们构建了第一个大规模、高质量的 Hi-FSOD 基准数据集 HiFSOD-Bird，其中包含 176,350 张野生鸟类图像，分为 1,432 个类别。所有类别均分为 4 级分类，包括 32 目、132 科、572 属和 1,432 种。另一方面，我们提出了第一个Hi-FSOD方法HiCLPL，其中开发了分层对比学习方法来约束特征空间，使得对象的特征分布与分层分类一致，并增强模型的泛化能力。同时，设计了概率损失以使子节点能够纠正其父节点在分类中的分类错误。在基准数据集 HiFSOD-Bird 上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法 HiCLPL 优于现有的 FSOD 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并解决了一种新的分层少样本目标检测问题（Hi-FSOD），构建了首个大规模分层基准数据集HiFSOD-Bird，并设计了分层对比学习方法HiCLPL。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本目标检测方法未考虑现实生活中广泛存在的分层细粒度类别结构（如生物分类学层级），导致模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出HiCLPL方法：1) 采用分层对比学习约束特征空间以匹配分类学层级结构；2) 设计概率损失函数使子节点修正父节点分类错误。
AI.result: 在HiFSOD-Bird数据集上，HiCLPL方法显著优于现有少样本检测方法，验证了分层结构建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过构建分层基准和设计分层学习方法，本文为少样本检测任务提供了考虑类别层级结构的新范式和解决方案。

However, existing FSOD methods do not consider hierarchical fine-grained category structures of objects that exist widely in real life. For example, animals are taxonomically classified into orders, families, genera and species etc. In this paper, we propose and solve a new problem called hierarchical few-shot object detection (Hi-FSOD), which aims to detect objects with hierarchical categories in the FSOD paradigm. To this end, on the one hand, we build the first large-scale and high-quality Hi-FSOD benchmark dataset HiFSOD-Bird, which contains 176,350 wild-bird images falling to 1,432 categories. Meanwhile, a probabilistic loss is designed to enable the child nodes to correct the classification errors of their parent nodes in the taxonomy. authors_text: Giovanni Toffetti,Leonardo Militano,Seán Murphy,Remo Maurer,Mark Straub
title: Cloud Native Robotic Applications with GPU Sharing on Kubernetes
title_zh: Kubernetes 上具有 GPU 共享的云原生机器人应用程序
comment: Submission accepted at the IROS'22 Cloud Robotics Workshop
comments: Submission accepted at the IROS'22 Cloud Robotics Workshop
abstract: In this paper we discuss our experience in teaching the Robotic Applications Programming course at ZHAW combining the use of a Kubernetes (k8s) cluster and real, heterogeneous, robotic hardware. We discuss the main advantages of our solutions in terms of seamless simulation-to-real experience for students and the main shortcomings we encountered with networking and sharing GPUs to support deep learning workloads. We describe the current and foreseen alternatives to avoid these drawbacks in future course editions and propose a more cloud-native approach to deploying multiple robotics applications on a k8s cluster.
summary: In this paper we discuss our experience in teaching the Robotic Applications Programming course at ZHAW combining the use of a Kubernetes (k8s) cluster and real, heterogeneous, robotic hardware. We discuss the main advantages of our solutions in terms of seamless simulation-to-real experience for students and the main shortcomings we encountered with networking and sharing GPUs to support deep learning workloads. We describe the current and foreseen alternatives to avoid these drawbacks in future course editions and propose a more cloud-native approach to deploying multiple robotics applications on a k8s cluster.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们讨论了在 ZHAW 结合使用 Kubernetes (k8s) 集群和真实的异构机器人硬件教授机器人应用程序编程课程的经验。我们讨论了我们的解决方案在为学生提供无缝模拟到真实体验方面的主要优势，以及我们在支持深度学习工作负载的网络和共享 GPU 方面遇到的主要缺点。我们描述了当前和预见的替代方案，以避免未来课程版本中的这些缺点，并提出一种更加云原生的方法来在 k8s 集群上部署多个机器人应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在Kubernetes集群中结合真实异构机器人硬件与GPU共享技术，实现云原生机器人应用的教学实践，并分析其优势与不足。
AI.motivation: 通过Kubernetes实现机器人应用的仿真到现实无缝衔接，提升教学效果，但需解决GPU共享和网络通信等技术难题。
AI.method: 基于Kubernetes集群部署机器人应用，结合真实硬件进行教学，分析GPU共享与网络瓶颈问题，并提出优化方案。
AI.result: 验证了云原生架构在机器人教学中的可行性，但发现GPU资源竞争和网络延迟影响性能，未来将优化共享机制与网络配置。
AI.conclusion: 云原生方法可提升机器人应用开发效率，但需进一步解决GPU共享和网络问题，以实现更稳定的教学与研究环境。

ai_content_json.result: 验证了云原生架构在机器人教学中的可行性，但发现GPU资源竞争和网络延迟影响性能，未来将优化共享机制与网络配置。

search_text: Cloud Native Robotic Applications with GPU Sharing on Kubernetes Kubernetes 上具有 GPU 共享的云原生机器人应用程序 In this paper we discuss our experience in teaching the Robotic Applications Programming course at ZHAW combining the use of a Kubernetes (k8s) cluster and real, heterogeneous, robotic hardware. We discuss the main advantages of our solutions in terms of seamless simulation-to-real experience for students and the main shortcomings we encountered with networking and sharing GPUs to support deep learning workloads. We describe the current and foreseen alternatives to avoid these drawbacks in future course editions and propose a more cloud-native approach to deploying multiple robotics applications on a k8s cluster. 在本文中，我们讨论了在 ZHAW 结合使用 Kubernetes (k8s) 集群和真实的异构机器人硬件教授机器人应用程序编程课程的经验。我们讨论了我们的解决方案在为学生提供无缝模拟到真实体验方面的主要优势，以及我们在支持深度学习工作负载的网络和共享 GPU 方面遇到的主要缺点。我们描述了当前和预见的替代方案，以避免未来课程版本中的这些缺点，并提出一种更加云原生的方法来在 k8s 集群上部署多个机器人应用程序。 本文探讨了在Kubernetes集群中结合真实异构机器人硬件与GPU共享技术，实现云原生机器人应用的教学实践，并分析其优势与不足。 Giovanni Toffetti,Leonardo Militano,Seán Murphy,Remo Maurer,Mark Straub cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.DC,cs.NI

authors_text: Akanksha Agrawal,Saket Saurabh,Meirav Zehavi
title: A Finite Algorithm for the Realizabilty of a Delaunay Triangulation
title_zh: 实现Delaunay三角剖分的有限算法
comment: ef:17th International Symposium on Parameterized and Exact Computation (IPEC), 2022
comments: ef:17th International Symposium on Parameterized and Exact Computation (IPEC), 2022
abstract: The \emph{Delaunay graph} of a point set $P \subseteq \mathbb{R}^2$ is the plane graph with the vertex-set $P$ and the edge-set that contains $\{p,p'\}$ if there exists a disc whose intersection with $P$ is exactly $\{p,p'\}$. Accordingly, a triangulated graph $G$ is \emph{Delaunay realizable} if there exists a triangulation of the Delaunay graph of some $P \subseteq \mathbb{R}^2$, called a \emph{Delaunay triangulation} of $P$, that is isomorphic to $G$. The objective of \textsc{Delaunay Realization} is to compute a point set $P \subseteq \mathbb{R}^2$ that realizes a given graph $G$ (if such a $P$ exists). Known algorithms do not solve \textsc{Delaunay Realization} as they are non-constructive. Obtaining a constructive algorithm for \textsc{Delaunay Realization} was mentioned as an open problem by Hiroshima et al.~\cite{hiroshima2000}. We design an $n^{\mathcal{O}(n)}$-time constructive algorithm for \textsc{Delaunay Realization}. In fact, our algorithm outputs sets of points with {\em integer} coordinates.
summary: The \emph{Delaunay graph} of a point set $P \subseteq \mathbb{R}^2$ is the plane graph with the vertex-set $P$ and the edge-set that contains $\{p,p'\}$ if there exists a disc whose intersection with $P$ is exactly $\{p,p'\}$. Accordingly, a triangulated graph $G$ is \emph{Delaunay realizable} if there exists a triangulation of the Delaunay graph of some $P \subseteq \mathbb{R}^2$, called a \emph{Delaunay triangulation} of $P$, that is isomorphic to $G$. The objective of \textsc{Delaunay Realization} is to compute a point set $P \subseteq \mathbb{R}^2$ that realizes a given graph $G$ (if such a $P$ exists). Known algorithms do not solve \textsc{Delaunay Realization} as they are non-constructive. Obtaining a constructive algorithm for \textsc{Delaunay Realization} was mentioned as an open problem by Hiroshima et al.~\cite{hiroshima2000}. We design an $n^{\mathcal{O}(n)}$-time constructive algorithm for \textsc{Delaunay Realization}. In fact, our algorithm outputs sets of points with {\em integer} coordinates.
abstract_zh: 点集 $P \subseteq \mathbb{R}^2$ 的 \emph{Delaunay 图} 是具有顶点集 $P$ 和包含 $\{p,p'\}$ 的边集的平面图，如果存在与 $P$ 的交集恰好是 $\{p,p'\}$ 的圆盘。因此，如果存在某个 $P \subseteq \mathbb{R}^2$ 的 Delaunay 图的三角剖分，称为 $P$ 的 \emph{Delaunay 三角剖分}，且与 $G$ 同构，则三角图 $G$ 是 \emph{Delaunay 可实现}。 \textsc{Delaunay Realization} 的目标是计算一个点集 $P \subseteq \mathbb{R}^2$ 来实现给定的图 $G$（如果这样的 $P$ 存在）。已知的算法不能解决 \textsc{Delaunay Realization}，因为它们是非构造性的。 Hiroshima 等人将获得 \textsc{Delaunay Realization} 的构造性算法作为一个开放问题提到。~\cite{hiroshima2000}。我们为 \textsc{Delaunay Realization} 设计了 ​​$n^{\mathcal{O}(n)}$ 次构造算法。事实上，我们的算法输出具有{\em整数}坐标的点集。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个构造性算法，用于判断给定的三角化图是否能够表示为某个点集的Delaunay三角剖分，并输出具有整数坐标的点集。
AI.motivation: 已知的Delaunay可实现性算法是非构造性的，无法实际输出点集，而构造性算法此前被认为是开放问题，因此需要设计一个能够实际构造出点集的算法。
AI.method: 设计了一个时间复杂度为n^{O(n)}的构造性算法，通过枚举和整数坐标约束来判定并构造满足条件的点集。
AI.result: 该算法能够在n^{O(n)}时间内构造性地判断Delaunay可实现性，并输出具有整数坐标的点集。
AI.conclusion: 成功解决了Hiroshima等人提出的构造性Delaunay Realization的开放问题，给出了首个能够输出整数坐标点集的构造性算法。

authors_text: Zaixi Zhang,Qi Liu,Qingyong Hu,Chee-Kong Lee
title: Hierarchical Graph Transformer with Adaptive Node Sampling
title_zh: 具有自适应节点采样的分层图转换器
abstract: The Transformer architecture has achieved remarkable success in a number of domains including natural language processing and computer vision. However, when it comes to graph-structured data, transformers have not achieved competitive performance, especially on large graphs. In this paper, we identify the main deficiencies of current graph transformers:(1) Existing node sampling strategies in Graph Transformers are agnostic to the graph characteristics and the training process. (2) Most sampling strategies only focus on local neighbors and neglect the long-range dependencies in the graph. We conduct experimental investigations on synthetic datasets to show that existing sampling strategies are sub-optimal. To tackle the aforementioned problems, we formulate the optimization strategies of node sampling in Graph Transformer as an adversary bandit problem, where the rewards are related to the attention weights and can vary in the training procedure. Meanwhile, we propose a hierarchical attention scheme with graph coarsening to capture the long-range interactions while reducing computational complexity. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on real-world datasets to demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing graph transformers and popular GNNs.
summary: The Transformer architecture has achieved remarkable success in a number of domains including natural language processing and computer vision. However, when it comes to graph-structured data, transformers have not achieved competitive performance, especially on large graphs. In this paper, we identify the main deficiencies of current graph transformers:(1) Existing node sampling strategies in Graph Transformers are agnostic to the graph characteristics and the training process. (2) Most sampling strategies only focus on local neighbors and neglect the long-range dependencies in the graph. We conduct experimental investigations on synthetic datasets to show that existing sampling strategies are sub-optimal. To tackle the aforementioned problems, we formulate the optimization strategies of node sampling in Graph Transformer as an adversary bandit problem, where the rewards are related to the attention weights and can vary in the training procedure. Meanwhile, we propose a hierarchical attention scheme with graph coarsening to capture the long-range interactions while reducing computational complexity. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on real-world datasets to demonstrate the superiority of our method over existing graph transformers and popular GNNs.
abstract_zh: Transformer 架构在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等多个领域取得了显着的成功。然而，当涉及到图结构数据时，Transformer 还没有取得有竞争力的性能，尤其是在大图上。在本文中，我们确定了当前图变压器的主要缺陷：（1）图变压器中现有的节点采样策略与图特征和训练过程无关。 （2）大多数采样策略只关注局部邻居，而忽略图中的远程依赖关系。我们对合成数据集进行实验研究，以表明现有的采样策略不是最优的。为了解决上述问题，我们将 Graph Transformer 中的节点采样优化策略制定为对抗强盗问题，其中奖励与注意力权重相关，并且在训练过程中可能会有所不同。同时，我们提出了一种具有图粗化的分层注意方案，以捕获远程交互，同时降低计算复杂度。最后，我们对现实世界的数据集进行了广泛的实验，以证明我们的方法相对于现有图转换器和流行的 GNN 的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的图Transformer模型，通过自适应节点采样和分层注意力机制解决现有图Transformer在大图处理中的性能不足。
AI.motivation: 现有图Transformer的节点采样策略无法适应图结构特性且忽视长距离依赖，导致在大型图数据上表现不佳。
AI.method: 将节点采样优化建模为对抗老虎机问题，结合分层注意力机制与图粗化技术，同时捕捉长距离依赖并降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界数据集上实验验证，新方法优于现有图Transformer和主流GNN模型。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应采样与分层注意力机制，有效提升了图Transformer在大型图数据上的性能，为图结构数据处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Baoxiong Jia,Ting Lei,Song-Chun Zhu,Siyuan Huang
title: EgoTaskQA: Understanding Human Tasks in Egocentric Videos
title_zh: EgoTaskQA：理解以自我为中心的视频中的人类任务
comment: Published at NeurIPS Track on Datasets and Benchmarks 2022
comments: Published at NeurIPS Track on Datasets and Benchmarks 2022
abstract: Understanding human tasks through video observations is an essential capability of intelligent agents. The challenges of such capability lie in the difficulty of generating a detailed understanding of situated actions, their effects on object states (i.e., state changes), and their causal dependencies. These challenges are further aggravated by the natural parallelism from multi-tasking and partial observations in multi-agent collaboration. Most prior works leverage action localization or future prediction as an indirect metric for evaluating such task understanding from videos. To make a direct evaluation, we introduce the EgoTaskQA benchmark that provides a single home for the crucial dimensions of task understanding through question-answering on real-world egocentric videos. We meticulously design questions that target the understanding of (1) action dependencies and effects, (2) intents and goals, and (3) agents' beliefs about others. These questions are divided into four types, including descriptive (what status?), predictive (what will?), explanatory (what caused?), and counterfactual (what if?) to provide diagnostic analyses on spatial, temporal, and causal understandings of goal-oriented tasks. We evaluate state-of-the-art video reasoning models on our benchmark and show their significant gaps between humans in understanding complex goal-oriented egocentric videos. We hope this effort will drive the vision community to move onward with goal-oriented video understanding and reasoning.
summary: Understanding human tasks through video observations is an essential capability of intelligent agents. The challenges of such capability lie in the difficulty of generating a detailed understanding of situated actions, their effects on object states (i.e., state changes), and their causal dependencies. These challenges are further aggravated by the natural parallelism from multi-tasking and partial observations in multi-agent collaboration. Most prior works leverage action localization or future prediction as an indirect metric for evaluating such task understanding from videos. To make a direct evaluation, we introduce the EgoTaskQA benchmark that provides a single home for the crucial dimensions of task understanding through question-answering on real-world egocentric videos. We meticulously design questions that target the understanding of (1) action dependencies and effects, (2) intents and goals, and (3) agents' beliefs about others. These questions are divided into four types, including descriptive (what status?), predictive (what will?), explanatory (what caused?), and counterfactual (what if?) to provide diagnostic analyses on spatial, temporal, and causal understandings of goal-oriented tasks. We evaluate state-of-the-art video reasoning models on our benchmark and show their significant gaps between humans in understanding complex goal-oriented egocentric videos. We hope this effort will drive the vision community to move onward with goal-oriented video understanding and reasoning.
abstract_zh: 通过视频观察理解人类任务是智能代理的一项基本能力。这种能力的挑战在于难以详细理解情境动作、它们对对象状态的影响（即状态变化）以及它们的因果依赖性。多智能体协作中多任务处理和部分观察的自然并行性进一步加剧了这些挑战。大多数先前的工作利用动作本地化或未来预测作为评估视频中此类任务理解的间接指标。为了进行直接评估，我们引入了 EgoTaskQA 基准，该基准通过对现实世界的自我中心视频进行问答，为任务理解的关键维度提供了一个单一的家。我们精心设计问题，旨在理解（1）行动依赖性和效果，（2）意图和目标，以及（3）代理人对他人的信念。这些问题分为四种类型，包括描述性（什么状态？）、预测性（将会发生什么？）、解释性（导致什么？）和反事实（如果？），以提供对目标导向任务的空间、时间和因果理解的诊断分析。我们根据基准评估最先进的视频推理模型，并展示它们在理解复杂的以目标为导向的自我中心视频方面与人类之间的显着差距。我们希望这一努力能够推动视觉社区在以目标为导向的视频理解和推理方面取得进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoTaskQA基准测试，通过问答形式直接评估智能体对第一视角视频中人类任务的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖动作定位或未来预测等间接指标评估任务理解，难以全面衡量行动依赖、意图目标及因果推理等核心能力。
AI.method: 设计四类问题（描述性/预测性/解释性/反事实性）聚焦行动依赖、意图目标及对他人信念的理解，并构建真实第一视角视频问答基准进行模型评估。
AI.result: 实验显示现有视频推理模型在复杂目标导向任务理解上与人类存在显著差距。
AI.conclusion: 该工作旨在推动视觉社区关注目标导向视频理解与推理方向的研究进展。

authors_text: Yufeng Zhong,Long Xu,Jiebo Luo,Lin Ma
title: Contextual Modeling for 3D Dense Captioning on Point Clouds
title_zh: 点云上 3D 密集字幕的上下文建模
abstract: 3D dense captioning, as an emerging vision-language task, aims to identify and locate each object from a set of point clouds and generate a distinctive natural language sentence for describing each located object. However, the existing methods mainly focus on mining inter-object relationship, while ignoring contextual information, especially the non-object details and background environment within the point clouds, thus leading to low-quality descriptions, such as inaccurate relative position information. In this paper, we make the first attempt to utilize the point clouds clustering features as the contextual information to supply the non-object details and background environment of the point clouds and incorporate them into the 3D dense captioning task. We propose two separate modules, namely the Global Context Modeling (GCM) and Local Context Modeling (LCM), in a coarse-to-fine manner to perform the contextual modeling of the point clouds. Specifically, the GCM module captures the inter-object relationship among all objects with global contextual information to obtain more complete scene information of the whole point clouds. The LCM module exploits the influence of the neighboring objects of the target object and local contextual information to enrich the object representations. With such global and local contextual modeling strategies, our proposed model can effectively characterize the object representations and contextual information and thereby generate comprehensive and detailed descriptions of the located objects. Extensive experiments on the ScanRefer and Nr3D datasets demonstrate that our proposed method sets a new record on the 3D dense captioning task, and verify the effectiveness of our raised contextual modeling of point clouds.
summary: 3D dense captioning, as an emerging vision-language task, aims to identify and locate each object from a set of point clouds and generate a distinctive natural language sentence for describing each located object. However, the existing methods mainly focus on mining inter-object relationship, while ignoring contextual information, especially the non-object details and background environment within the point clouds, thus leading to low-quality descriptions, such as inaccurate relative position information. In this paper, we make the first attempt to utilize the point clouds clustering features as the contextual information to supply the non-object details and background environment of the point clouds and incorporate them into the 3D dense captioning task. We propose two separate modules, namely the Global Context Modeling (GCM) and Local Context Modeling (LCM), in a coarse-to-fine manner to perform the contextual modeling of the point clouds. Specifically, the GCM module captures the inter-object relationship among all objects with global contextual information to obtain more complete scene information of the whole point clouds. The LCM module exploits the influence of the neighboring objects of the target object and local contextual information to enrich the object representations. With such global and local contextual modeling strategies, our proposed model can effectively characterize the object representations and contextual information and thereby generate comprehensive and detailed descriptions of the located objects. Extensive experiments on the ScanRefer and Nr3D datasets demonstrate that our proposed method sets a new record on the 3D dense captioning task, and verify the effectiveness of our raised contextual modeling of point clouds.
abstract_zh: 3D密集字幕作为一种新兴的视觉语言任务，旨在从一组点云中识别和定位每个对象，并生成独特的自然语言句子来描述每个定位的对象。然而，现有方法主要侧重于挖掘对象间关系，而忽略了上下文信息，特别是点云内的非对象细节和背景环境，从而导致描述质量低下，例如相对位置信息不准确。在本文中，我们首次尝试利用点云聚类特征作为上下文信息来提供点云的非对象细节和背景环境，并将它们合并到 3D 密集字幕任务中。我们提出了两个独立的模块，即全局上下文建模（GCM）和局部上下文建模（LCM），以从粗到细的方式来执行点云的上下文建模。具体来说，GCM模块利用全局上下文信息捕获所有对象之间的对象间关系，以获得整个点云的更完整的场景信息。 LCM模块利用目标对象的邻近对象的影响和局部上下文信息来丰富对象表示。通过这种全局和局部上下文建模策略，我们提出的模型可以有效地表征对象表示和上下文信息，从而生成所定位对象的全面和详细的描述。在 ScanRefer 和 Nr3D 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们提出的方法在 3D 密集字幕任务上创下了新记录，并验证了我们提出的点云上下文建模的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于点云上下文建模的3D密集字幕生成方法，通过融合全局和局部上下文信息提升物体描述的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在3D密集字幕任务中仅关注物体间关系，忽视了点云中的非物体细节和背景环境信息，导致生成的描述存在位置信息不准确等问题。
AI.method: 提出全局上下文建模模块（GCM）和局部上下文建模模块（LCM），通过点云聚类特征提取场景全局信息与物体局部关系，采用粗到细策略融合上下文信息。
AI.result: 在ScanRefer和Nr3D数据集上取得当前最优性能，验证了上下文建模对提升字幕质量的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模点云的全局场景语义与局部物体关系，能够生成更全面准确的3D物体描述，为密集字幕任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Chenliang Zhou,Fangcheng Zhong,Cengiz Oztireli
title: CLIP-PAE: Projection-Augmentation Embedding to Extract Relevant Features for a Disentangled, Interpretable, and Controllable Text-Guided Face Manipulation
title_zh: CLIP-PAE：投影增强嵌入提取相关特征，以实现解开、可解释且可控的文本引导面部操作
abstract: Recently introduced Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) bridges images and text by embedding them into a joint latent space. This opens the door to ample literature that aims to manipulate an input image by providing a textual explanation. However, due to the discrepancy between image and text embeddings in the joint space, using text embeddings as the optimization target often introduces undesired artifacts in the resulting images. Disentanglement, interpretability, and controllability are also hard to guarantee for manipulation. To alleviate these problems, we propose to define corpus subspaces spanned by relevant prompts to capture specific image characteristics. We introduce CLIP Projection-Augmentation Embedding (PAE) as an optimization target to improve the performance of text-guided image manipulation. Our method is a simple and general paradigm that can be easily computed and adapted, and smoothly incorporated into any CLIP-based image manipulation algorithm. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we conduct several theoretical and empirical studies. As a case study, we utilize the method for text-guided semantic face editing. We quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate that PAE facilitates a more disentangled, interpretable, and controllable image manipulation with state-of-the-art quality and accuracy. Project page: https://chenliang-zhou.github.io/CLIP-PAE/.

To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we conduct several theoretical and empirical studies. As a case study, we utilize the method for text-guided semantic face editing. We quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate that PAE facilitates a more disentangled, interpretable, and controllable image manipulation with state-of-the-art quality and accuracy. Project page: https://chenliang-zhou.github.io/CLIP-PAE/.
abstract_zh: 最近推出的对比语言图像预训练（CLIP）通过将图像和文本嵌入到联合潜在空间中来连接图像和文本。这为大量旨在通过提供文本解释来操纵输入图像的文献打开了大门。然而，由于联合空间中图像和文本嵌入之间的差异，使用文本嵌入作为优化目标通常会在结果图像中引入不需要的伪影。解开性、可解释性和可控性也很难保证可操纵。为了缓解这些问题，我们建议定义由相关提示跨越的语料库子空间以捕获特定的图像特征。我们引入 CLIP 投影增强嵌入（PAE）作为优化目标，以提高文本引导图像处理的性能。我们的方法是一种简单且通用的范例，可以轻松计算和调整，并顺利地融入任何基于 CLIP 的图像处理算法中。为了证明我们方法的有效性，我们进行了多项理论和实证研究。作为案例研究，我们利用文本引导语义人脸编辑方法。我们定量和定性地证明，PAE 有助于以最先进的质量和准确性进行更加清晰、可解释和可控的图像处理。项目页面：https://chenliang-zhou.github.io/CLIP-PAE/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CLIP-PAE的方法，用于通过文本引导实现更解耦、可解释和可控的图像操作。
AI.motivation: 尽管CLIP通过将图像和文本嵌入到共享的潜在空间中，为文本引导的图像操作提供了新思路，但图像和文本嵌入之间的差异常常导致操作结果中出现不希望的伪影，并且难以保证解耦、可解释性和可控性。
AI.method: 本文引入了CLIP投影增强嵌入（PAE）作为优化目标，通过定义由相关提示生成的语料子空间来捕捉特定的图像特征，从而提升文本引导图像操作的性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，PAE在文本引导的语义人脸编辑任务中，能够实现更高质量和准确度的图像操作，具有更优的解耦性、可解释性和可控性。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-PAE提供了一种简单且通用的范式，可以轻松计算和适应，并能顺利集成到任何基于CLIP的图像操作算法中，显著提升了文本引导图像操作的效果。

search_text: CLIP-PAE: Projection-Augmentation Embedding to Extract Relevant Features for a Disentangled, Interpretable, and Controllable Text-Guided Face Manipulation CLIP-PAE：投影增强嵌入提取相关特征，以实现解开、可解释且可控的文本引导面部操作 Recently introduced Contrastive Language-Image Pre-Training (CLIP) bridges images and text by embedding them into a joint latent space. This opens the door to ample literature that aims to manipulate an input image by providing a textual explanation. However, due to the discrepancy between image and text embeddings in the joint space, using text embeddings as the optimization target often introduces undesired artifacts in the resulting images. Disentanglement, interpretability, and controllability are also hard to guarantee for manipulation. To alleviate these problems, we propose to define corpus subspaces spanned by relevant prompts to capture specific image characteristics. We introduce CLIP Projection-Augmentation Embedding (PAE) as an optimization target to improve the performance of text-guided image manipulation. Our method is a simple and general paradigm that can be easily computed and adapted, and smoothly incorporated into any CLIP-based image manipulation algorithm. To demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, we conduct several theoretical and empirical studies. As a case study, we utilize the method for text-guided semantic face editing. We quantitatively and qualitatively demonstrate that PAE facilitates a more disentangled, interpretable, and controllable image manipulation with state-of-the-art quality and accuracy. authors_text: Jitao Xu,Hongbo Li,Minghao Yin
title: Finding and Exploring Promising Search Space for the 0-1 Multidimensional Knapsack Problem
title_zh: 寻找和探索 0-1 多维背包问题的有前景的搜索空间
abstract: The 0-1 Multidimensional Knapsack Problem (MKP) is a classical NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem with many engineering applications. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm combining evolutionary computation with the exact algorithm to solve the 0-1 MKP. It maintains a set of solutions and utilizes the information from the population to extract good partial assignments. To find high-quality solutions, an exact algorithm is applied to explore the promising search space specified by the good partial assignments. The new solutions are used to update the population. Thus, the good partial assignments evolve towards a better direction with the improvement of the population. Extensive experimentation with commonly used benchmark sets shows that our algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art heuristic algorithms, TPTEA and DQPSO, as well as the commercial solver CPlex. It finds better solutions than the existing algorithms and provides new lower bounds for 10 large and hard instances.
summary: The 0-1 Multidimensional Knapsack Problem (MKP) is a classical NP-hard combinatorial optimization problem with many engineering applications. In this paper, we propose a novel algorithm combining evolutionary computation with the exact algorithm to solve the 0-1 MKP. It maintains a set of solutions and utilizes the information from the population to extract good partial assignments. To find high-quality solutions, an exact algorithm is applied to explore the promising search space specified by the good partial assignments. The new solutions are used to update the population. Thus, the good partial assignments evolve towards a better direction with the improvement of the population. Extensive experimentation with commonly used benchmark sets shows that our algorithm outperforms the state-of-the-art heuristic algorithms, TPTEA and DQPSO, as well as the commercial solver CPlex. It finds better solutions than the existing algorithms and provides new lower bounds for 10 large and hard instances.
abstract_zh: 0-1多维背包问题（MKP）是一个经典的NP难组合优化问题，具有许多工程应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种将进化计算与精确算法相结合的新算法来求解0-1 MKP。它维护一组解决方案，并利用总体信息来提取良好的部分分配。为了找到高质量的解决方案，应用精确的算法来探索由良好的部分分配指定的有希望的搜索空间。新的解决方案用于更新人口。因此，随着种群数量的提高，好的部分分配会朝着更好的方向发展。对常用基准集的广泛实验表明，我们的算法优于最先进的启发式算法、TPTEA 和 DQPSO，以及商业求解器 CPlex。它找到了比现有算法更好的解决方案，并为 10 个大型实例和困难实例提供了新的下限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合进化计算与精确算法的新方法，用于求解0-1多维背包问题（MKP），以提升求解效率和质量。
AI.motivation: 0-1多维背包问题作为经典NP难问题，在工程中有广泛应用，但现有启发式算法和商业求解器在处理复杂实例时存在局限性，需探索更优解法。
AI.method: 算法通过维护解集并利用种群信息提取优质部分分配，结合精确算法探索这些部分分配定义的有前途的搜索空间，迭代更新种群以优化部分分配方向。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在常用基准测试集上优于当前最先进的启发式算法（TPTEA、DQPSO）及商业求解器CPlex，为10个大型困难实例提供了新的下界。
AI.conclusion: 混合算法有效结合了进化计算的全局搜索能力和精确算法的局部优化优势，为解决复杂组合优化问题提供了新思路。
