authors_text: Zeal Shah,Simone Fobi,Gabriel Cadamuro,Jay Taneja
title: A Higher Purpose: Measuring Electricity Access Using High-Resolution Daytime Satellite Imagery
title_zh: 更高的目标：使用高分辨率日间卫星图像测量电力接入
abstract: Governments and international organizations the world over are investing towards the goal of achieving universal energy access for improving socio-economic development. However, in developing settings, monitoring electrification efforts is typically inaccurate, infrequent, and expensive. In this work, we develop and present techniques for high-resolution monitoring of electrification progress at scale. Specifically, our 3 unique contributions are: (i) identifying areas with(out) electricity access, (ii) quantifying the extent of electrification in electrified areas (percentage/number of electrified structures), and (iii) differentiating between customer types in electrified regions (estimating the percentage/number of residential/non-residential electrified structures). We combine high-resolution 50 cm daytime satellite images with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to train a series of classification and regression models. We evaluate our models using unique ground truth datasets on building locations, building types (residential/non-residential), and building electrification status. Our classification models show a 92% accuracy in identifying electrified regions, 85% accuracy in estimating percent of (low/high) electrified buildings within the region, and 69% accuracy in differentiating between (low/high) percentage of electrified residential buildings. Our regressions show $R^2$ scores of 78% and 80% in estimating the number of electrified buildings and number of residential electrified building in images respectively. We also demonstrate the generalizability of our models in never-before-seen regions to assess their potential for consistent and high-resolution measurements of electrification in emerging economies, and conclude by highlighting opportunities for improvement.
summary: Governments and international organizations the world over are investing towards the goal of achieving universal energy access for improving socio-economic development. However, in developing settings, monitoring electrification efforts is typically inaccurate, infrequent, and expensive. In this work, we develop and present techniques for high-resolution monitoring of electrification progress at scale. Specifically, our 3 unique contributions are: (i) identifying areas with(out) electricity access, (ii) quantifying the extent of electrification in electrified areas (percentage/number of electrified structures), and (iii) differentiating between customer types in electrified regions (estimating the percentage/number of residential/non-residential electrified structures). We combine high-resolution 50 cm daytime satellite images with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to train a series of classification and regression models. We evaluate our models using unique ground truth datasets on building locations, building types (residential/non-residential), and building electrification status. Our classification models show a 92% accuracy in identifying electrified regions, 85% accuracy in estimating percent of (low/high) electrified buildings within the region, and 69% accuracy in differentiating between (low/high) percentage of electrified residential buildings. Our regressions show $R^2$ scores of 78% and 80% in estimating the number of electrified buildings and number of residential electrified building in images respectively. We also demonstrate the generalizability of our models in never-before-seen regions to assess their potential for consistent and high-resolution measurements of electrification in emerging economies, and conclude by highlighting opportunities for improvement.
abstract_zh: 世界各国政府和国际组织正在投资实现普遍获得能源以改善社会经济发展的目标。然而，在发展中环境中，监测电气化工作通常不准确、不频繁且昂贵。在这项工作中，我们开发并提出了大规模高分辨率监测电气化进展的技术。具体来说，我们的 3 个独特贡献是：(i) 识别无电区域，(ii) 量化电气化区域的电气化程度（电气化结构的百分比/数量），以及 (iii) 区分电气化区域的客户类型（估计住宅/非住宅电气化结构的百分比/数量）。我们将高分辨率 50 厘米白天卫星图像与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 相结合，训练一系列分类和回归模型。我们使用有关建筑位置、建筑类型（住宅/非住宅）和建筑电气化状态的独特地面实况数据集来评估我们的模型。我们的分类模型显示，识别电气化区域的准确度为 92%，估计区域内（低/高）电气化建筑百分比的准确度为 85%，区分电气化住宅建筑百分比（低/高）的准确度为 69%。我们的回归显示，在估计图像中的电气化建筑数量和住宅电气化建筑数量方面，$R^2$ 得分分别为 78% 和 80%。我们还展示了我们的模型在前所未见的地区的普适性，以评估其在新兴经济体中进行一致且高分辨率的电气化测量的潜力，并通过强调改进机会来得出结论。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用高分辨率白天卫星图像和卷积神经网络（CNNs）开发大规模电力覆盖监测技术，以准确评估电力接入情况。
AI.motivation: 全球政府和国际组织致力于实现普遍能源接入，但传统监测方法在发展中国家存在准确性低、成本高和频率不足的问题，需更高效的技术方案。
AI.method: 结合50厘米分辨率的白天卫星图像与CNNs，训练分类和回归模型，通过建筑位置、类型及电力状态的真实数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 分类模型识别电力区域准确率达92%，估算建筑电力比例准确率为85%，区分住宅与非住宅电力建筑准确率为69%；回归模型在估算电力建筑数量和住宅电力建筑数量上的R²分别为78%和80%。
AI.conclusion: 模型在新区域具有通用性，可为新兴经济体提供高分辨率电力监测方案，但需进一步优化以提高细分任务的准确性。

search_text: A Higher Purpose: Measuring Electricity Access Using High-Resolution Daytime Satellite Imagery 更高的目标：使用高分辨率日间卫星图像测量电力接入 Governments and international organizations the world over are investing towards the goal of achieving universal energy access for improving socio-economic development. However, in developing settings, monitoring electrification efforts is typically inaccurate, infrequent, and expensive. In this work, we develop and present techniques for high-resolution monitoring of electrification progress at scale. Specifically, our 3 unique contributions are: (i) identifying areas with(out) electricity access, (ii) quantifying the extent of electrification in electrified areas (percentage/number of electrified structures), and (iii) differentiating between customer types in electrified regions (estimating the percentage/number of residential/non-residential electrified structures). We combine high-resolution 50 cm daytime satellite images with Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) to train a series of classification and regression models. We evaluate our models using unique ground truth datasets on building locations, building types (residential/non-residential), and building electrification status. Our classification models show a 92% accuracy in identifying electrified regions, 85% accuracy in estimating percent of (low/high) electrified buildings within the region, and 69% accuracy in differentiating between (low/high) percentage of electrified residential buildings. Our regressions show $R^2$ scores of 78% and 80% in estimating the number of electrified buildings and number of residential electrified building in images respectively. We also demonstrate the generalizability of our models in never-before-seen regions to assess their potential for consistent and high-resolution measurements of electrification in emerging economies, and conclude by highlighting opportunities for improvement. 世界各国政府和国际组织正在投资实现普遍获得能源以改善社会经济发展的目标。然而，在发展中环境中，监测电气化工作通常不准确、不频繁且昂贵。在这项工作中，我们开发并提出了大规模高分辨率监测电气化进展的技术。具体来说，我们的 3 个独特贡献是：(i) 识别无电区域，(ii) 量化电气化区域的电气化程度（电气化结构的百分比/数量），以及 (iii) 区分电气化区域的客户类型（估计住宅/非住宅电气化结构的百分比/数量）。我们将高分辨率 50 厘米白天卫星图像与卷积神经网络 (CNN) 相结合，训练一系列分类和回归模型。我们使用有关建筑位置、建筑类型（住宅/非住宅）和建筑电气化状态的独特地面实况数据集来评估我们的模型。我们的分类模型显示，识别电气化区域的准确度为 92%，估计区域内（低/高）电气化建筑百分比的准确度为 85%，区分电气化住宅建筑百分比（低/高）的准确度为 69%。我们的回归显示，在估计图像中的电气化建筑数量和住宅电气化建筑数量方面，$R^2$ 得分分别为 78% 和 80%。我们还展示了我们的模型在前所未见的地区的普适性，以评估其在新兴经济体中进行一致且高分辨率的电气化测量的潜力，并通过强调改进机会来得出结论。 本文提出利用高分辨率白天卫星图像和卷积神经网络（CNNs）开发大规模电力覆盖监测技术，以准确评估电力接入情况。 Zeal Shah,Simone Fobi,Gabriel Cadamuro,Jay Taneja cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yixiang Shan,Jielong Yang,Xing Liu,Yixing Gao,Hechang Chen,Shuzhi Sam Ge
title: Learning the Network of Graphs for Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 学习图神经网络的图网络
abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved great success in many scenarios with graph-structured data. However, in many real applications, there are three issues when applying GNNs: graphs are unknown, nodes have noisy features, and graphs contain noisy connections. Aiming at solving these problems, we propose a new graph neural network named as GL-GNN. Our model includes multiple sub-modules, each sub-module selects important data features and learn the corresponding key relation graph of data samples when graphs are unknown. GL-GNN further obtains the network of graphs by learning the network of sub-modules. The learned graphs are further fused using an aggregation method over the network of graphs. Our model solves the first issue by simultaneously learning multiple relation graphs of data samples as well as a relation network of graphs, and solves the second and the third issue by selecting important data features as well as important data sample relations. We compare our method with 14 baseline methods on seven datasets when the graph is unknown and 11 baseline methods on two datasets when the graph is known. The results show that our method achieves better accuracies than the baseline methods and is capable of selecting important features and graph edges from the dataset. Our code will be publicly available at \url{https://github.com/Looomo/GL-GNN}.
summary: Graph neural networks (GNNs) have achieved great success in many scenarios with graph-structured data. However, in many real applications, there are three issues when applying GNNs: graphs are unknown, nodes have noisy features, and graphs contain noisy connections. Aiming at solving these problems, we propose a new graph neural network named as GL-GNN. Our model includes multiple sub-modules, each sub-module selects important data features and learn the corresponding key relation graph of data samples when graphs are unknown. GL-GNN further obtains the network of graphs by learning the network of sub-modules. The learned graphs are further fused using an aggregation method over the network of graphs. Our model solves the first issue by simultaneously learning multiple relation graphs of data samples as well as a relation network of graphs, and solves the second and the third issue by selecting important data features as well as important data sample relations. We compare our method with 14 baseline methods on seven datasets when the graph is unknown and 11 baseline methods on two datasets when the graph is known. The results show that our method achieves better accuracies than the baseline methods and is capable of selecting important features and graph edges from the dataset. Our code will be publicly available at \url{https://github.com/Looomo/GL-GNN}.
abstract_zh: 图神经网络（GNN）在许多具有图结构数据的场景中取得了巨大的成功。然而，在许多实际应用中，应用 GNN 时会遇到三个问题：图未知、节点具有噪声特征以及图包含噪声连接。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新的图神经网络，命名为 GL-GNN。我们的模型包括多个子模块，每个子模块选择重要的数据特征并在图未知时学习数据样本对应的关键关系图。 GL-GNN通过学习子模块的网络进一步获得图的网络。使用图网络上的聚合方法进一步融合学习到的图。我们的模型通过同时学习数据样本的多个关系图以及图的关系网络来解决第一个问题，并通过选择重要的数据特征以及重要的数据样本关系来解决第二个问题和第三个问题。当图未知时，我们将我们的方法与七个数据集上的 14 种基线方法进行比较；当图已知时，我们将我们的方法与两个数据集上的 11 种基线方法进行比较。结果表明，我们的方法比基线方法具有更好的精度，并且能够从数据集中选择重要的特征和图边缘。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/Looomo/GL-GNN} 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型图神经网络GL-GNN，解决图未知、节点特征噪声和图连接噪声等问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络在应用时面临图结构未知、节点特征噪声及图连接噪声三大挑战，需设计鲁棒性更强的模型。
AI.method: 构建包含多子模块的GL-GNN框架，通过学习数据样本的关键关系图及图网络，并采用聚合方法融合多图信息。
AI.result: 在7个未知图数据集和2个已知图数据集上均优于14/11种基线方法，可有效筛选重要特征与图边。
AI.conclusion: GL-GNN通过多图学习与特征选择机制，有效解决了图结构不确定性与噪声干扰问题，代码已开源。

authors_text: Hongyang Chen,Kaisheng Ma
title: LW-ISP: A Lightweight Model with ISP and Deep Learning
title_zh: LW-ISP：具有 ISP 和深度学习的轻量级模型
comment: 16 PAGES, ACCEPTED AS A CONFERENCE PAPER AT: BMVC 2022
comments: 16 PAGES, ACCEPTED AS A CONFERENCE PAPER AT: BMVC 2022
abstract: The deep learning (DL)-based methods of low-level tasks have many advantages over the traditional camera in terms of hardware prospects, error accumulation and imaging effects. Recently, the application of deep learning to replace the image signal processing (ISP) pipeline has appeared one after another; however, there is still a long way to go towards real landing. In this paper, we show the possibility of learning-based method to achieve real-time high-performance processing in the ISP pipeline. We propose LW-ISP, a novel architecture designed to implicitly learn the image mapping from RAW data to RGB image. Based on U-Net architecture, we propose the fine-grained attention module and a plug-and-play upsampling block suitable for low-level tasks. In particular, we design a heterogeneous distillation algorithm to distill the implicit features and reconstruction information of the clean image, so as to guide the learning of the student model. Our experiments demonstrate that LW-ISP has achieved a 0.38 dB improvement in PSNR compared to the previous best method, while the model parameters and calculation have been reduced by 23 times and 81 times. The inference efficiency has been accelerated by at least 15 times. Without bells and whistles, LW-ISP has achieved quite competitive results in ISP subtasks including image denoising and enhancement.
summary: The deep learning (DL)-based methods of low-level tasks have many advantages over the traditional camera in terms of hardware prospects, error accumulation and imaging effects. Recently, the application of deep learning to replace the image signal processing (ISP) pipeline has appeared one after another; however, there is still a long way to go towards real landing. In this paper, we show the possibility of learning-based method to achieve real-time high-performance processing in the ISP pipeline. We propose LW-ISP, a novel architecture designed to implicitly learn the image mapping from RAW data to RGB image. Based on U-Net architecture, we propose the fine-grained attention module and a plug-and-play upsampling block suitable for low-level tasks. In particular, we design a heterogeneous distillation algorithm to distill the implicit features and reconstruction information of the clean image, so as to guide the learning of the student model. Our experiments demonstrate that LW-ISP has achieved a 0.38 dB improvement in PSNR compared to the previous best method, while the model parameters and calculation have been reduced by 23 times and 81 times. The inference efficiency has been accelerated by at least 15 times. Without bells and whistles, LW-ISP has achieved quite competitive results in ISP subtasks including image denoising and enhancement.
abstract_zh: 基于深度学习（DL）的低级任务方法在硬件前景、误差累积和成像效果方面比传统相机具有许多优势。近来，深度学习取代图像信号处理（ISP）流水线的应用相继出现；但距离真正落地还有很长的路要走。在本文中，我们展示了基于学习的方法在 ISP 管道中实现实时高性能处理的可能性。我们提出了 LW-ISP，一种新颖的架构，旨在隐式学习从 RAW 数据到 RGB 图像的图像映射。基于U-Net架构，我们提出了细粒度注意力模块和适用于低级任务的即插即用上采样块。特别是，我们设计了一种异构蒸馏算法来蒸馏干净图像的隐式特征和重建信息，从而指导学生模型的学习。我们的实验表明，与之前的最佳方法相比，LW-ISP在PSNR上实现了0.38 dB的改进，同时模型参数和计算量分别减少了23倍和81倍。推理效率提升至少15倍。没有花哨的东西，LW-ISP 在图像去噪和增强等 ISP 子任务中取得了相当有竞争力的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LW-ISP，一种基于深度学习的轻量级图像信号处理（ISP）模型，旨在实现从RAW数据到RGB图像的高效实时处理。
AI.motivation: 传统ISP存在硬件限制、误差累积和成像效果不足的问题，而现有深度学习方法虽具优势但尚未实现实际落地，需更高效的模型设计。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构设计LW-ISP，引入细粒度注意力模块和即插即用上采样块，并采用异构蒸馏算法从干净图像中提取隐式特征指导学生模型学习。
AI.result: 在PSNR指标上较最佳方法提升0.38dB，模型参数和计算量分别减少23倍和81倍，推理效率提升至少15倍，在去噪和增强子任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: LW-ISP通过轻量化设计和知识蒸馏有效提升了ISP任务的性能与效率，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出LW-ISP，一种基于深度学习的轻量级图像信号处理（ISP）模型，旨在实现从RAW数据到RGB图像的高效实时处理。
ai_content.motivation: 传统ISP存在硬件限制、误差累积和成像效果不足的问题，而现有深度学习方法虽具优势但尚未实现实际落地，需更高效的模型设计。

search_text: LW-ISP: A Lightweight Model with ISP and Deep Learning LW-ISP：具有 ISP 和深度学习的轻量级模型 The deep learning (DL)-based methods of low-level tasks have many advantages over the traditional camera in terms of hardware prospects, error accumulation and imaging effects. Recently, the application of deep learning to replace the image signal processing (ISP) pipeline has appeared one after another; however, there is still a long way to go towards real landing. In this paper, we show the possibility of learning-based method to achieve real-time high-performance processing in the ISP pipeline. We propose LW-ISP, a novel architecture designed to implicitly learn the image mapping from RAW data to RGB image. Based on U-Net architecture, we propose the fine-grained attention module and a plug-and-play upsampling block suitable for low-level tasks. In particular, we design a heterogeneous distillation algorithm to distill the implicit features and reconstruction information of the clean image, so as to guide the learning of the student model. Our experiments demonstrate that LW-ISP has achieved a 0.38 dB improvement in PSNR compared to the previous best method, while the model parameters and calculation have been reduced by 23 times and 81 times. The inference efficiency has been accelerated by at least 15 times. Without bells and whistles, LW-ISP has achieved quite competitive results in ISP subtasks including image denoising and enhancement. 基于深度学习（DL）的低级任务方法在硬件前景、误差累积和成像效果方面比传统相机具有许多优势。近来，深度学习取代图像信号处理（ISP）流水线的应用相继出现；但距离真正落地还有很长的路要走。在本文中，我们展示了基于学习的方法在 ISP 管道中实现实时高性能处理的可能性。我们提出了 LW-ISP，一种新颖的架构，旨在隐式学习从 RAW 数据到 RGB 图像的图像映射。基于U-Net架构，我们提出了细粒度注意力模块和适用于低级任务的即插即用上采样块。特别是，我们设计了一种异构蒸馏算法来蒸馏干净图像的隐式特征和重建信息，从而指导学生模型的学习。我们的实验表明，与之前的最佳方法相比，LW-ISP在PSNR上实现了0.38 dB的改进，同时模型参数和计算量分别减少了23倍和81倍。推理效率提升至少15倍。没有花哨的东西，LW-ISP 在图像去噪和增强等 ISP 子任务中取得了相当有竞争力的结果。 本文提出LW-ISP，一种基于深度学习的轻量级图像信号处理（ISP）模型，旨在实现从RAW数据到RGB图像的高效实时处理。 Hongyang Chen,Kaisheng Ma cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jie Liu,Jingjing Wang,Peng Zhang,Chunmao Wang,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu
title: Multi-Scale Wavelet Transformer for Face Forgery Detection
title_zh: 用于人脸伪造检测的多尺度小波变换器
comment: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Accepted to ACCV 2022 as oral presentation
comments: The first two authors contributed equally to this work. Accepted to ACCV 2022 as oral presentation
abstract: Currently, many face forgery detection methods aggregate spatial and frequency features to enhance the generalization ability and gain promising performance under the cross-dataset scenario. However, these methods only leverage one level frequency information which limits their expressive ability. To overcome these limitations, we propose a multi-scale wavelet transformer framework for face forgery detection. Specifically, to take full advantage of the multi-scale and multi-frequency wavelet representation, we gradually aggregate the multi-scale wavelet representation at different stages of the backbone network. To better fuse the frequency feature with the spatial features, frequency-based spatial attention is designed to guide the spatial feature extractor to concentrate more on forgery traces. Meanwhile, cross-modality attention is proposed to fuse the frequency features with the spatial features. These two attention modules are calculated through a unified transformer block for efficiency. A wide variety of experiments demonstrate that the proposed method is efficient and effective for both within and cross datasets.
summary: Currently, many face forgery detection methods aggregate spatial and frequency features to enhance the generalization ability and gain promising performance under the cross-dataset scenario. However, these methods only leverage one level frequency information which limits their expressive ability. To overcome these limitations, we propose a multi-scale wavelet transformer framework for face forgery detection. Specifically, to take full advantage of the multi-scale and multi-frequency wavelet representation, we gradually aggregate the multi-scale wavelet representation at different stages of the backbone network. To better fuse the frequency feature with the spatial features, frequency-based spatial attention is designed to guide the spatial feature extractor to concentrate more on forgery traces. Meanwhile, cross-modality attention is proposed to fuse the frequency features with the spatial features. These two attention modules are calculated through a unified transformer block for efficiency. A wide variety of experiments demonstrate that the proposed method is efficient and effective for both within and cross datasets.
abstract_zh: 目前，许多人脸伪造检测方法聚合空间和频率特征以增强泛化能力并在跨数据集场景下获得良好的性能。然而，这些方法仅利用一级频率信息，这限制了它们的表达能力。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了一种用于人脸伪造检测的多尺度小波变换器框架。具体来说，为了充分利用多尺度、多频率的小波表示，我们逐渐聚合骨干网络不同阶段的多尺度小波表示。为了更好地融合频率特征和空间特征，设计了基于频率的空间注意力来引导空间特征提取器更多地关注伪造痕迹。同时，提出了跨模态注意力来融合频率特征和空间特征。这两个注意力模块通过统一的变压器块进行计算以提高效率。各种各样的实验表明，所提出的方法对于数据集内和跨数据集都是高效且有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度小波Transformer框架，通过融合多尺度频率特征与空间特征提升人脸伪造检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅利用单一频率层级信息，难以充分捕捉多尺度伪造痕迹，限制了跨数据集场景下的泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计多阶段多尺度小波特征聚合机制，结合频率空间注意力与跨模态注意力模块，通过统一Transformer块实现频率-空间特征高效融合。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种数据集内及跨数据集场景下均取得优于现有方法的检测准确率与鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征融合与注意力机制协同提升了伪造检测能力，为跨域场景下的反伪造研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yinpeng Dong,Shouwei Ruan,Hang Su,Caixin Kang,Xingxing Wei,Jun Zhu
title: ViewFool: Evaluating the Robustness of Visual Recognition to Adversarial Viewpoints
title_zh: ViewFool：评估视觉识别对对抗性观点的鲁棒性
abstract: Recent studies have demonstrated that visual recognition models lack robustness to distribution shift. However, current work mainly considers model robustness to 2D image transformations, leaving viewpoint changes in the 3D world less explored. In general, viewpoint changes are prevalent in various real-world applications (e.g., autonomous driving), making it imperative to evaluate viewpoint robustness. In this paper, we propose a novel method called ViewFool to find adversarial viewpoints that mislead visual recognition models. By encoding real-world objects as neural radiance fields (NeRF), ViewFool characterizes a distribution of diverse adversarial viewpoints under an entropic regularizer, which helps to handle the fluctuations of the real camera pose and mitigate the reality gap between the real objects and their neural representations. Experiments validate that the common image classifiers are extremely vulnerable to the generated adversarial viewpoints, which also exhibit high cross-model transferability. Based on ViewFool, we introduce ImageNet-V, a new out-of-distribution dataset for benchmarking viewpoint robustness of image classifiers. Evaluation results on 40 classifiers with diverse architectures, objective functions, and data augmentations reveal a significant drop in model performance when tested on ImageNet-V, which provides a possibility to leverage ViewFool as an effective data augmentation strategy to improve viewpoint robustness.
summary: Recent studies have demonstrated that visual recognition models lack robustness to distribution shift. However, current work mainly considers model robustness to 2D image transformations, leaving viewpoint changes in the 3D world less explored. In general, viewpoint changes are prevalent in various real-world applications (e.g., autonomous driving), making it imperative to evaluate viewpoint robustness. In this paper, we propose a novel method called ViewFool to find adversarial viewpoints that mislead visual recognition models. By encoding real-world objects as neural radiance fields (NeRF), ViewFool characterizes a distribution of diverse adversarial viewpoints under an entropic regularizer, which helps to handle the fluctuations of the real camera pose and mitigate the reality gap between the real objects and their neural representations. Experiments validate that the common image classifiers are extremely vulnerable to the generated adversarial viewpoints, which also exhibit high cross-model transferability. Based on ViewFool, we introduce ImageNet-V, a new out-of-distribution dataset for benchmarking viewpoint robustness of image classifiers. Evaluation results on 40 classifiers with diverse architectures, objective functions, and data augmentations reveal a significant drop in model performance when tested on ImageNet-V, which provides a possibility to leverage ViewFool as an effective data augmentation strategy to improve viewpoint robustness.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，视觉识别模型对分布变化缺乏鲁棒性。然而，当前的工作主要考虑模型对 2D 图像变换的鲁棒性，而对 3D 世界中的视点变化的探索较少。一般来说，视点变化在各种现实应用（例如自动驾驶）中普遍存在，因此必须评估视点的稳健性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 ViewFool 的新颖方法来寻找误导视觉识别模型的对抗性观点。通过将现实世界的物体编码为神经辐射场（NeRF），ViewFool 在熵正则化器下表征了不同对抗视点的分布，这有助于处理真实相机姿势的波动并减轻真实物体与其神经表示之间的现实差距。实验验证了常见的图像分类器极易受到生成的对抗性观点的影响，而这些观点也表现出较高的跨模型可迁移性。基于 ViewFool，我们引入了 ImageNet-V，这是一种新的分布外数据集，用于对图像分类器的视点鲁棒性进行基准测试。对具有不同架构、目标函数和数据增强的 40 个分类器的评估结果表明，在 ImageNet-V 上测试时模型性能显着下降，这提供了利用 ViewFool 作为有效数据增强策略来提高视点鲁棒性的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ViewFool的新方法，用于评估视觉识别模型在对抗性视角下的鲁棒性，并构建了一个新的数据集ImageNet-V用于基准测试。
AI.motivation: 当前研究主要关注图像变换下的模型鲁棒性，而对三维世界中视角变化的影响研究较少，这在自动驾驶等实际应用中尤为重要。
AI.method: 通过将现实世界物体编码为神经辐射场（NeRF），ViewFool在熵正则化下表征了多种对抗性视角的分布，以处理真实相机姿态的波动并减少现实物体与其神经表示之间的差距。
AI.result: 实验表明，常见的图像分类器对生成的对抗性视角非常脆弱，且具有高度的跨模型可迁移性。在ImageNet-V数据集上的评估显示，40种不同架构和数据增强的分类器性能显著下降。
AI.conclusion: ViewFool可以作为一种有效的数据增强策略，以提高图像分类器在视角变化下的鲁棒性。

By encoding real-world objects as neural radiance fields (NeRF), ViewFool characterizes a distribution of diverse adversarial viewpoints under an entropic regularizer, which helps to handle the fluctuations of the real camera pose and mitigate the reality gap between the real objects and their neural representations. Experiments validate that the common image classifiers are extremely vulnerable to the generated adversarial viewpoints, which also exhibit high cross-model transferability. Based on ViewFool, we introduce ImageNet-V, a new out-of-distribution dataset for benchmarking viewpoint robustness of image classifiers. Evaluation results on 40 classifiers with diverse architectures, objective functions, and data augmentations reveal a significant drop in model performance when tested on ImageNet-V, which provides a possibility to leverage ViewFool as an effective data augmentation strategy to improve viewpoint robustness. 最近的研究表明，视觉识别模型对分布变化缺乏鲁棒性。然而，当前的工作主要考虑模型对 2D 图像变换的鲁棒性，而对 3D 世界中的视点变化的探索较少。一般来说，视点变化在各种现实应用（例如自动驾驶）中普遍存在，因此必须评估视点的稳健性。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 ViewFool 的新颖方法来寻找误导视觉识别模型的对抗性观点。通过将现实世界的物体编码为神经辐射场（NeRF），ViewFool 在熵正则化器下表征了不同对抗视点的分布，这有助于处理真实相机姿势的波动并减轻真实物体与其神经表示之间的现实差距。实验验证了常见的图像分类器极易受到生成的对抗性观点的影响，而这些观点也表现出较高的跨模型可迁移性。基于 ViewFool，我们引入了 ImageNet-V，这是一种新的分布外数据集，用于对图像分类器的视点鲁棒性进行基准测试。对具有不同架构、目标函数和数据增强的 40 个分类器的评估结果表明，在 ImageNet-V 上测试时模型性能显着下降，这提供了利用 ViewFool 作为有效数据增强策略来提高视点鲁棒性的可能性。 本文提出了一种名为ViewFool的新方法，用于评估视觉识别模型在对抗性视角下的鲁棒性，并构建了一个新的数据集ImageNet-V用于基准测试。 Yinpeng Dong,Shouwei Ruan,Hang Su,Caixin Kang,Xingxing Wei,Jun Zhu cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Hiroshi Inazawa
title: An associative memory model with very high memory rate: Image storage by sequential addition learning
title_zh: 具有极高记忆率的联想记忆模型：通过顺序加法学习进行图像存储
abstract: In this paper, we present a neural network system related to about memory and recall that consists of one neuron group (the "cue ball") and a one-layer neural net (the "recall net"). This system realizes the bidirectional memorization learning between one cue neuron in the cue ball and the neurons in the recall net. It can memorize many patterns and recall these patterns or those that are similar at any time. Furthermore, the patterns are recalled at most the same time. This model's recall situation seems to resemble human recall of a variety of similar things almost simultaneously when one thing is recalled. It is also possible for additional learning to occur in the system without affecting the patterns memorized in advance. Moreover, the memory rate (the number of memorized patterns / the total number of neurons) is close to 100%; this system's rate is 0.987. Finally, pattern data constraints become an important aspect of this system.
summary: In this paper, we present a neural network system related to about memory and recall that consists of one neuron group (the "cue ball") and a one-layer neural net (the "recall net"). This system realizes the bidirectional memorization learning between one cue neuron in the cue ball and the neurons in the recall net. It can memorize many patterns and recall these patterns or those that are similar at any time. Furthermore, the patterns are recalled at most the same time. This model's recall situation seems to resemble human recall of a variety of similar things almost simultaneously when one thing is recalled. It is also possible for additional learning to occur in the system without affecting the patterns memorized in advance. Moreover, the memory rate (the number of memorized patterns / the total number of neurons) is close to 100%; this system's rate is 0.987. Finally, pattern data constraints become an important aspect of this system.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种与记忆和回忆相关的神经网络系统，该系统由一个神经元组（“母球”）和一个单层神经网络（“回忆网络”）组成。该系统实现了母球中的一个提示神经元与回忆网络中的神经元之间的双向记忆学习。它可以记住许多模式并随时回忆起这些模式或相似的模式。此外，这些模式几乎是同时被回忆起来的。该模型的回忆情况似乎类似于人类在回忆一件事情时几乎同时回忆多种相似的事情。系统中还可以进行额外的学习，而不会影响预先存储的模式。而且记忆率（记住的模式数/神经元总数）接近100%；该系统的比率是0.987。最后，模式数据约束成为该系统的一个重要方面。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种具有极高记忆率的联想记忆模型，通过顺序添加学习实现图像存储。
AI.motivation: 现有记忆模型存在记忆容量有限、无法同时召回相似模式等问题，需开发更接近人类记忆机制的高效模型。
AI.method: 构建包含‘提示球’神经元组和单层‘回忆网络’的系统，通过提示神经元与回忆网络间的双向记忆学习实现模式存储与召回。
AI.result: 记忆率高达98.7%，可同时召回相似模式且新增学习不影响原有记忆，模式数据约束成为系统关键因素。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过双向学习机制实现了接近100%的记忆效率，其同时召回相似模式的特性与人类记忆机制高度相似，为联想记忆系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Farhad Aghili
title: Hybrid Simulator for Space Docking and Robotic Proximity Operations
title_zh: 用于空间对接和机器人接近操作的混合模拟器
abstract: In this work, we present a hybrid simulator for space docking and robotic proximity operations methodology. This methodology also allows for the emulation of a target robot operating in a complex environment by using an actual robot. The emulation scheme aims to replicate the dynamic behavior of the target robot interacting with the environment, without dealing with a complex calculation of the contact dynamics. This method forms a basis for the task verification of a flexible space robot. The actual emulating robot is structurally rigid, while the target robot can represent any class of robots, e.g., flexible, redundant, or space robots. Although the emulating robot is not dynamically equivalent to the target robot, the dynamical similarity can be achieved by using a control law developed herein. The effect of disturbances and actuator dynamics on the fidelity and the contact stability of the robot emulation is thoroughly analyzed.
summary: In this work, we present a hybrid simulator for space docking and robotic proximity operations methodology. This methodology also allows for the emulation of a target robot operating in a complex environment by using an actual robot. The emulation scheme aims to replicate the dynamic behavior of the target robot interacting with the environment, without dealing with a complex calculation of the contact dynamics. This method forms a basis for the task verification of a flexible space robot. The actual emulating robot is structurally rigid, while the target robot can represent any class of robots, e.g., flexible, redundant, or space robots. Although the emulating robot is not dynamically equivalent to the target robot, the dynamical similarity can be achieved by using a control law developed herein. The effect of disturbances and actuator dynamics on the fidelity and the contact stability of the robot emulation is thoroughly analyzed.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于空间对接和机器人邻近操作方法的混合模拟器。该方法还允许使用实际机器人来模拟在复杂环境中运行的目标机器人。该仿真方案旨在复制目标机器人与环境交互的动态行为，而不需要处理复杂的接触动力学计算。该方法为柔性空间机器人的任务验证奠定了基础。实际的仿真机器人在结构上是刚性的，而目标机器人可以代表任何类别的机器人，例如柔性机器人、冗余机器人或空间机器人。尽管仿真机器人在动态上并不等同于目标机器人，但是可以通过使用本文开发的控制律来实现动态相似性。彻底分析了干扰和执行器动力学对机器人仿真的保真度和接触稳定性的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合模拟器，用于空间对接和机器人临近操作，通过实际机器人模拟目标机器人的动态行为，无需复杂接触动力学计算。
AI.motivation: 传统方法需复杂计算接触动力学，而该方法旨在简化验证过程，为柔性空间机器人任务提供可行的仿真基础。
AI.method: 利用结构刚性的实际机器人，通过开发的控制律实现与目标机器人（如柔性、冗余机器人）的动力学相似性，避免直接计算接触动力学。
AI.result: 分析了干扰和执行器动力学对模拟保真度及接触稳定性的影响，验证了方法在任务验证中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该混合模拟方法为不同类型的机器人任务验证提供了有效途径，尽管存在动力学差异，但通过控制律可确保模拟稳定性与准确性。

authors_text: Tao Zhong,Zhixiang Chi,Li Gu,Yang Wang,Yuanhao Yu,Jin Tang
title: Meta-DMoE: Adapting to Domain Shift by Meta-Distillation from Mixture-of-Experts
title_zh: Meta-DMoE：通过专家混合的元蒸馏来适应领域转移
abstract: In this paper, we tackle the problem of domain shift. Most existing methods perform training on multiple source domains using a single model, and the same trained model is used on all unseen target domains. Such solutions are sub-optimal as each target domain exhibits its own specialty, which is not adapted. Furthermore, expecting single-model training to learn extensive knowledge from multiple source domains is counterintuitive. The model is more biased toward learning only domain-invariant features and may result in negative knowledge transfer. In this work, we propose a novel framework for unsupervised test-time adaptation, which is formulated as a knowledge distillation process to address domain shift. Specifically, we incorporate Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) as teachers, where each expert is separately trained on different source domains to maximize their specialty. Given a test-time target domain, a small set of unlabeled data is sampled to query the knowledge from MoE. As the source domains are correlated to the target domains, a transformer-based aggregator then combines the domain knowledge by examining the interconnection among them. The output is treated as a supervision signal to adapt a student prediction network toward the target domain. We further employ meta-learning to enforce the aggregator to distill positive knowledge and the student network to achieve fast adaptation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art and validates the effectiveness of each proposed component. Our code is available at https://github.com/n3il666/Meta-DMoE.
summary: In this paper, we tackle the problem of domain shift. Most existing methods perform training on multiple source domains using a single model, and the same trained model is used on all unseen target domains. Such solutions are sub-optimal as each target domain exhibits its own specialty, which is not adapted. Furthermore, expecting single-model training to learn extensive knowledge from multiple source domains is counterintuitive. The model is more biased toward learning only domain-invariant features and may result in negative knowledge transfer. In this work, we propose a novel framework for unsupervised test-time adaptation, which is formulated as a knowledge distillation process to address domain shift. Specifically, we incorporate Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) as teachers, where each expert is separately trained on different source domains to maximize their specialty. Given a test-time target domain, a small set of unlabeled data is sampled to query the knowledge from MoE. As the source domains are correlated to the target domains, a transformer-based aggregator then combines the domain knowledge by examining the interconnection among them. The output is treated as a supervision signal to adapt a student prediction network toward the target domain. We further employ meta-learning to enforce the aggregator to distill positive knowledge and the student network to achieve fast adaptation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art and validates the effectiveness of each proposed component. Our code is available at https://github.com/n3il666/Meta-DMoE.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决域转移的问题。大多数现有方法使用单个模型对多个源域进行训练，并且在所有看不见的目标域上使用相同的训练模型。这样的解决方案并不是最优的，因为每个目标领域都表现出自己的特殊性，而这些特殊性并不适用。此外，期望单模型训练能够从多个源领域学习广泛的知识是违反直觉的。该模型更偏向于仅学习领域不变的特征，并可能导致负面的知识迁移。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于无监督测试时间适应的新颖框架，该框架被制定为解决领域转移的知识蒸馏过程。具体来说，我们采用混合专家（MoE）作为教师，每个专家都在不同的源领域分别接受培训，以最大限度地发挥他们的专业知识。给定测试时目标域，对一小组未标记的数据进行采样以查询 MoE 的知识。由于源域与目标域相关，基于转换器的聚合器然后通过检查它们之间的互连来组合域知识。输出被视为监督信号，以使学生预测网络适应目标域。我们进一步利用元学习来强制聚合器提取积极知识和学生网络以实现快速适应。大量的实验表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法，并验证了每个所提出组件的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/n3il666/Meta-DMoE 获取。

AI.tldr: 提出Meta-DMoE框架，通过元蒸馏和混合专家结构解决领域迁移问题，实现无监督测试时适应。
AI.motivation: 现有方法使用单一模型处理多源领域导致目标领域适配不足，且可能产生负迁移，需更有效的跨领域知识整合方案。
AI.method: 采用混合专家（MoE）作为教师模型，结合变压器聚合器整合领域知识，并通过元学习进行蒸馏，训练学生网络快速适应目标领域。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于当前最优方法，验证了各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Meta-DMoE通过元蒸馏和MoE结构有效应对领域迁移，提升模型在目标领域的适应能力。

search_text: Meta-DMoE: Adapting to Domain Shift by Meta-Distillation from Mixture-of-Experts Meta-DMoE：通过专家混合的元蒸馏来适应领域转移 In this paper, we tackle the problem of domain shift. Most existing methods perform training on multiple source domains using a single model, and the same trained model is used on all unseen target domains. Such solutions are sub-optimal as each target domain exhibits its own specialty, which is not adapted. Furthermore, expecting single-model training to learn extensive knowledge from multiple source domains is counterintuitive. The model is more biased toward learning only domain-invariant features and may result in negative knowledge transfer. In this work, we propose a novel framework for unsupervised test-time adaptation, which is formulated as a knowledge distillation process to address domain shift. Specifically, we incorporate Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) as teachers, where each expert is separately trained on different source domains to maximize their specialty. Given a test-time target domain, a small set of unlabeled data is sampled to query the knowledge from MoE. As the source domains are correlated to the target domains, a transformer-based aggregator then combines the domain knowledge by examining the interconnection among them. The output is treated as a supervision signal to adapt a student prediction network toward the target domain. We further employ meta-learning to enforce the aggregator to distill positive knowledge and the student network to achieve fast adaptation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the state-of-the-art and validates the effectiveness of each proposed component. Our code is available at https://github.com/n3il666/Meta-DMoE. 在本文中，我们解决域转移的问题。大多数现有方法使用单个模型对多个源域进行训练，并且在所有看不见的目标域上使用相同的训练模型。这样的解决方案并不是最优的，因为每个目标领域都表现出自己的特殊性，而这些特殊性并不适用。此外，期望单模型训练能够从多个源领域学习广泛的知识是违反直觉的。该模型更偏向于仅学习领域不变的特征，并可能导致负面的知识迁移。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种用于无监督测试时间适应的新颖框架，该框架被制定为解决领域转移的知识蒸馏过程。具体来说，我们采用混合专家（MoE）作为教师，每个专家都在不同的源领域分别接受培训，以最大限度地发挥他们的专业知识。给定测试时目标域，对一小组未标记的数据进行采样以查询 MoE 的知识。由于源域与目标域相关，基于转换器的聚合器然后通过检查它们之间的互连来组合域知识。输出被视为监督信号，以使学生预测网络适应目标域。我们进一步利用元学习来强制聚合器提取积极知识和学生网络以实现快速适应。大量的实验表明，所提出的方法优于最先进的方法，并验证了每个所提出组件的有效性。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/n3il666/Meta-DMoE 获取。 提出Meta-DMoE框架，通过元蒸馏和混合专家结构解决领域迁移问题，实现无监督测试时适应。 Tao Zhong,Zhixiang Chi,Li Gu,Yang Wang,Yuanhao Yu,Jin Tang cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Yi Shi,Jiang Wu,Shixuan Zhao,Gangyao Gao,Tao Deng,Hongmei Yan
title: Rethinking the Detection Head Configuration for Traffic Object Detection
title_zh: 重新思考流量对象检测的检测头配置
abstract: Multi-scale detection plays an important role in object detection models. However, researchers usually feel blank on how to reasonably configure detection heads combining multi-scale features at different input resolutions. We find that there are different matching relationships between the object distribution and the detection head at different input resolutions. Based on the instructive findings, we propose a lightweight traffic object detection network based on matching between detection head and object distribution, termed as MHD-Net. It consists of three main parts. The first is the detection head and object distribution matching strategy, which guides the rational configuration of detection head, so as to leverage multi-scale features to effectively detect objects at vastly different scales. The second is the cross-scale detection head configuration guideline, which instructs to replace multiple detection heads with only two detection heads possessing of rich feature representations to achieve an excellent balance between detection accuracy, model parameters, FLOPs and detection speed. The third is the receptive field enlargement method, which combines the dilated convolution module with shallow features of backbone to further improve the detection accuracy at the cost of increasing model parameters very slightly. The proposed model achieves more competitive performance than other models on BDD100K dataset and our proposed ETFOD-v2 dataset. The code will be available.
summary: Multi-scale detection plays an important role in object detection models. However, researchers usually feel blank on how to reasonably configure detection heads combining multi-scale features at different input resolutions. We find that there are different matching relationships between the object distribution and the detection head at different input resolutions. Based on the instructive findings, we propose a lightweight traffic object detection network based on matching between detection head and object distribution, termed as MHD-Net. It consists of three main parts. The first is the detection head and object distribution matching strategy, which guides the rational configuration of detection head, so as to leverage multi-scale features to effectively detect objects at vastly different scales. The second is the cross-scale detection head configuration guideline, which instructs to replace multiple detection heads with only two detection heads possessing of rich feature representations to achieve an excellent balance between detection accuracy, model parameters, FLOPs and detection speed. The third is the receptive field enlargement method, which combines the dilated convolution module with shallow features of backbone to further improve the detection accuracy at the cost of increasing model parameters very slightly. The proposed model achieves more competitive performance than other models on BDD100K dataset and our proposed ETFOD-v2 dataset. The code will be available.
abstract_zh: 多尺度检测在目标检测模型中发挥着重要作用。然而，研究人员通常对如何合理配置结合不同输入分辨率下的多尺度特征的检测头感到茫然。我们发现不同输入分辨率下物体分布与检测头之间存在不同的匹配关系。基于这些有益的发现，我们提出了一种基于检测头和对象分布之间匹配的轻量级交通对象检测网络，称为 MHD-Net。它由三个主要部分组成。首先是检测头与物体分布匹配策略，指导检测头的合理配置，从而利用多尺度特征有效地检测不同尺度的物体。其次是跨尺度检测头配置指南，指导用两个具有丰富特征表示的检测头代替多个检测头，以实现检测精度、模型参数、FLOPs和检测速度之间的良好平衡。第三种是感受野放大方法，将空洞卷积模块与backbone的浅层特征相结合，以微量增加模型参数为代价，进一步提高检测精度。所提出的模型在 BDD100K 数据集和我们提出的 ETFOD-v2 数据集上比其他模型实现了更具竞争力的性能。该代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MHD-Net的轻量级交通目标检测网络，通过优化检测头配置提升多尺度目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在多尺度特征与检测头配置的匹配关系上缺乏系统性指导，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 包含三部分：1) 检测头与目标分布匹配策略；2) 跨尺度检测头配置准则（仅用两个检测头替代多个）；3) 结合空洞卷积的感知野扩展方法。
AI.result: 在BDD100K和自建ETFOD-v2数据集上均取得优于其他模型的性能，代码将开源。
AI.conclusion: MHD-Net通过合理配置检测头，在检测精度、参数量、计算量和速度间取得良好平衡，为交通目标检测提供新思路。

authors_text: Indu Panigrahi,Ryan Manzuk,Adam Maloof,Ruth Fong
title: Improving Data-Efficient Fossil Segmentation via Model Editing
title_zh: 通过模型编辑提高数据效率的化石分割
comment: CVPR 2023 Workshop on Learning with Limited Labelled Data for Image and Video Understanding
comments: CVPR 2023 Workshop on Learning with Limited Labelled Data for Image and Video Understanding
abstract: Most computer vision research focuses on datasets containing thousands of images of commonplace objects. However, many high-impact datasets, such as those in medicine and the geosciences, contain fine-grain objects that require domain-expert knowledge to recognize and are time-consuming to collect and annotate. As a result, these datasets contain few labeled images, and current machine vision models cannot train intensively on them. Originally introduced to correct large-language models, model-editing techniques in machine learning have been shown to improve model performance using only small amounts of data and additional training. Using a Mask R-CNN to segment ancient reef fossils in rock sample images, we present a two-part paradigm to improve fossil segmentation with few labeled images: we first identify model weaknesses using image perturbations and then mitigate those weaknesses using model editing. Specifically, we apply domain-informed image perturbations to expose the Mask R-CNN's inability to distinguish between different classes of fossils and its inconsistency in segmenting fossils with different textures. To address these shortcomings, we extend an existing model-editing method for correcting systematic mistakes in image classification to image segmentation with no additional labeled data needed and show its effectiveness in decreasing confusion between different kinds of fossils. We also highlight the best settings for model editing in our situation: making a single edit using all relevant pixels in one image (vs. using multiple images, multiple edits, or fewer pixels). Though we focus on fossil segmentation, our approach may be useful in other similar fine-grain segmentation problems where data is limited.
summary: Most computer vision research focuses on datasets containing thousands of images of commonplace objects. However, many high-impact datasets, such as those in medicine and the geosciences, contain fine-grain objects that require domain-expert knowledge to recognize and are time-consuming to collect and annotate. As a result, these datasets contain few labeled images, and current machine vision models cannot train intensively on them. Originally introduced to correct large-language models, model-editing techniques in machine learning have been shown to improve model performance using only small amounts of data and additional training. Using a Mask R-CNN to segment ancient reef fossils in rock sample images, we present a two-part paradigm to improve fossil segmentation with few labeled images: we first identify model weaknesses using image perturbations and then mitigate those weaknesses using model editing. Specifically, we apply domain-informed image perturbations to expose the Mask R-CNN's inability to distinguish between different classes of fossils and its inconsistency in segmenting fossils with different textures. To address these shortcomings, we extend an existing model-editing method for correcting systematic mistakes in image classification to image segmentation with no additional labeled data needed and show its effectiveness in decreasing confusion between different kinds of fossils. We also highlight the best settings for model editing in our situation: making a single edit using all relevant pixels in one image (vs. using multiple images, multiple edits, or fewer pixels). Though we focus on fossil segmentation, our approach may be useful in other similar fine-grain segmentation problems where data is limited.
abstract_zh: 大多数计算机视觉研究都集中在包含数千张常见物体图像的数据集。然而，许多高影响力的数据集（例如医学和地球科学中的数据集）包含细粒度的对象，需要领域专家知识才能识别，并且收集和注释非常耗时。因此，这些数据集包含很少的标记图像，并且当前的机器视觉模型无法对其进行集中训练。机器学习中的模型编辑技术最初是为了纠正大语言模型而引入的，但事实证明，仅使用少量数据和额外的训练即可提高模型性能。使用 Mask R-CNN 来分割岩石样本图像中的古代珊瑚礁化石，我们提出了一个由两部分组成的范例，以使用少量标记图像来改进化石分割：我们首先使用图像扰动识别模型的弱点，然后使用模型编辑来减轻这些弱点。具体来说，我们应用领域信息图像扰动来揭示 Mask R-CNN 无法区分不同类别的化石及其在分割具有不同纹理的化石时的不一致。为了解决这些缺点，我们将现有的用于纠正图像分类中的系统错误的模型编辑方法扩展到图像分割，而无需额外的标记数据，并展示了其在减少不同种类化石之间的混淆方面的有效性。我们还强调了在我们的情况下模型编辑的最佳设置：使用一张图像中的所有相关像素进行单次编辑（相对于使用多个图像、多次编辑或更少的像素）。尽管我们专注于化石分割，但我们的方法可能对数据有限的其他类似细粒度分割问题有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过模型编辑技术提升化石分割的数据效率，解决小样本标注数据下的分割难题。
AI.motivation: 医学和地质学等领域因细粒度目标标注成本高，导致标注数据稀缺，传统模型难以有效训练。
AI.method: 基于Mask R-CNN，通过领域知识引导的图像扰动定位模型缺陷，再采用无额外标注数据的模型编辑方法修正分割错误。
AI.result: 有效降低不同化石类别间的混淆，验证了单图全像素编辑在减少标注依赖上的最优性。

search_text: Improving Data-Efficient Fossil Segmentation via Model Editing 通过模型编辑提高数据效率的化石分割 Most computer vision research focuses on datasets containing thousands of images of commonplace objects. However, many high-impact datasets, such as those in medicine and the geosciences, contain fine-grain objects that require domain-expert knowledge to recognize and are time-consuming to collect and annotate. As a result, these datasets contain few labeled images, and current machine vision models cannot train intensively on them. Originally introduced to correct large-language models, model-editing techniques in machine learning have been shown to improve model performance using only small amounts of data and additional training. Using a Mask R-CNN to segment ancient reef fossils in rock sample images, we present a two-part paradigm to improve fossil segmentation with few labeled images: we first identify model weaknesses using image perturbations and then mitigate those weaknesses using model editing. Specifically, we apply domain-informed image perturbations to expose the Mask R-CNN's inability to distinguish between different classes of fossils and its inconsistency in segmenting fossils with different textures. To address these shortcomings, we extend an existing model-editing method for correcting systematic mistakes in image classification to image segmentation with no additional labeled data needed and show its effectiveness in decreasing confusion between different kinds of fossils. We also highlight the best settings for model editing in our situation: making a single edit using all relevant pixels in one image (vs. using multiple images, multiple edits, or fewer pixels). Though we focus on fossil segmentation, our approach may be useful in other similar fine-grain segmentation problems where data is limited. 大多数计算机视觉研究都集中在包含数千张常见物体图像的数据集。然而，许多高影响力的数据集（例如医学和地球科学中的数据集）包含细粒度的对象，需要领域专家知识才能识别，并且收集和注释非常耗时。因此，这些数据集包含很少的标记图像，并且当前的机器视觉模型无法对其进行集中训练。机器学习中的模型编辑技术最初是为了纠正大语言模型而引入的，但事实证明，仅使用少量数据和额外的训练即可提高模型性能。使用 Mask R-CNN 来分割岩石样本图像中的古代珊瑚礁化石，我们提出了一个由两部分组成的范例，以使用少量标记图像来改进化石分割：我们首先使用图像扰动识别模型的弱点，然后使用模型编辑来减轻这些弱点。具体来说，我们应用领域信息图像扰动来揭示 Mask R-CNN 无法区分不同类别的化石及其在分割具有不同纹理的化石时的不一致。为了解决这些缺点，我们将现有的用于纠正图像分类中的系统错误的模型编辑方法扩展到图像分割，而无需额外的标记数据，并展示了其在减少不同种类化石之间的混淆方面的有效性。我们还强调了在我们的情况下模型编辑的最佳设置：使用一张图像中的所有相关像素进行单次编辑（相对于使用多个图像、多次编辑或更少的像素）。尽管我们专注于化石分割，但我们的方法可能对数据有限的其他类似细粒度分割问题有用。 本文提出通过模型编辑技术提升化石分割的数据效率，解决小样本标注数据下的分割难题。 Indu Panigrahi,Ryan Manzuk,Adam Maloof,Ruth Fong cs.CV

authors_text: Dharma KC,Venkata Ravi Kiran Dayana,Meng-Lin Wu,Venkateswara Rao Cherukuri,Hau Hwang
title: Towards Light Weight Object Detection System
title_zh: 迈向轻量级物体检测系统
abstract: Transformers are a popular choice for classification tasks and as backbones for object detection tasks. However, their high latency brings challenges in their adaptation to lightweight object detection systems. We present an approximation of the self-attention layers used in the transformer architecture. This approximation reduces the latency of the classification system while incurring minimal loss in accuracy. We also present a method that uses a transformer encoder layer for multi-resolution feature fusion. This feature fusion improves the accuracy of the state-of-the-art lightweight object detection system without significantly increasing the number of parameters. Finally, we provide an abstraction for the transformer architecture called Generalized Transformer (gFormer) that can guide the design of novel transformer-like architectures.
summary: Transformers are a popular choice for classification tasks and as backbones for object detection tasks. However, their high latency brings challenges in their adaptation to lightweight object detection systems. We present an approximation of the self-attention layers used in the transformer architecture. This approximation reduces the latency of the classification system while incurring minimal loss in accuracy. We also present a method that uses a transformer encoder layer for multi-resolution feature fusion. This feature fusion improves the accuracy of the state-of-the-art lightweight object detection system without significantly increasing the number of parameters. Finally, we provide an abstraction for the transformer architecture called Generalized Transformer (gFormer) that can guide the design of novel transformer-like architectures.
abstract_zh: Transformer 是分类任务的热门选择，也是对象检测任务的骨干。然而，它们的高延迟给它们适应轻量级物体检测系统带来了挑战。我们提出了变压器架构中使用的自注意力层的近似值。这种近似减少了分类系统的延迟，同时将准确性损失降至最低。我们还提出了一种使用变换器编码器层进行多分辨率特征融合的方法。这种特征融合提高了最先进的轻量级物体检测系统的准确性，而无需显着增加参数数量。最后，我们为 Transformer 架构提供了一个抽象，称为 Generalized Transformer (gFormer)，它可以指导新型 Transformer 架构的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决Transformer在轻量级目标检测系统中的高延迟问题，同时提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: Transformer虽在目标检测中表现优异，但其高计算量导致延迟问题，限制了在轻量设备上的应用。
AI.method: 通过近似自注意力层降低计算量，结合Transformer编码器进行多分辨率特征融合，并提出通用架构gFormer以指导新型设计。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在保持高准确率的同时显著降低延迟，并提升轻量检测系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法有效平衡了检测速度与精度，为轻量级目标检测系统的设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yuxuan Shu,Xiao Gu,Guang-Zhong Yang,Benny Lo
title: Revisiting Self-Supervised Contrastive Learning for Facial Expression Recognition
title_zh: 重新审视面部表情识别的自监督对比学习
abstract: The success of most advanced facial expression recognition works relies heavily on large-scale annotated datasets. However, it poses great challenges in acquiring clean and consistent annotations for facial expression datasets. On the other hand, self-supervised contrastive learning has gained great popularity due to its simple yet effective instance discrimination training strategy, which can potentially circumvent the annotation issue. Nevertheless, there remain inherent disadvantages of instance-level discrimination, which are even more challenging when faced with complicated facial representations. In this paper, we revisit the use of self-supervised contrastive learning and explore three core strategies to enforce expression-specific representations and to minimize the interference from other facial attributes, such as identity and face styling. Experimental results show that our proposed method outperforms the current state-of-the-art self-supervised learning methods, in terms of both categorical and dimensional facial expression recognition tasks.
summary: The success of most advanced facial expression recognition works relies heavily on large-scale annotated datasets. However, it poses great challenges in acquiring clean and consistent annotations for facial expression datasets. On the other hand, self-supervised contrastive learning has gained great popularity due to its simple yet effective instance discrimination training strategy, which can potentially circumvent the annotation issue. Nevertheless, there remain inherent disadvantages of instance-level discrimination, which are even more challenging when faced with complicated facial representations. In this paper, we revisit the use of self-supervised contrastive learning and explore three core strategies to enforce expression-specific representations and to minimize the interference from other facial attributes, such as identity and face styling. Experimental results show that our proposed method outperforms the current state-of-the-art self-supervised learning methods, in terms of both categorical and dimensional facial expression recognition tasks.
abstract_zh: 最先进的面部表情识别工作的成功在很大程度上依赖于大规模注释数据集。然而，它在为面部表情数据集获取清晰一致的注释方面提出了巨大的挑战。另一方面，自监督对比学习因其简单而有效的实例辨别训练策略而广受欢迎，这有可能规避注释问题。然而，实例级歧视仍然存在固有的缺点，当面对复杂的面部表征时，这些缺点甚至更具挑战性。在本文中，我们重新审视自我监督对比学习的使用，并探索三种核心策略来加强特定于表情的表示，并最大限度地减少其他面部属性（例如身份和面部造型）的干扰。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在分类和维度面部表情识别任务方面都优于当前最先进的自监督学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视自监督对比学习在面部表情识别中的应用，提出改进策略以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有面部表情识别依赖大规模标注数据，但获取高质量标注困难。自监督对比学习虽能减少对标注的依赖，但实例级判别存在固有缺陷，尤其在复杂面部特征下效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出三种核心策略：强化表情特异性表示、抑制身份和面部风格等属性的干扰，并优化对比学习框架。
AI.result: 在类别和维度面部表情识别任务中，所提方法优于当前最先进的自监督学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过针对性改进对比学习策略，有效解决了复杂面部特征下的表达识别难题，推动了自监督方法在该领域的应用。

authors_text: Xin Li
title: Information Topology
title_zh: 信息拓扑
abstract: We introduce \emph{Information Topology}: a framework that unifies information theory and algebraic topology by treating \emph{cycle closure} as the primitive operation of inference. The starting point is the \emph{dot-cycle dichotomy}, which separates pointwise, order-sensitive fluctuations (dots) from order-invariant, predictive structure (cycles). Algebraically, closure is the cancellation of boundaries ($\partial^2=0$), which converts transient histories into stable invariants. Building on this, we derive the \emph{Structure-Before-Specificity} (SbS) principle: stable information resides in nontrivial homology classes that persist under perturbations, while high-entropy contextual details act as scaffolds. The \emph{Context-Content Uncertainty Principle} (CCUP) quantifies this balance by decomposing uncertainty into contextual spread and content precision, showing why prediction requires invariance for generalization. Measure concentration onto residual invariant manifolds explains \emph{order invariance}: when mass collapses to a narrow tube around a closed cycle, reparameterizations of micro-steps leave predictive functionals unchanged. We then define \emph{homological capacity}, the topological dual of Shannon capacity, as the sustainable number of independent informational cycles supported by a system. This capacity links dynamical (KS) entropy to structural (homological) capacity and refines Euler characteristics from a ``net'' summary to a ``gross'' count of persistent invariants. Finally, we illustrate the theory across three domains where \emph{more is different}: \textbf{visual binding}, \textbf{working memory}, and \textbf{access consciousness}. Together, these results recast inference, learning, and communication as \emph{topological stabilization}: the formation, closure, and persistence of informational cycles that make prediction robust and scalable.
summary: We introduce \emph{Information Topology}: a framework that unifies information theory and algebraic topology by treating \emph{cycle closure} as the primitive operation of inference. The starting point is the \emph{dot-cycle dichotomy}, which separates pointwise, order-sensitive fluctuations (dots) from order-invariant, predictive structure (cycles). Algebraically, closure is the cancellation of boundaries ($\partial^2=0$), which converts transient histories into stable invariants. Building on this, we derive the \emph{Structure-Before-Specificity} (SbS) principle: stable information resides in nontrivial homology classes that persist under perturbations, while high-entropy contextual details act as scaffolds. The \emph{Context-Content Uncertainty Principle} (CCUP) quantifies this balance by decomposing uncertainty into contextual spread and content precision, showing why prediction requires invariance for generalization. Measure concentration onto residual invariant manifolds explains \emph{order invariance}: when mass collapses to a narrow tube around a closed cycle, reparameterizations of micro-steps leave predictive functionals unchanged. We then define \emph{homological capacity}, the topological dual of Shannon capacity, as the sustainable number of independent informational cycles supported by a system. This capacity links dynamical (KS) entropy to structural (homological) capacity and refines Euler characteristics from a ``net'' summary to a ``gross'' count of persistent invariants. Finally, we illustrate the theory across three domains where \emph{more is different}: \textbf{visual binding}, \textbf{working memory}, and \textbf{access consciousness}. Together, these results recast inference, learning, and communication as \emph{topological stabilization}: the formation, closure, and persistence of informational cycles that make prediction robust and scalable.
abstract_zh: 我们引入\emph{信息拓扑}：一个通过将\emph{循环闭包}视为推理的原始操作来统一信息论和代数拓扑的框架。起点是 \emph{点循环二分法}，它将逐点、顺序敏感的波动（点）与顺序不变的预测结构（循环）分开。从代数上来说，闭包就是边界的取消 ($\partial^2=0$)，它将瞬态历史转换为稳定的不变量。在此基础上，我们推导出\emph{结构先于特异性}（SbS）原则：稳定的信息驻留在在扰动下持续存在的重要同源类中，而高熵上下文细节充当支架。 \emph{上下文内容不确定性原理}（CCUP）通过将不确定性分解为上下文传播和内容精度来量化这种平衡，说明为什么预测需要泛化不变性。测量剩余不变流形上的浓度解释了\emph{阶次不变性}：当质量围绕闭合循环塌缩成窄管时，微步的重新参数化使预测泛函保持不变。然后，我们将香农容量的拓扑对偶 \emph{同调容量} 定义为系统支持的独立信息循环的可持续数量。这种能力将动态（KS）熵与结构（同源）能力联系起来，并将欧拉特征从“净”总结细化为持久不变量的“总”计数。最后，我们阐述了三个领域的理论，其中\emph{more is different}：\textbf{视觉绑定}、\textbf{工作记忆}和\textbf{访问意识}。总之，这些结果将推理、学习和交流重新定义为\emph{拓扑稳定}：信息循环的形成、闭合和持续，使预测变得稳健和可扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'信息拓扑'的框架，将信息论与代数拓扑统一，通过'循环闭合'作为推理的基本操作，揭示信息结构的稳定性与预测性。
AI.motivation: 传统信息论难以处理预测性结构与上下文不确定性的平衡，需结合拓扑学中不变性概念，为推理、学习与通信提供更稳健的理论基础。
AI.method: 基于'点-循环二分法'分离瞬时波动与预测结构，利用拓扑闭包消除边界扰动，推导出结构优先原则（SbS）与上下文-内容不确定性原理（CCUP），并通过同调容量连接动态熵与结构稳定性。
AI.result: 建立了信息同调容量理论，量化系统支持独立信息循环的能力；在视觉绑定、工作记忆与意识访问等场景验证了拓扑稳定化对预测鲁棒性与可扩展性的提升。
AI.conclusion: 信息拓扑将推理与学习重新诠释为'拓扑稳定化'过程，通过循环闭合与不变性机制实现跨领域预测的结构化与泛化能力。

search_text: Information Topology 信息拓扑 We introduce \emph{Information Topology}: a framework that unifies information theory and algebraic topology by treating \emph{cycle closure} as the primitive operation of inference. The starting point is the \emph{dot-cycle dichotomy}, which separates pointwise, order-sensitive fluctuations (dots) from order-invariant, predictive structure (cycles). Algebraically, closure is the cancellation of boundaries ($\partial^2=0$), which converts transient histories into stable invariants. Building on this, we derive the \emph{Structure-Before-Specificity} (SbS) principle: stable information resides in nontrivial homology classes that persist under perturbations, while high-entropy contextual details act as scaffolds. The \emph{Context-Content Uncertainty Principle} (CCUP) quantifies this balance by decomposing uncertainty into contextual spread and content precision, showing why prediction requires invariance for generalization. Measure concentration onto residual invariant manifolds explains \emph{order invariance}: when mass collapses to a narrow tube around a closed cycle, reparameterizations of micro-steps leave predictive functionals unchanged. We then define \emph{homological capacity}, the topological dual of Shannon capacity, as the sustainable number of independent informational cycles supported by a system. This capacity links dynamical (KS) entropy to structural (homological) capacity and refines Euler characteristics from a ``net'' summary to a ``gross'' count of persistent invariants. Finally, we illustrate the theory across three domains where \emph{more is different}: \textbf{visual binding}, \textbf{working memory}, and \textbf{access consciousness}. Together, these results recast inference, learning, and communication as \emph{topological stabilization}: the formation, closure, and persistence of informational cycles that make prediction robust and scalable. 我们引入\emph{信息拓扑}：一个通过将\emph{循环闭包}视为推理的原始操作来统一信息论和代数拓扑的框架。起点是 \emph{点循环二分法}，它将逐点、顺序敏感的波动（点）与顺序不变的预测结构（循环）分开。从代数上来说，闭包就是边界的取消 ($\partial^2=0$)，它将瞬态历史转换为稳定的不变量。在此基础上，我们推导出\emph{结构先于特异性}（SbS）原则：稳定的信息驻留在在扰动下持续存在的重要同源类中，而高熵上下文细节充当支架。 \emph{上下文内容不确定性原理}（CCUP）通过将不确定性分解为上下文传播和内容精度来量化这种平衡，说明为什么预测需要泛化不变性。测量剩余不变流形上的浓度解释了\emph{阶次不变性}：当质量围绕闭合循环塌缩成窄管时，微步的重新参数化使预测泛函保持不变。然后，我们将香农容量的拓扑对偶 \emph{同调容量} 定义为系统支持的独立信息循环的可持续数量。这种能力将动态（KS）熵与结构（同源）能力联系起来，并将欧拉特征从“净”总结细化为持久不变量的“总”计数。最后，我们阐述了三个领域的理论，其中\emph{more is different}：\textbf{视觉绑定}、\textbf{工作记忆}和\textbf{访问意识}。总之，这些结果将推理、学习和交流重新定义为\emph{拓扑稳定}：信息循环的形成、闭合和持续，使预测变得稳健和可扩展。 本文提出了一种名为'信息拓扑'的框架，将信息论与代数拓扑统一，通过'循环闭合'作为推理的基本操作，揭示信息结构的稳定性与预测性。 Xin Li cs.CV

authors_text: Qiaosi Wang,Ashok K. Goel
title: Mutual Theory of Mind for Human-AI Communication
title_zh: 人机交流的相互心理理论
abstract: New developments are enabling AI systems to perceive, recognize, and respond with social cues based on inferences made from humans' explicit or implicit behavioral and verbal cues. These AI systems, equipped with an equivalent of human's Theory of Mind (ToM) capability, are currently serving as matchmakers on dating platforms, assisting student learning as teaching assistants, and enhancing productivity as work partners. They mark a new era in human-AI interaction (HAI) that diverges from traditional human-computer interaction (HCI), where computers are commonly seen as tools instead of social actors. Designing and understanding the human perceptions and experiences in this emerging HAI era becomes an urgent and critical issue for AI systems to fulfill human needs and mitigate risks across social contexts. In this paper, we posit the Mutual Theory of Mind (MToM) framework, inspired by our capability of ToM in human-human communications, to guide this new generation of HAI research by highlighting the iterative and mutual shaping nature of human-AI communication. We discuss the motivation of the MToM framework and its three key components that iteratively shape the human-AI communication in three stages. We then describe two empirical studies inspired by the MToM framework to demonstrate the power of MToM in guiding the design and understanding of human-AI communication. Finally, we discuss future research opportunities in human-AI interaction through the lens of MToM.
summary: New developments are enabling AI systems to perceive, recognize, and respond with social cues based on inferences made from humans' explicit or implicit behavioral and verbal cues. These AI systems, equipped with an equivalent of human's Theory of Mind (ToM) capability, are currently serving as matchmakers on dating platforms, assisting student learning as teaching assistants, and enhancing productivity as work partners. They mark a new era in human-AI interaction (HAI) that diverges from traditional human-computer interaction (HCI), where computers are commonly seen as tools instead of social actors. Designing and understanding the human perceptions and experiences in this emerging HAI era becomes an urgent and critical issue for AI systems to fulfill human needs and mitigate risks across social contexts. In this paper, we posit the Mutual Theory of Mind (MToM) framework, inspired by our capability of ToM in human-human communications, to guide this new generation of HAI research by highlighting the iterative and mutual shaping nature of human-AI communication. We discuss the motivation of the MToM framework and its three key components that iteratively shape the human-AI communication in three stages. We then describe two empirical studies inspired by the MToM framework to demonstrate the power of MToM in guiding the design and understanding of human-AI communication. Finally, we discuss future research opportunities in human-AI interaction through the lens of MToM.
abstract_zh: 新的发展使人工智能系统能够根据人类显性或隐性的行为和言语线索做出的推论来感知、识别和响应社会线索。这些人工智能系统配备了相当于人类心智理论（ToM）的能力，目前正在约会平台上充当媒人，作为助教协助学生学习，并作为工作伙伴提高生产力。它们标志着人机交互 (HAI) 的新时代，与传统人机交互 (HCI) 不同，在传统人机交互 (HCI) 中，计算机通常被视为工具而不是社会参与者。在这个新兴的 HAI 时代，设计和理解人类的感知和体验成为人工智能系统满足人类需求并降低社会环境风险的紧迫而关键的问题。在本文中，受我们在人与人交流中 ToM 能力的启发，我们提出了相互心理理论 (MToM) 框架，通过强调人与人工智能交流的迭代和相互塑造性质来指导新一代 HAI 研究。我们讨论了 MToM 框架的动机及其三个关键组件，这些组件在三个阶段迭代地塑造了人类与人工智能的通信。然后，我们描述了两项受 MToM 框架启发的实证研究，以证明 MToM 在指导人类与人工智能通信的设计和理解方面的力量。最后，我们通过 MToM 的视角讨论了人机交互的未来研究机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为相互心智理论（MToM）的框架，用于指导人机交互（HAI）研究，强调人类与AI通信的迭代和相互塑造特性。
AI.motivation: 传统人机交互（HCI）将计算机视为工具而非社交参与者，而新兴的HAI需要AI系统具备类似人类心智理论（ToM）的能力，以更好地满足人类需求并降低社会风险。
AI.method: 提出MToM框架，包含三个关键组件和三个阶段的迭代过程，并通过两项实证研究验证其在设计和理解人机通信中的有效性。
AI.result: 实证研究展示了MToM框架在指导人机交互设计中的潜力，证明了人类与AI通信的相互塑造特性。
AI.conclusion: MToM框架为人机交互研究提供了新视角，强调双向互动的重要性，并为未来研究指明了方向。

authors_text: Noam Malali,Yosi Keller
title: Learning to embed semantic similarity for joint image-text retrieval
title_zh: 学习嵌入语义相似性以进行图像文本联合检索
comment: in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence, 2023
comments: in IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence, 2023
abstract: We present a deep learning approach for learning the joint semantic embeddings of images and captions in a Euclidean space, such that the semantic similarity is approximated by the L2 distances in the embedding space. For that, we introduce a metric learning scheme that utilizes multitask learning to learn the embedding of identical semantic concepts using a center loss. By introducing a differentiable quantization scheme into the end-to-end trainable network, we derive a semantic embedding of semantically similar concepts in Euclidean space. We also propose a novel metric learning formulation using an adaptive margin hinge loss, that is refined during the training phase. The proposed scheme was applied to the MS-COCO, Flicke30K and Flickr8K datasets, and was shown to compare favorably with contemporary state-of-the-art approaches.

For that, we introduce a metric learning scheme that utilizes multitask learning to learn the embedding of identical semantic concepts using a center loss. By introducing a differentiable quantization scheme into the end-to-end trainable network, we derive a semantic embedding of semantically similar concepts in Euclidean space. We also propose a novel metric learning formulation using an adaptive margin hinge loss, that is refined during the training phase. The proposed scheme was applied to the MS-COCO, Flicke30K and Flickr8K datasets, and was shown to compare favorably with contemporary state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种深度学习方法，用于学习欧几里德空间中图像和标题的联合语义嵌入，从而通过嵌入空间中的 L2 距离来近似语义相似性。为此，我们引入了一种度量学习方案，该方案利用多任务学习来使用中心损失来学习相同语义概念的嵌入。通过将可微分量化方案引入端到端可训练网络，我们在欧几里得空间中导出了语义相似概念的语义嵌入。我们还提出了一种使用自适应边缘铰链损失的新颖度量学习公式，该公式在训练阶段进行了完善。所提出的方案应用于 MS-COCO、Flicke30K 和 Flickr8K 数据集，并被证明与当代最先进的方法相比具有优势。

AI.motivation: 现有方法在联合图像-文本语义对齐和相似性度量方面存在不足，需更有效的嵌入学习方案提升检索性能。
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架结合中心损失学习语义概念嵌入，引入可微量化方案和自适应边距铰损失函数优化度量学习。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO、Flickr30K和Flickr8K数据集上，该方法性能优于当前先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方案通过联合语义嵌入和优化度量学习，有效提升了图像-文本联合检索的准确性和鲁棒性。

authors_text: Weijie Gan,Chunwei Ying,Parna Eshraghi,Tongyao Wang,Cihat Eldeniz,Yuyang Hu,Jiaming Liu,Yasheng Chen,Hongyu An,Ulugbek S. Kamilov
title: Self-Supervised Deep Equilibrium Models for Inverse Problems with Theoretical Guarantees
title_zh: 有理论保证的反问题自监督深度均衡模型
abstract: Deep equilibrium models (DEQ) have emerged as a powerful alternative to deep unfolding (DU) for image reconstruction. DEQ models-implicit neural networks with effectively infinite number of layers-were shown to achieve state-of-the-art image reconstruction without the memory complexity associated with DU. While the performance of DEQ has been widely investigated, the existing work has primarily focused on the settings where groundtruth data is available for training. We present self-supervised deep equilibrium model (SelfDEQ) as the first self-supervised reconstruction framework for training model-based implicit networks from undersampled and noisy MRI measurements. Our theoretical results show that SelfDEQ can compensate for unbalanced sampling across multiple acquisitions and match the performance of fully supervised DEQ. Our numerical results on in-vivo MRI data show that SelfDEQ leads to state-of-the-art performance using only undersampled and noisy training data.
summary: Deep equilibrium models (DEQ) have emerged as a powerful alternative to deep unfolding (DU) for image reconstruction. DEQ models-implicit neural networks with effectively infinite number of layers-were shown to achieve state-of-the-art image reconstruction without the memory complexity associated with DU. While the performance of DEQ has been widely investigated, the existing work has primarily focused on the settings where groundtruth data is available for training. We present self-supervised deep equilibrium model (SelfDEQ) as the first self-supervised reconstruction framework for training model-based implicit networks from undersampled and noisy MRI measurements. Our theoretical results show that SelfDEQ can compensate for unbalanced sampling across multiple acquisitions and match the performance of fully supervised DEQ. Our numerical results on in-vivo MRI data show that SelfDEQ leads to state-of-the-art performance using only undersampled and noisy training data.
abstract_zh: 深度平衡模型 (DEQ) 已成为图像重建深度展开 (DU) 的强大替代方案。 DEQ 模型（具有有效无限层数的隐式神经网络）已被证明可以实现最先进的图像重建，而无需与 DU 相关的内存复杂性。虽然 DEQ 的性能已被广泛研究，但现有的工作主要集中在可用于训练的真实数据的设置上。我们提出自监督深度平衡模型（SelfDEQ）作为第一个自监督重建框架，用于从欠采样和噪声 MRI 测量中训练基于模型的隐式网络。我们的理论结果表明，SelfDEQ 可以补偿多次采集中的不平衡采样，并与完全监督的 DEQ 的性能相匹配。我们对体内 MRI 数据的数值结果表明，SelfDEQ 仅使用欠采样和噪声训练数据即可实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督深度平衡模型（SelfDEQ），用于在没有真实标签的情况下解决逆问题，特别是在磁共振成像（MRI）重建中。
AI.motivation: 传统深度平衡模型（DEQ）依赖于有监督学习需要真实数据，但实际应用中常面临数据不足或噪声干扰的问题。本文旨在开发一种无需真实标签的自监督框架，以提升MRI重建的实用性。
AI.method: 提出SelfDEQ方法，通过自监督学习训练基于模型的隐式网络，利用欠采样和噪声MRI测量数据进行训练，理论分析表明其可补偿多采集中的采样不平衡。
AI.result: 在活体MRI数据上的实验表明，SelfDEQ仅使用欠采样和噪声训练数据即可达到最先进的重建效果，性能与全监督DEQ相当。
AI.conclusion: SelfDEQ为逆问题提供了一种有效的自监督解决方案，尤其适用于真实场景中缺乏真实标签的数据挑战，推动了MRI重建等领域的应用前景。

authors_text: Mark Van der Merwe,Dmitry Berenson,Nima Fazeli
title: Learning the Dynamics of Compliant Tool-Environment Interaction for Visuo-Tactile Contact Servoing
title_zh: 学习视觉-触觉接触伺服的顺应工具与环境交互的动力学
comment: 6th Conference on Robotic Learning (CoRL 2022), Auckland, New Zealand. 8 pages + references + appendix
comments: 6th Conference on Robotic Learning (CoRL 2022), Auckland, New Zealand. 8 pages + references + appendix
abstract: Many manipulation tasks require the robot to control the contact between a grasped compliant tool and the environment, e.g. scraping a frying pan with a spatula. However, modeling tool-environment interaction is difficult, especially when the tool is compliant, and the robot cannot be expected to have the full geometry and physical properties (e.g., mass, stiffness, and friction) of all the tools it must use. We propose a framework that learns to predict the effects of a robot's actions on the contact between the tool and the environment given visuo-tactile perception. Key to our framework is a novel contact feature representation that consists of a binary contact value, the line of contact, and an end-effector wrench. We propose a method to learn the dynamics of these contact features from real world data that does not require predicting the geometry of the compliant tool. We then propose a controller that uses this dynamics model for visuo-tactile contact servoing and show that it is effective at performing scraping tasks with a spatula, even in scenarios where precise contact needs to be made to avoid obstacles.
summary: Many manipulation tasks require the robot to control the contact between a grasped compliant tool and the environment, e.g. scraping a frying pan with a spatula. However, modeling tool-environment interaction is difficult, especially when the tool is compliant, and the robot cannot be expected to have the full geometry and physical properties (e.g., mass, stiffness, and friction) of all the tools it must use. We propose a framework that learns to predict the effects of a robot's actions on the contact between the tool and the environment given visuo-tactile perception. Key to our framework is a novel contact feature representation that consists of a binary contact value, the line of contact, and an end-effector wrench. We propose a method to learn the dynamics of these contact features from real world data that does not require predicting the geometry of the compliant tool. We then propose a controller that uses this dynamics model for visuo-tactile contact servoing and show that it is effective at performing scraping tasks with a spatula, even in scenarios where precise contact needs to be made to avoid obstacles.
abstract_zh: 许多操作任务需要机器人控制所抓取的顺应工具与环境之间的接触，例如用抹刀刮煎锅。然而，对工具与环境的交互进行建模很困难，特别是当工具兼容时，并且不能期望机器人具有其必须使用的所有工具的完整几何和物理属性（例如质量、刚度和摩擦力）。我们提出了一个框架，该框架可以学习预测机器人的动作对给定视觉触觉感知的工具与环境之间的接触的影响。我们框架的关键是一种新颖的接触特征表示，它由二进制接触值、接触线和末端执行器扳手组成。我们提出了一种从现实世界数据中学习这些接触特征动态的方法，该方法不需要预测顺应工具的几何形状。然后，我们提出了一种控制器，该控制器使用这种动力学模型进行视觉触觉接触伺服，并表明即使在需要进行精确接触以避免障碍物的情况下，它也能有效地用抹刀执行刮擦任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需精确工具几何信息的框架，通过学习视觉-触觉感知下的工具-环境接触动力学，实现对柔性工具与环境交互的接触伺服控制。
AI.motivation: 柔性工具与环境的交互建模困难，且机器人无法预知所有工具的物理属性（如质量、刚度、摩擦力），现有方法依赖几何模型难以泛化。
AI.method: 提出新型接触特征表示（二值接触值、接触线、末端力矩），通过真实数据学习接触动力学模型，设计基于该模型的视觉-触觉接触伺服控制器。
AI.result: 控制器在刮铲任务中表现有效，即使在需要精确避障的场景下也能成功完成任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需工具几何信息即可实现柔性工具的精确接触控制，为复杂环境下的机器人操作提供了新思路。
