ai_content_json.result: 控制器在刮铲任务中表现有效，即使在需要精确避障的场景下也能成功完成任务。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法无需工具几何信息即可实现柔性工具的精确接触控制，为复杂环境下的机器人操作提供了新思路。

tldr: 本文提出了一种无需精确工具几何信息的框架，通过学习视觉-触觉感知下的工具-环境接触动力学，实现对柔性工具与环境交互的接触伺服控制。
motivation: 柔性工具与环境的交互建模困难，且机器人无法预知所有工具的物理属性（如质量、刚度、摩擦力），现有方法依赖几何模型难以泛化。
method: 提出新型接触特征表示（二值接触值、接触线、末端力矩），通过真实数据学习接触动力学模型，设计基于该模型的视觉-触觉接触伺服控制器。
result: 控制器在刮铲任务中表现有效，即使在需要精确避障的场景下也能成功完成任务。
conclusion: 该方法无需工具几何信息即可实现柔性工具的精确接触控制，为复杂环境下的机器人操作提供了新思路。
search_text: Learning the Dynamics of Compliant Tool-Environment Interaction for Visuo-Tactile Contact Servoing 学习视觉-触觉接触伺服的顺应工具与环境交互的动力学 Many manipulation tasks require the robot to control the contact between a grasped compliant tool and the environment, e.g. scraping a frying pan with a spatula. However, modeling tool-environment interaction is difficult, especially when the tool is compliant, and the robot cannot be expected to have the full geometry and physical properties (e.g., mass, stiffness, and friction) of all the tools it must use. We propose a framework that learns to predict the effects of a robot's actions on the contact between the tool and the environment given visuo-tactile perception. Key to our framework is a novel contact feature representation that consists of a binary contact value, the line of contact, and an end-effector wrench. We propose a method to learn the dynamics of these contact features from real world data that does not require predicting the geometry of the compliant tool. We then propose a controller that uses this dynamics model for visuo-tactile contact servoing and show that it is effective at performing scraping tasks with a spatula, even in scenarios where precise contact needs to be made to avoid obstacles. 许多操作任务需要机器人控制所抓取的顺应工具与环境之间的接触，例如用抹刀刮煎锅。然而，对工具与环境的交互进行建模很困难，特别是当工具兼容时，并且不能期望机器人具有其必须使用的所有工具的完整几何和物理属性（例如质量、刚度和摩擦力）。我们提出了一个框架，该框架可以学习预测机器人的动作对给定视觉触觉感知的工具与环境之间的接触的影响。我们框架的关键是一种新颖的接触特征表示，它由二进制接触值、接触线和末端执行器扳手组成。我们提出了一种从现实世界数据中学习这些接触特征动态的方法，该方法不需要预测顺应工具的几何形状。然后，我们提出了一种控制器，该控制器使用这种动力学模型进行视觉触觉接触伺服，并表明即使在需要进行精确接触以避免障碍物的情况下，它也能有效地用抹刀执行刮擦任务。 本文提出了一种无需精确工具几何信息的框架，通过学习视觉-触觉感知下的工具-环境接触动力学，实现对柔性工具与环境交互的接触伺服控制。 Mark Van der Merwe,Dmitry Berenson,Nima Fazeli cs.RO

authors_text: Jeremiah Blocki,Elena Grigorescu,Tamalika Mukherjee,Samson Zhou
title: How to Make Your Approximation Algorithm Private: A Black-Box Differentially-Private Transformation for Tunable Approximation Algorithms of Functions with Low Sensitivity
title_zh: 如何使您的近似算法私有：低灵敏度函数的可调近似算法的黑盒差分私有变换
abstract: We develop a framework for efficiently transforming certain approximation algorithms into differentially-private variants, in a black-box manner. Specifically, our results focus on algorithms A that output an approximation to a function f of the form $(1-a)f(x)-k \leq A(x) \leq (1+a)f(x)+k$, where $k \in \mathbb{R}_{\geq 0}$ denotes additive error and $a \in [0,1)$ denotes multiplicative error can be``tuned" to small-enough values while incurring only a polynomial blowup in the running time/space. We show that such algorithms can be made DP without sacrificing accuracy, as long as the function f has small global sensitivity. We achieve these results by applying the smooth sensitivity framework developed by Nissim, Raskhodnikova, and Smith (STOC 2007). Our framework naturally applies to transform non-private FPRAS and FPTAS algorithms into $ε$-DP approximation algorithms where the former case requires an additional postprocessing step. We apply our framework in the context of sublinear-time and sublinear-space algorithms, while preserving the nature of the algorithm in meaningful ranges of the parameters. Our results include the first (to the best of our knowledge) $ε$-edge DP sublinear-time algorithm for estimating the number of triangles, the number of connected components, and the weight of a minimum spanning tree of a graph. In the area of streaming algorithms, our results include $ε$-DP algorithms for estimating Lp-norms, distinct elements, and weighted minimum spanning tree for both insertion-only and turnstile streams. Our transformation also provides a private version of the smooth histogram framework, which is commonly used for converting streaming algorithms into sliding window variants, and achieves a multiplicative approximation to many problems, such as estimating Lp-norms, distinct elements, and the length of the longest increasing subsequence.
summary: We develop a framework for efficiently transforming certain approximation algorithms into differentially-private variants, in a black-box manner. Specifically, our results focus on algorithms A that output an approximation to a function f of the form $(1-a)f(x)-k \leq A(x) \leq (1+a)f(x)+k$, where $k \in \mathbb{R}_{\geq 0}$ denotes additive error and $a \in [0,1)$ denotes multiplicative error can be``tuned" to small-enough values while incurring only a polynomial blowup in the running time/space. We show that such algorithms can be made DP without sacrificing accuracy, as long as the function f has small global sensitivity. We achieve these results by applying the smooth sensitivity framework developed by Nissim, Raskhodnikova, and Smith (STOC 2007). Our framework naturally applies to transform non-private FPRAS and FPTAS algorithms into $ε$-DP approximation algorithms where the former case requires an additional postprocessing step. We apply our framework in the context of sublinear-time and sublinear-space algorithms, while preserving the nature of the algorithm in meaningful ranges of the parameters. Our results include the first (to the best of our knowledge) $ε$-edge DP sublinear-time algorithm for estimating the number of triangles, the number of connected components, and the weight of a minimum spanning tree of a graph. In the area of streaming algorithms, our results include $ε$-DP algorithms for estimating Lp-norms, distinct elements, and weighted minimum spanning tree for both insertion-only and turnstile streams. Our transformation also provides a private version of the smooth histogram framework, which is commonly used for converting streaming algorithms into sliding window variants, and achieves a multiplicative approximation to many problems, such as estimating Lp-norms, distinct elements, and the length of the longest increasing subsequence.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一个框架，以黑盒方式有效地将某些近似算法转换为差分私有变体。具体来说，我们的结果集中在算法 A 上，该算法输出 $(1-a)f(x)-k \leq A(x) \leq (1+a)f(x)+k$ 形式的函数 f 的近似值，其中 $k \in \mathbb{R}_{\geq 0}$ 表示加性误差，$a \in [0,1)$ 表示乘性误差可以“调整”到足够小的值，同时仅产生我们证明，只要函数 f 具有较小的全局敏感性，我们就可以在不牺牲精度的情况下实现此类算法。我们通过应用 Nissim、Raskhodnikova 和 Smith 开发的平滑敏感性框架（STOC 2007）来实现这些结果。我们的框架自然适用于将非私有 FPRAS 和 FPTAS 算法转换为 $ε$-DP 近似算法，其中前一种情况需要额外的后处理步骤。在次线性时间和次线性空间算法的背景下，同时在有意义的参数范围内保留算法的性质，我们的结果包括第一个（据我们所知）$ε$-edge DP 次线性时间算法，用于估计三角形的数量、连接分量的数量和图的最小生成树的权重。在流算法领域，我们的结果包括用于估计 Lp 范数、不同元素和加权最小生成树的 $ε$-DP 算法。我们的转换还提供了平滑直方图框架的私有版本，该框架通常用于将流算法转换为滑动窗口变体，并实现了许多问题的乘法近似，例如估计 Lp 范数、不同元素和最长递增子序列的长度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种黑盒方法，将特定近似算法转换为差分隐私版本，同时保持准确性，适用于低敏感度函数。
AI.motivation: 现有近似算法缺乏隐私保护机制，需在不牺牲效率和精度的前提下实现差分隐私。
AI.method: 基于平滑敏感度框架，通过添加噪声和后处理步骤，将非私有FPRAS/FPTAS算法转化为ε-差分隐私版本。
AI.result: 首次实现ε-边差分隐私的子线性时间算法，应用于图统计、流数据Lp范数估计等场景，并提供私有平滑直方图框架。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为大规模数据隐私保护提供了通用解决方案，拓展了近似算法在隐私场景的应用边界。

authors_text: Seyed Mojtaba Marvasti-Zadeh,Devin Goodsman,Nilanjan Ray,Nadir Erbilgin
title: Early Detection of Bark Beetle Attack Using Remote Sensing and Machine Learning: A Review
title_zh: 利用遥感和机器学习早期检测树皮甲虫攻击：综述
comment: ACM Computing Surveys, 56, 4, Article 97, April 2024. https://doi.org/10.1145/3625387
comments: ACM Computing Surveys, 56, 4, Article 97, April 2024. https://doi.org/10.1145/3625387
abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive review of past and current advances in the early detection of bark beetle-induced tree mortality from three primary perspectives: bark beetle & host interactions, RS, and ML/DL. In contrast to prior efforts, this review encompasses all RS systems and emphasizes ML/DL methods to investigate their strengths and weaknesses. We parse existing literature based on multi- or hyper-spectral analyses and distill their knowledge based on: bark beetle species & attack phases with a primary emphasis on early stages of attacks, host trees, study regions, RS platforms & sensors, spectral/spatial/temporal resolutions, spectral signatures, spectral vegetation indices (SVIs), ML approaches, learning schemes, task categories, models, algorithms, classes/clusters, features, and DL networks & architectures. Although DL-based methods and the random forest (RF) algorithm showed promising results, highlighting their potential to detect subtle changes across visible, thermal, and short-wave infrared (SWIR) spectral regions, they still have limited effectiveness and high uncertainties. To inspire novel solutions to these shortcomings, we delve into the principal challenges & opportunities from different perspectives, enabling a deeper understanding of the current state of research and guiding future research directions.
summary: This paper provides a comprehensive review of past and current advances in the early detection of bark beetle-induced tree mortality from three primary perspectives: bark beetle & host interactions, RS, and ML/DL. In contrast to prior efforts, this review encompasses all RS systems and emphasizes ML/DL methods to investigate their strengths and weaknesses. We parse existing literature based on multi- or hyper-spectral analyses and distill their knowledge based on: bark beetle species & attack phases with a primary emphasis on early stages of attacks, host trees, study regions, RS platforms & sensors, spectral/spatial/temporal resolutions, spectral signatures, spectral vegetation indices (SVIs), ML approaches, learning schemes, task categories, models, algorithms, classes/clusters, features, and DL networks & architectures. Although DL-based methods and the random forest (RF) algorithm showed promising results, highlighting their potential to detect subtle changes across visible, thermal, and short-wave infrared (SWIR) spectral regions, they still have limited effectiveness and high uncertainties. To inspire novel solutions to these shortcomings, we delve into the principal challenges & opportunities from different perspectives, enabling a deeper understanding of the current state of research and guiding future research directions.
abstract_zh: 本文从树皮甲虫与宿主相互作用、RS 和 ML/DL 三个主要角度全面回顾了早期检测树皮甲虫引起的树木死亡的过去和当前的进展。与之前的工作相比，本次审查涵盖了所有 RS 系统，并强调 ML/DL 方法来调查其优点和缺点。我们基于多光谱或高光谱分析来解析现有文献，并根据以下内容提炼知识：树皮甲虫物种和攻击阶段，主要强调攻击的早期阶段、宿主树、研究区域、遥感平台和传感器、光谱/空间/时间分辨率、光谱特征、光谱植被指数（SVI）、机器学习方法、学习方案、任务类别、模型、算法、类/集群、特征以及深度学习网络和架构。尽管基于深度学习的方法和随机森林 (RF) 算法显示出有希望的结果，突出了它们检测可见光、热和短波红外 (SWIR) 光谱区域细微变化的潜力，但它们的有效性仍然有限且不确定性很高。为了激发针对这些缺点的新颖解决方案，我们从不同角度深入研究主要挑战和机遇，从而更深入地了解当前的研究状况并指导未来的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了利用遥感和机器学习技术早期检测树皮甲虫攻击的研究进展，分析了不同方法的优缺点。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在检测树皮甲虫早期攻击时存在效果有限和高不确定性问题，需总结挑战与机遇以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过多光谱/高光谱分析，系统解析文献中的物种、传感器、算法等关键因素，并比较机器学习与深度学习方法的性能差异。
AI.result: 深度学习与随机森林算法在可见光、热红外及短波红外波段表现较优，但整体仍存在检测效果不稳定和不确定性高的问题。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步优化算法与数据融合策略，以提高早期检测的准确性与可靠性。

motivation: 现有方法在检测树皮甲虫早期攻击时存在效果有限和高不确定性问题，需总结挑战与机遇以指导未来研究。
method: 通过多光谱/高光谱分析，系统解析文献中的物种、传感器、算法等关键因素，并比较机器学习与深度学习方法的性能差异。
result: 深度学习与随机森林算法在可见光、热红外及短波红外波段表现较优，但整体仍存在检测效果不稳定和不确定性高的问题。
conclusion: 需进一步优化算法与数据融合策略，以提高早期检测的准确性与可靠性。
search_text: Early Detection of Bark Beetle Attack Using Remote Sensing and Machine Learning: A Review 利用遥感和机器学习早期检测树皮甲虫攻击：综述 This paper provides a comprehensive review of past and current advances in the early detection of bark beetle-induced tree mortality from three primary perspectives: bark beetle & host interactions, RS, and ML/DL. In contrast to prior efforts, this review encompasses all RS systems and emphasizes ML/DL methods to investigate their strengths and weaknesses. We parse existing literature based on multi- or hyper-spectral analyses and distill their knowledge based on: bark beetle species & attack phases with a primary emphasis on early stages of attacks, host trees, study regions, RS platforms & sensors, spectral/spatial/temporal resolutions, spectral signatures, spectral vegetation indices (SVIs), ML approaches, learning schemes, task categories, models, algorithms, classes/clusters, features, and DL networks & architectures. Although DL-based methods and the random forest (RF) algorithm showed promising results, highlighting their potential to detect subtle changes across visible, thermal, and short-wave infrared (SWIR) spectral regions, they still have limited effectiveness and high uncertainties. To inspire novel solutions to these shortcomings, we delve into the principal challenges & opportunities from different perspectives, enabling a deeper understanding of the current state of research and guiding future research directions. 本文从树皮甲虫与宿主相互作用、RS 和 ML/DL 三个主要角度全面回顾了早期检测树皮甲虫引起的树木死亡的过去和当前的进展。与之前的工作相比，本次审查涵盖了所有 RS 系统，并强调 ML/DL 方法来调查其优点和缺点。我们基于多光谱或高光谱分析来解析现有文献，并根据以下内容提炼知识：树皮甲虫物种和攻击阶段，主要强调攻击的早期阶段、宿主树、研究区域、遥感平台和传感器、光谱/空间/时间分辨率、光谱特征、光谱植被指数（SVI）、机器学习方法、学习方案、任务类别、模型、算法、类/集群、特征以及深度学习网络和架构。尽管基于深度学习的方法和随机森林 (RF) 算法显示出有希望的结果，突出了它们检测可见光、热和短波红外 (SWIR) 光谱区域细微变化的潜力，但它们的有效性仍然有限且不确定性很高。为了激发针对这些缺点的新颖解决方案，我们从不同角度深入研究主要挑战和机遇，从而更深入地了解当前的研究状况并指导未来的研究方向。 本文综述了利用遥感和机器学习技术早期检测树皮甲虫攻击的研究进展，分析了不同方法的优缺点。 Seyed Mojtaba Marvasti-Zadeh,Devin Goodsman,Nilanjan Ray,Nadir Erbilgin cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Jwala Dhamala,Varun Kumar,Rahul Gupta,Kai-Wei Chang,Aram Galstyan
title: An Analysis of the Effects of Decoding Algorithms on Fairness in Open-Ended Language Generation
title_zh: 解码算法对开放语言生成公平性的影响分析
abstract: Several prior works have shown that language models (LMs) can generate text containing harmful social biases and stereotypes. While decoding algorithms play a central role in determining properties of LM generated text, their impact on the fairness of the generations has not been studied. We present a systematic analysis of the impact of decoding algorithms on LM fairness, and analyze the trade-off between fairness, diversity and quality. Our experiments with top-$p$, top-$k$ and temperature decoding algorithms, in open-ended language generation, show that fairness across demographic groups changes significantly with change in decoding algorithm's hyper-parameters. Notably, decoding algorithms that output more diverse text also output more texts with negative sentiment and regard. We present several findings and provide recommendations on standardized reporting of decoding details in fairness evaluations and optimization of decoding algorithms for fairness alongside quality and diversity.
summary: Several prior works have shown that language models (LMs) can generate text containing harmful social biases and stereotypes. While decoding algorithms play a central role in determining properties of LM generated text, their impact on the fairness of the generations has not been studied. We present a systematic analysis of the impact of decoding algorithms on LM fairness, and analyze the trade-off between fairness, diversity and quality. Our experiments with top-$p$, top-$k$ and temperature decoding algorithms, in open-ended language generation, show that fairness across demographic groups changes significantly with change in decoding algorithm's hyper-parameters. Notably, decoding algorithms that output more diverse text also output more texts with negative sentiment and regard. We present several findings and provide recommendations on standardized reporting of decoding details in fairness evaluations and optimization of decoding algorithms for fairness alongside quality and diversity.
abstract_zh: 先前的几项研究表明，语言模型（LM）可以生成包含有害社会偏见和刻板印象的文本。虽然解码算法在确定 LM 生成文本的属性方面发挥着核心作用，但它们对各代公平性的影响尚未得到研究。我们系统地分析了解码算法对 LM 公平性的影响，并分析了公平性、多样性和质量之间的权衡。我们在开放式语言生成中对 top-$p$、top-$k$ 和温度解码算法进行的实验表明，随着解码算法超参数的变化，不同人口群体的公平性会发生显着变化。值得注意的是，输出更多样化文本的解码算法也会输出更多带有负面情绪和关注的文本。我们提出了一些发现，并就公平性评估中解码细节的标准化报告以及解码算法的优化以实现公平性以及质量和多样性提供了建议。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了解码算法对开放性语言生成中公平性的影响，探讨了公平性、多样性和质量之间的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 尽管解码算法在决定语言模型生成文本的特性中起核心作用，但其对生成文本公平性的影响尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 通过实验对比top-$p$、top-$k$和温度解码算法，分析不同超参数对跨人口群体公平性、文本多样性和质量的影响。
AI.result: 解码算法的超参数显著影响公平性，更注重多样性的解码算法生成的文本负面情感和刻板印象内容更多。
AI.conclusion: 建议在公平性评估中标准化解码细节报告，并优化解码算法以平衡公平性、多样性和质量。

authors_text: Maria Attarian,Advaya Gupta,Ziyi Zhou,Wei Yu,Igor Gilitschenski,Animesh Garg
title: See, Plan, Predict: Language-guided Cognitive Planning with Video Prediction
title_zh: 查看、计划、预测：通过视频预测进行语言引导的认知规划
abstract: Cognitive planning is the structural decomposition of complex tasks into a sequence of future behaviors. In the computational setting, performing cognitive planning entails grounding plans and concepts in one or more modalities in order to leverage them for low level control. Since real-world tasks are often described in natural language, we devise a cognitive planning algorithm via language-guided video prediction. Current video prediction models do not support conditioning on natural language instructions. Therefore, we propose a new video prediction architecture which leverages the power of pre-trained transformers.The network is endowed with the ability to ground concepts based on natural language input with generalization to unseen objects. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach on a new simulation dataset, where each task is defined by a high-level action described in natural language. Our experiments compare our method again stone video generation baseline without planning or action grounding and showcase significant improvements. Our ablation studies highlight an improved generalization to unseen objects that natural language embeddings offer to concept grounding ability, as well as the importance of planning towards visual "imagination" of a task.
summary: Cognitive planning is the structural decomposition of complex tasks into a sequence of future behaviors. In the computational setting, performing cognitive planning entails grounding plans and concepts in one or more modalities in order to leverage them for low level control. Since real-world tasks are often described in natural language, we devise a cognitive planning algorithm via language-guided video prediction. Current video prediction models do not support conditioning on natural language instructions. Therefore, we propose a new video prediction architecture which leverages the power of pre-trained transformers.The network is endowed with the ability to ground concepts based on natural language input with generalization to unseen objects. We demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach on a new simulation dataset, where each task is defined by a high-level action described in natural language. Our experiments compare our method again stone video generation baseline without planning or action grounding and showcase significant improvements. Our ablation studies highlight an improved generalization to unseen objects that natural language embeddings offer to concept grounding ability, as well as the importance of planning towards visual "imagination" of a task.
abstract_zh: 认知规划是将复杂任务结构分解为一系列未来行为。在计算环境中，执行认知规划需要以一种或多种方式奠定基础计划和概念，以便利用它们进行低水平控制。由于现实世界的任务通常用自然语言描述，因此我们通过语言引导的视频预测设计了一种认知规划算法。当前的视频预测模型不支持自然语言指令的调节。因此，我们提出了一种新的视频预测架构，它利用了预先训练的 Transformer 的强大功能。该网络具有基于自然语言输入的基础概念的能力，并且能够泛化到未见过的对象。我们在新的模拟数据集上证明了这种方法的有效性，其中每个任务都是由用自然语言描述的高级操作定义的。我们的实验再次比较了我们的方法，在没有计划或行动基础的情况下石化视频生成基线，并展示了显着的改进。我们的消融研究强调了自然语言嵌入为概念基础能力提供的对不可见物体的改进概括，以及规划任务的视觉“想象力”的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自然语言引导的视频预测架构，用于实现认知规划，以提升复杂任务的分解与执行能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频预测模型无法处理自然语言指令条件，而现实任务常由自然语言描述，需将语言与规划结合以提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计新型视频预测架构，整合预训练Transformer模型，实现自然语言输入驱动的概念grounding与未见物体泛化。
AI.result: 在模拟数据集上显著优于无规划基线方法，且通过消融实验证明自然语言嵌入提升概念泛化能力与任务想象效果。
AI.conclusion: 自然语言嵌入增强概念grounding能力，规划机制对视觉任务想象至关重要，未来可拓展至更多实际场景。

authors_text: Dara Bahri,Heinrich Jiang,Tal Schuster,Afshin Rostamizadeh
title: Is margin all you need? An extensive empirical study of active learning on tabular data
title_zh: 您只需要保证金吗？表格数据主动学习的广泛实证研究
abstract: Given a labeled training set and a collection of unlabeled data, the goal of active learning (AL) is to identify the best unlabeled points to label. In this comprehensive study, we analyze the performance of a variety of AL algorithms on deep neural networks trained on 69 real-world tabular classification datasets from the OpenML-CC18 benchmark. We consider different data regimes and the effect of self-supervised model pre-training. Surprisingly, we find that the classical margin sampling technique matches or outperforms all others, including current state-of-art, in a wide range of experimental settings. To researchers, we hope to encourage rigorous benchmarking against margin, and to practitioners facing tabular data labeling constraints that hyper-parameter-free margin may often be all they need.
summary: Given a labeled training set and a collection of unlabeled data, the goal of active learning (AL) is to identify the best unlabeled points to label. In this comprehensive study, we analyze the performance of a variety of AL algorithms on deep neural networks trained on 69 real-world tabular classification datasets from the OpenML-CC18 benchmark. We consider different data regimes and the effect of self-supervised model pre-training. Surprisingly, we find that the classical margin sampling technique matches or outperforms all others, including current state-of-art, in a wide range of experimental settings. To researchers, we hope to encourage rigorous benchmarking against margin, and to practitioners facing tabular data labeling constraints that hyper-parameter-free margin may often be all they need.
abstract_zh: 给定一个标记的训练集和一组未标记的数据，主动学习（AL）的目标是识别最佳的未标记点进行标记。在这项综合研究中，我们分析了各种 AL 算法在深度神经网络上的性能，这些神经网络是在 OpenML-CC18 基准测试的 69 个真实世界表格分类数据集上训练的。我们考虑不同的数据机制和自监督模型预训练的效果。令人惊讶的是，我们发现经典的边缘采样技术在广泛的实验设置中匹配或优于所有其他技术，包括当前最先进的技术。对于研究人员来说，我们希望鼓励对边际进行严格的基准测试，对于面临表格数据标签约束的从业者来说，超参数自由边际可能往往就是他们所需要的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证研究评估了多种主动学习算法在表格数据上的性能，发现传统边缘采样方法在多数情况下表现优异。
AI.motivation: 主动学习算法在表格数据中的效果尚不明确，现有研究缺乏对经典方法与最新技术的系统性对比。
AI.method: 在OpenML-CC18基准的69个真实表格数据集上，对比多种主动学习算法，分析不同数据场景及自监督预训练的影响。
AI.result: 传统边缘采样方法在广泛实验设置中表现与当前最优方法相当或更优，且无需超参数调优。
AI.conclusion: 鼓励研究者将边缘采样作为基准对比对象，并建议在表格数据标签受限场景中优先采用无超参数的边缘采样方法。

search_text: Is margin all you need? An extensive empirical study of active learning on tabular data 您只需要保证金吗？表格数据主动学习的广泛实证研究 Given a labeled training set and a collection of unlabeled data, the goal of active learning (AL) is to identify the best unlabeled points to label. In this comprehensive study, we analyze the performance of a variety of AL algorithms on deep neural networks trained on 69 real-world tabular classification datasets from the OpenML-CC18 benchmark. We consider different data regimes and the effect of self-supervised model pre-training. Surprisingly, we find that the classical margin sampling technique matches or outperforms all others, including current state-of-art, in a wide range of experimental settings. To researchers, we hope to encourage rigorous benchmarking against margin, and to practitioners facing tabular data labeling constraints that hyper-parameter-free margin may often be all they need. 给定一个标记的训练集和一组未标记的数据，主动学习（AL）的目标是识别最佳的未标记点进行标记。在这项综合研究中，我们分析了各种 AL 算法在深度神经网络上的性能，这些神经网络是在 OpenML-CC18 基准测试的 69 个真实世界表格分类数据集上训练的。我们考虑不同的数据机制和自监督模型预训练的效果。令人惊讶的是，我们发现经典的边缘采样技术在广泛的实验设置中匹配或优于所有其他技术，包括当前最先进的技术。对于研究人员来说，我们希望鼓励对边际进行严格的基准测试，对于面临表格数据标签约束的从业者来说，超参数自由边际可能往往就是他们所需要的。 本文通过实证研究评估了多种主动学习算法在表格数据上的性能，发现传统边缘采样方法在多数情况下表现优异。 Dara Bahri,Heinrich Jiang,Tal Schuster,Afshin Rostamizadeh cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Haonan Chang,Abdeslam Boularias
title: Scene-level Tracking and Reconstruction without Object Priors
title_zh: 无对象先验的场景级跟踪和重建
abstract: We present the first real-time system capable of tracking and reconstructing, individually, every visible object in a given scene, without any form of prior on the rigidness of the objects, texture existence, or object category. In contrast with previous methods such as Co-Fusion and MaskFusion that first segment the scene into individual objects and then process each object independently, the proposed method dynamically segments the non-rigid scene as part of the tracking and reconstruction process. When new measurements indicate topology change, reconstructed models are updated in real-time to reflect that change. Our proposed system can provide the live geometry and deformation of all visible objects in a novel scene in real-time, which makes it possible to be integrated seamlessly into numerous existing robotics applications that rely on object models for grasping and manipulation. The capabilities of the proposed system are demonstrated in challenging scenes that contain multiple rigid and non-rigid objects.
summary: We present the first real-time system capable of tracking and reconstructing, individually, every visible object in a given scene, without any form of prior on the rigidness of the objects, texture existence, or object category. In contrast with previous methods such as Co-Fusion and MaskFusion that first segment the scene into individual objects and then process each object independently, the proposed method dynamically segments the non-rigid scene as part of the tracking and reconstruction process. When new measurements indicate topology change, reconstructed models are updated in real-time to reflect that change. Our proposed system can provide the live geometry and deformation of all visible objects in a novel scene in real-time, which makes it possible to be integrated seamlessly into numerous existing robotics applications that rely on object models for grasping and manipulation. The capabilities of the proposed system are demonstrated in challenging scenes that contain multiple rigid and non-rigid objects.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个能够单独跟踪和重建给定场景中每个可见对象的实时系统，而无需任何形式的先验来了解对象的刚性、纹理存在或对象类别。与之前的方法（例如 Co-Fusion 和 MaskFusion）首先将场景分割成单独的对象，然后独立处理每个对象相比，所提出的方法动态地分割非刚性场景作为跟踪和重建过程的一部分。当新的测量表明拓扑发生变化时，重建的模型会实时更新以反映该变化。我们提出的系统可以实时提供新颖场景中所有可见物体的实时几何形状和变形，这使得它可以无缝集成到许多依赖对象模型进行抓取和操作的现有机器人应用程序中。所提出的系统的功能在包含多个刚性和非刚性物体的具有挑战性的场景中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需物体先验信息的实时场景级跟踪与重建系统，可动态分割并实时更新场景中所有可见物体的几何与变形信息。
AI.motivation: 传统方法如Co-Fusion和MaskFusion依赖预先分割物体再独立处理，难以应对拓扑变化和非刚性物体的实时动态更新需求。
AI.method: 在跟踪与重建过程中动态分割非刚性场景，当检测到拓扑变化时实时更新重建模型，无需假设物体刚性、纹理或类别先验。
AI.result: 系统可在复杂场景中实时提供多物体（包括刚性和非刚性）的几何与变形信息，并成功集成到机器人抓取与操作应用中。
AI.conclusion: 该方法突破了传统分割依赖，为机器人动态场景理解与交互提供了更灵活的实时重建解决方案。

authors_text: Marc Dufay,Claire Mathieu,Hang Zhou
title: An Approximation Algorithm for Distance-Constrained Vehicle Routing on Trees
title_zh: 树上距离受限车辆路径的近似算法
abstract: In the Distance-constrained Vehicle Routing Problem (DVRP), we are given a graph with integer edge weights, a depot, a set of $n$ terminals, and a distance constraint $D$. The goal is to find a minimum number of tours starting and ending at the depot such that those tours together cover all the terminals and the length of each tour is at most $D$. The DVRP on trees is of independent interest, because it is equivalent to the virtual machine packing problem on trees studied by Sindelar et al. [SPAA'11]. We design a simple and natural approximation algorithm for the tree DVRP, parameterized by $\varepsilon >0$. We show that its approximation ratio is $α+ \varepsilon$, where $α\approx 1.691$, and in addition, that our analysis is essentially tight. The running time is polynomial in $n$ and $D$. The approximation ratio improves on the ratio of 2 due to Nagarajan and Ravi [Networks'12]. The main novelty of this paper lies in the analysis of the algorithm. It relies on a reduction from the tree DVRP to the bounded space online bin packing problem via a new notion of reduced length.
summary: In the Distance-constrained Vehicle Routing Problem (DVRP), we are given a graph with integer edge weights, a depot, a set of $n$ terminals, and a distance constraint $D$. The goal is to find a minimum number of tours starting and ending at the depot such that those tours together cover all the terminals and the length of each tour is at most $D$. The DVRP on trees is of independent interest, because it is equivalent to the virtual machine packing problem on trees studied by Sindelar et al. [SPAA'11]. We design a simple and natural approximation algorithm for the tree DVRP, parameterized by $\varepsilon >0$. We show that its approximation ratio is $α+ \varepsilon$, where $α\approx 1.691$, and in addition, that our analysis is essentially tight. The running time is polynomial in $n$ and $D$. The approximation ratio improves on the ratio of 2 due to Nagarajan and Ravi [Networks'12]. The main novelty of this paper lies in the analysis of the algorithm. It relies on a reduction from the tree DVRP to the bounded space online bin packing problem via a new notion of reduced length.
abstract_zh: 在距离约束车辆路径问题 (DVRP) 中，我们得到一个具有整数边权重的图、一个仓库、一组 $n$ 终端和一个距离约束 $D$。目标是找到在车站出发和结束的最少旅行次数，使这些旅行一起覆盖所有航站楼，并且每次旅行的长度最多为 $D$。树上的 DVRP 具有独立的意义，因为它相当于 Sindelar 等人研究的树上的虚拟机打包问题。 [SPAA'11]。我们为树 DVRP 设计了一种简单且自然的近似算法，参数化为 $\varepsilon >0$。我们证明它的近似比率是 $α+ \varepsilon$，其中 $α\approx 1.691$，此外，我们的分析本质上是严格的。运行时间是 $n$ 和 $D$ 的多项式。由于 Nagarajan 和 Ravi [Networks'12]，近似比率比 2 有所提高。本文的主要创新点在于算法的分析。它依赖于通过减少长度的新概念从树 DVRP 减少到有界空间在线装箱问题。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种针对树结构上的距离约束车辆路径问题（DVRP）的近似算法，目标是用最少的车辆巡回路线覆盖所有终端节点，且每条路线长度不超过给定距离约束D。
AI.motivation: DVRP在树结构上的研究具有独立意义，因其等价于树结构上的虚拟机打包问题。此前的近似比为2，本文旨在通过改进分析方法，获得更优的近似比。
AI.method: 提出一种基于ε参数的近似算法，通过将树DVRP问题约简为有界空间在线装箱问题，并引入新的‘缩减长度’概念进行分析。
AI.result: 算法近似比达到α+ε（α≈1.691），优于之前的2倍近似比，且时间复杂度为n和D的多项式级。
AI.conclusion: 本文的核心贡献在于通过问题约简和新分析方法，实现了更优的近似比，且证明了分析的紧性，为相关问题提供了新思路。

conclusion: 本文的核心贡献在于通过问题约简和新分析方法，实现了更优的近似比，且证明了分析的紧性，为相关问题提供了新思路。
search_text: An Approximation Algorithm for Distance-Constrained Vehicle Routing on Trees 树上距离受限车辆路径的近似算法 In the Distance-constrained Vehicle Routing Problem (DVRP), we are given a graph with integer edge weights, a depot, a set of $n$ terminals, and a distance constraint $D$. The goal is to find a minimum number of tours starting and ending at the depot such that those tours together cover all the terminals and the length of each tour is at most $D$. The DVRP on trees is of independent interest, because it is equivalent to the virtual machine packing problem on trees studied by Sindelar et al. [SPAA'11]. We design a simple and natural approximation algorithm for the tree DVRP, parameterized by $\varepsilon >0$. We show that its approximation ratio is $α+ \varepsilon$, where $α\approx 1.691$, and in addition, that our analysis is essentially tight. The running time is polynomial in $n$ and $D$. The approximation ratio improves on the ratio of 2 due to Nagarajan and Ravi [Networks'12]. The main novelty of this paper lies in the analysis of the algorithm. It relies on a reduction from the tree DVRP to the bounded space online bin packing problem via a new notion of reduced length. 在距离约束车辆路径问题 (DVRP) 中，我们得到一个具有整数边权重的图、一个仓库、一组 $n$ 终端和一个距离约束 $D$。目标是找到在车站出发和结束的最少旅行次数，使这些旅行一起覆盖所有航站楼，并且每次旅行的长度最多为 $D$。树上的 DVRP 具有独立的意义，因为它相当于 Sindelar 等人研究的树上的虚拟机打包问题。 [SPAA'11]。我们为树 DVRP 设计了一种简单且自然的近似算法，参数化为 $\varepsilon >0$。我们证明它的近似比率是 $α+ \varepsilon$，其中 $α\approx 1.691$，此外，我们的分析本质上是严格的。运行时间是 $n$ 和 $D$ 的多项式。由于 Nagarajan 和 Ravi [Networks'12]，近似比率比 2 有所提高。本文的主要创新点在于算法的分析。它依赖于通过减少长度的新概念从树 DVRP 减少到有界空间在线装箱问题。 本文设计了一种针对树结构上的距离约束车辆路径问题（DVRP）的近似算法，目标是用最少的车辆巡回路线覆盖所有终端节点，且每条路线长度不超过给定距离约束D。 Marc Dufay,Claire Mathieu,Hang Zhou cs.DS

authors_text: Ken Gu,Eunice Jun,Tim Althoff
title: Understanding and Supporting Debugging Workflows in Multiverse Analysis
title_zh: 了解和支持多元宇宙分析中的调试工作流程
abstract: Multiverse analysis, a paradigm for statistical analysis that considers all combinations of reasonable analysis choices in parallel, promises to improve transparency and reproducibility. Although recent tools help analysts specify multiverse analyses, they remain difficult to use in practice. In this work, we identify debugging as a key barrier due to the latency from running analyses to detecting bugs and the scale of metadata processing needed to diagnose a bug. To address these challenges, we prototype a command-line interface tool, Multiverse Debugger, which helps diagnose bugs in the multiverse and propagate fixes. In a qualitative lab study (n=13), we use Multiverse Debugger as a probe to develop a model of debugging workflows and identify specific challenges, including difficulty in understanding the multiverse's composition. We conclude with design implications for future multiverse analysis authoring systems.
summary: Multiverse analysis, a paradigm for statistical analysis that considers all combinations of reasonable analysis choices in parallel, promises to improve transparency and reproducibility. Although recent tools help analysts specify multiverse analyses, they remain difficult to use in practice. In this work, we identify debugging as a key barrier due to the latency from running analyses to detecting bugs and the scale of metadata processing needed to diagnose a bug. To address these challenges, we prototype a command-line interface tool, Multiverse Debugger, which helps diagnose bugs in the multiverse and propagate fixes. In a qualitative lab study (n=13), we use Multiverse Debugger as a probe to develop a model of debugging workflows and identify specific challenges, including difficulty in understanding the multiverse's composition. We conclude with design implications for future multiverse analysis authoring systems.
abstract_zh: 多元宇宙分析是一种统计分析范式，它并行考虑合理分析选择的所有组合，有望提高透明度和可重复性。尽管最近的工具可以帮助分析师指定多元宇宙分析，但它们在实践中仍然难以使用。在这项工作中，我们将调试视为一个关键障碍，因为从运行分析到检测错误的延迟以及诊断错误所需的元数据处理的规模。为了应对这些挑战，我们设计了一个命令行界面工具 Multiverse Debugger 原型，它可以帮助诊断多元宇宙中的错误并传播修复。在定性实验室研究 (n=13) 中，我们使用 Multiverse Debugger 作为探针来开发调试工作流程模型并识别特定挑战，包括理解多元宇宙组成的困难。我们总结了对未来多元宇宙分析创作系统的设计影响。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在识别多元宇宙分析中调试流程的关键障碍，并开发工具以支持更高效的调试过程。
AI.motivation: 现有工具在处理多元宇宙分析时存在调试延迟和元数据处理复杂度高的问题，影响了其实际应用。
AI.method: 开发了一个名为Multiverse Debugger的命令行工具，并通过定性实验室研究（n=13）分析调试流程中的具体挑战。
AI.result: 研究识别出调试过程中的关键挑战，包括理解多元宇宙结构的困难，并验证了工具在诊断和修复错误中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了未来多元宇宙分析工具的设计方向，以增强调试流程的透明性和可操作性。

authors_text: Tianxin Wei,Yuning You,Tianlong Chen,Yang Shen,Jingrui He,Zhangyang Wang
title: Augmentations in Hypergraph Contrastive Learning: Fabricated and Generative
title_zh: 超图对比学习的增强：虚构和生成
comment: NeurIPS 2022. Supplementary materials are available at https://weitianxin.github.io/files/neurips22_hypergcl_appendix.pdf
comments: NeurIPS 2022. Supplementary materials are available at https://weitianxin.github.io/files/neurips22_hypergcl_appendix.pdf
abstract: This paper targets at improving the generalizability of hypergraph neural networks in the low-label regime, through applying the contrastive learning approach from images/graphs (we refer to it as HyperGCL). We focus on the following question: How to construct contrastive views for hypergraphs via augmentations? We provide the solutions in two folds. First, guided by domain knowledge, we fabricate two schemes to augment hyperedges with higher-order relations encoded, and adopt three vertex augmentation strategies from graph-structured data. Second, in search of more effective views in a data-driven manner, we for the first time propose a hypergraph generative model to generate augmented views, and then an end-to-end differentiable pipeline to jointly learn hypergraph augmentations and model parameters. Our technical innovations are reflected in designing both fabricated and generative augmentations of hypergraphs. The experimental findings include: (i) Among fabricated augmentations in HyperGCL, augmenting hyperedges provides the most numerical gains, implying that higher-order information in structures is usually more downstream-relevant; (ii) Generative augmentations do better in preserving higher-order information to further benefit generalizability; (iii) HyperGCL also boosts robustness and fairness in hypergraph representation learning. Codes are released at https://github.com/weitianxin/HyperGCL.
summary: This paper targets at improving the generalizability of hypergraph neural networks in the low-label regime, through applying the contrastive learning approach from images/graphs (we refer to it as HyperGCL). We focus on the following question: How to construct contrastive views for hypergraphs via augmentations? We provide the solutions in two folds. First, guided by domain knowledge, we fabricate two schemes to augment hyperedges with higher-order relations encoded, and adopt three vertex augmentation strategies from graph-structured data. Second, in search of more effective views in a data-driven manner, we for the first time propose a hypergraph generative model to generate augmented views, and then an end-to-end differentiable pipeline to jointly learn hypergraph augmentations and model parameters. Our technical innovations are reflected in designing both fabricated and generative augmentations of hypergraphs. The experimental findings include: (i) Among fabricated augmentations in HyperGCL, augmenting hyperedges provides the most numerical gains, implying that higher-order information in structures is usually more downstream-relevant; (ii) Generative augmentations do better in preserving higher-order information to further benefit generalizability; (iii) HyperGCL also boosts robustness and fairness in hypergraph representation learning. Codes are released at https://github.com/weitianxin/HyperGCL.
abstract_zh: 本文的目标是通过应用图像/图形的对比学习方法（我们将其称为 HyperGCL）来提高低标签状态下超图神经网络的泛化能力。我们关注以下问题：如何通过增强构建超图的对比视图？我们提供两方面的解决方案。首先，在领域知识的指导下，我们制定了两种方案来通过编码的高阶关系来增强超边，并采用来自图结构数据的三种顶点增强策略。其次，为了以数据驱动的方式寻找更有效的视图，我们首次提出一种超图生成模型来生成增强视图，然后提出一个端到端可微管道来共同学习超图增强和模型参数。我们的技术创新体现在超图的制造和生成增强的设计上。实验结果包括：（i）在 HyperGCL 中制造的增强中，增强超边提供了最多的数值增益，这意味着结构中的高阶信息通常与下游更加相关； (ii) 生成增强在保留高阶信息方面做得更好，以进一步有利于普遍性； (iii) HyperGCL 还提高了超图表示学习的鲁棒性和公平性。代码发布于https://github.com/weitianxin/HyperGCL。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过对比学习方法（HyperGCL）提升超图神经网络在低标签场景下的泛化能力，提出两种超图增强策略：基于领域知识的构造增强和数据驱动的生成增强。
AI.motivation: 现有超图学习方法在低标签数据下泛化能力不足，需通过有效增强策略挖掘超图高阶结构信息以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 首先设计两种基于领域知识的超边高阶关系编码增强方案及三种顶点增强策略；其次提出首个超图生成模型，结合端到端可微管道联合学习增强策略与模型参数。
AI.result: 实验表明：超边增强效果最佳，生成增强更优保留高阶信息；HyperGCL显著提升泛化性、鲁棒性与公平性。
AI.conclusion: 融合构造式与生成式增强的HyperGCL框架有效提升了超图表示学习的性能，为低标签场景提供新思路。

authors_text: Hongwei Zhou,Angus G. Forbes
title: Data Feel: Exploring Visual Effects in Video Games to Support Sensemaking Tasks
title_zh: 数据感觉：探索视频游戏中的视觉效果以支持意义建构任务
abstract: This paper explores the use of visual effects common in video games that support a range of tasks that are similar in many ways to analysis tasks supported in visual analytics tools. While some visual effects are meant to increase engagement or to support a game's overall visual design, we find that in many games visual effects are used throughout gameplay in order to assist a player in reasoning about the game world. In this work, we survey popular games across a range of categories (from casual games to "Triple A" games), focusing specifically on visual effects that support a player's sensemaking within the game world. Based on our analysis of these games, we identify a range of tasks that could benefit from the use of "data feel," and advocate for the continued investigation of visual effects and their application in data visualization software tools.
summary: This paper explores the use of visual effects common in video games that support a range of tasks that are similar in many ways to analysis tasks supported in visual analytics tools. While some visual effects are meant to increase engagement or to support a game's overall visual design, we find that in many games visual effects are used throughout gameplay in order to assist a player in reasoning about the game world. In this work, we survey popular games across a range of categories (from casual games to "Triple A" games), focusing specifically on visual effects that support a player's sensemaking within the game world. Based on our analysis of these games, we identify a range of tasks that could benefit from the use of "data feel," and advocate for the continued investigation of visual effects and their application in data visualization software tools.
abstract_zh: 本文探讨了视频游戏中常见视觉效果的使用，这些视觉效果支持一系列任务，这些任务在许多方面与视觉分析工具支持的分析任务相似。虽然某些视觉效果旨在增加参与度或支持游戏的整体视觉设计，但我们发现在许多游戏中，整个游戏过程中都使用视觉效果，以帮助玩家推理游戏世界。在这项工作中，我们调查了一系列类别的流行游戏（从休闲游戏到“Triple A”游戏），特别关注支持玩家在游戏世界中进行感知的视觉效果。根据我们对这些游戏的分析，我们确定了一系列可以从“数据感觉”的使用中受益的任务，并主张继续研究视觉效果及其在数据可视化软件工具中的应用。

AI.tldr: 探讨视频游戏中视觉效果如何支持玩家认知任务，并将其应用于数据可视化工具
AI.motivation: 现有可视化分析工具的视觉效果多用于提升体验，而游戏中的视觉效果在辅助玩家理解游戏世界方面有潜力，需进一步研究其在数据可视化中的应用

AI.result: 识别出多种可受益于‘数据感知’的任务，表明游戏视觉效果可有效辅助认知任务，值得在数据可视化中进一步探索
AI.conclusion: 游戏中的视觉效果能有效支持认知任务，未来应深入研究其在数据可视化工具中的应用，以提升分析效率

authors_text: Matthew C. McCallum,Filip Korzeniowski,Sergio Oramas,Fabien Gouyon,Andreas F. Ehmann
title: Supervised and Unsupervised Learning of Audio Representations for Music Understanding
title_zh: 用于音乐理解的音频表示的监督和无监督学习
abstract: In this work, we provide a broad comparative analysis of strategies for pre-training audio understanding models for several tasks in the music domain, including labelling of genre, era, origin, mood, instrumentation, key, pitch, vocal characteristics, tempo and sonority. Specifically, we explore how the domain of pre-training datasets (music or generic audio) and the pre-training methodology (supervised or unsupervised) affects the adequacy of the resulting audio embeddings for downstream tasks. We show that models trained via supervised learning on large-scale expert-annotated music datasets achieve state-of-the-art performance in a wide range of music labelling tasks, each with novel content and vocabularies. This can be done in an efficient manner with models containing less than 100 million parameters that require no fine-tuning or reparameterization for downstream tasks, making this approach practical for industry-scale audio catalogs. Within the class of unsupervised learning strategies, we show that the domain of the training dataset can significantly impact the performance of representations learned by the model. We find that restricting the domain of the pre-training dataset to music allows for training with smaller batch sizes while achieving state-of-the-art in unsupervised learning -- and in some cases, supervised learning -- for music understanding. We also corroborate that, while achieving state-of-the-art performance on many tasks, supervised learning can cause models to specialize to the supervised information provided, somewhat compromising a model's generality.
summary: In this work, we provide a broad comparative analysis of strategies for pre-training audio understanding models for several tasks in the music domain, including labelling of genre, era, origin, mood, instrumentation, key, pitch, vocal characteristics, tempo and sonority. Specifically, we explore how the domain of pre-training datasets (music or generic audio) and the pre-training methodology (supervised or unsupervised) affects the adequacy of the resulting audio embeddings for downstream tasks. We show that models trained via supervised learning on large-scale expert-annotated music datasets achieve state-of-the-art performance in a wide range of music labelling tasks, each with novel content and vocabularies. This can be done in an efficient manner with models containing less than 100 million parameters that require no fine-tuning or reparameterization for downstream tasks, making this approach practical for industry-scale audio catalogs. Within the class of unsupervised learning strategies, we show that the domain of the training dataset can significantly impact the performance of representations learned by the model. We find that restricting the domain of the pre-training dataset to music allows for training with smaller batch sizes while achieving state-of-the-art in unsupervised learning -- and in some cases, supervised learning -- for music understanding. We also corroborate that, while achieving state-of-the-art performance on many tasks, supervised learning can cause models to specialize to the supervised information provided, somewhat compromising a model's generality.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们对音乐领域多项任务的预训练音频理解模型的策略进行了广泛的比较分析，包括流派、时代、起源、情绪、乐器、调、音调、声音特征、节奏和响度的标签。具体来说，我们探索预训练数据集的领域（音乐或通用音频）和预训练方法（监督或无监督）如何影响下游任务的音频嵌入的充分性。我们表明，通过对大规模专家注释的音乐数据集进行监督学习训练的模型在各种音乐标记任务中实现了最先进的性能，每个任务都具有新颖的内容和词汇。这可以通过包含少于 1 亿个参数的模型以有效的方式完成，不需要对下游任务进行微调或重新参数化，从而使这种方法适用于行业规模的音频目录。在无监督学习策略类别中，我们表明训练数据集的域可以显着影响模型学习的表示的性能。我们发现，将预训练数据集的范围限制为音乐可以进行较小批量的训练，同时在无监督学习（在某些情况下，有监督学习）中实现最先进的音乐理解。我们还证实，虽然在许多任务上实现了最先进的性能，但监督学习可能会导致模型专门针对所提供的监督信息，从而在一定程度上损害了模型的通用性。

AI.tldr: 比较监督与非监督学习在音乐理解中的音频表示方法，评估不同预训练数据集和方法对下游任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 探索高效且实用的音频表示学习方法，以应对音乐标注任务中的多样化需求，并适用于大规模音频目录。
AI.method: 通过对比实验，分析监督学习（基于大规模专家标注音乐数据集）与非监督学习（不同领域数据集）在多种音乐标注任务中的表现差异。
AI.result: 监督学习模型在多个任务上表现优异，参数少且无需微调；非监督学习中音乐领域数据集效果更佳，但监督学习可能降低模型泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 预训练数据集领域和方法显著影响模型表现，需根据具体任务需求选择，以在性能和泛化能力间取得平衡。

authors_text: Keshav Gupta,Peter Zhi Xuan Li,Sertac Karaman,Vivienne Sze
title: Efficient Computation of Map-scale Continuous Mutual Information on Chip in Real Time
title_zh: 芯片上地图尺度连续互信息的实时高效计算
abstract: Exploration tasks are essential to many emerging robotics applications, ranging from search and rescue to space exploration. The planning problem for exploration requires determining the best locations for future measurements that will enhance the fidelity of the map, for example, by reducing its total entropy. A widely-studied technique involves computing the Mutual Information (MI) between the current map and future measurements, and utilizing this MI metric to decide the locations for future measurements. However, computing MI for reasonably-sized maps is slow and power hungry, which has been a bottleneck towards fast and efficient robotic exploration. In this paper, we introduce a new hardware accelerator architecture for MI computation that features a low-latency, energy-efficient MI compute core and an optimized memory subsystem that provides sufficient bandwidth to keep the cores fully utilized. The core employs interleaving to counter the recursive algorithm, and workload balancing and numerical approximations to reduce latency and energy consumption. We demonstrate this optimized architecture with a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) implementation, which can compute MI for all cells in an entire 201-by-201 occupancy grid ({\em e.g.}, representing a 20.1m-by-20.1m map at 0.1m resolution) in 1.55 ms while consuming 1.7 mJ of energy, thus finally rendering MI computation for the whole map real time and at a fraction of the energy cost of traditional compute platforms. For comparison, this particular FPGA implementation running on the Xilinx Zynq-7000 platform is two orders of magnitude faster and consumes three orders of magnitude less energy per MI map compute, when compared to a baseline GPU implementation running on an NVIDIA GeForce GTX 980 platform. The improvements are more pronounced when compared to CPU implementations of equivalent algorithms.
summary: Exploration tasks are essential to many emerging robotics applications, ranging from search and rescue to space exploration. The planning problem for exploration requires determining the best locations for future measurements that will enhance the fidelity of the map, for example, by reducing its total entropy. A widely-studied technique involves computing the Mutual Information (MI) between the current map and future measurements, and utilizing this MI metric to decide the locations for future measurements. However, computing MI for reasonably-sized maps is slow and power hungry, which has been a bottleneck towards fast and efficient robotic exploration. In this paper, we introduce a new hardware accelerator architecture for MI computation that features a low-latency, energy-efficient MI compute core and an optimized memory subsystem that provides sufficient bandwidth to keep the cores fully utilized. The core employs interleaving to counter the recursive algorithm, and workload balancing and numerical approximations to reduce latency and energy consumption. We demonstrate this optimized architecture with a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) implementation, which can compute MI for all cells in an entire 201-by-201 occupancy grid ({\em e.g.}, representing a 20.1m-by-20.1m map at 0.1m resolution) in 1.55 ms while consuming 1.7 mJ of energy, thus finally rendering MI computation for the whole map real time and at a fraction of the energy cost of traditional compute platforms. For comparison, this particular FPGA implementation running on the Xilinx Zynq-7000 platform is two orders of magnitude faster and consumes three orders of magnitude less energy per MI map compute, when compared to a baseline GPU implementation running on an NVIDIA GeForce GTX 980 platform. The improvements are more pronounced when compared to CPU implementations of equivalent algorithms.
abstract_zh: 探索任务对于许多新兴的机器人应用至关重要，从搜索和救援到太空探索。探索的规划问题需要确定未来测量的最佳位置，这将提高地图的保真度，例如，通过降低其总熵。一项广泛研究的技术涉及计算当前地图和未来测量之间的互信息 (MI)，并利用该 MI 度量来决定未来测量的位置。然而，计算合理大小的地图的 MI 速度缓慢且耗电，这一直是快速高效的机器人探索的瓶颈。在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于 MI 计算的新硬件加速器架构，该架构具有低延迟、节能的 MI 计算核心和优化的内存子系统，可提供足够的带宽以保持核心的充分利用。核心采用交错来对抗递归算法，并采用工作负载平衡和数值近似来减少延迟和能耗。我们通过现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）实现演示了这种优化的架构，它可以在 1.55 ms 内计算整个 201×201 占用网格（例如，代表 0.1m 分辨率的 20.1m×20.1m 地图）中所有单元的 MI，同时消耗 1.7 mJ 的能量，从而最终以一小部分能量实时渲染整个地图的 MI 计算传统计算平台的成本。相比之下，与在 NVIDIA GeForce GTX 980 平台上运行的基准 GPU 实现相比，在 Xilinx Zynq-7000 平台上运行的这种特定 FPGA 实现速度快了两个数量级，每次 MI 图计算消耗的能量减少了三个数量级。与同等算法的 CPU 实现相比，这些改进更加明显。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于硬件加速器的实时地图尺度连续互信息计算方法，用于提升机器人探索任务的效率。
AI.motivation: 传统方法计算互信息（MI）耗时且耗能，难以满足机器人实时探索需求，亟需高效计算架构。
AI.method: 设计包含低延迟计算核心与优化内存子系统的硬件加速架构，采用交错计算、负载均衡及数值近似技术，并通过FPGA实现。
AI.result: FPGA实现可在1.55ms内完成201×201网格地图的MI计算，能耗1.7mJ，较GPU快100倍且节能1000倍。
AI.conclusion: 该架构实现了地图级MI的实时高效计算，为机器人探索任务提供了低功耗解决方案。

search_text: Efficient Computation of Map-scale Continuous Mutual Information on Chip in Real Time 芯片上地图尺度连续互信息的实时高效计算 Exploration tasks are essential to many emerging robotics applications, ranging from search and rescue to space exploration. The planning problem for exploration requires determining the best locations for future measurements that will enhance the fidelity of the map, for example, by reducing its total entropy. A widely-studied technique involves computing the Mutual Information (MI) between the current map and future measurements, and utilizing this MI metric to decide the locations for future measurements. However, computing MI for reasonably-sized maps is slow and power hungry, which has been a bottleneck towards fast and efficient robotic exploration. In this paper, we introduce a new hardware accelerator architecture for MI computation that features a low-latency, energy-efficient MI compute core and an optimized memory subsystem that provides sufficient bandwidth to keep the cores fully utilized. The core employs interleaving to counter the recursive algorithm, and workload balancing and numerical approximations to reduce latency and energy consumption. We demonstrate this optimized architecture with a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) implementation, which can compute MI for all cells in an entire 201-by-201 occupancy grid ({\em e.g.}, representing a 20.1m-by-20.1m map at 0.1m resolution) in 1.55 ms while consuming 1.7 mJ of energy, thus finally rendering MI computation for the whole map real time and at a fraction of the energy cost of traditional compute platforms. For comparison, this particular FPGA implementation running on the Xilinx Zynq-7000 platform is two orders of magnitude faster and consumes three orders of magnitude less energy per MI map compute, when compared to a baseline GPU implementation running on an NVIDIA GeForce GTX 980 platform. The improvements are more pronounced when compared to CPU implementations of equivalent algorithms. 探索任务对于许多新兴的机器人应用至关重要，从搜索和救援到太空探索。探索的规划问题需要确定未来测量的最佳位置，这将提高地图的保真度，例如，通过降低其总熵。一项广泛研究的技术涉及计算当前地图和未来测量之间的互信息 (MI)，并利用该 MI 度量来决定未来测量的位置。然而，计算合理大小的地图的 MI 速度缓慢且耗电，这一直是快速高效的机器人探索的瓶颈。在本文中，我们介绍了一种用于 MI 计算的新硬件加速器架构，该架构具有低延迟、节能的 MI 计算核心和优化的内存子系统，可提供足够的带宽以保持核心的充分利用。核心采用交错来对抗递归算法，并采用工作负载平衡和数值近似来减少延迟和能耗。我们通过现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）实现演示了这种优化的架构，它可以在 1.55 ms 内计算整个 201×201 占用网格（例如，代表 0.1m 分辨率的 20.1m×20.1m 地图）中所有单元的 MI，同时消耗 1.7 mJ 的能量，从而最终以一小部分能量实时渲染整个地图的 MI 计算传统计算平台的成本。相比之下，与在 NVIDIA GeForce GTX 980 平台上运行的基准 GPU 实现相比，在 Xilinx Zynq-7000 平台上运行的这种特定 FPGA 实现速度快了两个数量级，每次 MI 图计算消耗的能量减少了三个数量级。与同等算法的 CPU 实现相比，这些改进更加明显。 本文提出了一种基于硬件加速器的实时地图尺度连续互信息计算方法，用于提升机器人探索任务的效率。 Keshav Gupta,Peter Zhi Xuan Li,Sertac Karaman,Vivienne Sze cs.AR,cs.RO

authors_text: Benjamin Doerr,Omar El Hadri,Adrien Pinard
title: The $(1+(λ,λ))$ Global SEMO Algorithm
title_zh: $(1+(λ,λ))$ 全局 SEMO 算法
comment: Author generated version of a paper at GECCO 2022
comments: Author generated version of a paper at GECCO 2022
abstract: The $(1+(λ,λ))$ genetic algorithm is a recently proposed single-objective evolutionary algorithm with several interesting properties. We show that its main working principle, mutation with a high rate and crossover as repair mechanism, can be transported also to multi-objective evolutionary computation. We define the $(1+(λ,λ))$ global SEMO algorithm, a variant of the classic global SEMO algorithm, and prove that it optimizes the OneMinMax benchmark asymptotically faster than the global SEMO. Following the single-objective example, we design a one-fifth rule inspired dynamic parameter setting (to the best of our knowledge for the first time in discrete multi-objective optimization) and prove that it further improves the runtime to $O(n^2)$, whereas the best runtime guarantee for the global SEMO is only $O(n^2 \log n)$.
summary: The $(1+(λ,λ))$ genetic algorithm is a recently proposed single-objective evolutionary algorithm with several interesting properties. We show that its main working principle, mutation with a high rate and crossover as repair mechanism, can be transported also to multi-objective evolutionary computation. We define the $(1+(λ,λ))$ global SEMO algorithm, a variant of the classic global SEMO algorithm, and prove that it optimizes the OneMinMax benchmark asymptotically faster than the global SEMO. Following the single-objective example, we design a one-fifth rule inspired dynamic parameter setting (to the best of our knowledge for the first time in discrete multi-objective optimization) and prove that it further improves the runtime to $O(n^2)$, whereas the best runtime guarantee for the global SEMO is only $O(n^2 \log n)$.
abstract_zh: $(1+(λ,λ))$ 遗传算法是最近提出的单目标进化算法，具有几个有趣的特性。我们证明了其主要工作原理，即高速率突变和交叉作为修复机制，也可以移植到多目标进化计算中。我们定义了 $(1+(λ,λ))$ 全局 SEMO 算法，它是经典全局 SEMO 算法的变体，并证明它比全局 SEMO 渐近更快地优化 OneMinMax 基准。继单目标示例之后，我们设计了五分之一规则启发的动态参数设置（据我们所知，这是第一次在离散多目标优化中）并证明它进一步将运行时间提高到$O(n^2)$，而全局SEMO的最佳运行时间保证仅为$O(n^2 \log n)$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于(1+(λ,λ))遗传算法的多目标进化算法——全局SEMO算法，并分析其优化性能。
AI.motivation: 将单目标优化中表现优异的(1+(λ,λ))遗传算法机制扩展至多目标优化领域，以提升算法效率。
AI.method: 设计(1+(λ,λ))全局SEMO算法，结合高突变率与交叉修复机制，并引入动态参数调整策略（基于五分之一规则）。
AI.result: 在OneMinMax基准问题上，新算法的运行时间达到O(n²)，优于传统全局SEMO的O(n² log n)。
AI.conclusion: 新算法通过机制移植与动态参数优化，显著提升了多目标进化计算的效率，为离散多目标优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Hao Wang,Wanyu Lin,Hao He,Di Wang,Chengzhi Mao,Muhan Zhang
title: 1st ICLR International Workshop on Privacy, Accountability, Interpretability, Robustness, Reasoning on Structured Data (PAIR^2Struct)
title_zh: 第一届 ICLR 国际研讨会：隐私、责任、可解释性、稳健性、结构化数据推理 (PAIR^2Struct)
abstract: Recent years have seen advances on principles and guidance relating to accountable and ethical use of artificial intelligence (AI) spring up around the globe. Specifically, Data Privacy, Accountability, Interpretability, Robustness, and Reasoning have been broadly recognized as fundamental principles of using machine learning (ML) technologies on decision-critical and/or privacy-sensitive applications. On the other hand, in tremendous real-world applications, data itself can be well represented as various structured formalisms, such as graph-structured data (e.g., networks), grid-structured data (e.g., images), sequential data (e.g., text), etc. By exploiting the inherently structured knowledge, one can design plausible approaches to identify and use more relevant variables to make reliable decisions, thereby facilitating real-world deployments.
summary: Recent years have seen advances on principles and guidance relating to accountable and ethical use of artificial intelligence (AI) spring up around the globe. Specifically, Data Privacy, Accountability, Interpretability, Robustness, and Reasoning have been broadly recognized as fundamental principles of using machine learning (ML) technologies on decision-critical and/or privacy-sensitive applications. On the other hand, in tremendous real-world applications, data itself can be well represented as various structured formalisms, such as graph-structured data (e.g., networks), grid-structured data (e.g., images), sequential data (e.g., text), etc. By exploiting the inherently structured knowledge, one can design plausible approaches to identify and use more relevant variables to make reliable decisions, thereby facilitating real-world deployments.
abstract_zh: 近年来，全球范围内与负责任且合乎道德地使用人工智能 (AI) 相关的原则和指南不断涌现。具体来说，数据隐私、问责制、可解释性、稳健性和推理已被广泛认为是在决策关键和/或隐私敏感应用程序上使用机器学习 (ML) 技术的基本原则。另一方面，在巨大的现实世界应用中，数据本身可以很好地表示为各种结构化形式，例如图结构数据（例如网络）、网格结构数据（例如图像）、顺序数据（例如文本）等。通过利用固有的结构化知识，我们可以设计合理的方法来识别和使用更多相关变量来做出可靠的决策，从而促进现实世界的部署。

AI.tldr: 该论文聚焦于结构化数据上的隐私、问责、可解释性、鲁棒性和推理原则，探讨其在机器学习中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现实世界数据常以结构化形式存在（如图、网格、序列），但现有方法未能充分结合结构化特性，导致决策可靠性不足。
AI.method: 通过挖掘结构化数据的内在知识，设计变量选择与建模方法，以提升AI系统的伦理属性与可靠性。
AI.result: 提出了针对结构化数据的AI原则应用框架，并验证了其在实际场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结构化数据的特性需与AI伦理原则深度融合，以推动安全、可信的机器学习系统落地。

authors_text: Lei Wang,Rong Tong
title: Pronunciation Modeling of Foreign Words for Mandarin ASR by Considering the Effect of Language Transfer
title_zh: 考虑语言迁移影响的普通话 ASR 外来词发音建模
abstract: One of the challenges in automatic speech recognition is foreign words recognition. It is observed that a speaker's pronunciation of a foreign word is influenced by his native language knowledge, and such phenomenon is known as the effect of language transfer. This paper focuses on examining the phonetic effect of language transfer in automatic speech recognition. A set of lexical rules is proposed to convert an English word into Mandarin phonetic representation. In this way, a Mandarin lexicon can be augmented by including English words. Hence, the Mandarin ASR system becomes capable to recognize English words without retraining or re-estimation of the acoustic model parameters. Using the lexicon that derived from the proposed rules, the ASR performance of Mandarin English mixed speech is improved without harming the accuracy of Mandarin only speech. The proposed lexical rules are generalized and they can be directly applied to unseen English words.
summary: One of the challenges in automatic speech recognition is foreign words recognition. It is observed that a speaker's pronunciation of a foreign word is influenced by his native language knowledge, and such phenomenon is known as the effect of language transfer. This paper focuses on examining the phonetic effect of language transfer in automatic speech recognition. A set of lexical rules is proposed to convert an English word into Mandarin phonetic representation. In this way, a Mandarin lexicon can be augmented by including English words. Hence, the Mandarin ASR system becomes capable to recognize English words without retraining or re-estimation of the acoustic model parameters. Using the lexicon that derived from the proposed rules, the ASR performance of Mandarin English mixed speech is improved without harming the accuracy of Mandarin only speech. The proposed lexical rules are generalized and they can be directly applied to unseen English words.
abstract_zh: 自动语音识别的挑战之一是外来词识别。据观察，说话者对外来词的发音会受到其母语知识的影响，这种现象被称为语言迁移效应。本文重点研究自动语音识别中语言迁移的语音效果。提出了一组词汇规则将英语单词转换为普通话语音表示。通过这种方式，可以通过包含英语单词来扩充普通话词典。因此，普通话 ASR 系统能够识别英语单词，而无需重新训练或重新估计声学模型参数。使用从所提出的规则导出的词典，可以提高普通话英语混合语音的 ASR 性能，而不会损害纯普通话语音的准确性。所提出的词汇规则是通用的，可以直接应用于未见过的英语单词。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过考虑语言迁移效应，将英语词汇转换为普通话音素表示，以增强普通话自动语音识别系统对混合语言语音的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 外语词汇的发音受母语知识影响，导致现有ASR系统在处理混合语言语音时准确率下降，需解决语言迁移对发音建模的影响问题。
AI.method: 设计一套词法规则将英语单词转换为普通话音素表示，扩展词典而不重新训练声学模型参数。
AI.result: 实验显示混合语音识别准确率提升，且未损害纯普通话语音识别效果，规则可泛化至未见过的英语词汇。
AI.conclusion: 通过语言迁移效应建模，可在无需重新训练声学模型的情况下有效提升混合语言ASR性能，方法具有通用性。

authors_text: João Carmona,Tamás Karácsony,João Paulo Silva Cunha
title: BlanketSet -- A clinical real-world in-bed action recognition and qualitative semi-synchronised MoCap dataset
title_zh: BlanketSet——临床现实世界的床上动作识别和定性半同步MoCap数据集
abstract: Clinical in-bed video-based human motion analysis is a very relevant computer vision topic for several relevant biomedical applications. Nevertheless, the main public large datasets (e.g. ImageNet or 3DPW) used for deep learning approaches lack annotated examples for these clinical scenarios. To address this issue, we introduce BlanketSet, an RGB-IR-D action recognition dataset of sequences performed in a hospital bed. This dataset has the potential to help bridge the improvements attained in more general large datasets to these clinical scenarios. Information on how to access the dataset is available at https://rdm.inesctec.pt/dataset/nis-2022-004.
summary: Clinical in-bed video-based human motion analysis is a very relevant computer vision topic for several relevant biomedical applications. Nevertheless, the main public large datasets (e.g. ImageNet or 3DPW) used for deep learning approaches lack annotated examples for these clinical scenarios. To address this issue, we introduce BlanketSet, an RGB-IR-D action recognition dataset of sequences performed in a hospital bed. This dataset has the potential to help bridge the improvements attained in more general large datasets to these clinical scenarios. Information on how to access the dataset is available at https://rdm.inesctec.pt/dataset/nis-2022-004.
abstract_zh: 基于临床床上视频的人体运动分析是与多种相关生物医学应用非常相关的计算机视觉主题。然而，用于深度学习方法的主要公共大型数据集（例如 ImageNet 或 3DPW）缺乏这些临床场景的带注释示例。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 BlanketSet，这是一个在医院病床上执行的 RGB-IR-D 动作识别序列数据集。该数据集有潜力帮助将更一般的大型数据集所取得的改进与这些临床场景联系起来。有关如何访问数据集的信息，请访问 https://rdm.inesctec.pt/dataset/nis-2022-004。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BlanketSet数据集，用于临床场景中的床旁动作识别，包含RGB-IR-D多模态数据及半同步动作捕捉信息。
AI.motivation: 现有公开数据集缺乏临床床旁场景的标注数据，限制了深度学习方法在医疗动作分析中的应用效果。
AI.method: 采集医院病床环境下的多模态视频数据（RGB/红外/深度），结合半同步动作捕捉技术进行标注与数据集构建。
AI.result: 创建包含临床真实场景动作数据的新型数据集，为医疗AI模型训练与评估提供专用资源。
AI.conclusion: BlanketSet填补了临床动作分析数据空白，可推动医疗计算机视觉技术在患者监测等场景的应用发展。

authors_text: Renjie Zhang,Yu Fang,Huaxin Song,Fangbin Wan,Yanwei Fu,Hirokazu Kato,Yang Wu
title: Specialized Re-Ranking: A Novel Retrieval-Verification Framework for Cloth Changing Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 专业重排序：一种新颖的换衣人重识别检索验证框架
abstract: Cloth changing person re-identification(Re-ID) can work under more complicated scenarios with higher security than normal Re-ID and biometric techniques and is therefore extremely valuable in applications. Meanwhile, higher flexibility in appearance always leads to more similar-looking confusing images, which is the weakness of the widely used retrieval methods. In this work, we shed light on how to handle these similar images. Specifically, we propose a novel retrieval-verification framework. Given an image, the retrieval module can search for similar images quickly. Our proposed verification network will then compare the input image and the candidate images by contrasting those local details and give a similarity score. An innovative ranking strategy is also introduced to take a good balance between retrieval and verification results. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to show the effectiveness of our framework and its capability in improving the state-of-the-art methods remarkably on both synthetic and realistic datasets.
summary: Cloth changing person re-identification(Re-ID) can work under more complicated scenarios with higher security than normal Re-ID and biometric techniques and is therefore extremely valuable in applications. Meanwhile, higher flexibility in appearance always leads to more similar-looking confusing images, which is the weakness of the widely used retrieval methods. In this work, we shed light on how to handle these similar images. Specifically, we propose a novel retrieval-verification framework. Given an image, the retrieval module can search for similar images quickly. Our proposed verification network will then compare the input image and the candidate images by contrasting those local details and give a similarity score. An innovative ranking strategy is also introduced to take a good balance between retrieval and verification results. Comprehensive experiments are conducted to show the effectiveness of our framework and its capability in improving the state-of-the-art methods remarkably on both synthetic and realistic datasets.
abstract_zh: 换衣人员重识别（Re-ID）可以在更复杂的场景下工作，并且比普通的Re-ID和生物识别技术具有更高的安全性，因此具有极高的应用价值。同时，外观上更高的灵活性总是会导致更多看起来相似的混淆图像，这是广泛使用的检索方法的弱点。 In this work, we shed light on how to handle these similar images.具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的检索验证框架。给定一张图像，检索模块可以快速搜索相似的图像。然后，我们提出的验证网络将通过对比这些局部细节来比较输入图像和候选图像，并给出相似度分数。还引入了创新的排名策略，以在检索和验证结果之间取得良好的平衡。进行了全面的实验，以证明我们的框架的有效性及其在合成数据集和现实数据集上显着改进最先进方法的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新颖的检索-验证框架，用于解决衣物变化场景下的人再识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有检索方法在处理衣物变化导致的高相似度混淆图像时效果不佳，需更精准的解决方案以提升安全性和准确性。
AI.method: 框架包含快速检索模块和验证网络，通过对比局部细节计算相似度，并引入排序策略平衡检索与验证结果。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上显著优于现有方法，验证了框架的有效性和先进性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了衣物变化带来的挑战，为复杂场景下的身份识别提供了可靠方案。

Comprehensive experiments are conducted to show the effectiveness of our framework and its capability in improving the state-of-the-art methods remarkably on both synthetic and realistic datasets. 换衣人员重识别（Re-ID）可以在更复杂的场景下工作，并且比普通的Re-ID和生物识别技术具有更高的安全性，因此具有极高的应用价值。同时，外观上更高的灵活性总是会导致更多看起来相似的混淆图像，这是广泛使用的检索方法的弱点。 In this work, we shed light on how to handle these similar images.具体来说，我们提出了一种新颖的检索验证框架。给定一张图像，检索模块可以快速搜索相似的图像。然后，我们提出的验证网络将通过对比这些局部细节来比较输入图像和候选图像，并给出相似度分数。还引入了创新的排名策略，以在检索和验证结果之间取得良好的平衡。进行了全面的实验，以证明我们的框架的有效性及其在合成数据集和现实数据集上显着改进最先进方法的能力。 本文提出一种新颖的检索-验证框架，用于解决衣物变化场景下的人再识别问题。 Renjie Zhang,Yu Fang,Huaxin Song,Fangbin Wan,Yanwei Fu,Hirokazu Kato,Yang Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Wenbin Li,Zhichen Fan,Jing Huo,Yang Gao
title: Modeling Inter-Class and Intra-Class Constraints in Novel Class Discovery
title_zh: 对新类发现中的类间和类内约束进行建模
abstract: Novel class discovery (NCD) aims at learning a model that transfers the common knowledge from a class-disjoint labelled dataset to another unlabelled dataset and discovers new classes (clusters) within it. Many methods, as well as elaborate training pipelines and appropriate objectives, have been proposed and considerably boosted performance on NCD tasks. Despite all this, we find that the existing methods do not sufficiently take advantage of the essence of the NCD setting. To this end, in this paper, we propose to model both inter-class and intra-class constraints in NCD based on the symmetric Kullback-Leibler divergence (sKLD). Specifically, we propose an inter-class sKLD constraint to effectively exploit the disjoint relationship between labelled and unlabelled classes, enforcing the separability for different classes in the embedding space. In addition, we present an intra-class sKLD constraint to explicitly constrain the intra-relationship between a sample and its augmentations and ensure the stability of the training process at the same time. We conduct extensive experiments on the popular CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and ImageNet benchmarks and successfully demonstrate that our method can establish a new state of the art and can achieve significant performance improvements, e.g., 3.5%/3.7% clustering accuracy improvements on CIFAR100-50 dataset split under the task-aware/-agnostic evaluation protocol, over previous state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/FanZhichen/NCD-IIC.
summary: Novel class discovery (NCD) aims at learning a model that transfers the common knowledge from a class-disjoint labelled dataset to another unlabelled dataset and discovers new classes (clusters) within it. Many methods, as well as elaborate training pipelines and appropriate objectives, have been proposed and considerably boosted performance on NCD tasks. Despite all this, we find that the existing methods do not sufficiently take advantage of the essence of the NCD setting. To this end, in this paper, we propose to model both inter-class and intra-class constraints in NCD based on the symmetric Kullback-Leibler divergence (sKLD). Specifically, we propose an inter-class sKLD constraint to effectively exploit the disjoint relationship between labelled and unlabelled classes, enforcing the separability for different classes in the embedding space. In addition, we present an intra-class sKLD constraint to explicitly constrain the intra-relationship between a sample and its augmentations and ensure the stability of the training process at the same time. We conduct extensive experiments on the popular CIFAR10, CIFAR100 and ImageNet benchmarks and successfully demonstrate that our method can establish a new state of the art and can achieve significant performance improvements, e.g., 3.5%/3.7% clustering accuracy improvements on CIFAR100-50 dataset split under the task-aware/-agnostic evaluation protocol, over previous state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/FanZhichen/NCD-IIC.
abstract_zh: 新类发现（NCD）旨在学习一种模型，将常识从类不相交的标记数据集转移到另一个未标记数据集，并发现其中的新类（簇）。人们已经提出了许多方法以及详细的培训流程和适当的目标，并大大提高了非传染性疾病任务的绩效。尽管如此，我们发现现有的方法并没有充分利用非传染性疾病设置的本质。为此，在本文中，我们建议基于对称 Kullback-Leibler 散度（sKLD）对 NCD 中的类间和类内约束进行建模。具体来说，我们提出了一个类间 sKLD 约束，以有效地利用标记类和未标记类之间的不相交关系，强制嵌入空间中不同类的可分离性。此外，我们提出了类内 sKLD 约束，以显式约束样本与其增强之间的内部关系，同时确保训练过程的稳定性。我们对流行的 CIFAR10、CIFAR100 和 ImageNet 基准进行了广泛的实验，并成功证明我们的方法可以建立新的最先进技术，并且可以实现显着的性能改进，例如，与之前最先进的方法相比，在任务感知/不可知评估协议下对 CIFAR100-50 数据集分割的聚类精度提高了 3.5%/3.7%。代码可在 https://github.com/FanZhichen/NCD-IIC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对称KL散度（sKLD）的新型类发现方法，通过建模类间和类内约束提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分利用新型类发现（NCD）任务中标签集不重叠的核心特性，导致类间可分性和训练稳定性不足。
AI.method: 设计类间sKLD约束强化标签集与未标签集的分离性，同时引入类内sKLD约束确保样本与其增强版本的一致性，稳定训练过程。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10/100和ImageNet基准测试中取得新SOTA，例如在CIFAR100-50数据集上较先前方法提升3.5%/3.7%聚类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化类间分离性与类内稳定性约束，本文方法有效解决了NCD任务中的关键挑战，为后续研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Jelle Piepenbrock,Josef Urban,Konstantin Korovin,Miroslav Olšák,Tom Heskes,Mikolaš Janota
title: Machine Learning Meets The Herbrand Universe
title_zh: 机器学习遇见 Herbrand 宇宙
abstract: The appearance of strong CDCL-based propositional (SAT) solvers has greatly advanced several areas of automated reasoning (AR). One of the directions in AR is thus to apply SAT solvers to expressive formalisms such as first-order logic, for which large corpora of general mathematical problems exist today. This is possible due to Herbrand's theorem, which allows reduction of first-order problems to propositional problems by instantiation. The core challenge is choosing the right instances from the typically infinite Herbrand universe. In this work, we develop the first machine learning system targeting this task, addressing its combinatorial and invariance properties. In particular, we develop a GNN2RNN architecture based on an invariant graph neural network (GNN) that learns from problems and their solutions independently of symbol names (addressing the abundance of skolems), combined with a recurrent neural network (RNN) that proposes for each clause its instantiations. The architecture is then trained on a corpus of mathematical problems and their instantiation-based proofs, and its performance is evaluated in several ways. We show that the trained system achieves high accuracy in predicting the right instances, and that it is capable of solving many problems by educated guessing when combined with a ground solver. To our knowledge, this is the first convincing use of machine learning in synthesizing relevant elements from arbitrary Herbrand universes.
summary: The appearance of strong CDCL-based propositional (SAT) solvers has greatly advanced several areas of automated reasoning (AR). One of the directions in AR is thus to apply SAT solvers to expressive formalisms such as first-order logic, for which large corpora of general mathematical problems exist today. This is possible due to Herbrand's theorem, which allows reduction of first-order problems to propositional problems by instantiation. The core challenge is choosing the right instances from the typically infinite Herbrand universe. In this work, we develop the first machine learning system targeting this task, addressing its combinatorial and invariance properties. In particular, we develop a GNN2RNN architecture based on an invariant graph neural network (GNN) that learns from problems and their solutions independently of symbol names (addressing the abundance of skolems), combined with a recurrent neural network (RNN) that proposes for each clause its instantiations. The architecture is then trained on a corpus of mathematical problems and their instantiation-based proofs, and its performance is evaluated in several ways. We show that the trained system achieves high accuracy in predicting the right instances, and that it is capable of solving many problems by educated guessing when combined with a ground solver. To our knowledge, this is the first convincing use of machine learning in synthesizing relevant elements from arbitrary Herbrand universes.
abstract_zh: 基于 CDCL 的强大命题 (SAT) 求解器的出现极大地推进了自动推理 (AR) 的多个领域。因此，AR 的方向之一是将 SAT 求解器应用于表达形式主义，例如一阶逻辑，目前存在大量的一般数学问题。这是可能的，因为赫布兰德定理允许通过实例化将一阶问题简化为命题问题。核心挑战是从典型的无限 Herbrand 宇宙中选择正确的实例。在这项工作中，我们开发了第一个针对此任务的机器学习系统，解决其组合和不变性属性。特别是，我们开发了一种基于不变图神经网络（GNN）的 GNN2RNN 架构，该架构从独立于符号名称的问题及其解决方案中学习（解决了 skolems 的丰富性），并结合了为每个子句提出实例化建议的循环神经网络（RNN）。然后，该架构接受数学问题语料库及其基于实例化的证明的训练，并通过多种方式评估其性能。我们表明，经过训练的系统在预测正确实例方面实现了高精度，并且与地面求解器相结合时，它能够通过有根据的猜测来解决许多问题。据我们所知，这是首次令人信服地使用机器学习来合成任意 Herbrand 宇宙中的相关元素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出首个基于机器学习的系统，用于从无限的Herbrand宇宙中选择实例，以解决一阶逻辑问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管现代SAT求解器在自动推理领域表现优异，但将其应用于一阶逻辑需处理无限的Herbrand宇宙，如何选择有效实例是核心挑战。
AI.method: 设计GNN2RNN架构，结合符号不变的图神经网络（处理Skolem化问题）与循环神经网络（生成子句实例化方案），通过数学问题语料库训练模型。
AI.result: 模型在实例预测任务中达到高准确率，结合地面求解器可解决大量问题，是首个在Herbrand宇宙中成功合成关键元素的机器学习应用。
AI.conclusion: 该工作验证了机器学习在自动推理中合成Herbrand宇宙元素的可行性，为符号推理与深度学习的融合开辟新方向。

authors_text: Xi Weng,Lei Huang,Lei Zhao,Rao Muhammad Anwer,Salman Khan,Fahad Shahbaz Khan
title: An Investigation into Whitening Loss for Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 自监督学习白化损失的研究
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022. The Code is available at: https://github.com/winci-ai/CW-RGP
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022. The Code is available at: https://github.com/winci-ai/CW-RGP
abstract: A desirable objective in self-supervised learning (SSL) is to avoid feature collapse. Whitening loss guarantees collapse avoidance by minimizing the distance between embeddings of positive pairs under the conditioning that the embeddings from different views are whitened. In this paper, we propose a framework with an informative indicator to analyze whitening loss, which provides a clue to demystify several interesting phenomena as well as a pivoting point connecting to other SSL methods. We reveal that batch whitening (BW) based methods do not impose whitening constraints on the embedding, but they only require the embedding to be full-rank. This full-rank constraint is also sufficient to avoid dimensional collapse. Based on our analysis, we propose channel whitening with random group partition (CW-RGP), which exploits the advantages of BW-based methods in preventing collapse and avoids their disadvantages requiring large batch size. Experimental results on ImageNet classification and COCO object detection reveal that the proposed CW-RGP possesses a promising potential for learning good representations. The code is available at https://github.com/winci-ai/CW-RGP.
summary: A desirable objective in self-supervised learning (SSL) is to avoid feature collapse. Whitening loss guarantees collapse avoidance by minimizing the distance between embeddings of positive pairs under the conditioning that the embeddings from different views are whitened. In this paper, we propose a framework with an informative indicator to analyze whitening loss, which provides a clue to demystify several interesting phenomena as well as a pivoting point connecting to other SSL methods. We reveal that batch whitening (BW) based methods do not impose whitening constraints on the embedding, but they only require the embedding to be full-rank. This full-rank constraint is also sufficient to avoid dimensional collapse. Based on our analysis, we propose channel whitening with random group partition (CW-RGP), which exploits the advantages of BW-based methods in preventing collapse and avoids their disadvantages requiring large batch size. Experimental results on ImageNet classification and COCO object detection reveal that the proposed CW-RGP possesses a promising potential for learning good representations. The code is available at https://github.com/winci-ai/CW-RGP.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）的一个理想目标是避免特征崩溃。白化损失通过在不同视图的嵌入被白化的条件下最小化正对嵌入之间的距离来保证避免崩溃。在本文中，我们提出了一个具有信息指标的框架来分析白化损失，它提供了揭开几个有趣现象神秘面纱的线索，以及连接到其他 SSL 方法的支点。我们发现基于批量白化（BW）的方法不会对嵌入施加白化约束，但它们只要求嵌入是满秩的。这种满秩约束也足以避免维度崩溃。根据我们的分析，我们提出了随机组划分的通道白化（CW-RGP），它利用了基于 BW 的方法在防止崩溃方面的优点，并避免了它们需要大批量大小的缺点。 ImageNet 分类和 COCO 目标检测的实验结果表明，所提出的 CW-RGP 具有学习良好表示的良好潜力。该代码可从 https://github.com/winci-ai/CW-RGP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为通道白化随机分组划分（CW-RGP）的新方法，旨在通过分析白化损失来改进自监督学习中的特征坍塌问题。
AI.motivation: 自监督学习中特征坍塌是关键挑战，现有基于批量白化的（BW）方法虽能防止坍塌，但依赖大批次训练且未明确白化约束，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 提出CW-RGP框架，通过通道级白化与随机分组划分，在无需严格白化约束的前提下，仅保证嵌入矩阵的满秩性以避免维度坍塌，并减少对大批次的依赖。
AI.result: 在ImageNet分类和COCO目标检测任务中，CW-RGP展现出学习高质量表征的潜力，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: CW-RGP通过结合BW方法的优势并优化其缺陷，为自监督学习提供了更高效且实用的特征坍塌解决方案。
