authors_text: Yigit Yildirim,Emre Ugur
title: Learning Social Navigation from Demonstrations with Conditional Neural Processes
title_zh: 从条件神经过程的演示中学习社交导航
comment: Author submitted manuscript, accepted for publication in the Special Issue of Interaction Studies, titled "Socially Acceptable Robot Behavior: Approaches for Learning, Adaptation and Evaluation"
comments: Author submitted manuscript, accepted for publication in the Special Issue of Interaction Studies, titled "Socially Acceptable Robot Behavior: Approaches for Learning, Adaptation and Evaluation"
abstract: Sociability is essential for modern robots to increase their acceptability in human environments. Traditional techniques use manually engineered utility functions inspired by observing pedestrian behaviors to achieve social navigation. However, social aspects of navigation are diverse, changing across different types of environments, societies, and population densities, making it unrealistic to use hand-crafted techniques in each domain. This paper presents a data-driven navigation architecture that uses state-of-the-art neural architectures, namely Conditional Neural Processes, to learn global and local controllers of the mobile robot from observations. Additionally, we leverage a state-of-the-art, deep prediction mechanism to detect situations not similar to the trained ones, where reactive controllers step in to ensure safe navigation. Our results demonstrate that the proposed framework can successfully carry out navigation tasks regarding social norms in the data. Further, we showed that our system produces fewer personal-zone violations, causing less discomfort.
summary: Sociability is essential for modern robots to increase their acceptability in human environments. Traditional techniques use manually engineered utility functions inspired by observing pedestrian behaviors to achieve social navigation. However, social aspects of navigation are diverse, changing across different types of environments, societies, and population densities, making it unrealistic to use hand-crafted techniques in each domain. This paper presents a data-driven navigation architecture that uses state-of-the-art neural architectures, namely Conditional Neural Processes, to learn global and local controllers of the mobile robot from observations. Additionally, we leverage a state-of-the-art, deep prediction mechanism to detect situations not similar to the trained ones, where reactive controllers step in to ensure safe navigation. Our results demonstrate that the proposed framework can successfully carry out navigation tasks regarding social norms in the data. Further, we showed that our system produces fewer personal-zone violations, causing less discomfort.
abstract_zh: 社交能力对于现代机器人提高其在人类环境中的可接受性至关重要。传统技术使用受观察行人行为启发而手动设计的实用函数来实现社交导航。然而，导航的社会方面是多种多样的，随着不同类型的环境、社会和人口密度的变化而变化，使得在每个领域使用手工技术是不现实的。本文提出了一种数据驱动的导航架构，该架构使用最先进的神经架构（即条件神经过程）从观察中学习移动机器人的全局和局部控制器。此外，我们利用最先进的深度预测机制来检测与经过训练的情况不同的情况，反应控制器介入以确保安全导航。我们的结果表明，所提出的框架可以成功地执行有关数据中社会规范的导航任务。此外，我们还表明，我们的系统产生的个人区域违规情况较少，造成的不适也较少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件神经过程的数据驱动导航框架，用于学习机器人社会导航行为。
AI.motivation: 传统手工设计的导航效用函数难以适应多样化的社会环境和人群密度变化，需更灵活的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 结合条件神经过程学习全局/局部控制器，并采用深度预测机制检测异常场景触发反应式控制。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架能有效遵循社会规范，显著减少个人空间侵犯行为。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过端到端学习实现了复杂环境中符合社会习惯的机器人导航

authors_text: Lei Wang,Benedict Yeoh,Jun Wah Ng
title: Synthetic Voice Detection and Audio Splicing Detection using SE-Res2Net-Conformer Architecture
title_zh: 使用 SE-Res2Net-Conformer 架构的合成语音检测和音频拼接检测
comment: Accepted by the 13th International Symposium on Chinese Spoken Language Processing (ISCSLP 2022)
comments: Accepted by the 13th International Symposium on Chinese Spoken Language Processing (ISCSLP 2022)
abstract: Synthetic voice and splicing audio clips have been generated to spoof Internet users and artificial intelligence (AI) technologies such as voice authentication. Existing research work treats spoofing countermeasures as a binary classification problem: bonafide vs. spoof. This paper extends the existing Res2Net by involving the recent Conformer block to further exploit the local patterns on acoustic features. Experimental results on ASVspoof 2019 database show that the proposed SE-Res2Net-Conformer architecture is able to improve the spoofing countermeasures performance for the logical access scenario. In addition, this paper also proposes to re-formulate the existing audio splicing detection problem. Instead of identifying the complete splicing segments, it is more useful to detect the boundaries of the spliced segments. Moreover, a deep learning approach can be used to solve the problem, which is different from the previous signal processing techniques.
summary: Synthetic voice and splicing audio clips have been generated to spoof Internet users and artificial intelligence (AI) technologies such as voice authentication. Existing research work treats spoofing countermeasures as a binary classification problem: bonafide vs. spoof. This paper extends the existing Res2Net by involving the recent Conformer block to further exploit the local patterns on acoustic features. Experimental results on ASVspoof 2019 database show that the proposed SE-Res2Net-Conformer architecture is able to improve the spoofing countermeasures performance for the logical access scenario. In addition, this paper also proposes to re-formulate the existing audio splicing detection problem. Instead of identifying the complete splicing segments, it is more useful to detect the boundaries of the spliced segments. Moreover, a deep learning approach can be used to solve the problem, which is different from the previous signal processing techniques.
abstract_zh: 生成合成语音和拼接音频片段来欺骗互联网用户和语音认证等人工智能 (AI) 技术。现有的研究工作将欺骗对策视为二元分类问题：善意与欺骗。本文通过引入最近的 Conformer 块来扩展现有的 Res2Net，以进一步利用声学特征的局部模式。 ASVspoof 2019 数据库上的实验结果表明，所提出的 SE-Res2Net-Conformer 架构能够提高逻辑访问场景的欺骗对策性能。此外，本文还提出重新制定现有的音频拼接检测问题。检测拼接片段的边界比识别完整的拼接片段更有用。而且，可以使用深度学习方法来解决该问题，这与之前的信号处理技术不同。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于SE-Res2Net-Conformer架构的合成语音检测与音频拼接检测方法，通过改进模型结构和重新定义检测目标提升反欺骗性能。
AI.motivation: 现有反欺骗方法局限于二分类问题且效果有限，需更有效的模型结构及更实用的音频拼接检测方案。
AI.method: 融合Res2Net与Conformer模块构建SE-Res2Net-Conformer架构，并将音频拼接检测重新定义为边界检测问题，采用深度学习方法替代传统信号处理技术。
AI.result: 在ASVspoof 2019数据库的逻辑访问场景中，新架构显著提升了合成语音检测性能，边界检测方法验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: SE-Res2Net-Conformer架构有效改进了反欺骗性能，而基于边界的音频拼接检测方法为后续研究提供了新方向。

tldr: 本文提出基于SE-Res2Net-Conformer架构的合成语音检测与音频拼接检测方法，通过改进模型结构和重新定义检测目标提升反欺骗性能。
motivation: 现有反欺骗方法局限于二分类问题且效果有限，需更有效的模型结构及更实用的音频拼接检测方案。
method: 融合Res2Net与Conformer模块构建SE-Res2Net-Conformer架构，并将音频拼接检测重新定义为边界检测问题，采用深度学习方法替代传统信号处理技术。

conclusion: SE-Res2Net-Conformer架构有效改进了反欺骗性能，而基于边界的音频拼接检测方法为后续研究提供了新方向。
search_text: Synthetic Voice Detection and Audio Splicing Detection using SE-Res2Net-Conformer Architecture 使用 SE-Res2Net-Conformer 架构的合成语音检测和音频拼接检测 Synthetic voice and splicing audio clips have been generated to spoof Internet users and artificial intelligence (AI) technologies such as voice authentication. Existing research work treats spoofing countermeasures as a binary classification problem: bonafide vs. spoof. This paper extends the existing Res2Net by involving the recent Conformer block to further exploit the local patterns on acoustic features. Experimental results on ASVspoof 2019 database show that the proposed SE-Res2Net-Conformer architecture is able to improve the spoofing countermeasures performance for the logical access scenario. In addition, this paper also proposes to re-formulate the existing audio splicing detection problem. Instead of identifying the complete splicing segments, it is more useful to detect the boundaries of the spliced segments. Moreover, a deep learning approach can be used to solve the problem, which is different from the previous signal processing techniques. 生成合成语音和拼接音频片段来欺骗互联网用户和语音认证等人工智能 (AI) 技术。现有的研究工作将欺骗对策视为二元分类问题：善意与欺骗。本文通过引入最近的 Conformer 块来扩展现有的 Res2Net，以进一步利用声学特征的局部模式。 ASVspoof 2019 数据库上的实验结果表明，所提出的 SE-Res2Net-Conformer 架构能够提高逻辑访问场景的欺骗对策性能。此外，本文还提出重新制定现有的音频拼接检测问题。检测拼接片段的边界比识别完整的拼接片段更有用。而且，可以使用深度学习方法来解决该问题，这与之前的信号处理技术不同。 本文提出基于SE-Res2Net-Conformer架构的合成语音检测与音频拼接检测方法，通过改进模型结构和重新定义检测目标提升反欺骗性能。 Lei Wang,Benedict Yeoh,Jun Wah Ng eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.CR

authors_text: Lei Wang,Rong Tong,Cheung Chi Leung,Sunil Sivadas,Chongjia Ni,Bin Ma
title: Cloud-based Automatic Speech Recognition Systems for Southeast Asian Languages
title_zh: 基于云的东南亚语言自动语音识别系统
comment: Published by the 2017 IEEE International Conference on Orange Technologies (ICOT 2017)
comments: Published by the 2017 IEEE International Conference on Orange Technologies (ICOT 2017)
abstract: This paper provides an overall introduction of our Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems for Southeast Asian languages. As not much existing work has been carried out on such regional languages, a few difficulties should be addressed before building the systems: limitation on speech and text resources, lack of linguistic knowledge, etc. This work takes Bahasa Indonesia and Thai as examples to illustrate the strategies of collecting various resources required for building ASR systems.
summary: This paper provides an overall introduction of our Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) systems for Southeast Asian languages. As not much existing work has been carried out on such regional languages, a few difficulties should be addressed before building the systems: limitation on speech and text resources, lack of linguistic knowledge, etc. This work takes Bahasa Indonesia and Thai as examples to illustrate the strategies of collecting various resources required for building ASR systems.
abstract_zh: 本文全面介绍了我们的东南亚语言自动语音识别（ASR）系统。由于目前针对此类区域语言开展的工作不多，因此在构建系统之前需要解决一些困难：语音和文本资源的限制、语言知识的缺乏等。本工作以印尼语和泰语为例，说明收集构建ASR系统所需的各种资源的策略。

AI.tldr: 介绍针对东南亚语言（如印尼语和泰语）的基于云的自动语音识别系统，并解决资源和语言知识不足的挑战。
AI.motivation: 由于东南亚语言的ASR研究不足，缺乏语音文本资源和语言学知识，需开发有效系统。
AI.method: 以印尼语和泰语为例，采用资源收集策略，包括语音和文本数据获取及语言学知识构建。
AI.result: 成功构建了针对两种语言的ASR系统框架，并验证了资源收集策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 展示了云ASR系统在资源有限情况下的可行性，未来需更多语言和优化。

authors_text: Haris Iqbal,Hemang Chawla,Arnav Varma,Terence Brouns,Ahmed Badar,Elahe Arani,Bahram Zonooz
title: AI-Driven Road Maintenance Inspection v2: Reducing Data Dependency & Quantifying Road Damage
title_zh: 人工智能驱动的道路维护检查 v2：减少数据依赖并量化道路损坏
comment: Accepted at IRF Global R2T Conference & Exhibition 2022
comments: Accepted at IRF Global R2T Conference & Exhibition 2022
abstract: Road infrastructure maintenance inspection is typically a labor-intensive and critical task to ensure the safety of all road users. Existing state-of-the-art techniques in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for object detection and segmentation help automate a huge chunk of this task given adequate annotated data. However, annotating videos from scratch is cost-prohibitive. For instance, it can take an annotator several days to annotate a 5-minute video recorded at 30 FPS. Hence, we propose an automated labelling pipeline by leveraging techniques like few-shot learning and out-of-distribution detection to generate labels for road damage detection. In addition, our pipeline includes a risk factor assessment for each damage by instance quantification to prioritize locations for repairs which can lead to optimal deployment of road maintenance machinery. We show that the AI models trained with these techniques can not only generalize better to unseen real-world data with reduced requirement for human annotation but also provide an estimate of maintenance urgency, thereby leading to safer roads.
summary: Road infrastructure maintenance inspection is typically a labor-intensive and critical task to ensure the safety of all road users. Existing state-of-the-art techniques in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for object detection and segmentation help automate a huge chunk of this task given adequate annotated data. However, annotating videos from scratch is cost-prohibitive. For instance, it can take an annotator several days to annotate a 5-minute video recorded at 30 FPS. Hence, we propose an automated labelling pipeline by leveraging techniques like few-shot learning and out-of-distribution detection to generate labels for road damage detection. In addition, our pipeline includes a risk factor assessment for each damage by instance quantification to prioritize locations for repairs which can lead to optimal deployment of road maintenance machinery. We show that the AI models trained with these techniques can not only generalize better to unseen real-world data with reduced requirement for human annotation but also provide an estimate of maintenance urgency, thereby leading to safer roads.
abstract_zh: 道路基础设施维护检查通常是一项劳动密集型且关键的任务，以确保所有道路使用者的安全。现有最先进的人工智能 (AI) 对象检测和分割技术在提供足够的注释数据的情况下有助于自动完成大部分任务。然而，从头开始为视频添加注释成本高昂。例如，注释者可能需要几天时间才能注释以 30 FPS 录制的 5 分钟视频。因此，我们提出了一种自动标签管道，通过利用少样本学习和分布外检测等技术来生成用于道路损坏检测的标签。此外，我们的管道包括通过实例量化对每次损坏进行风险因素评估，以优先考虑维修地点，从而实现道路养护机械的最佳部署。我们表明，使用这些技术训练的人工智能模型不仅可以更好地推广到看不见的现实世界数据，减少对人工注释的需求，而且还可以提供维护紧迫性的估计，从而使道路更安全。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于AI的道路维护检测方法，通过减少数据依赖性和量化道路损坏程度来提升检测效率。
AI.motivation: 传统道路检测依赖大量人工标注数据，成本高昂且耗时，而现有AI模型在真实场景中泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 结合少样本学习和分布外检测技术实现自动化标注，并通过实例量化评估损坏风险优先级。
AI.result: 模型在减少人工标注需求的同时提升了泛化能力，并能提供维护紧迫性评估，优化维护资源分配。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过降低数据依赖性和量化损坏风险，为道路维护提供了更高效、安全的解决方案。

authors_text: Jan Philip Wahle,Terry Ruas,Frederic Kirstein,Bela Gipp
title: How Large Language Models are Transforming Machine-Paraphrased Plagiarism
title_zh: 大型语言模型如何改变机器释义的抄袭行为
abstract: The recent success of large language models for text generation poses a severe threat to academic integrity, as plagiarists can generate realistic paraphrases indistinguishable from original work. However, the role of large autoregressive transformers in generating machine-paraphrased plagiarism and their detection is still developing in the literature. This work explores T5 and GPT-3 for machine-paraphrase generation on scientific articles from arXiv, student theses, and Wikipedia. We evaluate the detection performance of six automated solutions and one commercial plagiarism detection software and perform a human study with 105 participants regarding their detection performance and the quality of generated examples. Our results suggest that large models can rewrite text humans have difficulty identifying as machine-paraphrased (53% mean acc.). Human experts rate the quality of paraphrases generated by GPT-3 as high as original texts (clarity 4.0/5, fluency 4.2/5, coherence 3.8/5). The best-performing detection model (GPT-3) achieves a 66% F1-score in detecting paraphrases.
summary: The recent success of large language models for text generation poses a severe threat to academic integrity, as plagiarists can generate realistic paraphrases indistinguishable from original work. However, the role of large autoregressive transformers in generating machine-paraphrased plagiarism and their detection is still developing in the literature. This work explores T5 and GPT-3 for machine-paraphrase generation on scientific articles from arXiv, student theses, and Wikipedia. We evaluate the detection performance of six automated solutions and one commercial plagiarism detection software and perform a human study with 105 participants regarding their detection performance and the quality of generated examples. Our results suggest that large models can rewrite text humans have difficulty identifying as machine-paraphrased (53% mean acc.). Human experts rate the quality of paraphrases generated by GPT-3 as high as original texts (clarity 4.0/5, fluency 4.2/5, coherence 3.8/5). The best-performing detection model (GPT-3) achieves a 66% F1-score in detecting paraphrases.
abstract_zh: 最近用于文本生成的大型语言模型的成功对学术诚信构成了严重威胁，因为抄袭者可以生成与原始作品无法区分的真实释义。然而，大型自回归变压器在生成机器转述抄袭及其检测方面的作用仍在文献中发展。这项工作探索了 T5 和 GPT-3 在 arXiv、学生论文和维基百科的科学文章上进行机器释义生成。我们评估了六种自动化解决方案和一种商业抄袭检测软件的检测性能，并对 105 名参与者进行了一项人类研究，了解其检测性能和生成示例的质量。我们的结果表明，大型模型可以重写人类难以识别为机器释义的文本（平均符合率 53%）。人类专家对 GPT-3 生成的释义质量的评价与原始文本一样高（清晰度 4.0/5、流畅性 4.2/5、连贯性 3.8/5）。性能最佳的检测模型 (GPT-3) 在检测释义方面取得了 66% 的 F1 分数。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了大型语言模型（如T5和GPT-3）在生成机器改写抄袭内容中的作用，并评估了其检测方法的效果。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型生成的高质量改写文本可能威胁学术诚信，但现有文献对其生成机制及检测方法的研究尚不充分。
AI.method: 使用T5和GPT-3对科学论文、学生论文和维基百科文本进行改写，评估六种自动检测工具和一款商业软件，并通过105名参与者的实验研究人类检测能力。
AI.result: 人类检测准确率为53%，GPT-3生成的改写文本质量接近原作（清晰度4.0/5，流畅度4.2/5），最佳检测模型（GPT-3）的F1分数为66%。
AI.conclusion: 大型语言模型显著提升了机器改写抄袭的隐蔽性，现有检测技术难以有效识别，需进一步研究改进检测方法。

ai_content.conclusion: 大型语言模型显著提升了机器改写抄袭的隐蔽性，现有检测技术难以有效识别，需进一步研究改进检测方法。

search_text: How Large Language Models are Transforming Machine-Paraphrased Plagiarism 大型语言模型如何改变机器释义的抄袭行为 The recent success of large language models for text generation poses a severe threat to academic integrity, as plagiarists can generate realistic paraphrases indistinguishable from original work. However, the role of large autoregressive transformers in generating machine-paraphrased plagiarism and their detection is still developing in the literature. This work explores T5 and GPT-3 for machine-paraphrase generation on scientific articles from arXiv, student theses, and Wikipedia. We evaluate the detection performance of six automated solutions and one commercial plagiarism detection software and perform a human study with 105 participants regarding their detection performance and the quality of generated examples. Our results suggest that large models can rewrite text humans have difficulty identifying as machine-paraphrased (53% mean acc.). Human experts rate the quality of paraphrases generated by GPT-3 as high as original texts (clarity 4.0/5, fluency 4.2/5, coherence 3.8/5). The best-performing detection model (GPT-3) achieves a 66% F1-score in detecting paraphrases. 最近用于文本生成的大型语言模型的成功对学术诚信构成了严重威胁，因为抄袭者可以生成与原始作品无法区分的真实释义。然而，大型自回归变压器在生成机器转述抄袭及其检测方面的作用仍在文献中发展。这项工作探索了 T5 和 GPT-3 在 arXiv、学生论文和维基百科的科学文章上进行机器释义生成。我们评估了六种自动化解决方案和一种商业抄袭检测软件的检测性能，并对 105 名参与者进行了一项人类研究，了解其检测性能和生成示例的质量。我们的结果表明，大型模型可以重写人类难以识别为机器释义的文本（平均符合率 53%）。人类专家对 GPT-3 生成的释义质量的评价与原始文本一样高（清晰度 4.0/5、流畅性 4.2/5、连贯性 3.8/5）。性能最佳的检测模型 (GPT-3) 在检测释义方面取得了 66% 的 F1 分数。 本文探讨了大型语言模型（如T5和GPT-3）在生成机器改写抄袭内容中的作用，并评估了其检测方法的效果。 Jan Philip Wahle,Terry Ruas,Frederic Kirstein,Bela Gipp cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Arash Rabbani,Masoud Babaei,Masoumeh Gharib
title: Automated segmentation and morphological characterization of placental histology images based on a single labeled image
title_zh: 基于单个标记图像的胎盘组织学图像的自动分割和形态学表征
abstract: In this study, a novel method of data augmentation has been presented for the segmentation of placental histological images when the labeled data are scarce. This method generates new realizations of the placenta intervillous morphology while maintaining the general textures and orientations. As a result, a diversified artificial dataset of images is generated that can be used for training deep learning segmentation models. We have observed that on average the presented method of data augmentation led to a 42% decrease in the binary cross-entropy loss of the validation dataset compared to the common approach in the literature. Additionally, the morphology of the intervillous space is studied under the effect of the proposed image reconstruction technique, and the diversity of the artificially generated population is quantified. Due to the high resemblance of the generated images to the real ones, the applications of the proposed method may not be limited to placental histological images, and it is recommended that other types of tissues be investigated in future studies.
summary: In this study, a novel method of data augmentation has been presented for the segmentation of placental histological images when the labeled data are scarce. This method generates new realizations of the placenta intervillous morphology while maintaining the general textures and orientations. As a result, a diversified artificial dataset of images is generated that can be used for training deep learning segmentation models. We have observed that on average the presented method of data augmentation led to a 42% decrease in the binary cross-entropy loss of the validation dataset compared to the common approach in the literature. Additionally, the morphology of the intervillous space is studied under the effect of the proposed image reconstruction technique, and the diversity of the artificially generated population is quantified. Due to the high resemblance of the generated images to the real ones, the applications of the proposed method may not be limited to placental histological images, and it is recommended that other types of tissues be investigated in future studies.
abstract_zh: 在这项研究中，提出了一种新的数据增强方法，用于在标记数据稀缺时对胎盘组织学图像进行分割。该方法产生了胎盘绒毛间形态的新认识，同时保持了一般纹理和方向。结果，生成了多样化的人工图像数据集，可用于训练深度学习分割模型。我们观察到，与文献中的常见方法相比，所提出的数据增强方法平均使验证数据集的二元交叉熵损失减少了 42%。此外，在所提出的图像重建技术的作用下研究了绒毛间隙的形态，并对人工生成的种群的多样性进行了量化。由于生成的图像与真实图像高度相似，该方法的应用可能不限于胎盘组织学图像，建议在未来的研究中研究其他类型的组织。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于单张标记图像的数据增强方法，用于解决胎盘组织学图像分割中标记数据稀缺的问题。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分析中常面临标记数据不足的挑战，传统方法难以有效生成多样化数据以训练深度学习模型。
AI.method: 通过单张标记图像生成保持纹理和方向性的胎盘绒毛间隙形态新样本，构建多样化人工数据集。
AI.result: 该方法使验证集二元交叉熵损失平均降低42%，并量化了生成图像的形态多样性。
AI.conclusion: 生成图像与真实图像高度相似，该方法不仅适用于胎盘组织学图像，未来可拓展至其他类型组织研究。

authors_text: Wei Jin,Tong Zhao,Jiayuan Ding,Yozen Liu,Jiliang Tang,Neil Shah
title: Empowering Graph Representation Learning with Test-Time Graph Transformation
title_zh: 通过测试时图转换增强图表示学习
abstract: As powerful tools for representation learning on graphs, graph neural networks (GNNs) have facilitated various applications from drug discovery to recommender systems. Nevertheless, the effectiveness of GNNs is immensely challenged by issues related to data quality, such as distribution shift, abnormal features and adversarial attacks. Recent efforts have been made on tackling these issues from a modeling perspective which requires additional cost of changing model architectures or re-training model parameters. In this work, we provide a data-centric view to tackle these issues and propose a graph transformation framework named GTrans which adapts and refines graph data at test time to achieve better performance. We provide theoretical analysis on the design of the framework and discuss why adapting graph data works better than adapting the model. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of GTrans on three distinct scenarios for eight benchmark datasets where suboptimal data is presented. Remarkably, GTrans performs the best in most cases with improvements up to 2.8%, 8.2% and 3.8% over the best baselines on three experimental settings. Code is released at https://github.com/ChandlerBang/GTrans.
summary: As powerful tools for representation learning on graphs, graph neural networks (GNNs) have facilitated various applications from drug discovery to recommender systems. Nevertheless, the effectiveness of GNNs is immensely challenged by issues related to data quality, such as distribution shift, abnormal features and adversarial attacks. Recent efforts have been made on tackling these issues from a modeling perspective which requires additional cost of changing model architectures or re-training model parameters. In this work, we provide a data-centric view to tackle these issues and propose a graph transformation framework named GTrans which adapts and refines graph data at test time to achieve better performance. We provide theoretical analysis on the design of the framework and discuss why adapting graph data works better than adapting the model. Extensive experiments have demonstrated the effectiveness of GTrans on three distinct scenarios for eight benchmark datasets where suboptimal data is presented. Remarkably, GTrans performs the best in most cases with improvements up to 2.8%, 8.2% and 3.8% over the best baselines on three experimental settings. Code is released at https://github.com/ChandlerBang/GTrans.
abstract_zh: 作为图表示学习的强大工具，图神经网络（GNN）促进了从药物发现到推荐系统的各种应用。然而，GNN 的有效性受到与数据质量相关的问题的巨大挑战，例如分布变化、异常特征和对抗性攻击。最近人们努力从建模的角度解决这些问题，这需要改变模型架构或重新训练模型参数的额外成本。在这项工作中，我们提供了一个以数据为中心的视图来解决这些问题，并提出了一个名为 GTrans 的图转换框架，该框架在测试时调整和细化图数据以实现更好的性能。我们对框架的设计进行了理论分析，并讨论了为什么调整图数据比调整模型效果更好。大量实验证明了 GTrans 在八个基准数据集的三种不同场景（其中呈现次优数据）上的有效性。值得注意的是，GTrans 在大多数情况下表现最好，在三个实验设置中比最佳基线提高了 2.8%、8.2% 和 3.8%。代码发布于 https://github.com/ChandlerBang/GTrans。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为GTrans的图变换框架，在测试时通过适应和优化图数据来提升图神经网络（GNN）的表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN方法在面对数据分布偏移、异常特征和对抗攻击等数据质量问题时效果受限，且改进方法通常需要调整模型结构或重新训练，成本较高。
AI.method: 设计GTrans框架，在测试阶段直接对图数据进行自适应变换，通过理论分析证明数据适配优于模型适配，并在三个不同场景下验证其有效性。
AI.result: 在八个基准数据集的实验中，GTrans在三种设置下均优于最佳基线，提升幅度最高达2.8%、8.2%和3.8%，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过测试时图数据适配而非模型调整，GTrans能有效应对数据质量问题，为提升GNN鲁棒性提供了低成本的解决方案。

authors_text: Davide Calabrò,Massimiliano Lupo Pasini,Nicola Ferro,Simona Perotto
title: A deep learning approach for detection and localization of leaf anomalies
title_zh: 用于检测和定位叶子异常的深度学习方法
abstract: The detection and localization of possible diseases in crops are usually automated by resorting to supervised deep learning approaches. In this work, we tackle these goals with unsupervised models, by applying three different types of autoencoders to a specific open-source dataset of healthy and unhealthy pepper and cherry leaf images. CAE, CVAE and VQ-VAE autoencoders are deployed to screen unlabeled images of such a dataset, and compared in terms of image reconstruction, anomaly removal, detection and localization. The vector-quantized variational architecture turns out to be the best performing one with respect to all these targets.
summary: The detection and localization of possible diseases in crops are usually automated by resorting to supervised deep learning approaches. In this work, we tackle these goals with unsupervised models, by applying three different types of autoencoders to a specific open-source dataset of healthy and unhealthy pepper and cherry leaf images. CAE, CVAE and VQ-VAE autoencoders are deployed to screen unlabeled images of such a dataset, and compared in terms of image reconstruction, anomaly removal, detection and localization. The vector-quantized variational architecture turns out to be the best performing one with respect to all these targets.
abstract_zh: 作物中可能的疾病的检测和定位通常通过监督深度学习方法实现自动化。在这项工作中，我们通过将三种不同类型的自动编码器应用于健康和不健康的胡椒和樱桃叶图像的特定开源数据集，使用无监督模型来解决这些目标。部署 CAE、CVAE 和 VQ-VAE 自动编码器来筛选此类数据集的未标记图像，并在图像重建、异常去除、检测和定位方面进行比较。事实证明，矢量量化变分架构是针对所有这些目标表现最好的架构。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于深度学习的方法，用于检测和定位叶片异常。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖监督学习，但实际中标签数据获取困难，因此采用无监督模型处理未标记数据以检测叶片异常。
AI.method: 采用CAE、CVAE和VQ-VAE三种自编码器，对未标记的辣椒和樱桃叶片图像进行异常检测与定位，并比较其性能。
AI.result: VQ-VAE在图像重建、异常去除、检测和定位方面均优于其他两种模型。
AI.conclusion: VQ-VAE在无监督异常检测任务中表现优异，适用于未标记的叶片图像分析。

authors_text: Kaibin Huang,Hai Wu,Zhiyan Liu,Xiaojuan Qi
title: In-situ Model Downloading to Realize Versatile Edge AI in 6G Mobile Networks
title_zh: 原位模型下载实现 6G 移动网络中的多功能边缘 AI
comment: To appear in IEEE Wireless Communications
comments: To appear in IEEE Wireless Communications
abstract: The sixth-generation (6G) mobile networks are expected to feature the ubiquitous deployment of machine learning and AI algorithms at the network edge. With rapid advancements in edge AI, the time has come to realize intelligence downloading onto edge devices (e.g., smartphones and sensors). To materialize this version, we propose a novel technology in this article, called in-situ model downloading, that aims to achieve transparent and real-time replacement of on-device AI models by downloading from an AI library in the network. Its distinctive feature is the adaptation of downloading to time-varying situations (e.g., application, location, and time), devices' heterogeneous storage-and-computing capacities, and channel states. A key component of the presented framework is a set of techniques that dynamically compress a downloaded model at the depth-level, parameter-level, or bit-level to support adaptive model downloading. We further propose a virtualized 6G network architecture customized for deploying in-situ model downloading with the key feature of a three-tier (edge, local, and central) AI library. Furthermore, experiments are conducted to quantify 6G connectivity requirements and research opportunities pertaining to the proposed technology are discussed.
summary: The sixth-generation (6G) mobile networks are expected to feature the ubiquitous deployment of machine learning and AI algorithms at the network edge. With rapid advancements in edge AI, the time has come to realize intelligence downloading onto edge devices (e.g., smartphones and sensors). Its distinctive feature is the adaptation of downloading to time-varying situations (e.g., application, location, and time), devices' heterogeneous storage-and-computing capacities, and channel states. A key component of the presented framework is a set of techniques that dynamically compress a downloaded model at the depth-level, parameter-level, or bit-level to support adaptive model downloading. We further propose a virtualized 6G network architecture customized for deploying in-situ model downloading with the key feature of a three-tier (edge, local, and central) AI library. Furthermore, experiments are conducted to quantify 6G connectivity requirements and research opportunities pertaining to the proposed technology are discussed.
abstract_zh: 第六代（6G）移动网络预计将在网络边缘普遍部署机器学习和人工智能算法。随着边缘人工智能的快速发展，实现智能下载到边缘设备（例如智能手机和传感器）的时机已经到来。为了实现这个版本，我们在本文中提出了一种称为原位模型下载的新技术，旨在通过从网络中的人工智能库下载来实现设备上人工智能模型的透明和实时替换。其显着特征是下载适应时变情况（例如应用程序、位置和时间）、设备的异构存储和计算能力以及通道状态。所提出框架的关键组件是一组在深度级别、参数级别或位级别动态压缩下载模型以支持自适应模型下载的技术。我们进一步提出了一种为部署原位模型下载而定制的虚拟化 6G 网络架构，其关键特征是三层（边缘、本地和中央）AI 库。此外，还进行了量化 6G 连接要求的实验，并讨论了与所提议技术相关的研究机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'原位模型下载'的新技术，旨在通过动态压缩和三级AI库架构，在6G移动网络中实现边缘设备的实时、自适应AI模型下载。
AI.motivation: 随着6G网络的发展，需要在边缘设备上实现智能算法的实时更新，以适应动态变化的应用场景、设备异构性和信道状态。
AI.method: 设计了深度级、参数级和比特级的动态模型压缩技术，并构建了包含边缘、本地和中心三级AI库的虚拟化6G网络架构。
AI.result: 通过实验量化了6G连接需求，验证了框架在不同场景下的适应性，并探讨了相关技术的研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为6G时代实现灵活、高效的边缘AI部署提供了可行方案，未来需进一步优化压缩算法和网络架构。

authors_text: Markus Hecher
title: Treewidth-aware Reductions of Normal ASP to SAT -- Is Normal ASP Harder than SAT after All?
title_zh: 普通 ASP 到 SAT 的树宽感知缩减——普通 ASP 到底比 SAT 难吗？
abstract: Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a paradigm for modeling and solving problems for knowledge representation and reasoning. There are plenty of results dedicated to studying the hardness of (fragments of) ASP. So far, these studies resulted in characterizations in terms of computational complexity as well as in fine-grained insights presented in form of dichotomy-style results, lower bounds when translating to other formalisms like propositional satisfiability (SAT), and even detailed parameterized complexity landscapes. A generic parameter in parameterized complexity originating from graph theory is the so-called treewidth, which in a sense captures structural density of a program. Recently, there was an increase in the number of treewidth-based solvers related to SAT. While there are translations from (normal) ASP to SAT, no reduction that preserves treewidth or at least keeps track of the treewidth increase is known. In this paper we propose a novel reduction from normal ASP to SAT that is aware of the treewidth, and guarantees that a slight increase of treewidth is indeed sufficient. Further, we show a new result establishing that, when considering treewidth, already the fragment of normal ASP is slightly harder than SAT (under reasonable assumptions in computational complexity). This also confirms that our reduction probably cannot be significantly improved and that the slight increase of treewidth is unavoidable. Finally, we present an empirical study of our novel reduction from normal ASP to SAT, where we compare treewidth upper bounds that are obtained via known decomposition heuristics. Overall, our reduction works better with these heuristics than existing translations.
summary: Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a paradigm for modeling and solving problems for knowledge representation and reasoning. There are plenty of results dedicated to studying the hardness of (fragments of) ASP. So far, these studies resulted in characterizations in terms of computational complexity as well as in fine-grained insights presented in form of dichotomy-style results, lower bounds when translating to other formalisms like propositional satisfiability (SAT), and even detailed parameterized complexity landscapes. A generic parameter in parameterized complexity originating from graph theory is the so-called treewidth, which in a sense captures structural density of a program. Recently, there was an increase in the number of treewidth-based solvers related to SAT. While there are translations from (normal) ASP to SAT, no reduction that preserves treewidth or at least keeps track of the treewidth increase is known. In this paper we propose a novel reduction from normal ASP to SAT that is aware of the treewidth, and guarantees that a slight increase of treewidth is indeed sufficient. Further, we show a new result establishing that, when considering treewidth, already the fragment of normal ASP is slightly harder than SAT (under reasonable assumptions in computational complexity). This also confirms that our reduction probably cannot be significantly improved and that the slight increase of treewidth is unavoidable. Finally, we present an empirical study of our novel reduction from normal ASP to SAT, where we compare treewidth upper bounds that are obtained via known decomposition heuristics. Overall, our reduction works better with these heuristics than existing translations.
abstract_zh: 答案集编程 (ASP) 是建模和解决知识表示和推理问题的范例。有大量研究成果致力于研究 ASP（碎片）的硬度。到目前为止，这些研究得出了计算复杂性方面的特征，以及以二分式结果形式呈现的细粒度见解、转换为命题可满足性（SAT）等其他形式主义时的下限，甚至详细的参数化复杂性景观。源于图论的参数化复杂性中的一个通用参数是所谓的树宽，它在某种意义上捕获了程序的结构密度。最近，与 SAT 相关的基于树宽的求解器数量有所增加。虽然有从（普通）ASP 到 SAT 的转换，但没有已知的减少可以保留树宽或至少跟踪树宽的增加。在本文中，我们提出了一种从普通 ASP 到 SAT 的新颖简化方法，它可以感知树宽，并保证稍微增加树宽确实足够。此外，我们还展示了一个新结果，表明在考虑树宽时，普通 ASP 的片段已经比 SAT 稍难（在计算复杂性的合理假设下）。这也证实了我们的减少可能无法得到显着改善，树宽的轻微增加是不可避免的。最后，我们对从普通 ASP 到 SAT 的新颖简化进行了实证研究，其中我们比较了通过已知的分解启发式方法获得的树宽上限。总的来说，我们的还原比现有的翻译更好地使用这些启发式方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新型的、考虑树宽的正常ASP到SAT的归约方法，并证明了在考虑树宽的情况下，正常ASP比SAT稍难。
AI.motivation: 尽管存在将ASP转换为SAT的翻译方法，但尚未有能保持或追踪树宽变化的归约方法。研究旨在填补这一空白，并探讨正常ASP在树宽参数下的复杂性。
AI.method: 设计了一种新型归约方法，该方法在转换过程中保持树宽的轻微增加，并通过已知分解启发式方法进行实验验证。
AI.result: 理论证明正常ASP在树宽参数下比SAT稍难；实验表明新归约方法在启发式分解上的表现优于现有翻译方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的归约方法有效且难以进一步优化，树宽的轻微增加是不可避免的，且新方法在实际应用中表现更优。

motivation: 尽管存在将ASP转换为SAT的翻译方法，但尚未有能保持或追踪树宽变化的归约方法。研究旨在填补这一空白，并探讨正常ASP在树宽参数下的复杂性。

search_text: Treewidth-aware Reductions of Normal ASP to SAT -- Is Normal ASP Harder than SAT after All? 普通 ASP 到 SAT 的树宽感知缩减——普通 ASP 到底比 SAT 难吗？ Answer Set Programming (ASP) is a paradigm for modeling and solving problems for knowledge representation and reasoning. There are plenty of results dedicated to studying the hardness of (fragments of) ASP. So far, these studies resulted in characterizations in terms of computational complexity as well as in fine-grained insights presented in form of dichotomy-style results, lower bounds when translating to other formalisms like propositional satisfiability (SAT), and even detailed parameterized complexity landscapes. A generic parameter in parameterized complexity originating from graph theory is the so-called treewidth, which in a sense captures structural density of a program. Recently, there was an increase in the number of treewidth-based solvers related to SAT. While there are translations from (normal) ASP to SAT, no reduction that preserves treewidth or at least keeps track of the treewidth increase is known. In this paper we propose a novel reduction from normal ASP to SAT that is aware of the treewidth, and guarantees that a slight increase of treewidth is indeed sufficient. Further, we show a new result establishing that, when considering treewidth, already the fragment of normal ASP is slightly harder than SAT (under reasonable assumptions in computational complexity). This also confirms that our reduction probably cannot be significantly improved and that the slight increase of treewidth is unavoidable. Finally, we present an empirical study of our novel reduction from normal ASP to SAT, where we compare treewidth upper bounds that are obtained via known decomposition heuristics. Overall, our reduction works better with these heuristics than existing translations. 答案集编程 (ASP) 是建模和解决知识表示和推理问题的范例。有大量研究成果致力于研究 ASP（碎片）的硬度。到目前为止，这些研究得出了计算复杂性方面的特征，以及以二分式结果形式呈现的细粒度见解、转换为命题可满足性（SAT）等其他形式主义时的下限，甚至详细的参数化复杂性景观。源于图论的参数化复杂性中的一个通用参数是所谓的树宽，它在某种意义上捕获了程序的结构密度。最近，与 SAT 相关的基于树宽的求解器数量有所增加。虽然有从（普通）ASP 到 SAT 的转换，但没有已知的减少可以保留树宽或至少跟踪树宽的增加。在本文中，我们提出了一种从普通 ASP 到 SAT 的新颖简化方法，它可以感知树宽，并保证稍微增加树宽确实足够。此外，我们还展示了一个新结果，表明在考虑树宽时，普通 ASP 的片段已经比 SAT 稍难（在计算复杂性的合理假设下）。这也证实了我们的减少可能无法得到显着改善，树宽的轻微增加是不可避免的。最后，我们对从普通 ASP 到 SAT 的新颖简化进行了实证研究，其中我们比较了通过已知的分解启发式方法获得的树宽上限。总的来说，我们的还原比现有的翻译更好地使用这些启发式方法。 本文提出了一种新型的、考虑树宽的正常ASP到SAT的归约方法，并证明了在考虑树宽的情况下，正常ASP比SAT稍难。 Markus Hecher cs.AI,cs.CC,cs.LO

authors_text: Long Chen,Yuli Wu,Dorit Merhof
title: Instance Segmentation of Dense and Overlapping Objects via Layering
title_zh: 通过分层对密集和重叠对象进行实例分割
abstract: Instance segmentation aims to delineate each individual object of interest in an image. State-of-the-art approaches achieve this goal by either partitioning semantic segmentations or refining coarse representations of detected objects. In this work, we propose a novel approach to solve the problem via object layering, i.e. by distributing crowded, even overlapping objects into different layers. By grouping spatially separated objects in the same layer, instances can be effortlessly isolated by extracting connected components in each layer. In comparison to previous methods, our approach is not affected by complex object shapes or object overlaps. With minimal post-processing, our method yields very competitive results on a diverse line of datasets: C. elegans (BBBC), Overlapping Cervical Cells (OCC) and cultured neuroblastoma cells (CCDB). The source code is publicly available.
summary: Instance segmentation aims to delineate each individual object of interest in an image. State-of-the-art approaches achieve this goal by either partitioning semantic segmentations or refining coarse representations of detected objects. In this work, we propose a novel approach to solve the problem via object layering, i.e. by distributing crowded, even overlapping objects into different layers. By grouping spatially separated objects in the same layer, instances can be effortlessly isolated by extracting connected components in each layer. In comparison to previous methods, our approach is not affected by complex object shapes or object overlaps. With minimal post-processing, our method yields very competitive results on a diverse line of datasets: C. elegans (BBBC), Overlapping Cervical Cells (OCC) and cultured neuroblastoma cells (CCDB). The source code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 实例分割旨在描绘图像中每个感兴趣的单独对象。最先进的方法通过划分语义分割或细化检测到的对象的粗略表示来实现这一目标。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通过对象分层解决问题的新颖方法，即将拥挤的、甚至重叠的对象分布到不同的层中。通过将空间上分离的对象分组在同一层中，可以通过提取每层中的连接组件来轻松隔离实例。与以前的方法相比，我们的方法不受复杂对象形状或对象重叠的影响。通过最少的后处理，我们的方法在多种数据集上产生了非常有竞争力的结果：线虫（BBBC）、重叠宫颈细胞（OCC）和培养的神经母细胞瘤细胞（CCDB）。源代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过对象分层解决密集和重叠物体实例分割的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂形状或重叠物体时效果不佳，因此需要一种更鲁棒的分割策略。
AI.method: 将密集或重叠物体分配到不同层，同一层内空间分离的物体可通过连通区域提取轻松分离。
AI.result: 在C. elegans、宫颈细胞和神经母细胞瘤细胞等数据集上取得具有竞争力的结果，且仅需少量后处理。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了密集和重叠物体的实例分割问题，对复杂形状和重叠情况具有鲁棒性。

authors_text: Andra Petrovai,Sergiu Nedevschi
title: Time-Space Transformers for Video Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于视频全景分割的时空转换器
abstract: We propose a novel solution for the task of video panoptic segmentation, that simultaneously predicts pixel-level semantic and instance segmentation and generates clip-level instance tracks. Our network, named VPS-Transformer, with a hybrid architecture based on the state-of-the-art panoptic segmentation network Panoptic-DeepLab, combines a convolutional architecture for single-frame panoptic segmentation and a novel video module based on an instantiation of the pure Transformer block. The Transformer, equipped with attention mechanisms, models spatio-temporal relations between backbone output features of current and past frames for more accurate and consistent panoptic estimates. As the pure Transformer block introduces large computation overhead when processing high resolution images, we propose a few design changes for a more efficient compute. We study how to aggregate information more effectively over the space-time volume and we compare several variants of the Transformer block with different attention schemes. Extensive experiments on the Cityscapes-VPS dataset demonstrate that our best model improves the temporal consistency and video panoptic quality by a margin of 2.2%, with little extra computation.
summary: We propose a novel solution for the task of video panoptic segmentation, that simultaneously predicts pixel-level semantic and instance segmentation and generates clip-level instance tracks. Our network, named VPS-Transformer, with a hybrid architecture based on the state-of-the-art panoptic segmentation network Panoptic-DeepLab, combines a convolutional architecture for single-frame panoptic segmentation and a novel video module based on an instantiation of the pure Transformer block. The Transformer, equipped with attention mechanisms, models spatio-temporal relations between backbone output features of current and past frames for more accurate and consistent panoptic estimates. As the pure Transformer block introduces large computation overhead when processing high resolution images, we propose a few design changes for a more efficient compute. We study how to aggregate information more effectively over the space-time volume and we compare several variants of the Transformer block with different attention schemes. Extensive experiments on the Cityscapes-VPS dataset demonstrate that our best model improves the temporal consistency and video panoptic quality by a margin of 2.2%, with little extra computation.
abstract_zh: 我们为视频全景分割任务提出了一种新颖的解决方案，它同时预测像素级语义和实例分割并生成剪辑级实例轨道。我们的网络名为 VPS-Transformer，采用基于最先进的全景分割网络 Panoptic-DeepLab 的混合架构，结合了用于单帧全景分割的卷积架构和基于纯 Transformer 块实例化的新颖视频模块。配备注意力机制的 Transformer 对当前帧和过去帧的主干输出特征之间的时空关系进行建模，以实现更准确和一致的全景估计。由于纯 Transformer 块在处理高分辨率图像时会引入大量计算开销，因此我们提出了一些设计更改以提高计算效率。我们研究如何在时空体积上更有效地聚合信息，并将 Transformer 块的几种变体与不同的注意力方案进行比较。对 Cityscapes-VPS 数据集的大量实验表明，我们的最佳模型将时间一致性和视频全景质量提高了 2.2%，几乎不需要额外的计算。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空变换器的视频全景分割方法，通过结合卷积网络与Transformer模块提升分割的时空一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有视频分割方法在处理时序信息时存在时空关联建模不足的问题，导致分割结果不够连贯。
AI.method: 设计VPS-Transformer网络，融合Panoptic-DeepLab的卷积架构与纯Transformer模块，通过注意力机制建模帧间时空关系，并优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes-VPS数据集上，模型在时间一致性和视频全景质量指标上提升2.2%，计算开销增加有限。
AI.conclusion: 时空变换器有效提升了视频全景分割的准确性与连贯性，且保持了较高的计算效率。

authors_text: Zhuoer Xu,Guanghui Zhu,Changhua Meng,Shiwen Cui,Zhenzhe Ying,Weiqiang Wang,Ming GU,Yihua Huang
title: A2: Efficient Automated Attacker for Boosting Adversarial Training
title_zh: A2：用于促进对抗训练的高效自动攻击者
abstract: Based on the significant improvement of model robustness by AT (Adversarial Training), various variants have been proposed to further boost the performance. Well-recognized methods have focused on different components of AT (e.g., designing loss functions and leveraging additional unlabeled data). It is generally accepted that stronger perturbations yield more robust models. However, how to generate stronger perturbations efficiently is still missed. In this paper, we propose an efficient automated attacker called A2 to boost AT by generating the optimal perturbations on-the-fly during training. A2 is a parameterized automated attacker to search in the attacker space for the best attacker against the defense model and examples. Extensive experiments across different datasets demonstrate that A2 generates stronger perturbations with low extra cost and reliably improves the robustness of various AT methods against different attacks.
summary: Based on the significant improvement of model robustness by AT (Adversarial Training), various variants have been proposed to further boost the performance. Well-recognized methods have focused on different components of AT (e.g., designing loss functions and leveraging additional unlabeled data). It is generally accepted that stronger perturbations yield more robust models. However, how to generate stronger perturbations efficiently is still missed. In this paper, we propose an efficient automated attacker called A2 to boost AT by generating the optimal perturbations on-the-fly during training. A2 is a parameterized automated attacker to search in the attacker space for the best attacker against the defense model and examples. Extensive experiments across different datasets demonstrate that A2 generates stronger perturbations with low extra cost and reliably improves the robustness of various AT methods against different attacks.
abstract_zh: 基于AT（对抗训练）对模型鲁棒性的显着提高，人们提出了各种变体来进一步提高性能。公认的方法侧重于 AT 的不同组成部分（例如，设计损失函数和利用额外的未标记数据）。人们普遍认为，更强的扰动会产生更稳健的模型。然而，如何有效地产生更强的扰动仍然是未知的。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 A2 的高效自动攻击器，通过在训练过程中动态生成最佳扰动来增强 AT。 A2是一个参数化的自动化攻击者，用于在攻击者空间中搜索针对防御模型和示例的最佳攻击者。跨不同数据集的大量实验表明，A2 以较低的额外成本产生更强的扰动，并可靠地提高了各种 AT 方法针对不同攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的自动化攻击者A2，通过在训练过程中实时生成最优扰动来增强对抗训练的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法在生成更强扰动时效率不足，而更强扰动能显著提升模型鲁棒性，因此需要高效生成扰动的方法。
AI.method: 设计参数化自动化攻击者A2，在训练时动态搜索攻击空间，寻找针对防御模型和样本的最佳攻击策略。
AI.result: 实验表明A2在多个数据集上以低成本生成更强扰动，可靠提升多种对抗训练方法的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: A2通过高效生成最优扰动有效增强对抗训练，为提升模型鲁棒性提供了低成本且可靠的新方案。

search_text: A2: Efficient Automated Attacker for Boosting Adversarial Training A2：用于促进对抗训练的高效自动攻击者 Based on the significant improvement of model robustness by AT (Adversarial Training), various variants have been proposed to further boost the performance. Well-recognized methods have focused on different components of AT (e.g., designing loss functions and leveraging additional unlabeled data). It is generally accepted that stronger perturbations yield more robust models. However, how to generate stronger perturbations efficiently is still missed. In this paper, we propose an efficient automated attacker called A2 to boost AT by generating the optimal perturbations on-the-fly during training. A2 is a parameterized automated attacker to search in the attacker space for the best attacker against the defense model and examples. Extensive experiments across different datasets demonstrate that A2 generates stronger perturbations with low extra cost and reliably improves the robustness of various AT methods against different attacks. 基于AT（对抗训练）对模型鲁棒性的显着提高，人们提出了各种变体来进一步提高性能。公认的方法侧重于 AT 的不同组成部分（例如，设计损失函数和利用额外的未标记数据）。人们普遍认为，更强的扰动会产生更稳健的模型。然而，如何有效地产生更强的扰动仍然是未知的。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 A2 的高效自动攻击器，通过在训练过程中动态生成最佳扰动来增强 AT。 A2是一个参数化的自动化攻击者，用于在攻击者空间中搜索针对防御模型和示例的最佳攻击者。跨不同数据集的大量实验表明，A2 以较低的额外成本产生更强的扰动，并可靠地提高了各种 AT 方法针对不同攻击的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种高效的自动化攻击者A2，通过在训练过程中实时生成最优扰动来增强对抗训练的效果。 Zhuoer Xu,Guanghui Zhu,Changhua Meng,Shiwen Cui,Zhenzhe Ying,Weiqiang Wang,Ming GU,Yihua Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Karam Daaboul,Joel Ikels,Marius Zöllner
title: Robotic Control Using Model Based Meta Adaption
title_zh: 使用基于模型的元适应的机器人控制
abstract: In machine learning, meta-learning methods aim for fast adaptability to unknown tasks using prior knowledge. Model-based meta-reinforcement learning combines reinforcement learning via world models with Meta Reinforcement Learning (MRL) for increased sample efficiency. However, adaption to unknown tasks does not always result in preferable agent behavior. This paper introduces a new Meta Adaptation Controller (MAC) that employs MRL to apply a preferred robot behavior from one task to many similar tasks. To do this, MAC aims to find actions an agent has to take in a new task to reach a similar outcome as in a learned task. As a result, the agent will adapt quickly to the change in the dynamic and behave appropriately without the need to construct a reward function that enforces the preferred behavior.
summary: In machine learning, meta-learning methods aim for fast adaptability to unknown tasks using prior knowledge. Model-based meta-reinforcement learning combines reinforcement learning via world models with Meta Reinforcement Learning (MRL) for increased sample efficiency. However, adaption to unknown tasks does not always result in preferable agent behavior. This paper introduces a new Meta Adaptation Controller (MAC) that employs MRL to apply a preferred robot behavior from one task to many similar tasks. To do this, MAC aims to find actions an agent has to take in a new task to reach a similar outcome as in a learned task. As a result, the agent will adapt quickly to the change in the dynamic and behave appropriately without the need to construct a reward function that enforces the preferred behavior.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习中，元学习方法旨在利用先验知识快速适应未知任务。基于模型的元强化学习将通过世界模型进行的强化学习与元强化学习 (MRL) 相结合，以提高样本效率。然而，适应未知任务并不总能带来更好的代理行为。本文介绍了一种新的元适应控制器（MAC），它采用 MRL 将首选机器人行为从一项任务应用到许多类似任务。为此，MAC 的目标是找到代理在新任务中必须采取的操作，以达到与学习任务中类似的结果。因此，代理将快速适应动态变化并做出适当的行为，而无需构建强制执行首选行为的奖励函数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型的元适应控制器（MAC），通过元强化学习将已学习任务中的优选机器人行为快速迁移到相似任务中，无需显式设计奖励函数。
AI.motivation: 现有模型基于元强化学习的方法在适应未知任务时可能无法保证机器人行为的最优性，且依赖奖励函数的设计限制了适用性。
AI.method: MAC结合世界模型与元强化学习，通过对比新旧任务动态差异，直接搜索使新任务状态分布接近已学习任务的动作策略，实现行为迁移。
AI.result: 实验表明代理能在动态变化环境中快速适应并保持预期行为，验证了无需奖励函数的元适应控制有效性。
AI.conclusion: MAC为机器人跨任务迁移提供了新范式，通过直接状态分布对齐替代传统奖励塑造，提升了适应效率与行为一致性。

authors_text: Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Björn W. Schuller,Gökçe İymen,Metin Sezgin,Xiangheng He,Zijiang Yang,Panagiotis Tzirakis,Shuo Liu,Silvan Mertes,Elisabeth André,Ruibo Fu,Jianhua Tao
title: An Overview of Affective Speech Synthesis and Conversion in the Deep Learning Era
title_zh: 深度学习时代情感语音合成与转换概述
comment: Submitted to the Proceedings of IEEE
comments: Submitted to the Proceedings of IEEE
abstract: Speech is the fundamental mode of human communication, and its synthesis has long been a core priority in human-computer interaction research. In recent years, machines have managed to master the art of generating speech that is understandable by humans. But the linguistic content of an utterance encompasses only a part of its meaning. Affect, or expressivity, has the capacity to turn speech into a medium capable of conveying intimate thoughts, feelings, and emotions -- aspects that are essential for engaging and naturalistic interpersonal communication. While the goal of imparting expressivity to synthesised utterances has so far remained elusive, following recent advances in text-to-speech synthesis, a paradigm shift is well under way in the fields of affective speech synthesis and conversion as well. Deep learning, as the technology which underlies most of the recent advances in artificial intelligence, is spearheading these efforts. In the present overview, we outline ongoing trends and summarise state-of-the-art approaches in an attempt to provide a comprehensive overview of this exciting field.
summary: Speech is the fundamental mode of human communication, and its synthesis has long been a core priority in human-computer interaction research. In recent years, machines have managed to master the art of generating speech that is understandable by humans. But the linguistic content of an utterance encompasses only a part of its meaning. Affect, or expressivity, has the capacity to turn speech into a medium capable of conveying intimate thoughts, feelings, and emotions -- aspects that are essential for engaging and naturalistic interpersonal communication. While the goal of imparting expressivity to synthesised utterances has so far remained elusive, following recent advances in text-to-speech synthesis, a paradigm shift is well under way in the fields of affective speech synthesis and conversion as well. Deep learning, as the technology which underlies most of the recent advances in artificial intelligence, is spearheading these efforts. In the present overview, we outline ongoing trends and summarise state-of-the-art approaches in an attempt to provide a comprehensive overview of this exciting field.
abstract_zh: 语音是人类交流的基本模式，其合成长期以来一直是人机交互研究的核心重点。近年来，机器已经成功地掌握了生成人类可以理解的语音的艺术。但话语的语言内容仅包含其含义的一部分。情感或表现力有能力将言语变成一种能够传达亲密的想法、感受和情感的媒介——这些方面对于参与和自然的人际交流至关重要。虽然赋予合成话语表达性的目标迄今为止仍然难以实现，但随着文本到语音合成的最新进展，情感语音合成和转换领域也正在发生范式转变。深度学习作为人工智能最新进展的基础技术，正在引领这些努力。在本概述中，我们概述了当前的趋势并总结了最先进的方法，试图对这个令人兴奋的领域提供全面的概述。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习时代情感语音合成与转换领域的最新进展和关键技术。
AI.motivation: 传统语音合成仅关注可理解性，而情感表达对自然人际交流至关重要，现有技术在情感表现方面仍存在不足。
AI.method: 系统梳理并分类现有情感语音合成与转换技术，分析深度学习方法在该领域的应用与创新。
AI.result: 总结了当前主流技术路线，指出情感可控性、自然度提升及跨语言迁移等核心挑战。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习推动了情感语音技术突破，未来需在多模态融合与情感语义理解层面进一步探索。

authors_text: Shalaleh Rismani,Renee Shelby,Andrew Smart,Edgar Jatho,Joshua Kroll,AJung Moon,Negar Rostamzadeh
title: From plane crashes to algorithmic harm: applicability of safety engineering frameworks for responsible ML
title_zh: 从飞机失事到算法损害：安全工程框架对负责任的机器学习的适用性
abstract: Inappropriate design and deployment of machine learning (ML) systems leads to negative downstream social and ethical impact -- described here as social and ethical risks -- for users, society and the environment. Despite the growing need to regulate ML systems, current processes for assessing and mitigating risks are disjointed and inconsistent. We interviewed 30 industry practitioners on their current social and ethical risk management practices, and collected their first reactions on adapting safety engineering frameworks into their practice -- namely, System Theoretic Process Analysis (STPA) and Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA). Our findings suggest STPA/FMEA can provide appropriate structure toward social and ethical risk assessment and mitigation processes. However, we also find nontrivial challenges in integrating such frameworks in the fast-paced culture of the ML industry. We call on the ML research community to strengthen existing frameworks and assess their efficacy, ensuring that ML systems are safer for all people.
summary: Inappropriate design and deployment of machine learning (ML) systems leads to negative downstream social and ethical impact -- described here as social and ethical risks -- for users, society and the environment. Despite the growing need to regulate ML systems, current processes for assessing and mitigating risks are disjointed and inconsistent. We interviewed 30 industry practitioners on their current social and ethical risk management practices, and collected their first reactions on adapting safety engineering frameworks into their practice -- namely, System Theoretic Process Analysis (STPA) and Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA). Our findings suggest STPA/FMEA can provide appropriate structure toward social and ethical risk assessment and mitigation processes. However, we also find nontrivial challenges in integrating such frameworks in the fast-paced culture of the ML industry. We call on the ML research community to strengthen existing frameworks and assess their efficacy, ensuring that ML systems are safer for all people.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 系统的不当设计和部署会给用户、社会和环境带来负面的下游社会和道德影响（此处称为社会和道德风险）。尽管监管机器学习系统的需求日益增长，但当前评估和缓解风险的流程是脱节且不一致的。我们采访了 30 位行业从业者，了解他们当前的社会和道德风险管理实践，并收集了他们对将安全工程框架应用于实践的第一反应，即系统理论过程分析 (STPA) 和故障模式与影响分析 (FMEA)。我们的研究结果表明，STPA/FMEA 可以为社会和道德风险评估和缓解流程提供适当的结构。然而，我们也发现将此类框架集成到机器学习行业的快节奏文化中面临着不小的挑战。我们呼吁机器学习研究社区加强现有框架并评估其功效，确保机器学习系统对所有人来说都更安全。

AI.tldr: 探讨安全工程框架在负责任机器学习中的适用性，以解决社会和伦理风险
AI.motivation: 现有ML系统风险评估方法分散且不一致，需引入安全工程框架以提升风险管理效果
AI.method: 通过访谈30位行业从业者，分析其对STPA和FMEA框架在ML领域应用的适应性
AI.result: 发现STPA/FMEA能提供结构化风险评估，但ML行业快速发展的文化带来非 trivial 的整合挑战
AI.conclusion: 呼吁ML研究社区完善现有框架，确保系统安全性

authors_text: Chirag Raman,Charlie Hewitt,Erroll Wood,Tadas Baltrusaitis
title: Mesh-Tension Driven Expression-Based Wrinkles for Synthetic Faces
title_zh: 网格张力驱动的基于表情的合成面部皱纹
comment: In Proceedings of the 2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV)
comments: In Proceedings of the 2023 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV)
abstract: Recent advances in synthesizing realistic faces have shown that synthetic training data can replace real data for various face-related computer vision tasks. A question arises: how important is realism? Is the pursuit of photorealism excessive? In this work, we show otherwise. We boost the realism of our synthetic faces by introducing dynamic skin wrinkles in response to facial expressions and observe significant performance improvements in downstream computer vision tasks. Previous approaches for producing such wrinkles either required prohibitive artist effort to scale across identities and expressions or were not capable of reconstructing high-frequency skin details with sufficient fidelity. Our key contribution is an approach that produces realistic wrinkles across a large and diverse population of digital humans. Concretely, we formalize the concept of mesh-tension and use it to aggregate possible wrinkles from high-quality expression scans into albedo and displacement texture maps. At synthesis, we use these maps to produce wrinkles even for expressions not represented in the source scans. Additionally, to provide a more nuanced indicator of model performance under deformations resulting from compressed expressions, we introduce the 300W-winks evaluation subset and the Pexels dataset of closed eyes and winks.
summary: Recent advances in synthesizing realistic faces have shown that synthetic training data can replace real data for various face-related computer vision tasks. A question arises: how important is realism? Is the pursuit of photorealism excessive? In this work, we show otherwise. We boost the realism of our synthetic faces by introducing dynamic skin wrinkles in response to facial expressions and observe significant performance improvements in downstream computer vision tasks. Previous approaches for producing such wrinkles either required prohibitive artist effort to scale across identities and expressions or were not capable of reconstructing high-frequency skin details with sufficient fidelity. Our key contribution is an approach that produces realistic wrinkles across a large and diverse population of digital humans. Concretely, we formalize the concept of mesh-tension and use it to aggregate possible wrinkles from high-quality expression scans into albedo and displacement texture maps. At synthesis, we use these maps to produce wrinkles even for expressions not represented in the source scans. Additionally, to provide a more nuanced indicator of model performance under deformations resulting from compressed expressions, we introduce the 300W-winks evaluation subset and the Pexels dataset of closed eyes and winks.
abstract_zh: 合成真实人脸的最新进展表明，合成训练数据可以替代真实数据来完成各种与人脸相关的计算机视觉任务。出现一个问题：现实主义有多重要？追求真实感是否过度？在这项工作中，我们展示了不同的情况。我们通过引入响应面部表情的动态皮肤皱纹来提高合成面部的真实感，并观察下游计算机视觉任务的显着性能改进。以前产生此类皱纹的方法要么需要艺术家付出巨大的努力来扩展身份和表情，要么无法以足够的保真度重建高频皮肤细节。我们的主要贡献是一种能够在大量不同的数字人类群体中产生真实皱纹的方法。具体来说，我们形式化了网格张力的概念，并用它来将高质量表情扫描中可能的皱纹聚合成反照率和位移纹理图。在合成时，我们使用这些贴图来产生皱纹，即使对于源扫描中未表示的表达也是如此。此外，为了在压缩表达式导致的变形下提供更细致的模型性能指标，我们引入了 300W-winks 评估子集和闭眼和眨眼的 Pexels 数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于网格张力和表情驱动的合成面部皱纹生成方法，通过动态皱纹提升合成人脸的真实感。
AI.motivation: 质疑高保真合成是否必要，指出现有皱纹生成方法存在人工成本高或细节还原不足的问题，需改进以提升计算机视觉任务性能。
AI.method: 提出网格张力概念，从高质量表情扫描中生成法线与位移纹理图，并用于合成新表情的皱纹；构建300W-winks和Pexels数据集评估模型。
AI.result: 合成皱纹显著提升下游视觉任务性能，验证了方法在多样化数字人类中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态皱纹生成对提升合成人脸应用价值具有重要意义，所提方法在效率与效果间取得平衡。

authors_text: Katharina Weitz,Chi Tai Dang,Elisabeth André
title: Do We Need Explainable AI in Companies? Investigation of Challenges, Expectations, and Chances from Employees' Perspective
title_zh: Do We Need Explainable AI in Companies?从员工的角度调查挑战、期望和机会
abstract: Companies' adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly becoming an essential element of business success. However, using AI poses new requirements for companies and their employees, including transparency and comprehensibility of AI systems. The field of Explainable AI (XAI) aims to address these issues. Yet, the current research primarily consists of laboratory studies, and there is a need to improve the applicability of the findings to real-world situations. Therefore, this project report paper provides insights into employees' needs and attitudes towards (X)AI. For this, we investigate employees' perspectives on (X)AI. Our findings suggest that AI and XAI are well-known terms perceived as important for employees. This recognition is a critical first step for XAI to potentially drive successful usage of AI by providing comprehensible insights into AI technologies. In a lessons-learned section, we discuss the open questions identified and suggest future research directions to develop human-centered XAI designs for companies. By providing insights into employees' needs and attitudes towards (X)AI, our project report contributes to the development of XAI solutions that meet the requirements of companies and their employees, ultimately driving the successful adoption of AI technologies in the business context.
summary: Companies' adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly becoming an essential element of business success. However, using AI poses new requirements for companies and their employees, including transparency and comprehensibility of AI systems. The field of Explainable AI (XAI) aims to address these issues. Yet, the current research primarily consists of laboratory studies, and there is a need to improve the applicability of the findings to real-world situations. Therefore, this project report paper provides insights into employees' needs and attitudes towards (X)AI. For this, we investigate employees' perspectives on (X)AI. Our findings suggest that AI and XAI are well-known terms perceived as important for employees. This recognition is a critical first step for XAI to potentially drive successful usage of AI by providing comprehensible insights into AI technologies. In a lessons-learned section, we discuss the open questions identified and suggest future research directions to develop human-centered XAI designs for companies. By providing insights into employees' needs and attitudes towards (X)AI, our project report contributes to the development of XAI solutions that meet the requirements of companies and their employees, ultimately driving the successful adoption of AI technologies in the business context.
abstract_zh: 公司对人工智能 (AI) 的采用日益成为商业成功的重要因素。然而，使用人工智能对公司及其员工提出了新的要求，包括人工智能系统的透明度和可理解性。可解释人工智能（XAI）领域旨在解决这些问题。然而，目前的研究主要由实验室研究组成，需要提高研究结果对现实世界情况的适用性。因此，本项目报告深入了解了员工对 (X)AI 的需求和态度。为此，我们调查了员工对 (X)AI 的看法。我们的研究结果表明，AI 和 XAI 是众所周知的术语，被认为对员工很重要。这一认可是 XAI 通过提供对人工智能技术的全面见解来潜在推动人工智能成功使用的关键第一步。在经验教训部分，我们讨论了已确定的开放性问题，并提出了为公司开发以人为本的 XAI 设计的未来研究方向。通过深入了解员工对 (X)AI 的需求和态度，我们的项目报告有助于开发满足公司及其员工要求的 XAI 解决方案，最终推动人工智能技术在业务环境中的成功采用。

AI.tldr: 本文从员工视角探讨企业中可解释人工智能（XAI）的必要性，分析其面临的挑战、期望及应用机会。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI研究多基于实验室环境，缺乏对实际企业场景中员工需求与态度的深入理解，需通过实证研究提升XAI的实用性。
AI.method: 通过调查员工对AI及XAI的认知、需求及态度，结合实际案例分析，总结关键问题与改进方向。
AI.result: 员工普遍认可AI与XAI的重要性，但存在技术透明度、信任度及应用场景适配性等挑战，需进一步优化XAI设计。
AI.conclusion: 需以员工需求为导向，开发更符合企业实际的人本化XAI方案，以推动AI技术在商业场景中的成功落地。

motivation: 当前XAI研究多基于实验室环境，缺乏对实际企业场景中员工需求与态度的深入理解，需通过实证研究提升XAI的实用性。
method: 通过调查员工对AI及XAI的认知、需求及态度，结合实际案例分析，总结关键问题与改进方向。
result: 员工普遍认可AI与XAI的重要性，但存在技术透明度、信任度及应用场景适配性等挑战，需进一步优化XAI设计。
conclusion: 需以员工需求为导向，开发更符合企业实际的人本化XAI方案，以推动AI技术在商业场景中的成功落地。
search_text: Do We Need Explainable AI in Companies? Investigation of Challenges, Expectations, and Chances from Employees' Perspective Do We Need Explainable AI in Companies?从员工的角度调查挑战、期望和机会 Companies' adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) is increasingly becoming an essential element of business success. However, using AI poses new requirements for companies and their employees, including transparency and comprehensibility of AI systems. The field of Explainable AI (XAI) aims to address these issues. Yet, the current research primarily consists of laboratory studies, and there is a need to improve the applicability of the findings to real-world situations. Therefore, this project report paper provides insights into employees' needs and attitudes towards (X)AI. For this, we investigate employees' perspectives on (X)AI. Our findings suggest that AI and XAI are well-known terms perceived as important for employees. This recognition is a critical first step for XAI to potentially drive successful usage of AI by providing comprehensible insights into AI technologies. In a lessons-learned section, we discuss the open questions identified and suggest future research directions to develop human-centered XAI designs for companies. By providing insights into employees' needs and attitudes towards (X)AI, our project report contributes to the development of XAI solutions that meet the requirements of companies and their employees, ultimately driving the successful adoption of AI technologies in the business context. 公司对人工智能 (AI) 的采用日益成为商业成功的重要因素。然而，使用人工智能对公司及其员工提出了新的要求，包括人工智能系统的透明度和可理解性。可解释人工智能（XAI）领域旨在解决这些问题。然而，目前的研究主要由实验室研究组成，需要提高研究结果对现实世界情况的适用性。因此，本项目报告深入了解了员工对 (X)AI 的需求和态度。为此，我们调查了员工对 (X)AI 的看法。我们的研究结果表明，AI 和 XAI 是众所周知的术语，被认为对员工很重要。这一认可是 XAI 通过提供对人工智能技术的全面见解来潜在推动人工智能成功使用的关键第一步。在经验教训部分，我们讨论了已确定的开放性问题，并提出了为公司开发以人为本的 XAI 设计的未来研究方向。通过深入了解员工对 (X)AI 的需求和态度，我们的项目报告有助于开发满足公司及其员工要求的 XAI 解决方案，最终推动人工智能技术在业务环境中的成功采用。 本文从员工视角探讨企业中可解释人工智能（XAI）的必要性，分析其面临的挑战、期望及应用机会。 Katharina Weitz,Chi Tai Dang,Elisabeth André cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Sajib Kumar Saha Joy,Farzad Ahmed,Al Hasib Mahamud,Nibir Chandra Mandal
title: An Empirical Study on How the Developers Discussed about Pandas Topics
title_zh: 开发者如何讨论 Pandas 话题的实证研究
abstract: Pandas is defined as a software library which is used for data analysis in Python programming language. As pandas is a fast, easy and open source data analysis tool, it is rapidly used in different software engineering projects like software development, machine learning, computer vision, natural language processing, robotics, and others. So a huge interests are shown in software developers regarding pandas and a huge number of discussions are now becoming dominant in online developer forums, like Stack Overflow (SO). Such discussions can help to understand the popularity of pandas library and also can help to understand the importance, prevalence, difficulties of pandas topics. The main aim of this research paper is to find the popularity and difficulty of pandas topics. For this regard, SO posts are collected which are related to pandas topic discussions. Topic modeling are done on the textual contents of the posts. We found 26 topics which we further categorized into 5 board categories. We observed that developers discuss variety of pandas topics in SO related to error and excepting handling, visualization, External support, dataframe, and optimization. In addition, a trend chart is generated according to the discussion of topics in a predefined time series. The finding of this paper can provide a path to help the developers, educators and learners. For example, beginner developers can learn most important topics in pandas which are essential for develop any model. Educators can understand the topics which seem hard to learners and can build different tutorials which can make that pandas topic understandable. From this empirical study it is possible to understand the preferences of developers in pandas topic by processing their SO posts

For example, beginner developers can learn most important topics in pandas which are essential for develop any model. From this empirical study it is possible to understand the preferences of developers in pandas topic by processing their SO posts
abstract_zh: Pandas被定义为一个用Python编程语言进行数据分析的软件库。由于 pandas 是一种快速、简单且开源的数据分析工具，因此它被迅速应用于不同的软件工程项目，如软件开发、机器学习、计算机视觉、自然语言处理、机器人等。因此，软件开发人员对 pandas 表现出了巨大的兴趣，并且大量讨论现在在 Stack Overflow（SO）等在线开发人员论坛中占据主导地位。这样的讨论可以帮助了解 pandas 库的受欢迎程度，也可以帮助了解 pandas 主题的重要性、普遍性、难点。本研究论文的主要目的是找出 pandas 主题的受欢迎程度和难度。为此，收集了与 pandas 主题讨论相关的 SO 帖子。主题建模是根据帖子的文本内容完成的。我们找到了 26 个主题，并进一步将其分为 5 个板块类别。我们观察到开发人员在 SO 中讨论与错误和异常处理、可视化、外部支持、数据框架和优化相关的各种 pandas 主题。此外，根据预定义时间序列中的主题讨论生成趋势图。本文的发现可以为开发者、教育者和学习者提供帮助。例如，初学者开发人员可以学习 pandas 中最重要的主题，这对于开发任何模型都至关重要。教育工作者可以理解对学习者来说似乎很难的主题，并且可以构建不同的教程，使 pandas 主题易于理解。从这个实证研究中，可以通过处理开发人员的 SO 帖子来了解开发人员对 pandas 主题的偏好

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析Stack Overflow上与pandas相关的讨论，研究其主题的流行度和难度。
AI.motivation: pandas作为Python数据分析工具被广泛应用，但开发者在使用中遇到的困难和讨论趋势尚不明确，需通过分析讨论数据提供指导。
AI.method: 收集Stack Overflow相关帖子，通过主题建模提取26个主题并归类为5大类，结合时间序列趋势分析讨论热度。
AI.result: 识别出5类主要讨论主题（错误处理、可视化、外部支持、DataFrame、优化），并发现不同主题的讨论趋势变化。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果可帮助开发者优先学习关键主题，教育者优化教学内容，同时揭示pandas库的使用偏好与挑战。

authors_text: Mariia Zameshina,Olivier Teytaud,Fabien Teytaud,Vlad Hosu,Nathanael Carraz,Laurent Najman,Markus Wagner
title: Fairness in generative modeling
title_zh: 生成模型的公平性
comment: ef:GECCO '22: Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference, Jul 2022, Boston Massachusetts, France. pp.320-323
comments: ef:GECCO '22: Genetic and Evolutionary Computation Conference, Jul 2022, Boston Massachusetts, France. pp.320-323
abstract: We design general-purpose algorithms for addressing fairness issues and mode collapse in generative modeling. More precisely, to design fair algorithms for as many sensitive variables as possible, including variables we might not be aware of, we assume no prior knowledge of sensitive variables: our algorithms use unsupervised fairness only, meaning no information related to the sensitive variables is used for our fairness-improving methods. All images of faces (even generated ones) have been removed to mitigate legal risks.
summary: We design general-purpose algorithms for addressing fairness issues and mode collapse in generative modeling. More precisely, to design fair algorithms for as many sensitive variables as possible, including variables we might not be aware of, we assume no prior knowledge of sensitive variables: our algorithms use unsupervised fairness only, meaning no information related to the sensitive variables is used for our fairness-improving methods. All images of faces (even generated ones) have been removed to mitigate legal risks.
abstract_zh: 我们设计通用算法来解决生成建模中的公平问题和模式崩溃。更准确地说，为了为尽可能多的敏感变量（包括我们可能不知道的变量）设计公平算法，我们假设没有敏感变量的先验知识：我们的算法仅使用无监督公平性，这意味着与敏感变量相关的信息不会用于我们的公平性改进方法。所有人脸图像（甚至是生成的图像）​​都已被删除，以降低法律风险。

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一种通用算法，用于解决生成模型中的公平性和模式崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: 本文的动机是设计一种能够处理尽可能多的敏感变量（包括可能未被意识到的变量）的公平算法，同时避免使用与敏感变量相关的信息。
AI.method: 本文采用无监督公平方法，即不使用任何与敏感变量相关的信息来改进公平性。
AI.result: 本文提出了一种新的算法，可以在不依赖敏感变量信息的情况下提升生成模型的公平性，并减少模式崩溃问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文展示了如何在不依赖敏感变量信息的前提下，设计出通用的生成模型公平性算法，为未来研究提供了新的方向。

authors_text: Felix Chalumeau,Raphael Boige,Bryan Lim,Valentin Macé,Maxime Allard,Arthur Flajolet,Antoine Cully,Thomas Pierrot
title: Neuroevolution is a Competitive Alternative to Reinforcement Learning for Skill Discovery
title_zh: 神经进化是用于技能发现的强化学习的竞争性替代方案
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for training neural policies to solve complex control tasks. However, these policies tend to be overfit to the exact specifications of the task and environment they were trained on, and thus do not perform well when conditions deviate slightly or when composed hierarchically to solve even more complex tasks. Recent work has shown that training a mixture of policies, as opposed to a single one, that are driven to explore different regions of the state-action space can address this shortcoming by generating a diverse set of behaviors, referred to as skills, that can be collectively used to great effect in adaptation tasks or for hierarchical planning. This is typically realized by including a diversity term - often derived from information theory - in the objective function optimized by RL. However these approaches often require careful hyperparameter tuning to be effective. In this work, we demonstrate that less widely-used neuroevolution methods, specifically Quality Diversity (QD), are a competitive alternative to information-theory-augmented RL for skill discovery. Through an extensive empirical evaluation comparing eight state-of-the-art algorithms (four flagship algorithms from each line of work) on the basis of (i) metrics directly evaluating the skills' diversity, (ii) the skills' performance on adaptation tasks, and (iii) the skills' performance when used as primitives for hierarchical planning; QD methods are found to provide equal, and sometimes improved, performance whilst being less sensitive to hyperparameters and more scalable. As no single method is found to provide near-optimal performance across all environments, there is a rich scope for further research which we support by proposing future directions and providing optimized open-source implementations.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for training neural policies to solve complex control tasks. However, these policies tend to be overfit to the exact specifications of the task and environment they were trained on, and thus do not perform well when conditions deviate slightly or when composed hierarchically to solve even more complex tasks. Recent work has shown that training a mixture of policies, as opposed to a single one, that are driven to explore different regions of the state-action space can address this shortcoming by generating a diverse set of behaviors, referred to as skills, that can be collectively used to great effect in adaptation tasks or for hierarchical planning. This is typically realized by including a diversity term - often derived from information theory - in the objective function optimized by RL. However these approaches often require careful hyperparameter tuning to be effective. In this work, we demonstrate that less widely-used neuroevolution methods, specifically Quality Diversity (QD), are a competitive alternative to information-theory-augmented RL for skill discovery. Through an extensive empirical evaluation comparing eight state-of-the-art algorithms (four flagship algorithms from each line of work) on the basis of (i) metrics directly evaluating the skills' diversity, (ii) the skills' performance on adaptation tasks, and (iii) the skills' performance when used as primitives for hierarchical planning; QD methods are found to provide equal, and sometimes improved, performance whilst being less sensitive to hyperparameters and more scalable. As no single method is found to provide near-optimal performance across all environments, there is a rich scope for further research which we support by proposing future directions and providing optimized open-source implementations.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习 (RL) 已成为训练神经策略以解决复杂控制任务的强大范例。然而，这些策略往往过于适合其所训练的任务和环境的具体规范，因此当条件略有偏差或分层组合以解决更复杂的任务时，它们的表现不佳。最近的研究表明，训练混合政策（而不是单一政策）来探索国家行动空间的不同区域，可以通过生成一组不同的行为（称为技能）来解决这一缺陷，这些行为可以共同用于适应任务或分层规划中，从而发挥巨大作用。这通常是通过在强化学习优化的目标函数中包含多样性项（通常源自信息论）来实现的。然而，这些方法通常需要仔细的超参数调整才能有效。在这项工作中，我们证明了不太广泛使用的神经进化方法，特别是质量多样性（QD），是用于技能发现的信息论增强强化学习的有竞争力的替代方案。通过广泛的实证评估，比较八种最先进的算法（每个工作领域的四种旗舰算法），基于（i）直接评估技能多样性的指标，（ii）技能在适应任务上的表现，以及（iii）用作分层规划基元时的技能表现；我们发现 QD 方法可以提供相同的、有时甚至是改进的性能，同时对超参数不太敏感并且更具可扩展性。由于没有找到一种方法可以在所有环境中提供接近最佳的性能，因此进一步研究的范围很广，我们通过提出未来方向和提供优化的开源实现来支持这些研究。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了神经进化方法（特别是质量多样性QD）与信息论增强的强化学习在技能发现中的表现，验证QD作为替代方案的竞争力。
AI.motivation: 深度强化学习策略易过拟合任务环境，且在条件变化或分层任务中表现不佳。现有方法依赖信息论多样性项但需精细调参，亟需更鲁棒的替代方案。
AI.method: 通过实验对比八种前沿算法（每类各四款），从技能多样性、适应性任务表现及分层规划效能三个维度进行评估。
AI.result: QD方法在技能多样性与任务适应性上表现与RL相当或更优，且对超参数更鲁棒、可扩展性更强，但无单一方法在所有环境中均最优。
AI.conclusion: QD是技能发现的有效替代方案，未来需探索方法组合与优化，作者已提供开源实现以推动研究。
