search_text: Neuroevolution is a Competitive Alternative to Reinforcement Learning for Skill Discovery 神经进化是用于技能发现的强化学习的竞争性替代方案 Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for training neural policies to solve complex control tasks. However, these policies tend to be overfit to the exact specifications of the task and environment they were trained on, and thus do not perform well when conditions deviate slightly or when composed hierarchically to solve even more complex tasks. Recent work has shown that training a mixture of policies, as opposed to a single one, that are driven to explore different regions of the state-action space can address this shortcoming by generating a diverse set of behaviors, referred to as skills, that can be collectively used to great effect in adaptation tasks or for hierarchical planning. This is typically realized by including a diversity term - often derived from information theory - in the objective function optimized by RL. However these approaches often require careful hyperparameter tuning to be effective. In this work, we demonstrate that less widely-used neuroevolution methods, specifically Quality Diversity (QD), are a competitive alternative to information-theory-augmented RL for skill discovery. Through an extensive empirical evaluation comparing eight state-of-the-art algorithms (four flagship algorithms from each line of work) on the basis of (i) metrics directly evaluating the skills' diversity, (ii) the skills' performance on adaptation tasks, and (iii) the skills' performance when used as primitives for hierarchical planning; QD methods are found to provide equal, and sometimes improved, performance whilst being less sensitive to hyperparameters and more scalable. As no single method is found to provide near-optimal performance across all environments, there is a rich scope for further research which we support by proposing future directions and providing optimized open-source implementations. 深度强化学习 (RL) 已成为训练神经策略以解决复杂控制任务的强大范例。然而，这些策略往往过于适合其所训练的任务和环境的具体规范，因此当条件略有偏差或分层组合以解决更复杂的任务时，它们的表现不佳。最近的研究表明，训练混合政策（而不是单一政策）来探索国家行动空间的不同区域，可以通过生成一组不同的行为（称为技能）来解决这一缺陷，这些行为可以共同用于适应任务或分层规划中，从而发挥巨大作用。这通常是通过在强化学习优化的目标函数中包含多样性项（通常源自信息论）来实现的。然而，这些方法通常需要仔细的超参数调整才能有效。在这项工作中，我们证明了不太广泛使用的神经进化方法，特别是质量多样性（QD），是用于技能发现的信息论增强强化学习的有竞争力的替代方案。通过广泛的实证评估，比较八种最先进的算法（每个工作领域的四种旗舰算法），基于（i）直接评估技能多样性的指标，（ii）技能在适应任务上的表现，以及（iii）用作分层规划基元时的技能表现；我们发现 QD 方法可以提供相同的、有时甚至是改进的性能，同时对超参数不太敏感并且更具可扩展性。由于没有找到一种方法可以在所有环境中提供接近最佳的性能，因此进一步研究的范围很广，我们通过提出未来方向和提供优化的开源实现来支持这些研究。 本文比较了神经进化方法（特别是质量多样性QD）与信息论增强的强化学习在技能发现中的表现，验证QD作为替代方案的竞争力。 Felix Chalumeau,Raphael Boige,Bryan Lim,Valentin Macé,Maxime Allard,Arthur Flajolet,Antoine Cully,Thomas Pierrot cs.NE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Alexander Henkes,Jason K. Eshraghian,Henning Wessels
title: Spiking neural networks for nonlinear regression
title_zh: 用于非线性回归的尖峰神经网络
abstract: Spiking neural networks, also often referred to as the third generation of neural networks, carry the potential for a massive reduction in memory and energy consumption over traditional, second-generation neural networks. Inspired by the undisputed efficiency of the human brain, they introduce temporal and neuronal sparsity, which can be exploited by next-generation neuromorphic hardware. To open the pathway toward engineering applications, we introduce this exciting technology in the context of continuum mechanics. However, the nature of spiking neural networks poses a challenge for regression problems, which frequently arise in the modeling of engineering sciences. To overcome this problem, a framework for regression using spiking neural networks is proposed. In particular, a network topology for decoding binary spike trains to real numbers is introduced, utilizing the membrane potential of spiking neurons. As the aim of this contribution is a concise introduction to this new methodology, several different spiking neural architectures, ranging from simple spiking feed-forward to complex spiking long short-term memory neural networks, are derived. Several numerical experiments directed towards regression of linear and nonlinear, history-dependent material models are carried out. A direct comparison with counterparts of traditional neural networks shows that the proposed framework is much more efficient while retaining precision and generalizability. All code has been made publicly available in the interest of reproducibility and to promote continued enhancement in this new domain.
summary: Spiking neural networks, also often referred to as the third generation of neural networks, carry the potential for a massive reduction in memory and energy consumption over traditional, second-generation neural networks. Inspired by the undisputed efficiency of the human brain, they introduce temporal and neuronal sparsity, which can be exploited by next-generation neuromorphic hardware. To open the pathway toward engineering applications, we introduce this exciting technology in the context of continuum mechanics. However, the nature of spiking neural networks poses a challenge for regression problems, which frequently arise in the modeling of engineering sciences. To overcome this problem, a framework for regression using spiking neural networks is proposed. In particular, a network topology for decoding binary spike trains to real numbers is introduced, utilizing the membrane potential of spiking neurons. As the aim of this contribution is a concise introduction to this new methodology, several different spiking neural architectures, ranging from simple spiking feed-forward to complex spiking long short-term memory neural networks, are derived. Several numerical experiments directed towards regression of linear and nonlinear, history-dependent material models are carried out. A direct comparison with counterparts of traditional neural networks shows that the proposed framework is much more efficient while retaining precision and generalizability. All code has been made publicly available in the interest of reproducibility and to promote continued enhancement in this new domain.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络通常也被称为第三代神经网络，与传统的第二代神经网络相比，它具有大幅减少内存和能耗的潜力。受到人脑无可争议的效率的启发，他们引入了时间和神经元稀疏性，下一代神经形态硬件可以利用这一点。为了打开工程应用的道路，我们在连续介质力学的背景下引入了这项令人兴奋的技术。然而，尖峰神经网络的性质对工程科学建模中经常出现的回归问题提出了挑战。为了克服这个问题，提出了一种使用尖峰神经网络进行回归的框架。特别是，引入了一种利用尖峰神经元的膜电位将二进制尖峰序列解码为实数的网络拓扑。由于本贡献的目的是简要介绍这种新方法，因此衍生了几种不同的尖峰神经架构，从简单的尖峰前馈到复杂的尖峰长短期记忆神经网络。进行了一些针对线性和非线性、历史相关材料模型回归的数值实验。与传统神经网络的直接比较表明，所提出的框架在保持精度和通用性的同时更加高效。所有代码均已公开，以确保可重复性并促进这一新领域的持续增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于脉冲神经网络的非线性回归框架，通过解码二进制脉冲序列实现对连续值的预测，并验证其在工程材料模型回归中的有效性。
AI.motivation: 脉冲神经网络具有低能耗和高效率的优势，但其在回归问题中的应用尚未充分探索，尤其在工程科学中存在大量非线性回归需求，需开发适配的框架以推动实际应用。
AI.method: 设计了利用脉冲神经元膜电位将二进制脉冲序列解码为实数的网络结构，涵盖从简单前馈网络到复杂LSTM的多种架构，并通过数值实验对比传统神经网络的性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在保持精度和泛化能力的同时，显著优于传统神经网络，且代码已开源以促进后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 脉冲神经网络为工程领域的非线性回归问题提供了高效解决方案，其架构灵活性和能效优势为未来神经形态硬件应用奠定了基础。

authors_text: Joe Watson,Jan Peters
title: Inferring Smooth Control: Monte Carlo Posterior Policy Iteration with Gaussian Processes
title_zh: 推断平滑控制：使用高斯过程的蒙特卡洛后验策略迭代
comment: 43 pages, 37 figures. Conference on Robot Learning 2022
comments: 43 pages, 37 figures. Conference on Robot Learning 2022
abstract: Monte Carlo methods have become increasingly relevant for control of non-differentiable systems, approximate dynamics models and learning from data. These methods scale to high-dimensional spaces and are effective at the non-convex optimizations often seen in robot learning. We look at sample-based methods from the perspective of inference-based control, specifically posterior policy iteration. From this perspective, we highlight how Gaussian noise priors produce rough control actions that are unsuitable for physical robot deployment. Considering smoother Gaussian process priors, as used in episodic reinforcement learning and motion planning, we demonstrate how smoother model predictive control can be achieved using online sequential inference. This inference is realized through an efficient factorization of the action distribution and a novel means of optimizing the likelihood temperature to improve importance sampling accuracy. We evaluate this approach on several high-dimensional robot control tasks, matching the sample efficiency of prior heuristic methods while also ensuring smoothness. Simulation results can be seen at https://monte-carlo-ppi.github.io/.
summary: Monte Carlo methods have become increasingly relevant for control of non-differentiable systems, approximate dynamics models and learning from data. These methods scale to high-dimensional spaces and are effective at the non-convex optimizations often seen in robot learning. We look at sample-based methods from the perspective of inference-based control, specifically posterior policy iteration. From this perspective, we highlight how Gaussian noise priors produce rough control actions that are unsuitable for physical robot deployment. Considering smoother Gaussian process priors, as used in episodic reinforcement learning and motion planning, we demonstrate how smoother model predictive control can be achieved using online sequential inference. This inference is realized through an efficient factorization of the action distribution and a novel means of optimizing the likelihood temperature to improve importance sampling accuracy. We evaluate this approach on several high-dimensional robot control tasks, matching the sample efficiency of prior heuristic methods while also ensuring smoothness. Simulation results can be seen at https://monte-carlo-ppi.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 蒙特卡罗方法对于不可微分系统的控制、近似动力学模型和数据学习变得越来越重要。这些方法可扩展到高维空间，并且对于机器人学习中常见的非凸优化非常有效。我们从基于推理的控制的角度来看待基于样本的方法，特别是后验策略迭代。从这个角度来看，我们强调高斯噪声先验如何产生不适合物理机器人部署的粗略控制动作。考虑到情景强化学习和运动规划中使用的更平滑的高斯过程先验，我们演示了如何使用在线顺序推理来实现更平滑的模型预测控制。这一推论是通过对动作分布进行有效分解以及优化似然温度以提高重要性采样精度的新颖方法来实现的。我们在几个高维机器人控制任务上评估了这种方法，匹配先前启发式方法的样本效率，同时确保平滑性。仿真结果可见https://monte-carlo-ppi.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于蒙特卡洛后验策略迭代和高斯过程的平滑控制方法，用于解决高维机器人控制任务。
AI.motivation: 传统的基于蒙特卡洛的方法在非微分系统中表现良好，但其控制动作粗糙，不适合实际机器人部署。本文旨在通过引入更平滑的高斯过程先验来提高控制的平滑性。
AI.method: 本文采用后验策略迭代方法，并结合高斯过程先验，通过在线顺序推理实现更平滑的模型预测控制。方法中包括对动作分布的高效分解和对似然温度的优化以提高重要性采样的准确性。
AI.result: 该方法在多个高维机器人控制任务中展示了与先前启发式方法相当的样本效率，同时确保了控制动作的平滑性。
AI.conclusion: 引入高斯过程先验的蒙特卡洛后验策略迭代方法可以有效提高机器人控制的平滑性，适用于高维和非凸优化任务。

search_text: Inferring Smooth Control: Monte Carlo Posterior Policy Iteration with Gaussian Processes 推断平滑控制：使用高斯过程的蒙特卡洛后验策略迭代 Monte Carlo methods have become increasingly relevant for control of non-differentiable systems, approximate dynamics models and learning from data. These methods scale to high-dimensional spaces and are effective at the non-convex optimizations often seen in robot learning. We look at sample-based methods from the perspective of inference-based control, specifically posterior policy iteration. From this perspective, we highlight how Gaussian noise priors produce rough control actions that are unsuitable for physical robot deployment. Considering smoother Gaussian process priors, as used in episodic reinforcement learning and motion planning, we demonstrate how smoother model predictive control can be achieved using online sequential inference. This inference is realized through an efficient factorization of the action distribution and a novel means of optimizing the likelihood temperature to improve importance sampling accuracy. We evaluate this approach on several high-dimensional robot control tasks, matching the sample efficiency of prior heuristic methods while also ensuring smoothness. Simulation results can be seen at https://monte-carlo-ppi.github.io/. 蒙特卡罗方法对于不可微分系统的控制、近似动力学模型和数据学习变得越来越重要。这些方法可扩展到高维空间，并且对于机器人学习中常见的非凸优化非常有效。我们从基于推理的控制的角度来看待基于样本的方法，特别是后验策略迭代。从这个角度来看，我们强调高斯噪声先验如何产生不适合物理机器人部署的粗略控制动作。考虑到情景强化学习和运动规划中使用的更平滑的高斯过程先验，我们演示了如何使用在线顺序推理来实现更平滑的模型预测控制。这一推论是通过对动作分布进行有效分解以及优化似然温度以提高重要性采样精度的新颖方法来实现的。我们在几个高维机器人控制任务上评估了这种方法，匹配先前启发式方法的样本效率，同时确保平滑性。仿真结果可见https://monte-carlo-ppi.github.io/。 本文提出了一种基于蒙特卡洛后验策略迭代和高斯过程的平滑控制方法，用于解决高维机器人控制任务。 Joe Watson,Jan Peters cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Chen Liu,Michael Fischer,Tobias Ritschel
title: Learning to Learn and Sample BRDFs
title_zh: 学习如何学习和采样 BRDF
comment: Accepted to Eurographics 2023; Project Page at https://ryushinn.github.io/metasampling
comments: Accepted to Eurographics 2023; Project Page at https://ryushinn.github.io/metasampling
abstract: We propose a method to accelerate the joint process of physically acquiring and learning neural Bi-directional Reflectance Distribution Function (BRDF) models. While BRDF learning alone can be accelerated by meta-learning, acquisition remains slow as it relies on a mechanical process. We show that meta-learning can be extended to optimize the physical sampling pattern, too. After our method has been meta-trained for a set of fully-sampled BRDFs, it is able to quickly train on new BRDFs with up to five orders of magnitude fewer physical acquisition samples at similar quality. Our approach also extends to other linear and non-linear BRDF models, which we show in an extensive evaluation.
summary: We propose a method to accelerate the joint process of physically acquiring and learning neural Bi-directional Reflectance Distribution Function (BRDF) models. While BRDF learning alone can be accelerated by meta-learning, acquisition remains slow as it relies on a mechanical process. We show that meta-learning can be extended to optimize the physical sampling pattern, too. After our method has been meta-trained for a set of fully-sampled BRDFs, it is able to quickly train on new BRDFs with up to five orders of magnitude fewer physical acquisition samples at similar quality. Our approach also extends to other linear and non-linear BRDF models, which we show in an extensive evaluation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种加速物理获取和学习神经双向反射分布函数（BRDF）模型的联合过程的方法。虽然元学习可以单独加速 BRDF 学习，但由于它依赖于机械过程，学习仍然很慢。我们证明元学习也可以扩展以优化物理采样模式。在我们的方法针对一组完全采样的 BRDF 进行元训练后，它能够在类似质量的情况下快速训练新的 BRDF，物理采集样本数量减少多达五个数量级。我们的方法还扩展到其他线性和非线性 BRDF 模型，我们在广泛的评估中对此进行了展示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合元学习与物理采样的方法，加速神经双向反射分布函数（BRDF）模型的物理获取与学习过程。
AI.motivation: 传统BRDF学习虽可通过元学习加速，但物理采样依赖机械过程效率低下，亟需优化采样策略以减少实验次数。
AI.method: 通过元学习优化物理采样模式，在元训练阶段学习通用采样规律，使新BRDF训练时可减少至原样本量的百万分之一。
AI.result: 在保持相似质量的前提下，新BRDF训练样本量减少5个数量级，并验证了方法对多种线性与非线性BRDF模型的普适性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过元学习统一优化采样与学习过程，显著提升BRDF建模效率，为物理感知任务提供通用加速框架。

authors_text: Katharina Weitz,Alexander Zellner,Elisabeth André
title: What Do End-Users Really Want? Investigation of Human-Centered XAI for Mobile Health Apps
title_zh: 最终用户真正想要什么？针对移动健康应用程序以人为本的 XAI 的研究
abstract: In healthcare, AI systems support clinicians and patients in diagnosis, treatment, and monitoring, but many systems' poor explainability remains challenging for practical application. Overcoming this barrier is the goal of explainable AI (XAI). However, an explanation can be perceived differently and, thus, not solve the black-box problem for everyone. The domain of Human-Centered AI deals with this problem by adapting AI to users. We present a user-centered persona concept to evaluate XAI and use it to investigate end-users preferences for various explanation styles and contents in a mobile health stress monitoring application. The results of our online survey show that users' demographics and personality, as well as the type of explanation, impact explanation preferences, indicating that these are essential features for XAI design. We subsumed the results in three prototypical user personas: power-, casual-, and privacy-oriented users. Our insights bring an interactive, human-centered XAI closer to practical application.
summary: In healthcare, AI systems support clinicians and patients in diagnosis, treatment, and monitoring, but many systems' poor explainability remains challenging for practical application. Overcoming this barrier is the goal of explainable AI (XAI). However, an explanation can be perceived differently and, thus, not solve the black-box problem for everyone. The domain of Human-Centered AI deals with this problem by adapting AI to users. We present a user-centered persona concept to evaluate XAI and use it to investigate end-users preferences for various explanation styles and contents in a mobile health stress monitoring application. The results of our online survey show that users' demographics and personality, as well as the type of explanation, impact explanation preferences, indicating that these are essential features for XAI design. We subsumed the results in three prototypical user personas: power-, casual-, and privacy-oriented users. Our insights bring an interactive, human-centered XAI closer to practical application.
abstract_zh: 在医疗保健领域，人工智能系统支持临床医生和患者进行诊断、治疗和监测，但许多系统的可解释性较差，这对实际应用来说仍然是一个挑战。克服这一障碍是可解释人工智能（XAI）的目标。然而，解释可能会有不同的理解，因此并不能解决每个人的黑匣子问题。以人为中心的人工智能领域通过使人工智能适应用户来解决这个问题。我们提出了一个以用户为中心的角色概念来评估 XAI，并用它来调查最终用户对移动健康压力监测应用程序中各种解释风格和内容的偏好。我们的在线调查结果表明，用户的人口统计和个性以及解释类型会影响解释偏好，表明这些是 XAI 设计的基本特征。我们将结果归入三个典型的用户角色：权力用户、休闲用户和隐私用户。我们的见解使交互式、以人为本的 XAI 更接近实际应用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究移动健康应用中用户对人性化可解释AI（XAI）的真实需求，通过调查分析不同用户群体对解释内容和形式的偏好。
AI.motivation: 现有AI系统在医疗领域存在可解释性不足的问题，导致实际应用受限，需通过人性化设计提升用户接受度。
AI.method: 提出用户中心的虚拟人物概念，结合在线调查分析用户对不同解释风格和内容的偏好，并归纳典型用户画像。
AI.result: 用户人口统计特征、性格类型及解释类型显著影响偏好，总结出权力导向型、随意型和隐私导向型三类典型用户。
AI.conclusion: 基于用户特征的差异化XAI设计能有效提升可解释性，推动交互式AI在医疗健康领域的实际应用。

The domain of Human-Centered AI deals with this problem by adapting AI to users. We present a user-centered persona concept to evaluate XAI and use it to investigate end-users preferences for various explanation styles and contents in a mobile health stress monitoring application. The results of our online survey show that users' demographics and personality, as well as the type of explanation, impact explanation preferences, indicating that these are essential features for XAI design. We subsumed the results in three prototypical user personas: power-, casual-, and privacy-oriented users. Our insights bring an interactive, human-centered XAI closer to practical application. 在医疗保健领域，人工智能系统支持临床医生和患者进行诊断、治疗和监测，但许多系统的可解释性较差，这对实际应用来说仍然是一个挑战。克服这一障碍是可解释人工智能（XAI）的目标。然而，解释可能会有不同的理解，因此并不能解决每个人的黑匣子问题。以人为中心的人工智能领域通过使人工智能适应用户来解决这个问题。我们提出了一个以用户为中心的角色概念来评估 XAI，并用它来调查最终用户对移动健康压力监测应用程序中各种解释风格和内容的偏好。我们的在线调查结果表明，用户的人口统计和个性以及解释类型会影响解释偏好，表明这些是 XAI 设计的基本特征。我们将结果归入三个典型的用户角色：权力用户、休闲用户和隐私用户。我们的见解使交互式、以人为本的 XAI 更接近实际应用。 本文研究移动健康应用中用户对人性化可解释AI（XAI）的真实需求，通过调查分析不同用户群体对解释内容和形式的偏好。 Katharina Weitz,Alexander Zellner,Elisabeth André cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Simon Flügel,Martin Glauer,Fabian Neuhaus,Janna Hastings
title: When one Logic is Not Enough: Integrating First-order Annotations in OWL Ontologies
title_zh: 当一个逻辑不够时：在 OWL 本体中集成一阶注释
abstract: In ontology development, there is a gap between domain ontologies which mostly use the web ontology language, OWL, and foundational ontologies written in first-order logic, FOL. To bridge this gap, we present Gavel, a tool that supports the development of heterogeneous 'FOWL' ontologies that extend OWL with FOL annotations, and is able to reason over the combined set of axioms. Since FOL annotations are stored in OWL annotations, FOWL ontologies remain compatible with the existing OWL infrastructure. We show that for the OWL domain ontology OBI, the stronger integration with its FOL top-level ontology BFO via our approach enables us to detect several inconsistencies. Furthermore, existing OWL ontologies can benefit from FOL annotations. We illustrate this with FOWL ontologies containing mereotopological axioms that enable new meaningful inferences. Finally, we show that even for large domain ontologies such as ChEBI, automatic reasoning with FOL annotations can be used to detect previously unnoticed errors in the classification.
summary: In ontology development, there is a gap between domain ontologies which mostly use the web ontology language, OWL, and foundational ontologies written in first-order logic, FOL. To bridge this gap, we present Gavel, a tool that supports the development of heterogeneous 'FOWL' ontologies that extend OWL with FOL annotations, and is able to reason over the combined set of axioms. Since FOL annotations are stored in OWL annotations, FOWL ontologies remain compatible with the existing OWL infrastructure. We show that for the OWL domain ontology OBI, the stronger integration with its FOL top-level ontology BFO via our approach enables us to detect several inconsistencies. Furthermore, existing OWL ontologies can benefit from FOL annotations. We illustrate this with FOWL ontologies containing mereotopological axioms that enable new meaningful inferences. Finally, we show that even for large domain ontologies such as ChEBI, automatic reasoning with FOL annotations can be used to detect previously unnoticed errors in the classification.
abstract_zh: 在本体开发中，主要使用网络本体语言（OWL）的领域本体与使用一阶逻辑（FOL）编写的基础本体之间存在差距。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 Gavel，这是一种支持异构“FOWL”本体开发的工具，该本体通过 FOL 注释扩展 OWL，并且能够对组合公理集进行推理。由于 FOL 注释存储在 OWL 注释中，因此 FOWL 本体仍然与现有 OWL 基础设施兼容。我们表明，对于 OWL 领域本体 OBI，通过我们的方法与其 FOL 顶级本体 BFO 的更强集成使我们能够检测到一些不一致之处。此外，现有的 OWL 本体可以从 FOL 注释中受益。我们用包含分体拓扑公理的 FOWL 本体来说明这一点，这些公理可以实现新的有意义的推论。最后，我们表明，即使对于 ChEBI 等大型领域本体，带有 FOL 注释的自动推理也可以用于检测以前未注意到的分类错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Gavel的工具，用于在OWL本体中集成一阶逻辑（FOL）注释，以解决领域本体与基础本体之间的逻辑鸿沟问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的OWL领域本体与基于一阶逻辑（FOL）的基础本体之间存在兼容性问题，导致推理能力受限且难以发现潜在不一致。
AI.method: 通过开发Gavel工具，将FOL注释以OWL注释形式存储，扩展OWL本体为异构的'FOWL'本体，并支持对组合公理的联合推理。
AI.result: 在OBI和ChEBI等大型本体中检测到先前未发现的分类错误，并通过mereotopological公理实现了新的有意义推理。
AI.conclusion: 集成FOL注释可增强OWL本体的推理能力，有效发现不一致并提升本体质量，为异构本体开发提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhuosheng Zhang,Aston Zhang,Mu Li,Alex Smola
title: Automatic Chain of Thought Prompting in Large Language Models
title_zh: 大型语言模型中的自动思维提示链
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can perform complex reasoning by generating intermediate reasoning steps. Providing these steps for prompting demonstrations is called chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting. CoT prompting has two major paradigms. One leverages a simple prompt like "Let's think step by step" to facilitate step-by-step thinking before answering a question. The other uses a few manual demonstrations one by one, each composed of a question and a reasoning chain that leads to an answer. The superior performance of the second paradigm hinges on the hand-crafting of task-specific demonstrations one by one. We show that such manual efforts may be eliminated by leveraging LLMs with the "Let's think step by step" prompt to generate reasoning chains for demonstrations one by one, i.e., let's think not just step by step, but also one by one. However, these generated chains often come with mistakes. To mitigate the effect of such mistakes, we find that diversity matters for automatically constructing demonstrations. We propose an automatic CoT prompting method: Auto-CoT. It samples questions with diversity and generates reasoning chains to construct demonstrations. On ten public benchmark reasoning tasks with GPT-3, Auto-CoT consistently matches or exceeds the performance of the CoT paradigm that requires manual designs of demonstrations. Code is available at https://github.com/amazon-research/auto-cot
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can perform complex reasoning by generating intermediate reasoning steps. Providing these steps for prompting demonstrations is called chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting. CoT prompting has two major paradigms. One leverages a simple prompt like "Let's think step by step" to facilitate step-by-step thinking before answering a question. The other uses a few manual demonstrations one by one, each composed of a question and a reasoning chain that leads to an answer. The superior performance of the second paradigm hinges on the hand-crafting of task-specific demonstrations one by one. We show that such manual efforts may be eliminated by leveraging LLMs with the "Let's think step by step" prompt to generate reasoning chains for demonstrations one by one, i.e., let's think not just step by step, but also one by one. However, these generated chains often come with mistakes. To mitigate the effect of such mistakes, we find that diversity matters for automatically constructing demonstrations. We propose an automatic CoT prompting method: Auto-CoT. It samples questions with diversity and generates reasoning chains to construct demonstrations. On ten public benchmark reasoning tasks with GPT-3, Auto-CoT consistently matches or exceeds the performance of the CoT paradigm that requires manual designs of demonstrations. Code is available at https://github.com/amazon-research/auto-cot
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）可以通过生成中间推理步骤来执行复杂的推理。提供这些提示演示的步骤称为思路链 (CoT) 提示。 CoT 提示有两个主要范例。在回答问题之前，可以利用“让我们逐步思考”这样的简单提示来促进逐步思考。另一种则使用一些手动演示，每个演示都由一个问题和一个导致答案的推理链组成。第二范式的卓越性能取决于逐一手工制作特定任务的演示。我们表明，通过利用法学硕士的“让我们一步一步思考”提示来生成用于演示的推理链，可以消除这种手动工作，即，让我们不仅一步一步地思考，而且一步一步地思考。然而，这些生成的链经常会出现错误。为了减轻此类错误的影响，我们发现多样性对于自动构建演示很重要。我们提出了一种自动CoT提示方法：Auto-CoT。它对多样性的问题进行采样，并生成推理链来构建演示。在使用 GPT-3 的十个公共基准推理任务中，Auto-CoT 始终匹配或超过需要手动设计演示的 CoT 范例的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/amazon-research/auto-cot 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动化的链式思维（CoT）提示方法Auto-CoT，通过让大型语言模型自动生成推理链，减少对人工设计演示的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统CoT提示需要人工逐个设计任务特定的演示，耗时且依赖人工。本文旨在通过自动生成功能减少人工干预，同时解决生成推理链中可能出现的错误问题。
AI.method: Auto-CoT方法通过多样化的样本选择生成推理链，利用'逐步思考'提示让模型自动生成演示，并通过多样性策略降低错误影响。
AI.result: 在GPT-3上测试的10个基准推理任务中，Auto-CoT的表现与需要人工设计演示的CoT方法相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: Auto-CoT有效减少了人工设计需求，通过多样性策略提升了自动生成推理链的可靠性，为复杂推理任务提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Eli Verwimp,Kuo Yang,Sarah Parisot,Hong Lanqing,Steven McDonagh,Eduardo Pérez-Pellitero,Matthias De Lange,Tinne Tuytelaars
title: CLAD: A realistic Continual Learning benchmark for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: CLAD：自动驾驶的现实持续学习基准
abstract: In this paper we describe the design and the ideas motivating a new Continual Learning benchmark for Autonomous Driving (CLAD), that focuses on the problems of object classification and object detection. The benchmark utilises SODA10M, a recently released large-scale dataset that concerns autonomous driving related problems. First, we review and discuss existing continual learning benchmarks, how they are related, and show that most are extreme cases of continual learning. To this end, we survey the benchmarks used in continual learning papers at three highly ranked computer vision conferences. Next, we introduce CLAD-C, an online classification benchmark realised through a chronological data stream that poses both class and domain incremental challenges; and CLAD-D, a domain incremental continual object detection benchmark. We examine the inherent difficulties and challenges posed by the benchmark, through a survey of the techniques and methods used by the top-3 participants in a CLAD-challenge workshop at ICCV 2021. We conclude with possible pathways to improve the current continual learning state of the art, and which directions we deem promising for future research.
summary: In this paper we describe the design and the ideas motivating a new Continual Learning benchmark for Autonomous Driving (CLAD), that focuses on the problems of object classification and object detection. The benchmark utilises SODA10M, a recently released large-scale dataset that concerns autonomous driving related problems. First, we review and discuss existing continual learning benchmarks, how they are related, and show that most are extreme cases of continual learning. To this end, we survey the benchmarks used in continual learning papers at three highly ranked computer vision conferences. Next, we introduce CLAD-C, an online classification benchmark realised through a chronological data stream that poses both class and domain incremental challenges; and CLAD-D, a domain incremental continual object detection benchmark. We examine the inherent difficulties and challenges posed by the benchmark, through a survey of the techniques and methods used by the top-3 participants in a CLAD-challenge workshop at ICCV 2021. We conclude with possible pathways to improve the current continual learning state of the art, and which directions we deem promising for future research.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了新的自动驾驶持续学习基准（CLAD）的设计和思想，该基准重点关注对象分类和对象检测问题。该基准测试使用 SODA10M，这是一个最近发布的大规模数据集，涉及自动驾驶相关问题。首先，我们回顾并讨论现有的持续学习基准，它们之间的关系，并表明大多数都是持续学习的极端情况。为此，我们调查了三个排名较高的计算机视觉会议上持续学习论文中使用的基准。接下来，我们介绍 CLAD-C，这是一种通过按时间顺序排列的数据流实现的在线分类基准，它提出了类和领域增量挑战； CLAD-D，一个领域增量连续对象检测基准。我们通过对 ICCV 2021 CLAD 挑战研讨会上前 3 名参与者使用的技术和方法进行调查，研究了基准带来的固有困难和挑战。我们得出了改进当前持续学习技术水平的可能途径，以及我们认为未来研究有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLAD基准，用于评估自动驾驶场景下的持续学习能力，包含分类和检测任务，基于SODA10M数据集设计CLAD-C和CLAD-D两个子基准。
AI.motivation: 现有持续学习基准过于极端，无法反映自动驾驶的真实场景需求，需构建更贴近实际应用的评估体系以推动相关研究。
AI.method: 通过分析三大顶会的持续学习基准，发现其多为极端场景；基于SODA10M构建CLAD-C（类别增量分类）和CLAD-D（领域增量检测），并评估ICCV 2021挑战赛中前三名方法的性能。
AI.result: 揭示了持续学习在自动驾驶任务中的固有挑战，发现现有方法在领域增量和类别增量场景下表现不足，需改进知识保留与跨领域适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究应聚焦于设计更鲁棒的知识保留机制、跨领域迁移策略及动态模型更新方法，以提升自动驾驶系统的持续学习能力。

search_text: CLAD: A realistic Continual Learning benchmark for Autonomous Driving CLAD：自动驾驶的现实持续学习基准 In this paper we describe the design and the ideas motivating a new Continual Learning benchmark for Autonomous Driving (CLAD), that focuses on the problems of object classification and object detection. The benchmark utilises SODA10M, a recently released large-scale dataset that concerns autonomous driving related problems. First, we review and discuss existing continual learning benchmarks, how they are related, and show that most are extreme cases of continual learning. To this end, we survey the benchmarks used in continual learning papers at three highly ranked computer vision conferences. Next, we introduce CLAD-C, an online classification benchmark realised through a chronological data stream that poses both class and domain incremental challenges; and CLAD-D, a domain incremental continual object detection benchmark. We examine the inherent difficulties and challenges posed by the benchmark, through a survey of the techniques and methods used by the top-3 participants in a CLAD-challenge workshop at ICCV 2021. We conclude with possible pathways to improve the current continual learning state of the art, and which directions we deem promising for future research. 在本文中，我们描述了新的自动驾驶持续学习基准（CLAD）的设计和思想，该基准重点关注对象分类和对象检测问题。该基准测试使用 SODA10M，这是一个最近发布的大规模数据集，涉及自动驾驶相关问题。首先，我们回顾并讨论现有的持续学习基准，它们之间的关系，并表明大多数都是持续学习的极端情况。为此，我们调查了三个排名较高的计算机视觉会议上持续学习论文中使用的基准。接下来，我们介绍 CLAD-C，这是一种通过按时间顺序排列的数据流实现的在线分类基准，它提出了类和领域增量挑战； CLAD-D，一个领域增量连续对象检测基准。我们通过对 ICCV 2021 CLAD 挑战研讨会上前 3 名参与者使用的技术和方法进行调查，研究了基准带来的固有困难和挑战。我们得出了改进当前持续学习技术水平的可能途径，以及我们认为未来研究有希望的方向。 本文提出CLAD基准，用于评估自动驾驶场景下的持续学习能力，包含分类和检测任务，基于SODA10M数据集设计CLAD-C和CLAD-D两个子基准。 Eli Verwimp,Kuo Yang,Sarah Parisot,Hong Lanqing,Steven McDonagh,Eduardo Pérez-Pellitero,Matthias De Lange,Tinne Tuytelaars cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Lei Cui,Yangguang Li,Xin Lu,Dong An,Fenggang Liu
title: Neighbor Regularized Bayesian Optimization for Hyperparameter Optimization
title_zh: 用于超参数优化的邻域正则贝叶斯优化
abstract: Bayesian Optimization (BO) is a common solution to search optimal hyperparameters based on sample observations of a machine learning model. Existing BO algorithms could converge slowly even collapse when the potential observation noise misdirects the optimization. In this paper, we propose a novel BO algorithm called Neighbor Regularized Bayesian Optimization (NRBO) to solve the problem. We first propose a neighbor-based regularization to smooth each sample observation, which could reduce the observation noise efficiently without any extra training cost. Since the neighbor regularization highly depends on the sample density of a neighbor area, we further design a density-based acquisition function to adjust the acquisition reward and obtain more stable statistics. In addition, we design a adjustment mechanism to ensure the framework maintains a reasonable regularization strength and density reward conditioned on remaining computation resources. We conduct experiments on the bayesmark benchmark and important computer vision benchmarks such as ImageNet and COCO. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of NRBO and it consistently outperforms other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Bayesian Optimization (BO) is a common solution to search optimal hyperparameters based on sample observations of a machine learning model. Existing BO algorithms could converge slowly even collapse when the potential observation noise misdirects the optimization. In this paper, we propose a novel BO algorithm called Neighbor Regularized Bayesian Optimization (NRBO) to solve the problem. We first propose a neighbor-based regularization to smooth each sample observation, which could reduce the observation noise efficiently without any extra training cost. Since the neighbor regularization highly depends on the sample density of a neighbor area, we further design a density-based acquisition function to adjust the acquisition reward and obtain more stable statistics. In addition, we design a adjustment mechanism to ensure the framework maintains a reasonable regularization strength and density reward conditioned on remaining computation resources. We conduct experiments on the bayesmark benchmark and important computer vision benchmarks such as ImageNet and COCO. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of NRBO and it consistently outperforms other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 是一种基于机器学习模型的样本观察来搜索最佳超参数的常见解决方案。当潜在的观测噪声误导优化时，现有的 BO 算法可能会缓慢收敛甚至崩溃。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为邻域正则化贝叶斯优化（NRBO）的新型 BO 算法来解决该问题。我们首先提出基于邻居的正则化来平滑每个样本观测，这可以有效地减少观测噪声，而无需任何额外的训练成本。由于邻域正则化高度依赖于邻域区域的样本密度，因此我们进一步设计了基于密度的获取函数来调整获取奖励并获得更稳定的统计数据。此外，我们设计了一种调整机制，以确保框架根据剩余计算资源保持合理的正则化强度和密度奖励。我们在 bayesmark 基准和重要的计算机视觉基准（例如 ImageNet 和 COCO）上进行了实验。大量实验证明了 NRBO 的有效性，并且它始终优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Neighbor Regularized Bayesian Optimization (NRBO)的新算法，用于改进超参数优化中的贝叶斯优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有贝叶斯优化算法在存在观测噪声时可能收敛缓慢甚至失效，需设计更鲁棒的优化框架以提升稳定性与效率。
AI.method: 通过引入基于邻域的正则化技术降低噪声影响，并设计密度感知的采集函数与动态调整机制，以平衡正则化强度与计算资源分配。
AI.result: 在Bayesmark基准及ImageNet、COCO等计算机视觉任务中，NRBO均显著优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: NRBO通过噪声抑制与密度感知机制有效提升了超参数优化的稳定性与性能，为贝叶斯优化提供了新思路。

Existing BO algorithms could converge slowly even collapse when the potential observation noise misdirects the optimization. In this paper, we propose a novel BO algorithm called Neighbor Regularized Bayesian Optimization (NRBO) to solve the problem. We first propose a neighbor-based regularization to smooth each sample observation, which could reduce the observation noise efficiently without any extra training cost. Since the neighbor regularization highly depends on the sample density of a neighbor area, we further design a density-based acquisition function to adjust the acquisition reward and obtain more stable statistics. In addition, we design a adjustment mechanism to ensure the framework maintains a reasonable regularization strength and density reward conditioned on remaining computation resources. We conduct experiments on the bayesmark benchmark and important computer vision benchmarks such as ImageNet and COCO. authors_text: Sheng Xu,Yanjing Li,Bohan Zeng,Teli ma,Baochang Zhang,Xianbin Cao,Peng Gao,Jinhu Lv
title: IDa-Det: An Information Discrepancy-aware Distillation for 1-bit Detectors
title_zh: IDa-Det：1 位检测器的信息差异感知蒸馏
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) has been proven to be useful for training compact object detection models. However, we observe that KD is often effective when the teacher model and student counterpart share similar proposal information. This explains why existing KD methods are less effective for 1-bit detectors, caused by a significant information discrepancy between the real-valued teacher and the 1-bit student. This paper presents an Information Discrepancy-aware strategy (IDa-Det) to distill 1-bit detectors that can effectively eliminate information discrepancies and significantly reduce the performance gap between a 1-bit detector and its real-valued counterpart. We formulate the distillation process as a bi-level optimization formulation. At the inner level, we select the representative proposals with maximum information discrepancy. We then introduce a novel entropy distillation loss to reduce the disparity based on the selected proposals. Extensive experiments demonstrate IDa-Det's superiority over state-of-the-art 1-bit detectors and KD methods on both PASCAL VOC and COCO datasets. IDa-Det achieves a 76.9% mAP for a 1-bit Faster-RCNN with ResNet-18 backbone. Our code is open-sourced on https://github.com/SteveTsui/IDa-Det.
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) has been proven to be useful for training compact object detection models. However, we observe that KD is often effective when the teacher model and student counterpart share similar proposal information. This explains why existing KD methods are less effective for 1-bit detectors, caused by a significant information discrepancy between the real-valued teacher and the 1-bit student. This paper presents an Information Discrepancy-aware strategy (IDa-Det) to distill 1-bit detectors that can effectively eliminate information discrepancies and significantly reduce the performance gap between a 1-bit detector and its real-valued counterpart. We formulate the distillation process as a bi-level optimization formulation. At the inner level, we select the representative proposals with maximum information discrepancy. We then introduce a novel entropy distillation loss to reduce the disparity based on the selected proposals. Extensive experiments demonstrate IDa-Det's superiority over state-of-the-art 1-bit detectors and KD methods on both PASCAL VOC and COCO datasets. IDa-Det achieves a 76.9% mAP for a 1-bit Faster-RCNN with ResNet-18 backbone. Our code is open-sourced on https://github.com/SteveTsui/IDa-Det.
abstract_zh: 知识蒸馏（KD）已被证明对于训练紧凑的目标检测模型非常有用。然而，我们观察到，当教师模型和学生模型共享相似的提案信息时，KD 通常是有效的。这解释了为什么现有的 KD 方法对于 1 位检测器效果较差，这是由于实值教师和 1 位学生之间存在显着的信息差异造成的。本文提出了一种信息差异感知策略（IDa-Det）来提取 1 位检测器，可以有效消除信息差异并显着缩小 1 位检测器与其实值检测器之间的性能差距。我们将蒸馏过程制定为双层优化公式。在内部层面，我们选择信息差异最大的代表性提案。然后，我们引入一种新颖的熵蒸馏损失，以根据所选提案减少差异。大量实验证明了 IDa-Det 在 PASCAL VOC 和 COCO 数据集上优于最先进的 1 位检测器和 KD 方法。 IDa-Det 对于具有 ResNet-18 主干的 1 位 Faster-RCNN 实现了 76.9% 的 mAP。我们的代码在 https://github.com/SteveTsui/IDa-Det 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为IDa-Det的信息差异感知知识蒸馏方法，用于训练1位检测器以缩小其与实值检测器之间的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在1位检测器上效果不佳，因为实值教师模型与1位学生模型之间存在显著的信息差异，导致性能差距较大。
AI.method: 将蒸馏过程建模为双层优化问题，通过选择信息差异最大的候选框，并引入新的熵蒸馏损失函数来减少差异。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC和COCO数据集上，IDa-Det优于现有1位检测器和蒸馏方法，1位Faster-RCNN（ResNet-18）达到76.9% mAP。
AI.conclusion: IDa-Det通过有效消除信息差异，显著缩小了1位检测器与实值模型之间的性能差距，验证了方法的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为IDa-Det的信息差异感知知识蒸馏方法，用于训练1位检测器以缩小其与实值检测器之间的性能差距。
ai_content.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏方法在1位检测器上效果不佳，因为实值教师模型与1位学生模型之间存在显著的信息差异，导致性能差距较大。

search_text: IDa-Det: An Information Discrepancy-aware Distillation for 1-bit Detectors IDa-Det：1 位检测器的信息差异感知蒸馏 Knowledge distillation (KD) has been proven to be useful for training compact object detection models. However, we observe that KD is often effective when the teacher model and student counterpart share similar proposal information. This explains why existing KD methods are less effective for 1-bit detectors, caused by a significant information discrepancy between the real-valued teacher and the 1-bit student. This paper presents an Information Discrepancy-aware strategy (IDa-Det) to distill 1-bit detectors that can effectively eliminate information discrepancies and significantly reduce the performance gap between a 1-bit detector and its real-valued counterpart. We formulate the distillation process as a bi-level optimization formulation. At the inner level, we select the representative proposals with maximum information discrepancy. We then introduce a novel entropy distillation loss to reduce the disparity based on the selected proposals. Extensive experiments demonstrate IDa-Det's superiority over state-of-the-art 1-bit detectors and KD methods on both PASCAL VOC and COCO datasets. IDa-Det achieves a 76.9% mAP for a 1-bit Faster-RCNN with ResNet-18 backbone. Our code is open-sourced on https://github.com/SteveTsui/IDa-Det. 知识蒸馏（KD）已被证明对于训练紧凑的目标检测模型非常有用。然而，我们观察到，当教师模型和学生模型共享相似的提案信息时，KD 通常是有效的。这解释了为什么现有的 KD 方法对于 1 位检测器效果较差，这是由于实值教师和 1 位学生之间存在显着的信息差异造成的。本文提出了一种信息差异感知策略（IDa-Det）来提取 1 位检测器，可以有效消除信息差异并显着缩小 1 位检测器与其实值检测器之间的性能差距。我们将蒸馏过程制定为双层优化公式。在内部层面，我们选择信息差异最大的代表性提案。然后，我们引入一种新颖的熵蒸馏损失，以根据所选提案减少差异。大量实验证明了 IDa-Det 在 PASCAL VOC 和 COCO 数据集上优于最先进的 1 位检测器和 KD 方法。 IDa-Det 对于具有 ResNet-18 主干的 1 位 Faster-RCNN 实现了 76.9% 的 mAP。我们的代码在 https://github.com/SteveTsui/IDa-Det 上开源。 本文提出一种名为IDa-Det的信息差异感知知识蒸馏方法，用于训练1位检测器以缩小其与实值检测器之间的性能差距。 Sheng Xu,Yanjing Li,Bohan Zeng,Teli ma,Baochang Zhang,Xianbin Cao,Peng Gao,Jinhu Lv cs.CV

authors_text: Nathan Grinsztajn,Daniel Furelos-Blanco,Shikha Surana,Clément Bonnet,Thomas D. Barrett
title: Winner Takes It All: Training Performant RL Populations for Combinatorial Optimization
title_zh: 胜者为王：训练高性能 RL 群体进行组合优化
abstract: Applying reinforcement learning (RL) to combinatorial optimization problems is attractive as it removes the need for expert knowledge or pre-solved instances. However, it is unrealistic to expect an agent to solve these (often NP-)hard problems in a single shot at inference due to their inherent complexity. Thus, leading approaches often implement additional search strategies, from stochastic sampling and beam search to explicit fine-tuning. In this paper, we argue for the benefits of learning a population of complementary policies, which can be simultaneously rolled out at inference. To this end, we introduce Poppy, a simple training procedure for populations. Instead of relying on a predefined or hand-crafted notion of diversity, Poppy induces an unsupervised specialization targeted solely at maximizing the performance of the population. We show that Poppy produces a set of complementary policies, and obtains state-of-the-art RL results on four popular NP-hard problems: traveling salesman, capacitated vehicle routing, 0-1 knapsack, and job-shop scheduling.
summary: Applying reinforcement learning (RL) to combinatorial optimization problems is attractive as it removes the need for expert knowledge or pre-solved instances. However, it is unrealistic to expect an agent to solve these (often NP-)hard problems in a single shot at inference due to their inherent complexity. Thus, leading approaches often implement additional search strategies, from stochastic sampling and beam search to explicit fine-tuning. In this paper, we argue for the benefits of learning a population of complementary policies, which can be simultaneously rolled out at inference. To this end, we introduce Poppy, a simple training procedure for populations. Instead of relying on a predefined or hand-crafted notion of diversity, Poppy induces an unsupervised specialization targeted solely at maximizing the performance of the population. We show that Poppy produces a set of complementary policies, and obtains state-of-the-art RL results on four popular NP-hard problems: traveling salesman, capacitated vehicle routing, 0-1 knapsack, and job-shop scheduling.
abstract_zh: 将强化学习 (RL) 应用于组合优化问题很有吸引力，因为它不需要专家知识或预先解决的实例。然而，由于其固有的复杂性，期望代理在一次推理中解决这些（通常是 NP-）难题是不现实的。因此，领先的方法通常会实施额外的搜索策略，从随机采样和波束搜索到显式微调。在本文中，我们论证了学习一组补充策略的好处，这些策略可以在推理时同时推出。为此，我们引入了 Poppy，这是一种针对人群的简单训练程序。 Poppy 没有依赖预先定义或手工制作的多样性概念，而是引入了一种无监督的专业化，其目标只是最大限度地提高群体的表现。我们展示了 Poppy 产生了一组补充策略，并在四个流行的 NP 难问题上获得了最先进的 RL 结果：旅行推销员、有能力的车辆路线、0-1 背包和车间调度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Poppy的训练方法，用于训练解决组合优化问题的强化学习（RL）群体策略，通过无监督的多样化机制提升整体性能。
AI.motivation: 单个RL智能体难以高效解决NP难组合优化问题，现有方法依赖额外搜索策略，但缺乏对群体策略互补性的系统性学习。
AI.method: Poppy通过无监督的群体专业化训练，无需预定义多样性，仅以最大化群体整体性能为目标，生成互补策略。
AI.result: 在旅行商问题、车辆路径规划、0-1背包和作业车间调度四个经典NP难问题上达到RL领域最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: Poppy通过学习互补策略群体有效解决了组合优化问题，验证了群体专业化训练在复杂问题求解中的优势。

authors_text: Sahitya Yarragolla,Nan Du,Torben Hemke,Xianyue Zhao,Ziang Chen,Ilia Polian,Thomas Mussenbrock
title: Physics inspired compact modelling of BiFeO$_3$ based memristors for hardware security applications
title_zh: 基于物理学的 BiFeO$_3$ 忆阻器紧凑建模，用于硬件安全应用
abstract: With the advent of the Internet of Things, nanoelectronic devices or memristors have been the subject of significant interest for use as new hardware security primitives. Among the several available memristors, BiFe$\rm O_{3}$ (BFO)-based electroforming-free memristors have attracted considerable attention due to their excellent properties, such as long retention time, self-rectification, intrinsic stochasticity, and fast switching. They have been actively investigated for use in physical unclonable function (PUF) key storage modules, artificial synapses in neural networks, nonvolatile resistive switches, and reconfigurable logic applications. In this work, we present a physics-inspired 1D compact model of a BFO memristor to understand its implementation for such applications (mainly PUFs) and perform circuit simulations. The resistive switching based on electric field-driven vacancy migration and intrinsic stochastic behaviour of the BFO memristor are modelled using the cloud-in-a-cell scheme. The experimental current-voltage characteristics of the BFO memristor are successfully reproduced. The response of the BFO memristor to changes in electrical properties, environmental properties (such as temperature) and stress are analyzed and consistent with experimental results.
summary: With the advent of the Internet of Things, nanoelectronic devices or memristors have been the subject of significant interest for use as new hardware security primitives. Among the several available memristors, BiFe$\rm O_{3}$ (BFO)-based electroforming-free memristors have attracted considerable attention due to their excellent properties, such as long retention time, self-rectification, intrinsic stochasticity, and fast switching. They have been actively investigated for use in physical unclonable function (PUF) key storage modules, artificial synapses in neural networks, nonvolatile resistive switches, and reconfigurable logic applications. In this work, we present a physics-inspired 1D compact model of a BFO memristor to understand its implementation for such applications (mainly PUFs) and perform circuit simulations. The resistive switching based on electric field-driven vacancy migration and intrinsic stochastic behaviour of the BFO memristor are modelled using the cloud-in-a-cell scheme. The experimental current-voltage characteristics of the BFO memristor are successfully reproduced. The response of the BFO memristor to changes in electrical properties, environmental properties (such as temperature) and stress are analyzed and consistent with experimental results.
abstract_zh: 随着物联网的出现，纳米电子设备或忆阻器作为新的硬件安全原语已成为人们极大的兴趣。在现有的几种忆阻器中，BiFe$\rm O_{3}$ (BFO)基免电铸忆阻器由于其优异的性能，如长保留时间、自校正、内在随机性和快速开关等，引起了广泛的关注。它们已被积极研究用于物理不可克隆功能 (PUF) 密钥存储模块、神经网络中的人工突触、非易失性电阻开关和可重构逻辑应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个受物理启发的 BFO 忆阻器一维紧凑模型，以了解其在此类应用（主要是 PUF）中的实现并执行电路仿真。使用单元云方案对基于电场驱动的空位迁移和 BFO 忆阻器固有随机行为的电阻开关进行建模。成功再现了 BFO 忆阻器的实验电流-电压特性。分析了BFO忆阻器对电特性、环境特性（如温度）和应力变化的响应，并与实验结果一致。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于物理原理的1D紧凑模型，用于描述BiFeO3基忆阻器的特性，以支持其在硬件安全等应用中的实现。
AI.motivation: 随着物联网发展，忆阻器作为新型硬件安全原语备受关注。BiFeO3基忆阻器因其长保留时间、自整流性、内在随机性等特性，适合用于PUF密钥存储等安全场景，但需建立物理模型以指导电路设计。
AI.method: 采用云-胞模型模拟电场驱动的空位迁移及内在随机性，通过实验电流-电压特性验证模型，并分析器件对电气参数、环境变化及应力的响应。
AI.result: 成功复现BiFeO3忆阻器的实验I-V特性，模型结果与实验数据一致，且能准确反映器件在不同条件下的响应行为。
AI.conclusion: 该物理模型有效表征了BiFeO3忆阻器的核心特性，为设计基于忆阻器的PUF、神经突触等安全硬件提供了理论支持。

Among the several available memristors, BiFe$\rm O_{3}$ (BFO)-based electroforming-free memristors have attracted considerable attention due to their excellent properties, such as long retention time, self-rectification, intrinsic stochasticity, and fast switching. In this work, we present a physics-inspired 1D compact model of a BFO memristor to understand its implementation for such applications (mainly PUFs) and perform circuit simulations. The resistive switching based on electric field-driven vacancy migration and intrinsic stochastic behaviour of the BFO memristor are modelled using the cloud-in-a-cell scheme. The experimental current-voltage characteristics of the BFO memristor are successfully reproduced. The response of the BFO memristor to changes in electrical properties, environmental properties (such as temperature) and stress are analyzed and consistent with experimental results. 随着物联网的出现，纳米电子设备或忆阻器作为新的硬件安全原语已成为人们极大的兴趣。在现有的几种忆阻器中，BiFe$\rm O_{3}$ (BFO)基免电铸忆阻器由于其优异的性能，如长保留时间、自校正、内在随机性和快速开关等，引起了广泛的关注。它们已被积极研究用于物理不可克隆功能 (PUF) 密钥存储模块、神经网络中的人工突触、非易失性电阻开关和可重构逻辑应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个受物理启发的 BFO 忆阻器一维紧凑模型，以了解其在此类应用（主要是 PUF）中的实现并执行电路仿真。使用单元云方案对基于电场驱动的空位迁移和 BFO 忆阻器固有随机行为的电阻开关进行建模。成功再现了 BFO 忆阻器的实验电流-电压特性。分析了BFO忆阻器对电特性、环境特性（如温度）和应力变化的响应，并与实验结果一致。 本文提出一种基于物理原理的1D紧凑模型，用于描述BiFeO3基忆阻器的特性，以支持其在硬件安全等应用中的实现。 Sahitya Yarragolla,Nan Du,Torben Hemke,Xianyue Zhao,Ziang Chen,Ilia Polian,Thomas Mussenbrock cs.ET,cond-mat.mes-hall,cs.CR,physics.comp-ph

authors_text: Ananda Padhmanabhan Suresh,Sanjana Jain,Pavit Noinongyao,Ankush Ganguly,Ukrit Watchareeruetai,Aubin Samacoits
title: FastCLIPstyler: Optimisation-free Text-based Image Style Transfer Using Style Representations
title_zh: FastCLIPstyler：使用样式表示进行免优化的基于文本的图像样式传输
comment: Accepted at the 2024 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2024)
comments: Accepted at the 2024 IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV 2024)
abstract: In recent years, language-driven artistic style transfer has emerged as a new type of style transfer technique, eliminating the need for a reference style image by using natural language descriptions of the style. The first model to achieve this, called CLIPstyler, has demonstrated impressive stylisation results. However, its lengthy optimisation procedure at runtime for each query limits its suitability for many practical applications. In this work, we present FastCLIPstyler, a generalised text-based image style transfer model capable of stylising images in a single forward pass for arbitrary text inputs. Furthermore, we introduce EdgeCLIPstyler, a lightweight model designed for compatibility with resource-constrained devices. Through quantitative and qualitative comparisons with state-of-the-art approaches, we demonstrate that our models achieve superior stylisation quality based on measurable metrics while offering significantly improved runtime efficiency, particularly on edge devices.
summary: In recent years, language-driven artistic style transfer has emerged as a new type of style transfer technique, eliminating the need for a reference style image by using natural language descriptions of the style. The first model to achieve this, called CLIPstyler, has demonstrated impressive stylisation results. However, its lengthy optimisation procedure at runtime for each query limits its suitability for many practical applications. In this work, we present FastCLIPstyler, a generalised text-based image style transfer model capable of stylising images in a single forward pass for arbitrary text inputs. Furthermore, we introduce EdgeCLIPstyler, a lightweight model designed for compatibility with resource-constrained devices. Through quantitative and qualitative comparisons with state-of-the-art approaches, we demonstrate that our models achieve superior stylisation quality based on measurable metrics while offering significantly improved runtime efficiency, particularly on edge devices.
abstract_zh: 近年来，语言驱动的艺术风格迁移作为一种新型的风格迁移技术出现，通过使用风格的自然语言描述来消除对参考风格图像的需要。第一个实现这一目标的模型称为 CLIPstyler，它已经展示了令人印象深刻的风格化结果。然而，它在运行时对每个查询的冗长优化过程限制了它对许多实际应用的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 FastCLIPstyler，这是一种通用的基于文本的图像样式传输模型，能够在任意文本输入的单次前向传递中对图像进行风格化。此外，我们还推出了 EdgeCLIPstyler，这是一种专为与资源受限设备兼容而设计的轻量级模型。通过与最先进的方法进行定量和定性比较，我们证明我们的模型基于可测量的指标实现了卓越的风格化质量，同时显着提高了运行效率，特别是在边缘设备上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FastCLIPstyler和EdgeCLIPstyler模型，实现无需优化步骤的文本驱动图像风格迁移，提升运行效率。
AI.motivation: CLIPstyler虽能通过文本描述实现风格迁移，但其运行时需进行耗时的优化过程，限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 设计FastCLIPstyler通过单次前向传递完成风格迁移，并开发轻量级EdgeCLIPstyler适配边缘设备。
AI.result: 实验表明，模型在保持高质量风格迁移效果的同时，显著提升运行效率，尤其在边缘设备上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: FastCLIPstyler系列模型有效解决了文本驱动风格迁移的效率瓶颈，为实际应用提供可行方案。

authors_text: Yiming Liu,Mengxi Zhang,Weiqin Zhang,Bo Jiang,Bo Hou,Dan Liu,Jie Chen,Heqing Lian
title: Flexible Alignment Super-Resolution Network for Multi-Contrast MRI
title_zh: 用于多对比 MRI 的灵活对准超分辨率网络
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging plays an essential role in clinical diagnosis by acquiring the structural information of biological tissue. Recently, many multi-contrast MRI super-resolution networks achieve good effects. However, most studies ignore the impact of the inappropriate foreground scale and patch size of multi-contrast MRI, which probably leads to inappropriate feature alignment. To tackle this problem, we propose the Flexible Alignment Super-Resolution Network (FASR-Net) for multi-contrast MRI Super-Resolution. The Flexible Alignment module of FASR-Net consists of two modules for feature alignment. (1) The Single-Multi Pyramid Alignment(S-A) module solves the situation where low-resolution (LR) images and reference (Ref) images have different scales. (2) The Multi-Multi Pyramid Alignment(M-A) module solves the situation where LR and Ref images have the same scale. Besides, we propose the Cross-Hierarchical Progressive Fusion (CHPF) module aiming at fusing the features effectively, further improving the image quality. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, FASR-net achieves the most competitive results on FastMRI and IXI datasets. Our code will be available at \href{https://github.com/yimingliu123/FASR-Net}{https://github.com/yimingliu123/FASR-Net}.
summary: Magnetic resonance imaging plays an essential role in clinical diagnosis by acquiring the structural information of biological tissue. Recently, many multi-contrast MRI super-resolution networks achieve good effects. However, most studies ignore the impact of the inappropriate foreground scale and patch size of multi-contrast MRI, which probably leads to inappropriate feature alignment. To tackle this problem, we propose the Flexible Alignment Super-Resolution Network (FASR-Net) for multi-contrast MRI Super-Resolution. The Flexible Alignment module of FASR-Net consists of two modules for feature alignment. (1) The Single-Multi Pyramid Alignment(S-A) module solves the situation where low-resolution (LR) images and reference (Ref) images have different scales. (2) The Multi-Multi Pyramid Alignment(M-A) module solves the situation where LR and Ref images have the same scale. Besides, we propose the Cross-Hierarchical Progressive Fusion (CHPF) module aiming at fusing the features effectively, further improving the image quality. Compared with other state-of-the-art methods, FASR-net achieves the most competitive results on FastMRI and IXI datasets. Our code will be available at \href{https://github.com/yimingliu123/FASR-Net}{https://github.com/yimingliu123/FASR-Net}.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像通过获取生物组织的结构信息在临床诊断中发挥着重要作用。近年来，许多多对比MRI超分辨率网络取得了良好的效果。然而，大多数研究忽略了多对比 MRI 不适当的前景尺度和斑块大小的影响，这可能导致不适当的特征对齐。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了用于多对比 MRI 超分辨率的灵活对齐超分辨率网络（FASR-Net）。 FASR-Net 的灵活对齐模块由两个用于特征对齐的模块组成。 (1)单多金字塔对齐(S-A)模块解决了低分辨率(LR)图像和参考(Ref)图像具有不同尺度的情况。 （2）Multi-Multi Pyramid Alignment（M-A）模块解决了LR和Ref图像具有相同尺度的情况。此外，我们提出了跨层次渐进融合（CHPF）模块，旨在有效融合特征，进一步提高图像质量。与其他最先进的方法相比，FASR-net 在 FastMRI 和 IXI 数据集上取得了最具竞争力的结果。我们的代码将在 \href{https://github.com/yimingliu123/FASR-Net}{https://github.com/yimingliu123/FASR-Net} 提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多对比MRI的柔性对齐超分辨率网络（FASR-Net），以解决多对比MRI超分辨率中特征对齐不当的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视了多对比MRI中前景尺度和补丁尺寸不适当可能导致的特征对齐问题，从而影响超分辨率效果。
AI.method: FASR-Net包含两个特征对齐模块：单-多金字塔对齐（S-A）模块解决低分辨率与参考图像尺度不同的问题，多-多金字塔对齐（M-A）模块处理尺度相同的情况，并引入跨层级渐进融合（CHPF）模块有效融合特征。
AI.result: 在FastMRI和IXI数据集上，FASR-Net相比其他先进方法取得了最具竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: FASR-Net通过柔性对齐模块和特征融合策略，有效提升了多对比MRI的超分辨率质量。

authors_text: Shota Horiguchi,Yuki Takashima,Shinji Watanabe,Paola Garcia
title: Mutual Learning of Single- and Multi-Channel End-to-End Neural Diarization
title_zh: 单通道和多通道端到端神经二值化的相互学习
abstract: Due to the high performance of multi-channel speech processing, we can use the outputs from a multi-channel model as teacher labels when training a single-channel model with knowledge distillation. To the contrary, it is also known that single-channel speech data can benefit multi-channel models by mixing it with multi-channel speech data during training or by using it for model pretraining. This paper focuses on speaker diarization and proposes to conduct the above bi-directional knowledge transfer alternately. We first introduce an end-to-end neural diarization model that can handle both single- and multi-channel inputs. Using this model, we alternately conduct i) knowledge distillation from a multi-channel model to a single-channel model and ii) finetuning from the distilled single-channel model to a multi-channel model. Experimental results on two-speaker data show that the proposed method mutually improved single- and multi-channel speaker diarization performances.
summary: Due to the high performance of multi-channel speech processing, we can use the outputs from a multi-channel model as teacher labels when training a single-channel model with knowledge distillation. To the contrary, it is also known that single-channel speech data can benefit multi-channel models by mixing it with multi-channel speech data during training or by using it for model pretraining. This paper focuses on speaker diarization and proposes to conduct the above bi-directional knowledge transfer alternately. We first introduce an end-to-end neural diarization model that can handle both single- and multi-channel inputs. Using this model, we alternately conduct i) knowledge distillation from a multi-channel model to a single-channel model and ii) finetuning from the distilled single-channel model to a multi-channel model. Experimental results on two-speaker data show that the proposed method mutually improved single- and multi-channel speaker diarization performances.
abstract_zh: 由于多通道语音处理的高性能，我们可以在通过知识蒸馏训练单通道模型时使用多通道模型的输出作为教师标签。相反，众所周知，通过在训练期间将单通道语音数据与多通道语音数据混合或将其用于模型预训练，单通道语音数据可以使多通道模型受益。本文重点关注说话人二值化，并提出交替进行上述双向知识迁移。我们首先引入一个端到端的神经二值化模型，它可以处理单通道和多通道输入。使用该模型，我们交替进行i）从多通道模型到单通道模型的知识蒸馏和ii）从蒸馏后的单通道模型到多通道模型的微调。双说话人数据的实验结果表明，该方法相互提高了单通道和多通道说话人二值化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过双向知识迁移交替提升单通道和多通道端到端说话人分割性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 多通道语音处理性能优异，但单通道模型与多通道模型间存在互补性，需通过双向知识迁移实现共同优化。
AI.method: 设计统一处理单/多通道输入的端到端模型，交替执行多通道模型向单通道模型的知识蒸馏与单通道模型向多通道模型的微调。
AI.result: 在双说话人数据集上验证了该方法能同时提升单通道和多通道说话人分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 双向知识迁移机制有效实现了单通道与多通道模型的协同优化，为说话人分割任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Mutual Learning of Single- and Multi-Channel End-to-End Neural Diarization 单通道和多通道端到端神经二值化的相互学习 Due to the high performance of multi-channel speech processing, we can use the outputs from a multi-channel model as teacher labels when training a single-channel model with knowledge distillation. To the contrary, it is also known that single-channel speech data can benefit multi-channel models by mixing it with multi-channel speech data during training or by using it for model pretraining. This paper focuses on speaker diarization and proposes to conduct the above bi-directional knowledge transfer alternately. We first introduce an end-to-end neural diarization model that can handle both single- and multi-channel inputs. Using this model, we alternately conduct i) knowledge distillation from a multi-channel model to a single-channel model and ii) finetuning from the distilled single-channel model to a multi-channel model. Experimental results on two-speaker data show that the proposed method mutually improved single- and multi-channel speaker diarization performances. 由于多通道语音处理的高性能，我们可以在通过知识蒸馏训练单通道模型时使用多通道模型的输出作为教师标签。相反，众所周知，通过在训练期间将单通道语音数据与多通道语音数据混合或将其用于模型预训练，单通道语音数据可以使多通道模型受益。本文重点关注说话人二值化，并提出交替进行上述双向知识迁移。我们首先引入一个端到端的神经二值化模型，它可以处理单通道和多通道输入。使用该模型，我们交替进行i）从多通道模型到单通道模型的知识蒸馏和ii）从蒸馏后的单通道模型到多通道模型的微调。双说话人数据的实验结果表明，该方法相互提高了单通道和多通道说话人二值化性能。 本文提出了一种通过双向知识迁移交替提升单通道和多通道端到端说话人分割性能的方法。 Shota Horiguchi,Yuki Takashima,Shinji Watanabe,Paola Garcia eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Mudit Verma,Ayush Kharkwal,Subbarao Kambhampati
title: Advice Conformance Verification by Reinforcement Learning agents for Human-in-the-Loop
title_zh: 通过强化学习代理进行人在环建议一致性验证
abstract: Human-in-the-loop (HiL) reinforcement learning is gaining traction in domains with large action and state spaces, and sparse rewards by allowing the agent to take advice from HiL. Beyond advice accommodation, a sequential decision-making agent must be able to express the extent to which it was able to utilize the human advice. Subsequently, the agent should provide a means for the HiL to inspect parts of advice that it had to reject in favor of the overall environment objective. We introduce the problem of Advice-Conformance Verification which requires reinforcement learning (RL) agents to provide assurances to the human in the loop regarding how much of their advice is being conformed to. We then propose a Tree-based lingua-franca to support this communication, called a Preference Tree. We study two cases of good and bad advice scenarios in MuJoCo's Humanoid environment. Through our experiments, we show that our method can provide an interpretable means of solving the Advice-Conformance Verification problem by conveying whether or not the agent is using the human's advice. Finally, we present a human-user study with 20 participants that validates our method.
summary: Human-in-the-loop (HiL) reinforcement learning is gaining traction in domains with large action and state spaces, and sparse rewards by allowing the agent to take advice from HiL. Beyond advice accommodation, a sequential decision-making agent must be able to express the extent to which it was able to utilize the human advice. Subsequently, the agent should provide a means for the HiL to inspect parts of advice that it had to reject in favor of the overall environment objective. We introduce the problem of Advice-Conformance Verification which requires reinforcement learning (RL) agents to provide assurances to the human in the loop regarding how much of their advice is being conformed to. We then propose a Tree-based lingua-franca to support this communication, called a Preference Tree. We study two cases of good and bad advice scenarios in MuJoCo's Humanoid environment. Through our experiments, we show that our method can provide an interpretable means of solving the Advice-Conformance Verification problem by conveying whether or not the agent is using the human's advice. Finally, we present a human-user study with 20 participants that validates our method.
abstract_zh: 人机循环 (HiL) 强化学习在具有较大动作和状态空间的领域中越来越受欢迎，并且通过允许代理接受 HiL 的建议而获得稀疏奖励。除了建议适应之外，顺序决策代理还必须能够表达它能够利用人类建议的程度。随后，代理应该为 HiL 提供一种方法来检查为了整体环境目标而必须拒绝的部分建议。我们引入了建议一致性验证问题，该问题需要强化学习（RL）代理向循环中的人员提供关于他们的建议在多大程度上得到遵守的保证。然后，我们提出了一种基于树的通用语言来支持这种通信，称为偏好树。我们研究了 MuJoCo 的人形环境中好的和坏的建议场景的两个案例。通过我们的实验，我们表明我们的方法可以通过传达代理是否正在使用人类的建议来提供解决建议一致性验证问题的可解释方法。最后，我们提出了一项有 20 名参与者参与的人类用户研究来验证我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于强化学习的建议遵循验证方法，使代理能向人类说明其遵循建议的程度
AI.motivation: 在HiL中，代理需明确遵循建议的程度，并允许人类审查被拒绝的建议，以增强透明度和信任
AI.method: 提出基于树结构的偏好树，作为代理与人类沟通建议遵循情况的通用语言
AI.result: 实验表明方法能有效传达代理是否使用建议，用户研究验证了其有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法解决了建议遵循验证问题，提供了可解释的沟通方式，并通过实验和用户研究验证了其有效性

authors_text: Roberto Arroyo,Javier Yebes,Elena Martínez,Héctor Corrales,Javier Lorenzo
title: Key Information Extraction in Purchase Documents using Deep Learning and Rule-based Corrections
title_zh: 使用深度学习和基于规则的更正提取采购文档中的关键信息
comment: Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING 2022). PAN-DL Workshop
comments: Conference on Computational Linguistics (COLING 2022). PAN-DL Workshop
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) is dominating the fields of Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Computer Vision (CV) in the recent times. However, DL commonly relies on the availability of large data annotations, so other alternative or complementary pattern-based techniques can help to improve results. In this paper, we build upon Key Information Extraction (KIE) in purchase documents using both DL and rule-based corrections. Our system initially trusts on Optical Character Recognition (OCR) and text understanding based on entity tagging to identify purchase facts of interest (e.g., product codes, descriptions, quantities, or prices). These facts are then linked to a same product group, which is recognized by means of line detection and some grouping heuristics. Once these DL approaches are processed, we contribute several mechanisms consisting of rule-based corrections for improving the baseline DL predictions. We prove the enhancements provided by these rule-based corrections over the baseline DL results in the presented experiments for purchase documents from public and NielsenIQ datasets.
summary: Deep Learning (DL) is dominating the fields of Natural Language Processing (NLP) and Computer Vision (CV) in the recent times. However, DL commonly relies on the availability of large data annotations, so other alternative or complementary pattern-based techniques can help to improve results. In this paper, we build upon Key Information Extraction (KIE) in purchase documents using both DL and rule-based corrections. Our system initially trusts on Optical Character Recognition (OCR) and text understanding based on entity tagging to identify purchase facts of interest (e.g., product codes, descriptions, quantities, or prices). These facts are then linked to a same product group, which is recognized by means of line detection and some grouping heuristics. Once these DL approaches are processed, we contribute several mechanisms consisting of rule-based corrections for improving the baseline DL predictions. We prove the enhancements provided by these rule-based corrections over the baseline DL results in the presented experiments for purchase documents from public and NielsenIQ datasets.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习（DL）在自然语言处理（NLP）和计算机视觉（CV）领域占据主导地位。然而，深度学习通常依赖于大数据注释的可用性，因此其他替代或补充的基于模式的技术可以帮助改善结果。在本文中，我们使用深度学习和基于规则的更正，以采购文档中的关键信息提取 (KIE) 为基础。我们的系统最初依赖光学字符识别 (OCR) 和基于实体标记的文本理解来识别感兴趣的购买事实（例如产品代码、描述、数量或价格）。然后将这些事实链接到同一产品组，该产品组通过线路检测和一些分组启发法进行识别。一旦处理完这些深度学习方法，我们就会贡献多种机制，其中包括基于规则的修正，以改进基线深度学习预测。我们在所提出的从公共和 NielsenIQ 数据集购买文档的实验中证明了这些基于规则的修正对基线 DL 结果所提供的增强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合深度学习与基于规则的校正方法，用于从采购文档中提取关键信息。
AI.motivation: 深度学习虽在NLP领域表现优异，但依赖大量标注数据，而基于规则的方法可作为补充手段提升效果。
AI.method: 系统首先通过OCR和实体标记识别采购信息，利用行检测与分组启发式方法关联产品组，再通过规则校正优化深度学习结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，规则校正机制有效提升了基线深度学习模型在公开数据集和NielsenIQ数据集上的表现。
AI.conclusion: 融合深度学习与规则校正的方法能显著提高采购文档关键信息提取的准确性。

These facts are then linked to a same product group, which is recognized by means of line detection and some grouping heuristics. Once these DL approaches are processed, we contribute several mechanisms consisting of rule-based corrections for improving the baseline DL predictions. We prove the enhancements provided by these rule-based corrections over the baseline DL results in the presented experiments for purchase documents from public and NielsenIQ datasets. 近年来，深度学习（DL）在自然语言处理（NLP）和计算机视觉（CV）领域占据主导地位。然而，深度学习通常依赖于大数据注释的可用性，因此其他替代或补充的基于模式的技术可以帮助改善结果。在本文中，我们使用深度学习和基于规则的更正，以采购文档中的关键信息提取 (KIE) 为基础。我们的系统最初依赖光学字符识别 (OCR) 和基于实体标记的文本理解来识别感兴趣的购买事实（例如产品代码、描述、数量或价格）。然后将这些事实链接到同一产品组，该产品组通过线路检测和一些分组启发法进行识别。一旦处理完这些深度学习方法，我们就会贡献多种机制，其中包括基于规则的修正，以改进基线深度学习预测。我们在所提出的从公共和 NielsenIQ 数据集购买文档的实验中证明了这些基于规则的修正对基线 DL 结果所提供的增强。 本文提出结合深度学习与基于规则的校正方法，用于从采购文档中提取关键信息。 Roberto Arroyo,Javier Yebes,Elena Martínez,Héctor Corrales,Javier Lorenzo cs.CV

authors_text: Alberto Rigo,Yiyu Chen,Satyandra K. Gupta,Quan Nguyen
title: Contact Optimization for Non-Prehensile Loco-Manipulation via Hierarchical Model Predictive Control
title_zh: 通过分层模型预测控制实现非预制局部操纵的接触优化
abstract: Recent studies on quadruped robots have focused on either locomotion or mobile manipulation using a robotic arm. Legged robots can manipulate heavier and larger objects using non-prehensile manipulation primitives, such as planar pushing, to drive the object to the desired location. In this paper, we present a novel hierarchical model predictive control (MPC) for contact optimization of the manipulation task. Using two cascading MPCs, we split the loco-manipulation problem into two parts: the first to optimize both contact force and contact location between the robot and the object, and the second to regulate the desired interaction force through the robot locomotion. Our method is successfully validated in both simulation and hardware experiments. While the baseline locomotion MPC fails to follow the desired trajectory of the object, our proposed approach can effectively control both object's position and orientation with minimal tracking error. This capability also allows us to perform obstacle avoidance for both the robot and the object during the loco-manipulation task.
summary: Recent studies on quadruped robots have focused on either locomotion or mobile manipulation using a robotic arm. Legged robots can manipulate heavier and larger objects using non-prehensile manipulation primitives, such as planar pushing, to drive the object to the desired location. In this paper, we present a novel hierarchical model predictive control (MPC) for contact optimization of the manipulation task. Using two cascading MPCs, we split the loco-manipulation problem into two parts: the first to optimize both contact force and contact location between the robot and the object, and the second to regulate the desired interaction force through the robot locomotion. Our method is successfully validated in both simulation and hardware experiments. While the baseline locomotion MPC fails to follow the desired trajectory of the object, our proposed approach can effectively control both object's position and orientation with minimal tracking error. This capability also allows us to perform obstacle avoidance for both the robot and the object during the loco-manipulation task.
abstract_zh: 最近对四足机器人的研究主要集中在使用机械臂进行运动或移动操作。腿式机器人可以使用非抓取操纵原语（例如平面推动）操纵更重和更大的物体，以将物体驱动到所需位置。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的分层模型预测控制（MPC），用于操作任务的接触优化。使用两个级联 MPC，我们将运动操纵问题分为两部分：第一部分优化机器人与物体之间的接触力和接触位置，第二部分通过机器人运动调节所需的相互作用力。我们的方法在模拟和硬件实验中都得到了成功的验证。虽然基线运动 MPC 无法遵循物体的所需轨迹，但我们提出的方法可以有效地控制物体的位置和方向，同时跟踪误差最小。这种能力还使我们能够在局部操纵任务期间为机器人和物体执行避障操作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分层模型预测控制方法，用于优化四足机器人非抓取式移动操作中的接触力与接触位置，实现对物体位置和方向的精确控制。
AI.motivation: 传统四足机器人研究多分离移动与操作任务，难以有效处理需要同时调节接触力和位置的复杂非抓取操作场景，亟需协调移动与操作的控制方法。
AI.method: 设计双级联模型预测控制架构：第一层优化机器人与物体间的接触力及接触点位置，第二层通过调节机器人移动实现目标相互作用力控制，分层解耦复杂任务。
AI.result: 仿真与硬件实验验证方法有效性，相较基线方法显著降低物体跟踪误差，成功实现机器人与物体的协同避障控制。
AI.conclusion: 分层MPC框架有效解决了非抓取移动操作中的接触优化难题，为复杂动态环境下的机器人操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sahar Salimpour,Farhad Keramat,Jorge Peña Queralta,Tomi Westerlund
title: Decentralized Vision-Based Byzantine Agent Detection in Multi-Robot Systems with IOTA Smart Contracts
title_zh: 使用 IOTA 智能合约在多机器人系统中进行基于视觉的去中心化拜占庭代理检测
abstract: Multiple opportunities lie at the intersection of multi-robot systems and distributed ledger technologies (DLTs). In this work, we investigate the potential of new DLT solutions such as IOTA, for detecting anomalies and byzantine agents in multi-robot systems in a decentralized manner. Traditional blockchain approaches are not applicable to real-world networked and decentralized robotic systems where connectivity conditions are not ideal. To address this, we leverage recent advances in partition-tolerant and byzantine-tolerant collaborative decision-making processes with IOTA smart contracts. We show how our work in vision-based anomaly and change detection can be applied to detecting byzantine agents within multiple robots operating in the same environment. We show that IOTA smart contracts add a low computational overhead while allowing to build trust within the multi-robot system. The proposed approach effectively enables byzantine robot detection based on the comparison of images submitted by the different robots and detection of anomalies and changes between them.
summary: Multiple opportunities lie at the intersection of multi-robot systems and distributed ledger technologies (DLTs). In this work, we investigate the potential of new DLT solutions such as IOTA, for detecting anomalies and byzantine agents in multi-robot systems in a decentralized manner. Traditional blockchain approaches are not applicable to real-world networked and decentralized robotic systems where connectivity conditions are not ideal. To address this, we leverage recent advances in partition-tolerant and byzantine-tolerant collaborative decision-making processes with IOTA smart contracts. We show how our work in vision-based anomaly and change detection can be applied to detecting byzantine agents within multiple robots operating in the same environment. We show that IOTA smart contracts add a low computational overhead while allowing to build trust within the multi-robot system. The proposed approach effectively enables byzantine robot detection based on the comparison of images submitted by the different robots and detection of anomalies and changes between them.
abstract_zh: 多机器人系统和分布式账本技术（DLT）的交叉存在多种机会。在这项工作中，我们研究了新的 DLT 解决方案（例如 IOTA）的潜力，以分散的方式检测多机器人系统中的异常和拜占庭代理。传统的区块链方法不适用于连接条件不理想的现实世界网络和去中心化机器人系统。为了解决这个问题，我们利用 IOTA 智能合约在分区容忍和拜占庭容忍协作决策过程方面的最新进展。我们展示了我们在基于视觉的异常和变化检测方面的工作如何应用于检测在同一环境中运行的多个机器人中的拜占庭代理。我们表明，IOTA 智能合约增加了较低的计算开销，同时允许在多机器人系统内建立信任。该方法基于比较不同机器人提交的图像并检测它们之间的异常和变化，有效地实现了拜占庭式机器人检测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用IOTA智能合约在多机器人系统中实现基于视觉的拜占庭代理检测，以解决传统区块链在实际环境中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统区块链技术因计算开销大且无法适应多机器人系统的网络不稳定特性，难以有效检测拜占庭故障。需探索更适用于分布式机器人环境的分布式账本技术（DLT）方案。
AI.method: 结合IOTA智能合约的分区容忍性和拜占庭容错特性，通过多机器人视觉数据对比与异常变化检测，实现去中心化的拜占庭代理识别。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能以低计算开销有效检测拜占庭机器人，通过图像比对和异常识别建立系统内信任机制。
AI.conclusion: IOTA智能合约为多机器人系统提供了高效、去中心化的拜占庭检测方案，验证了其在分布式协作中的可行性。

authors_text: Yiheng Han,Irvin Haozhe Zhan,Long Zeng,Yu-Ping Wang,Ran Yi,Minjing Yu,Matthieu Gaetan Lin,Jenny Sheng,Yong-Jin Liu
title: PCKRF: Point Cloud Completion and Keypoint Refinement With Fusion Data for 6D Pose Estimation
title_zh: PCKRF：使用融合数据进行点云补全和关键点细化以进行 6D 姿态估计
abstract: Some robust point cloud registration approaches with controllable pose refinement magnitude, such as ICP and its variants, are commonly used to improve 6D pose estimation accuracy. However, the effectiveness of these methods gradually diminishes with the advancement of deep learning techniques and the enhancement of initial pose accuracy, primarily due to their lack of specific design for pose refinement. In this paper, we propose Point Cloud Completion and Keypoint Refinement with Fusion Data (PCKRF), a new pose refinement pipeline for 6D pose estimation. The pipeline consists of two steps. First, it completes the input point clouds via a novel pose-sensitive point completion network. The network uses both local and global features with pose information during point completion. Then, it registers the completed object point cloud with the corresponding target point cloud by our proposed Color supported Iterative KeyPoint (CIKP) method. The CIKP method introduces color information into registration and registers a point cloud around each keypoint to increase stability. The PCKRF pipeline can be integrated with existing popular 6D pose estimation methods, such as the full flow bidirectional fusion network, to further improve their pose estimation accuracy. Experiments demonstrate that our method exhibits superior stability compared to existing approaches when optimizing initial poses with relatively high precision. Notably, the results indicate that our method effectively complements most existing pose estimation techniques, leading to improved performance in most cases. Furthermore, our method achieves promising results even in challenging scenarios involving textureless and symmetrical objects. Our source code is available at https://github.com/zhanhz/KRF.
summary: Some robust point cloud registration approaches with controllable pose refinement magnitude, such as ICP and its variants, are commonly used to improve 6D pose estimation accuracy. However, the effectiveness of these methods gradually diminishes with the advancement of deep learning techniques and the enhancement of initial pose accuracy, primarily due to their lack of specific design for pose refinement. In this paper, we propose Point Cloud Completion and Keypoint Refinement with Fusion Data (PCKRF), a new pose refinement pipeline for 6D pose estimation. The pipeline consists of two steps. First, it completes the input point clouds via a novel pose-sensitive point completion network. The network uses both local and global features with pose information during point completion. Then, it registers the completed object point cloud with the corresponding target point cloud by our proposed Color supported Iterative KeyPoint (CIKP) method. The CIKP method introduces color information into registration and registers a point cloud around each keypoint to increase stability. The PCKRF pipeline can be integrated with existing popular 6D pose estimation methods, such as the full flow bidirectional fusion network, to further improve their pose estimation accuracy. Experiments demonstrate that our method exhibits superior stability compared to existing approaches when optimizing initial poses with relatively high precision. Notably, the results indicate that our method effectively complements most existing pose estimation techniques, leading to improved performance in most cases. Furthermore, our method achieves promising results even in challenging scenarios involving textureless and symmetrical objects. Our source code is available at https://github.com/zhanhz/KRF.
abstract_zh: 一些具有可控位姿细化幅度的鲁棒点云配准方法（例如 ICP 及其变体）通常用于提高 6D 位姿估计精度。然而，随着深度学习技术的进步和初始姿态精度的提高，这些方法的有效性逐渐减弱，这主要是由于它们缺乏针对姿态细化的具体设计。在本文中，我们提出了点云完成和融合数据关键点细化（PCKRF），这是一种用于 6D 姿态估计的新姿态细化管道。该管道由两个步骤组成。首先，它通过新颖的姿势敏感点完成网络完成输入点云。该网络在点完成过程中使用带有姿态信息的局部和全局特征。然后，它通过我们提出的颜色支持迭代关键点（CIKP）方法将完成的对象点云与相应的目标点云注册。 CIKP方法将颜色信息引入配准中，并在每个关键点周围配准点云以增加稳定性。 PCKRF管道可以与现有流行的6D位姿估计方法（例如全流双向融合网络）集成，以进一步提高其位姿估计精度。实验表明，在以相对较高的精度优化初始位姿时，我们的方法与现有方法相比表现出卓越的稳定性。值得注意的是，结果表明我们的方法有效地补充了大多数现有的姿态估计技术，从而在大多数情况下提高了性能。此外，即使在涉及无纹理和对称物体的挑战性场景中，我们的方法也取得了有希望的结果。我们的源代码可在 https://github.com/zhanhz/KRF 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PCKRF方法，通过融合点云补全和关键点优化，提升6D位姿估计的精度与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 传统位姿优化方法（如ICP）在深度学习时代因初始位姿精度提升和缺乏针对性设计而效果下降，需开发更鲁棒的融合数据管道。
AI.method: 分两步：1）基于位姿敏感网络完成点云补全，融合局部/全局特征；2）通过引入颜色信息的CIKP方法，围绕关键点进行点云配准。
AI.result: 在高精度初始位姿优化中表现更稳定，兼容主流方法并提升性能，尤其在无纹理/对称物体等挑战场景效果显著。
AI.conclusion: PCKRF通过数据融合与关键点优化有效弥补现有技术缺陷，为6D位姿估计提供可靠解决方案。
